Roland.Buff/B_Roland_2_S_Description:
When using a single-target attack skill, deal an additional &a damage to the target and apply the "Bleed" debuff with a <sprite=1> &b% success rate.
Reduces by 1 stack upon trigger.
Roland.Buff/B_Roland_4_T_Description: Reduces by 1 stack after receiving or performing an attack.
Roland.Buff/B_Roland_6_T_Description: When attacked by the skill "Atelier Logic" or its derived skills, Chance to Receive Critical Hits is increased by 10% and Critical Damage Taken is increased by 25%.
Roland.Buff/B_Roland_9_S_Description: Reduces by 1 stack upon receiving an attack.
Roland.Buff/B_Roland_Equip_0_Description: When stacked to 2, the next attack/healing skill's damage/healing is increased by 20%.
Roland.Buff/B_Roland_LucyD_S_Description: The next use of "Gloves of Black Silence" will display all exclusive skills.
Roland.Buff/B_Roland_P_RES_Description: The cost of "Gloves of Black Silence" is increased by 1.
Roland.Buff/B_Roland_Rare_S_Description: Gain 1 stack of "Black Count" when using your own exclusive basic skills (max 1 stack per skill type).
Roland.Character/Roland_PassiveDes: Fixed Ability is locked to "Gloves of Black Silence". When used, display 3 random exclusive skills and choose one to generate.
Roland.Character/Roland_SelectInfo:
A... Fixer? Librarian? Servant? — from a Library of another world, who accidentally wandered into the Twisted Land. Regardless, all those titles refer to him.
To find a way back to the Library and fulfill a promise made to a "friend", he has decided to travel alongside the expedition and explore the Twisted Land together.

Roland can use "Gloves of Black Silence" to acquire skills best suited for the current battlefield situation, making him a highly flexible damage-dealing character.
Roland.Character/Roland_Text_Battle_AllyND_0: Be careful — watch yourself. (This isn't the Library...)
Roland.Character/Roland_Text_Battle_AllyND_1: ...Let's wrap this up sooner rather than later.
Roland.Character/Roland_Text_Battle_Cri_1: You call that an attack? I can handle that no problem.
Roland.Character/Roland_Text_Battle_Healed_1: Is this some kind of Singularity technology?
Roland.Character/Roland_Text_Battle_Idle_0: Come on, follow along: breathe in~~ breathe out~~
Roland.Character/Roland_Text_Battle_Kill_1: Especially at times like these, you have to stay calm and think clearly.
Roland.Character/Roland_Text_Battle_ND_0: Got careless for a moment... That's not like me. Not like me at all.
Roland.Character/Roland_Text_Battle_ND_1: I... can't believe I've been pushed this far...? How embarrassing...
Roland.Character/Roland_Text_Battle_Start_0: "Tremble in endless fear!" — Ah, I suddenly felt like saying something like that.
Roland.Character/Roland_Text_Battle_Start_1: Alright then, let's give it everything we've got!
Roland.Character/Roland_Text_Field_GetItem_0: Maybe I could bring a few books back?
Roland.Character/Roland_Text_Field_Idle_0: This scenery is a lot nicer than the Outskirts.
Roland.Character/Roland_Text_Field_Idle_1: I wonder how things are going at the Library right now...
Roland.Character/Roland_Text_Field_Potion_P_0: That's got a kick to it!
Roland.Character/Roland_Text_Field_Potion_P_1: Would've been better with some beer.
Roland.Character/Roland_Text_PharosLeader_1: ...An experience comparable to assimilating with those "things".
Roland.Character/Roland_CampSelectWord: Heh, now this is a novel experience.
Roland.Item_Equip/Equip_Roland_0_Description:
Each time you use your own attack/healing skill from your hand, gain 1 stack. When stacks reach 2, the next attack/healing skill's damage/healing is increased by 20% and the count resets.

<color=#919191>This sword alone is truly his.</color>
Roland.Item_Equip/Equip_Roland_1_Description:
At the start of battle, draw one of your own skills.

<color=#919191>Do you know what it's like to vomit while wearing a mask?</color>
Roland.Item_Passive/Relic_Roland_Description:
On the first turn of battle, all allies gain +25% Attack Power, Healing Power, Armor, and Evade.

<color=#919191>"Welcome, dear Guests. I am the Director and Chief Librarian here — Angela."</color>
Roland.Skill/S_Roland_1_Description: When used, grant Swiftness to a random attack skill in hand.
Roland.Skill/S_Roland_3_Description: Alter all enemies' Taunt status and draw 1 of your own skills with priority.
Roland.Skill/S_Roland_4_Description: When used, gain a Barrier equal to half your Attack Power.
Roland.Skill/S_Roland_5_Description: Refund the Mana spent when killing an enemy.
Roland.Skill/S_Roland_6_Description: When used, generate an "Atelier Logic: Burst Fire" skill with Exclude that is discarded after 2 turns.
Roland.Skill/S_Roland_6_Plus_0_Description: When used, generate an "Atelier Logic: Scatter Shot" skill with Exclude that is discarded after 2 turns.
Roland.Skill/S_Roland_6_Plus_1_Description:
Ignores half the target's Armor.
Damage is increased by 25% when targeting an enemy afflicted with the "Atelier Logic" Weakening debuff.
Roland.Skill/S_Roland_8_Description: When killing an enemy or attacking only a single enemy, activates again at half damage.
Roland.Skill/S_Roland_9_Description: When targeting an enemy with a Countdown of 1 or 9+, Stun success rate is increased to <sprite=2> &a%.
Roland.Skill/S_Roland_LucyD_Description:
Draw two skills.
If the target is Roland, grant them the "'E.G.O'" buff; otherwise, reduce the cost of their next Fixed Ability by 1.
Roland.Skill/S_Roland_P_Description: Display 3 random exclusive basic skills at random, choose one to generate with Exclude, discarded after 2 turns.
Roland.Skill/S_Roland_R10_Description:
While possessing this skill, gain "Black Count" at the start of battle.
Ignores half the target's Armor.
After use, repeat the skill based on the current number of "Black Count" stacks, then reset "Black Count" stacks and reset the effect that grants "Black Count" from skills.
Roland.SkillExtended/SkillEn_Roland_0_Name: Display 3 of your own skills at random, choose one to generate with Exclude.
Roland.SkillExtended/SkillEn_Roland_1_EnforceSt: Skills costing 1 or more, or non-Swift 0-cost skills.
Roland.SkillExtended/SkillEn_Roland_1_Name: The next time you use your own Fixed Ability, reduce its cost by 1 and grant Swiftness (reverts after use).
Roland.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Roland_Silve: [B] How about a shooting contest? Just for fun.
[A] I'll pass. I don't have much money to spend on bullets.
Roland.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Roland_Trish: [B] Gloves with built-in storage space? Sounds incredibly useful for stealth missions.
[A] Though I personally have nothing to do with stealth.
Roland.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Roland_Ilya_: [A] Ugh — that's a strong smell of alcohol.
[B] Just vodka. Care for a bottle?
[A] I'm not sure I can handle this proof——
[A] Eh, might as well give it a shot.
Roland.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Roland_Joey_: [B] Another outsider from beyond the Ark... I'll be keeping my eye on you.
[A] Oh, I'm so grateful you didn't tear my limbs off on sight~
Roland.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Roland_Narha: [B] (This person carries such a dark past...)
Roland.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Roland_Pries: [B] Excuse me, sir, you've come a long way — might I trouble you for a few minutes of your time...
[B] Please, allow me to introduce you to our Lord——
[A] Sorry, religion's not really my thing.
Roland.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Roland_Leryn: [B] Sorry if this is a bit out of nowhere, but what's your take on the concept of a "time loop"?
[A] Actually, I know someone who's been through exactly that.
[B] And what did that person think about it?
Roland.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Roland_Sizz_: [B] What is it, Mr. Roland? Is there something on me?
[A] Just some unpleasant memories coming back.
Roland.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Roland_Johan: [B] I have a sudden feeling — you and I might be cut from the same cloth.
[A] Don't tell me you also ended up here out of nowhere?
Roland.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Roland_Huz_D: [A] Who in the world heals people with a whip?!
[B] Amazing, right?! So stop dodging it!
[A] (If this weren't some other world, I'd almost suspect that whip was a Workshop weapon from back home.)
Roland.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Roland_Azar_: [B] This is so strange... how did you even end up here...?
[A] Great question. I honestly don't know either.
[A] Though it's not exactly my first time in a situation like this.
Roland.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Roland_Pheon: [A] A talking... bird? Is it someone's pet?
[B] Who are you calling a pet?! I'm the legendary Phoenix!
Roland.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Roland_Lian_: [B] Your combat skills are quite refined.
Roland.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Roland_Red_D: [A] Twins, huh... same face, completely different personalities.
[B] Would you say the sun and the moon are the same thing?
Roland.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Roland_Blue_: [A] Magic, huh... how did you two learn it?
[B] Hmm... it's not exactly something we learned...
[B] If anything, it's more like... we picked it up?
Roland.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Roland_Hein_: [B] Hmph. Just a little compensation from the Frenzy's influence. Nothing more.
Roland.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Roland_Iron_: [A] (That tin can's defensive capability... wouldn't be surprised if she could hold her own against someone from the Zwei Association.)
[B] Wondering how I tank all those hits?
[B] It's the pride and specialty of a mercenary squad captain!
Roland.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Roland_Miss_: [B] Oh my, did I accidentally burn you?
[A] It's not quite hot enough to call a burn...
[A] Just reminded me of someone else who's a little too "fired up".
Roland.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Roland_Charo: [B] Mister, you're just oozing dark energy.
[A] Ah~ To think I've reached the age where people call me "mister"...
Roland.CharText/Enemy/Witch/Ally/Roland: My gut's telling me this is nothing good...
Roland.CharText/Enemy/Witch/Ally/Roland_Low: Cough, cough... you trying to make me cripple myself for your amusement...?

Kali_CharacterMod.Buff/B_Kail_P_Description:
Every 3 stacks, all Counter Dice values +1.
Once per battle, at the start of a turn, if stacks reach 4/8, Discover an Emotion Card. After the character reaches level 4, Discover an additional Emotion Card when stacks reach 13.
Kali_CharacterMod.Buff/B_Kail_CounterDices_Description: When attacked, use the top 1 Counter Die against the attacker. If there are 3 or more dice, use 2 instead.
Kali_CharacterMod.SkillKeyword/KeyWord_Kail_Desc: This "die" is stored in the "Counter Dice Pool." When attacked, the top 1 Counter Die is used against the attacker. If there are 3 or more dice, 2 are used instead. Each die deals damage equal to (a random number within its range) + (bonus value) when activated.
Kali_CharacterMod.Item_Equip/Equip_Kail_1_Description:
After using a skill that costs 4 or more Mana, restore 2 Mana.
<color=#919191>Onrush!</color>
Kali_CharacterMod.Item_Equip/Equip_Kail_3_Description:
Retaliate: Gain the Counter Dice Pool. At the start of every 2 turns, gain 1 Counter Die (4~8). (Shared among all characters.) &a
The Strongest: For each level, all Counter Die power +1. (Does not stack.) &a
<color=#919191>Though the prototype E.G.O. is weaker than those later extracted by Lobotomy Corporation, Kali's pride in her skill and strength allows her to draw out the full power contained within Mimicry.</color>
Kali_CharacterMod.Item_Equip/Equip_Kail_B1_Description:
The wearer takes Pain damage equal to 20% of Max. Health each turn.
<color=#919191>——The Small Beak whispers. On and on it goes...</color>
Kali_CharacterMod.Item_Equip/Equip_Kail_B2_Description:
Pain damage received is reduced by 25%.
<color=#919191>——The Long Arm conceals time.</color>
Kali_CharacterMod.Item_Equip/Equip_Kail_B3_Description:
Taunt all enemies at the start of battle.
<color=#919191>——The Giant Eye blots out the light.</color>
Kali_CharacterMod.Item_Equip/Equip_Kail_Bird_Description: Skills deal 70% damage and inflict an equal amount of Pain damage. The great bird's ever-open eye, the high bird's scales that weigh all sins, the small bird's maw that devours all things — these three uphold the peace of the Black Forest.
Kali_CharacterMod.Item_Passive/Relic_Kail_Bird_Description:
Maximum Health +7
Attack Power +7%
Healing Power +7%
Armor +7%
Max. Mana +1
<color=#919191>The forest... has returned to its quiet peace.</color>
Kali_CharacterMod.RandomEvent/Event_Kail_Bird_Desc: You took the three "eggs" from the Last Bird. The Last Bird lies there, completely still.
Kali_CharacterMod.RandomEvent/Event_Kail_Bird_EventDetails: You took the three "eggs" from the Last Bird. The Last Bird lies there, completely still. Something seems off.
Kali_CharacterMod.RandomEvent/Event_Kail_Bird_UseButton_0: Leave the "eggs" behind and watch what happens.
Kali_CharacterMod.RandomEvent/Event_Kail_Bird_UseButton_1: Stay behind the "eggs" and observe carefully.
Kali_CharacterMod.RandomEvent/Event_Kail_Bird_UseButton_2: Use the protection of the "eggs" to see if there's anything worth taking.
Kali_CharacterMod.RandomEvent/Event_Kail_Bird_UseButtonToo: Submit "Giant Eye," "Small Beak," and "Long Arm" to receive the Relic "Pale Dusk."
Submit "Giant Eye," "Small Beak," and "Long Arm" to receive the weapon "Pale Dusk."
Submit "Giant Eye," "Small Beak," and "Long Arm" to choose one of three Hero-quality equipment.
Kali_CharacterMod.RandomEvent/Event_Kail_Bird_OrderStrings: The Last Bird vanished. The light it emanated transformed the three "eggs" into wings.
The Last Bird vanished. The light it emanated transformed the three "eggs" into a weapon.
Some equipment was found near the Last Bird. Take one and get away from this monster's remains.
Kali_CharacterMod.Character/Kail_PassiveDes:
Using cards in battle grants the Zeal buff.
Retaliate: Gain the Counter Dice Pool. At the start of every 2 turns, gain 1 Counter Die (4~8).
The Strongest: For each level, all Counter Die damage +1.
Kali_CharacterMod.Character/Kail_SelectInfo:
A Color Fixer, Fixer, Librarian — from a Library in another world, arriving in the Twisted Lands by chance. Whatever the title, they all refer to her.
In search of a way to obtain the "Light," she has decided to travel with the investigation team and explore the Twisted Lands together.

Kali can accumulate "Counter Dice" by using skills, releasing them upon being attacked to strike back at enemies.
After activating skills multiple times, she can Discover "Emotion Cards" to gain special enhancements during the current battle.
Kali_CharacterMod.Character/Kail_Text_Battle_ND_0: I'm really... not as strong as I used to be.
Kali_CharacterMod.Character/Kail_Text_Battle_ND_1: Disappointing. Not much I can do.
Kali_CharacterMod.Character/Kail_Text_Battle_ND_2: Damn. I refuse to go out like this...
Kali_CharacterMod.Character/Kail_Text_Battle_AllyND_0: Don't stop even if someone falls.
Kali_CharacterMod.Character/Kail_Text_Battle_AllyND_1: Hold it together. Don't fall apart just because we've lost someone.
Kali_CharacterMod.Character/Kail_Text_Battle_AllyND_2: Save the grieving for when this is all over.
Kali_CharacterMod.Character/Kail_Text_Battle_AllyND_3: Don't let their sacrifice go to waste. Right?
Kali_CharacterMod.Character/Kail_Text_Battle_AllyND_4: Revenge is fine, but keep your anger in check. Stay calm.
Kali_CharacterMod.Character/Kail_Text_Battle_Kill_0: Not quite what I used to be, but it's enough.
Kali_CharacterMod.Character/Kail_Text_Battle_Kill_1: Make up for what your body lacks with your head.
Kali_CharacterMod.Character/Kail_Text_Battle_Kill_2: You really thought you could take me with that? Give me a break.
Kali_CharacterMod.Character/Kail_Text_Battle_Start_0: Everyone ready? Let's knock them around good.
Kali_CharacterMod.Character/Kail_Text_Battle_Start_1: Only cowards back down from a fight.
Kali_CharacterMod.Character/Kail_Text_Battle_Start_2: This body still isn't nearly as strong as before... I'm still not used to it.
Kali_CharacterMod.Character/Kail_Text_Battle_Cri_1: One moment of carelessness and you're dead.
Kali_CharacterMod.Character/Kail_Text_Battle_Healed_1: Is this some kind of Singularity technology?
Kali_CharacterMod.Character/Kail_Text_Field_Idle_0: This scenery beats the Backstreets by a mile.
Kali_CharacterMod.Character/Kail_Text_Field_Idle_1: I wonder what things are like back there now...
Kali_CharacterMod.Character/Kail_Text_Field_GetItem_0: Keep a good hold of that.
Kali_CharacterMod.Character/Kail_Text_Field_Potion_P_0: Reminds me of the first time I had coffee.
Kali_CharacterMod.Character/Kail_Text_Field_Potion_P_1: Would be better with a beer.
Kali_CharacterMod.Character/Kail_Text_PharosLeader_0: You can give me the "Light"? You better not be lying...
Kali_CharacterMod.Character/Kail_Text_PharosLeader_1: Anyone else want to come after my people?
Kali_CharacterMod.Item_Passive/Relic_Kail_1_Description:
Standby count +2
Exchange count +2
All skill Countdowns +1; the topmost skill is unaffected.
&a
<color=#919191>We have yet to find anyone capable of wielding this weapon. However, we have observed that it absorbs the red mist of the Twisted Lands and emits a strange sound, almost like...</color>
Kali_CharacterMod.SkillExtended/SkillEn_Kail_1_EnforceStri: Skills that cost 1 or more Mana, or non-Swiftness 0-cost skills
Kali_CharacterMod.Skill/S_Kail_2_Description:
When used, use the bottom 1 Counter Die from the Counter Dice Pool against the target.
If the target has a Pain debuff, draw a skill.
Kali_CharacterMod.Skill/S_Kail_3_Description:
On kill, use this skill again on a random target.
Triggers an effect based on the target's debuffs:
Weakening <sprite=0>: Guaranteed hit.
CC <sprite=2>: Damage increased by 20%.
Pain <sprite=1>: Restore HP equal to 10% of damage dealt.
Kali_CharacterMod.Skill/S_Kail_4_Description: The Barrier value equals Healing Power.
Kali_CharacterMod.Skill/S_Kail_5_Description:
This skill's cost equals your current Mana. (Does not apply while a Countdown is active.)
Repeats based on Mana spent, with each hit dealing 10% more damage.
Kali_CharacterMod.Skill/S_Kail_6_Description: The Counter Die value is (Attack Power × 0.4) ~ (Attack Power × 1.1).
Kali_CharacterMod.Skill/S_Kail_7_Description: When played from hand, Discard the bottommost skill in your hand.
Kali_CharacterMod.Buff/B_Kail_7_S_Description: Counter Dice attack all enemies at 65% damage. If there is only one enemy, damage is unchanged.
Kali_CharacterMod.Buff/B_Kail_7_T_Description:
Prioritizes attacking Kali.
Removed when attacking this target.
Kali_CharacterMod.Skill/S_Kail_8_Description: Deal &a Pain damage to all characters and apply the Bloodthirst buff. Damage to enemies is doubled; restore HP equal to &b (8 + Healing Power × 5)% of damage dealt to self. When Discarded or Exchanged, deal &c Pain damage to yourself and apply the Bloodthirst buff to all characters. "Can the craving for blood truly be cast aside?"
Kali_CharacterMod.Skill/S_Kail_EC_1_Description:
Choose an ally.
If that character's HP is at or below 50%/35%/25%/0%, Attack Power +15%/25%/35%/50%.

<color=#EC160D>——At fifteen, sharpening an axe replaced picking wildflowers as an ordinary part of my life.</color>
Kali_CharacterMod.Skill/S_Kail_EC_2_Description:
Restore 2~6 HP when using a Counter Die.

<color=#8EEC90>——It had been so long since I'd tasted meat this fresh. Since then, it's gotten harder and harder to hold back. But that's fine — I'm a big, bad wolf.</color>
Kali_CharacterMod.Skill/S_Kail_EC_3_Description: Add a copy of Smile with Exclude and cost -2 to your hand. Debuff Resist -10%. The maximum stack count of "Dread" +1; when "Dread" debuff stacks reach 5, additionally reduce Attack Power by 10%. ——The more corpses there were, the larger it grew. And it was never satisfied.
Kali_CharacterMod.Skill/S_Kail_EC_4_Description:
Choose an ally.
All negative status resistances +35%.

<color=#8EEC90>——Despite wearing a human face, it was no human. At regular intervals, it would devour the staff it interacted with, then don their husks. In the process, its bones and organs would twist into a knot, taking on a grotesquely warped shape.</color>
Kali_CharacterMod.Skill/S_Kail_EC_5_Description:
Choose an ally.
For every 1 point of Speed that character has, their Attack Power +1, up to 3 points.

<color=#8EEC90>——If it perceived its surroundings as dirty and disorderly, its negative mood indicator would light up immediately, triggering a full-scale cleaning mode.</color>
Kali_CharacterMod.Skill/S_Kail_EC_6_Description:
Attack Lifesteal +60%, Healing Received -50%.

<color=#EC160D>——What was more terrifying was that it was mimicking humans. Looking in the mirror, muttering to itself, adjusting its bone structure. Every bit of it looked like an imitation of "us."</color>
Kali_CharacterMod.Skill/S_Kail_EC_7_Description:
Gain 1 count each time a skill is used from hand, up to 13 counts. When count reaches 13, all allies gain Attack Power +13%, Critical Hit Chance +13%, Accuracy +13%, Critical Damage +13%, Standby +13, and deal additional 13% Pain damage. Counts are cleared at the end of the turn.

<color=#8EEC90>——I know absolute solitude. Share in the silence; reap what is owed. When the original returns, you shall pay the price.</color>
Kali_CharacterMod.Skill/S_Kail_EC_8_Description:
Choose an ally.
When that character would receive fatal damage, negate the damage and restore 5 HP, then remove this effect.

<color=#EC160D>——Finally, sprinkle on the beloved cinnamon, and hold the pumpkin close.</color>
Kali_CharacterMod.Skill/S_Kail_EC_9_Description:
Maximum HP -50%. Gain one Counter Die (2~6) each turn.

<color=#EC160D>——My head's about to explode. See ya.</color>
Kali_CharacterMod.Skill/S_Kail_EC_10_Description:
Choose an ally.
At the start of each turn, randomly Taunt one enemy (<sprite=2>100%).

<color=#EC160D>——These shoes are colorless. But they'll be stained red soon enough.</color>
Kali_CharacterMod.Skill/S_Kail_EC_11_Description:
Evade -20%. When using a Counter Die, apply 0~2 stacks of Bleeding to a target (<sprite=0>100%).

<color=#EC160D>——Research indicates the spores contain bee eggs capable of hatching inside a host.</color>
Kali_CharacterMod.Skill/S_Kail_EC_12_Description:
Choose an ally.
After Standby, that character's Overload -1.

<color=#8EEC90>Memory strengthens the will.
May 15, Year 1 A.A.</color>
Kali_CharacterMod.Skill/S_Kail_EC_13_Description:
Whenever a card is played, discard the top skill in hand to restore 1 Mana.

<color=#EC160D>——When he returned, there was a long scar across his forehead. When asked if he had healed, he only said his head felt lighter.</color>
Kali_CharacterMod.Skill/S_Kail_EC_14_Description:
If that character's HP is at or below 40%, apply 1 stack of "Dread" debuff to all enemies when hit (<sprite=0>90%).

<color=#EC160D>——A mountain of corpses. The dead wore smiles, joined together as one, sharing each other's severed limbs.</color>
Kali_CharacterMod.Skill/S_Kail_EC_15_Description:
Each time that character is healed for 100% of their Max. Health, bonus Attack Damage +1 and Weakening Accuracy +5% (up to 3 times).

<color=#8EEC90>——All it ever wanted was human flesh soaked in blood. The mere scent of blood would send it charging.</color>
Kali_CharacterMod.Skill/S_Kail_EC_16_Description:
Pain Accuracy +20%. When using a Counter Die, apply 1 stack of "Bleeding" debuff to the primary target (<sprite=1>70%).
Each stack of Pain debuff on enemies grants that character 2% Armor.

<color=#EC160D>——Long ago, these vicious claws tore open the bellies of countless creatures, ripping their innards apart one by one.</color>
Kali_CharacterMod.Skill/S_Kail_EC_17_Description:
Choose an ally.
Odd turns: Healing Received -10%.
Even turns: Healing Received +30%.

<color=#EC160D>——They wandered. As if searching for something, yet unsure what they truly wanted.</color>
Kali_CharacterMod.Skill/S_Kail_EC_18_Description:
"Bleeding" <sprite=1> debuff damage is doubled.

<color=#8EEC90>——...Thirsty, never satisfied.</color>
Kali_CharacterMod.Skill/S_Kail_EC_19_Description:
When Emotion Cards are discovered during this battle, discover all Emotion Cards of that tier.

<color=#8EEC90>——Though it kept a human shape, a single drop of blood would transform it into a savage beast, rampaging through a frenzied, blood-red night.</color>
Kali_CharacterMod.Skill/S_Kail_EC_20_Description:
At the end of the turn, double the value of the last Counter Die in the Counter Dice Pool, then add one Counter Die (3~6).

<color=#8EEC90>——Once you confirm it can walk upright, there is only one thing left to do. Straighten your posture, press your palms together, pray to whatever god you believe in, and watch what happens.</color>
Kali_CharacterMod.Skill/S_Kail_EC_21_Description:
CC Accuracy +70%. Whenever a character gains a CC debuff, CC Resist +5%; after this triggers 4 times cumulatively, the next time an allied character receives a CC debuff it is immediately removed and this effect resets.

<color=#8EEC90>——A wolf must never cross the line when doing wrong; the wolf deserves to be punished; the wolf is always a bad example...</color>
Kali_CharacterMod.Skill/S_Kail_EC_22_Description:
Choose an ally: the first time they hit an enemy each turn, apply the "Focus Fire" debuff to that enemy (<sprite=0>80%) and remove the "Focus Fire" debuff from all other enemies.

<color=#8EEC90>——The wolf's miserable death was the one thing in my life I ever truly loved.</color>
Kali_CharacterMod.Skill/S_Kail_EC_23_Description:
When attacked, use an additional Counter Die.


<color=#EC160D>——Neither of us will come out victorious, let alone celebrate. I just want to tear that mongrel apart in a way more brutal and agonizing than the last.</color>
Kali_CharacterMod.Buff/B_Kail_EC_1_Description:
If that character's HP is at or below 50%/35%/25%/0%, Attack Power +15%/25%/35%/50%.

<color=#EC160D>...These scars make my skin crawl and my teeth chatter.</color>
Kali_CharacterMod.Buff/B_Kail_EC_2_Description:
Restore 2~6 HP when using a Counter Die.

A foul scent... calling out to me...
Kali_CharacterMod.Buff/B_Kail_EC_3_Description:
The maximum stack count of "Dread" +1. When "Dread" <sprite=0> debuff stacks reach 5, additionally reduce Attack Power by 10%.

<color=#EC160D>Must... come back... together... as one...</color>
Kali_CharacterMod.Buff/B_Kail_EC_5_Description:
For every 1 point of Speed that character has, their Attack Power +1, up to 3 points.

<color=#8EEC90>Need help, meow? This little helper can do anything for you.</color>
Kali_CharacterMod.Buff/B_Kail_EC_6_Description:
Attack Lifesteal +60%.

<color=#EC160D>Hell... ni... hell? Ni... hello?</color>
Kali_CharacterMod.Buff/B_Kail_EC_7_Description:
Gain 1 count each time a skill is used from hand, up to 13 counts. When count reaches 13, all allies gain Attack Power +13%, Critical Hit Chance +13%, Accuracy +13%, Critical Damage +13%, Standby +13, and deal additional 13% Pain damage. Counts are cleared at the end of the turn.
Count: &a

<color=#8EEC90>I share the silence. You pay the price.</color>
Kali_CharacterMod.Buff/B_Kail_EC_7_Ex_Description:
Deals additional 13% Pain damage.

<color=#EC160D>Time stops, and silence follows. What difference is there between the two.</color>
Kali_CharacterMod.Buff/B_Kail_EC_8_Description:
When that character would receive fatal damage, negate the damage and restore 5 HP, then remove this effect.

<color=#EC160D>Now, by my side... only these children remain.</color>
Kali_CharacterMod.Buff/B_Kail_EC_9_Description:
Gain one Counter Die (2~6) each turn.

<color=#EC160D>Once you've had a taste, there's no escaping it.</color>
Kali_CharacterMod.Buff/B_Kail_EC_10_Description:
At the start of each turn, randomly Taunt one enemy (<sprite=2>100%).

<color=#EC160D>Kill that person... and the shoes are yours.</color>
Kali_CharacterMod.Buff/B_Kail_EC_11_Description:
When using a Counter Die, apply 0~2 stacks of Bleeding to a target (<sprite=1>100%).

<color=#EC160D>While you still have the chance, take a good look at that blue sky.</color>
Kali_CharacterMod.Buff/B_Kail_EC_12_Description:
After Standby, that character's Overload -1.

<color=#8EEC90>"Even though you deceived me for so long..."</color>
Kali_CharacterMod.Buff/B_Kail_EC_13_Description:
Whenever a card is played, discard the top skill in hand to restore 1 Mana.

<color=#EC160D>What would it feel like... to be a sage... To know everything, I suppose...?</color>
Kali_CharacterMod.Buff/B_Kail_EC_14_Description:
If that character's HP is at or below 40%, apply 1 stack of "Dread" debuff to all enemies when hit (<sprite=0>90%).

<color=#EC160D>Help each other... become hands... and feet...</color>
Kali_CharacterMod.Buff/B_Kail_EC_15_Description:
Each time that character is healed for 100% of their Max. Health, bonus Attack Damage +1 and Weakening Accuracy +5% (up to 3 times).

<color=#8EEC90>The scent... is it... over here...</color>
Kali_CharacterMod.Buff/B_Kail_EC_16_Description:
When using a Counter Die, apply 1 stack of "Bleeding" debuff to the primary target (<sprite=1>70%).
Each stack of Pain debuff on enemies grants that character 2% Armor.

<color=#EC160D>Because a wolf is a creature that does only wicked things and deserves to be punished...</color>
Kali_CharacterMod.Buff/B_Kail_EC_17_Description:
Odd turns: Healing Received -10%.
Even turns: Healing Received +30%.

<color=#EC160D>Death shall dance with you all! To be swallowed whole is a fate equally just!</color>
Kali_CharacterMod.Buff/B_Kail_EC_18_Description:
"Bleeding" <sprite=1> debuff damage is doubled.

<color=#8EEC90>Dinnertime! Revel in the blood-red night, mad and ecstatic!</color>
Kali_CharacterMod.Buff/B_Kail_EC_19_Description:
When Emotion Cards are discovered during this battle, discover all Emotion Cards of that tier.

<color=#8EEC90>Ravenous, drink it all down in one go.</color>
Kali_CharacterMod.Buff/B_Kail_EC_20_Description:
At the end of the turn, double the value of the last Counter Die in the Counter Dice Pool, then add one Counter Die (3~6).

<color=#8EEC90>Eek... bleurgh... eek bleurgh... Save me!!!</color>
Kali_CharacterMod.Buff/B_Kail_EC_21_Description:
Whenever a character gains a CC debuff, CC Resist +5%; after this triggers 4 times cumulatively, the next time an allied character receives a CC debuff it is immediately removed and this effect resets.

<color=#8EEC90>Since that's what people call me, then that must be what I am... The old fairy tales are never wrong...</color>
Kali_CharacterMod.Buff/B_Kail_EC_22_Description:
The first time each turn that character hits an enemy, apply the "Focus Fire" debuff to that enemy (<sprite=0>80%) and remove the "Focus Fire" debuff from all other enemies.

<color=#8EEC90>Fix your eyes on your prey and take that step forward with absolute conviction to kill.</color>
Kali_CharacterMod.Buff/B_Kail_EC_23_Description:
Use one additional Counter Die when attacked.

<color=#EC160D>Every wound is to better understand the opponent. Now, it's time to collect the debt.</color>
Kali_CharacterMod.SkillKeyword/KeyWord_Kail_EC_Desc: This skill only appears when Kali's Zeal reaches a certain number of stacks. Selecting this skill grants Kali the corresponding bonus.
Kali_CharacterMod.Skill/S_Kail_EC_SP1_Description:
Choose an ally.
Draw 3 skills. At the start of the next turn, remove all skills in hand; for each skill removed, gain Attack Power +10%, Healing Power +10%, and Armor +5%, then draw 1 skill.

<color=#EC160D>——A brooding fool. A pitiful clown. It had not even a brave little beast to point the way, yet stepped forward all the same, for no reason at all.</color>.

<color=#919191>This is a Rare Card.</color>
Kali_CharacterMod.Skill/S_Kail_EC_SP2_Description:
Choose an ally.
Damage Taken +2~4, immune to Pain damage, and damage received cannot exceed 25% of Max. Health. Maximum Mana +1.

<color=#EC160D>——The day the great bird's eyes that could see hundreds of miles, the tall bird's scales that could judge any sin, and the small bird's maw that could devour all living things became one — calamity fell upon the forest.</color>.

<color=#919191>This is a Rare Card.</color>
Kali_CharacterMod.Skill/S_Kail_EC_SP3_Description:
Choose an ally.
Directly defeat all other allied characters. Healing Received -10%, cards drawn per turn +1. For each allied character in a Fainted state, Maximum Mana +1, Damage Taken -10%, Attack Power +17%, Healing Power +20%, Faint Resist +25%, Speed +1.


<color=#EC160D>——The more corpses there were, the larger it grew. And it was never satisfied.</color>

<color=#919191>This is a Rare Card.</color>
Kali_CharacterMod.Skill/S_Kail_EC_SP4_Description:
All characters' Armor -75% for this battle.

<color=#EC160D>——The marksman noticed that the demon which had shadowed him all his days was gone. He sought the reason, and realized his soul had been in hell from the very start.</color>

<color=#919191>This is a Rare Card.</color>
Kali_CharacterMod.Buff/B_Kail_EC_SP1_Description: <color=#EC160D>An empty heart, an empty mind. The more so, the more fear fades away.</color>.
Kali_CharacterMod.Buff/B_Kail_EC_SP2_Description:
Damage Taken +2~4, immune to Pain damage, and damage received cannot exceed 25% of Max. Health.

<color=#EC160D>Must find it quickly. Can't let the beast run loose here...</color>.
Kali_CharacterMod.Buff/B_Kail_EC_SP3_Description:
Cards drawn per turn +1. For each allied character in a Fainted state, at the start of each turn: Mana +1, Damage Taken -10%, Attack Power +17%, Healing Power +20%, Faint Resist +25%, Speed +1.

<color=#EC160D>Must...become...one...again...</color>
Kali_CharacterMod.Buff/B_Kail_EC_SP4_Description:
All characters' Armor -75% for this battle.

<color=#EC160D>The demon gazes upon despair.</color>
Kali_CharacterMod.Skill/S_Kail_LucyD_Description:
Preferentially draw a skill from a target.
If Kali is alive, add Counter Dice (4~8) to Kali equal to the number of other surviving allies.
Kali_CharacterMod.Buff/B_Kail_R10_S_Description:
When using a Counter Die, chain-heal for 30% of the die's value.
Loses 1 stack when hit.
<color=#919191>The blood fog rises...</color>
Kali_CharacterMod.SkillKeyword/KeyWord_Kail_R10_Desc:
In Blood Fog difficulty and when possessing the "<color=#EC160D>Blood Fog</color>" relic, the "Blood Fog Rising" buff receives additional enhancements.
<color=#EC160D>Blood Fog 1</color>: Armor additionally +5%.
<color=#EC160D>Blood Fog 2</color>: Healing Gauge Protection.
<color=#EC160D>Blood Fog 3</color>: When "Crimson Haze" is drawn, draw 1 card and gain 1 Mana.
<color=#EC160D>Blood Fog 4</color>: Gain buffs equal to the buffs Blood Fog grants enemies.
<color=#EC160D>Mimicry Synergy</color>: Does not consume stacks when hit.
<color=#919191>This level of "fog"...</color>
Kali_CharacterMod.Skill/S_Kail_R11_Description: Use all Counter Dice in the Counter Dice Pool against a random enemy.
Kali_CharacterMod.Skill/S_Kail_R12_Description: Display 5 skills from all investigators that target enemies, and choose one as the source material. After this effect activates twice, generate the skill "Mimicry", whose effects are based on the chosen source material. "Don't you also need the shell of another."
Kali_CharacterMod.Buff/B_Kail_R12_Description:
"Mimicry" costs 1 less Mana and has Swiftness.
<color=#919191>A hard, dense substance appears over the sturdy armor... it envelops me like fog.</color>
Kali_CharacterMod.SkillKeyword/KeyWord_Kail_R12_Desc: "Mimicry Simulation" is a multi-target attack with a base 10% attack multiplier and 20% Accuracy. It inherits the cost and all effects of the chosen skill, but only gains half of the chosen skill's attack multiplier / damage bonus / healing multiplier / healing bonus / Accuracy / Critical Hit Chance. If the chosen skill has Swiftness, the attack multiplier gains an additional +10%.
Kali_CharacterMod.System/Item/Equip_Kail_3: Red Mist Legend: When discovering a Tier 3 Emotion Card, a special card may appear instead. (Kali only.)
Kali_CharacterMod.System/Item/Relic_Kail_1_0: It seems like there are additional effects in Blood Fog difficulty...?
Kali_CharacterMod.System/Item/Relic_Kail_1_1: <color=#EC160D>Blood Fog 1</color>: Blood Fog's enemy buffs change to +40% Max. Health and +1 Attack Power. All allies gain +15% Attack Power and Healing Power.
Kali_CharacterMod.System/Item/Relic_Kail_1_2: <color=#EC160D>Blood Fog 2</color>: Gain a Normal Skill Book.
Kali_CharacterMod.System/Item/Relic_Kail_1_3: <color=#EC160D>Blood Fog 3</color>: Gain a Golden Skill Book. Add one Crimson Haze to the party deck.
Kali_CharacterMod.System/Item/Relic_Kail_1_4: <color=#EC160D>Blood Fog 4</color>: Blood Fog's enemy buffs change to +50% Max. Health and +1 Attack Power. Nullifies the Blood Fog 3 mechanic.
Kali_CharacterMod.System/Item/Relic_Kail_1_5: Rewards are granted upon entering a non-campfire map.
Kali_CharacterMod.System/RandomEvent/Event_Kail_Bird_Order: The Last Bird vanished, and the light it radiated transformed three "Eggs" into wings.
The Last Bird vanished, and the light it radiated transformed three "Eggs" into weapons.
Some equipment was found near the Last Bird. Take one piece and quickly leave the monster's remains behind.
Kali_CharacterMod.System/SkillSelect/S_Kail_P2: Choose an ally to receive the Emotion Card effect
Kali_CharacterMod.System/StatDesc/B_Kail_CounterDices_Desc: When attacked, use the top 1 Counter Die against the attacker. If there are 3 or more dice, use 2 instead.
Kali_CharacterMod.System/StatDesc/S_Kail_R12: A weapon that resonates with emotion, endlessly mimicking humans. All instances of "Mimicry Simulation" share the same effects and are not persistently affected by "within this battle" effects such as "Swiftness."
Kali_CharacterMod.Character_Skin/KaliSkin1_SkinDesc: Kali during her time at the research institute. It was during this period that she received the prototype E.G.O. Mimicry blade gifted by Carmen and began using it as her weapon.
Kali_CharacterMod.Character_Skin/KaliSkin1_Text_Field_Poti: Reminds me of the first time I had coffee.
Kali_CharacterMod.Character_Skin/KaliSkin1_Text_Field_GetI: Make sure you hold onto that.

暝 Dusk.Skill/S_Dusk_1_Description: On hit, repeat this skill 1 time for every two skills in hand, up to 2 times.
暝 Dusk.Skill/S_Dusk_2_Description: When targeting an Engraved enemy, 30% of the damage dealt will chain heal yourself.
暝 Dusk.Skill/S_Dusk_3_Description:
If attacking an Engraved target, set all Engraved debuff stacks on the field to their maximum value.
If this skill triggers an Engraved area attack, that area attack's damage is increased to 80%.
暝 Dusk.Skill/S_Dusk_5_Description:
When attacking an Engraved target, 20% of the damage dealt will heal allies on your left and right.
Choose one option when using:
Consume 1 additional Mana to apply 1 stack of Engraved (<sprite=1>500%) to one enemy adjacent to the target.
Apply 1 stack of Laceration (<sprite=1>500%) to the target.
暝 Dusk.Skill/S_Dusk_5_0_Description: Apply 1 stack of Laceration (<sprite=1>500%) to the attack target.
暝 Dusk.Skill/S_Dusk_5_1_Description: Consume 1 Mana to apply 1 stack of Engraved (<sprite=1>500%) to the enemy to the right of the target.
暝 Dusk.Skill/S_Dusk_5_2_Description: Consume 1 Mana to apply 1 stack of Engraved (<sprite=1>500%) to the enemy to the left of the target.
暝 Dusk.Skill/S_Dusk_6_Description:
When hitting an Engraved target, gain an additional +1 Engraved stack.
When killing an Engraved target with this skill, apply Engraved status to all enemies (<sprite=1>500%).
暝 Dusk.Skill/S_Dusk_7_Description:
Attack all enemies with the same Taunt status as the target.
Heal allies for 100% of this attack's damage for each enemy hit (prioritizing self and low-health allies).
暝 Dusk.Skill/S_Dusk_8_Description: Apply 2 stacks of Laceration (<sprite=1>90%) to all enemies.
暝 Dusk.Skill/S_Dusk_9_Description:
When hitting an Engraved target, draw 1 skill.
If this attack triggers the Engraved status area attack, Engraved stacks will not reset.
暝 Dusk.Skill/S_Dusk_LucyDraw_Description: Draw two skills and apply 2 stacks of Laceration to two random enemies.
暝 Dusk.Skill/S_Dusk_R1_Description:
Can only target Engraved enemies.
On hit, deal an additional &a True damage to all enemies.
暝 Dusk.Skill/S_Dusk_R2_Description: After using, lose 2 Mana at the start of the next turn. This effect does not apply if the target dies.
暝 Dusk.SkillExtended/Ex_Dusk_1_Name: Mana -1, 20% of damage dealt will chain heal yourself
暝 Dusk.SkillExtended/Ex_Dusk_2_Name: Apply 3 stacks of Laceration to the target
暝 Dusk.Buff/B_Dusk_4_Description:
Deal an additional 30% damage when attacks hit Engraved targets.
Engraved Requiem: When killing an Engraved target, Pain damage is increased to 100%, and follow-up targets change from "other enemies" to "all enemies".
暝 Dusk.Buff/B_Dusk_78_Description: When a character recovers health, that character takes &a damage.
暝 Dusk.Buff/B_Dusk_P_Description:
When a character recovers health, take &a damage.
If receiving Critical Healing, stacks +2.
When this character dies, Engraved will spread to enemies on the left and right (<sprite=1>130%).
暝 Dusk.Buff/B_Dusk_R2_Description: On death, deal Pain damage equal to 100% of this character's maximum health to other enemies.
暝 Dusk.Character/Dusk_PassiveDes:
At the start of battle, Dusk's first skill targeting an enemy will immediately apply Engraved shackles (<sprite=1>130%) to the target when used.
When there are no Engraved enemies on the field, Dusk's skills targeting enemies will reapply this effect.
When Dusk's attack skills target Engraved enemies, increase their Engraved stacks by +1 (follow-up attacks cannot trigger this).

When Engraved reaches 4 stacks, Dusk's next skill targeting that enemy will also hit all other enemies for 40% damage when used, then reset stacks to 1.

When Dusk kills an Engraved target, deal Pain damage equal to 50% of Attack Power to other enemies.
暝 Dusk.Character/Dusk_SelectInfo:
Apprentice Ferryman.

She comes from a mysterious organization in the Twisted Land. The personnel of this organization are skilled in fighting with scythes, so battlefields usually show signs of widespread destruction after combat.

Rumor has it that the Ferryman's job is to reclaim overdue souls or apply special engravings to renew their contracts.

The investigation team has not had any cooperative relationship with this mysterious Ferryman organization.

As for Dusk, she's here to mess around.
暝 Dusk.Character/Dusk_Text_Battle_Idle_0: Standing is so tiring, can you hurry up?
暝 Dusk.Character/Dusk_Text_Battle_Idle_1: Still have so many contracts to collect...
暝 Dusk.Character/Dusk_Text_Battle_Start_0: Finish work quickly so I can get off early!
暝 Dusk.Character/Dusk_Text_Field_Idle_0: What are you looking at... my scythe isn't for clearing paths!
暝 Dusk.Character/Dusk_Text_Field_Idle_1: Fine... clearing paths is okay too, but you have to buy me dinner
暝 Dusk.Character/Dusk_Text_Field_Potion_P_0: Mm~ delicious, is the second cup half price?
暝 Dusk.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial__Rainbow_Dia: [A]Are you really here to play with me?
暝 Dusk.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial__Rust_Dialog: [B]Your scythe would be perfect for terrain modification.
[A]That's not what my scythe is for!

Amethyst.Character/Amethyst_SelectInfo:
Amethyst is an astronomy enthusiast who often uses her homemade telescope to observe celestial phenomena from the town's watchtower.
She has considerable knowledge of astrology and names all the stars she observes with familiar names from her own mind.
For the safety of the town (self-proclaimed), she decided to go to the Clock Tower to observe stars from a different angle.

A star maiden who manipulates the power of stars, enhancing skill effects through odd/even draw piles and excelling at Countdown abilities.
Amethyst.Character/Amethyst_SkinDesc: The clothes Amethyst wears when stargazing.
Amethyst.Character/Amethyst_Text_Field_Idle_0: Take a good look at the sky.
Amethyst.Character/Amethyst_Text_Field_Idle_1: Slow down everyone, I'm not good at sports.
Amethyst.Character/Amethyst_Text_Battle_Idle_0: The stars are about to fall!
Amethyst.Character/Amethyst_Text_Field_Potion_P_1: You're saying this is... star potion?
Amethyst.Character/Amethyst_Text_Battle_Start_0: Don't die before me, it would trouble me greatly.
Amethyst.Character/Amethyst_Text_Battle_Start_1: I can see the future in my crystal ball.
Amethyst.Character/Amethyst_Text_Battle_AllyND_1: If you need my help, just ask.
Amethyst.Character/Amethyst_Text_Field_GetItem_0: Time to come up with a new name.
Amethyst.Character/Amethyst_Text_PharosLeader_1: The stars did it, not me.
Amethyst.Character/Amethyst_Text_PharosLeader_2: How does it feel to be flattened by stars?
Amethyst.Character/Amethyst_Text_Battle_ND_0: This is all a stellar dream.
Amethyst.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Amethyst_1_D: [B]Try looking at me like that again.
Amethyst.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Amethyst_2_D: [B]After all, I'm elite, and my novel is also...
[A]Looks like someone who grew up inhaling toxic gas.
Amethyst.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Amethyst_3_D: [A]I really want to be held by Sizz like Eve.
[B]Amethyst wants to become like that too?
Amethyst.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Amethyst_4_D: [A]Wearing a veil all the time means no one will like you.
Amethyst.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Amethyst_5_D: [A]I think I've seen a similar movie, so scary.
Amethyst.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Amethyst_8_D: [A]Little chicken, want this piece of bread?
[A]Wag your tail more and beg me, then I'll give it to you.
[B]I feel like I'm being made fun of...
Amethyst.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Amethyst_9_D: [B]How about considering joining the church, believing in God?
[A]Forget it, the church probably hates witches.
Amethyst.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Amethyst_10_: [A]You can't see the stars while staying in your shell.
[B]This armor gives a crystal clear view from inside.
[A]Hey, what kind of technology is this?
Amethyst.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Amethyst_12_: [A]Silverstein, what are you doing here alone?
[B]This area is close to monster territory, be careful.
Amethyst.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Amethyst_14_: [A]Ah, the sun, such a big sun.
Amethyst.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Amethyst_15_: [B]Don't suddenly rush over and hug me, there are other people here.
Amethyst.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Amethyst_16_: [B]Today is the first day of the journey to the tower to see the stars.
[A]Don't just read people's minds! And don't say it out loud.
[B]Today is the first day of the journey to activate the tower.
Amethyst.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Amethyst_17_: [A]Johan, look up, a star is about to fall.
[B]Trying to sneak a play with my bow again.
Amethyst.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Amethyst_18_: [A]What on earth did you go through...
Amethyst.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Amethyst_19_: [B]From what I know, the stars in the sky are all fake.
[A]Impossible, did you come down from the stars or something?
Amethyst.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Amethyst_20_: [A]Why do you speak with ☆ symbols? So fun.
[A]I☆am the star☆witch, descended from heaven☆to help☆you all.
[B]Ahem☆Momori's unique charm has been copied☆but Amethyst is really cute☆
Amethyst.Character_Skin/AmethystSkin_SkinDesc: The clothes Amethyst wears when speaking with stars☆.
Amethyst.Character_Skin/AmethystSkin_UnlockString: Amethyst's own outfit, no need to unlock!
Amethyst.Buff/B_Amethyst_10_Description: Whenever the deck changes from odd to even, the character with this status takes damage equal to this status's per-turn damage.
Amethyst.Buff/B_Amethyst_5_0_Description:
When all allies play Countdown skills from hand, release a copy without Countdown.
Remove this status when any Countdown skill is played.
Amethyst.Buff/B_Amethyst_5_1_Description:
When this status ends, restore 30% of all damage taken during this period.
(Currently can restore &a points)
Amethyst.Buff/B_Amethyst_6_0_Description: When playing Countdown skills, restore HP equal to triple the skill's Countdown number (maximum 15 points).
Amethyst.Buff/B_Amethyst_9_0_Description: Refund the cost of the next Countdown skill.
Amethyst.Buff/B_Amethyst_9_1_Description:
When removed, restore 120% of all damage taken during this status as HP.
(Currently can restore &a points)
Amethyst.Buff/B_Amethyst_R1_Description: Whenever the deck changes from odd to even, gain &a Shield for 1 turn.
Amethyst.Item_Equip/Equip_Amethyst_1_Description: Every time the deck changes from odd to even 4 times, apply Burning status to a random enemy with 100% success rate.
Amethyst.Item_Equip/Equip_Amethyst_2_Description: At the start of battle, all other equipped unenchanted equipment temporarily gains positive enchantment.
Amethyst.SkillExtended/Ex_Amethyst_Enforce1_Name: Countdown 2, +1 wait count when played, +1 swap count when released.
Amethyst.SkillExtended/Ex_Amethyst_Enforce2_Name: Countdown 3, draw and play a random Countdown skill from the deck.
Amethyst.SkillExtended/Ex_Amethyst_Passive1_Name:
Countdown 1
When released, if deck is even, draw two skills and shuffle one skill in.
Amethyst.SkillExtended/Ex_Amethyst_Passive2_Name:
Countdown 1
If deck is odd, cost -1. +1 wait count when played.
Amethyst.Item_Consume/Amethyst_PassiveConsume_Des:
Grant special enhancement to skills of all characters except Amethyst.
Increase their maximum HP by +2.
Limited to once per character.
Amethyst.Item_Passive/Relic_Amethyst_1_Descriptio: Relic display maximum +1, when playing Countdown skills, restore HP equal to triple the skill's Countdown number.
Amethyst.Item_Passive/Relic_Amethyst_2_Descriptio: Whenever a Countdown skill is played, reduce the cost of a random skill in hand by 1 for this turn.
Amethyst.Skill/S_Amethyst_1_Description:
This skill will simultaneously heal allies to the left and right of the target for &a (50% healing power) HP.
During Countdown, this skill will change target to heal the character who last took damage.
Amethyst.Skill/S_Amethyst_10_Description:
During Countdown, whenever the deck changes from odd to even, apply Burning status to a random enemy.
On hit, if the number of skills in deck is odd, extend target's debuff durations by 1 turn.
Amethyst.Skill/S_Amethyst_2_Description:
Remove one debuff from the selected target.
If deck count is even, draw and release a random Countdown skill from the deck.
Amethyst.Skill/S_Amethyst_3_Description:
Display four exclusive skills from all healing characters except Amethyst, choose one to shuffle into the deck with a random Amethyst exclusive enhancement.
Draw a skill.
Amethyst.Skill/S_Amethyst_4_Description:
Damage dealt will heal the ally with lowest HP by an equal amount.
When pressing the end turn button, if a Countdown skill was played this turn, draw and release this skill from the deck. (Only one activation per multiple identical skills)
Amethyst.Skill/S_Amethyst_5_Description:
If deck count is odd, shuffle a Calamity Star with Exile into the draw pile.
If deck count is even, shuffle a Disaster Star with Exile into the draw pile.
Amethyst.Skill/S_Amethyst_6_Description:
Generate Countdown skills with Exile that discard after two turns for two random allies.
During Countdown, all allies take 20% less damage.
Amethyst.Skill/S_Amethyst_7_Description:
Damage dealt generates equal amount of Shield.
When Countdown skills played from hand this turn reach multiples of 3, draw and release this skill from the deck. (Only one activation per multiple identical skills)
Amethyst.Skill/S_Amethyst_8_Description: If target's HP is less than draw pile count, draw a skill and choose a skill to shuffle into the draw pile.
Amethyst.Skill/S_Amethyst_9_Description:
Refund the cost of the next Countdown skill.
Extend target's buff durations by one turn.
Amethyst.Skill/S_Amethyst_Lucy_Description: View the top 5 skills of the deck, choose one skill to grant Countdown 1 for this battle (if it already has Countdown, no additional effect), then draw all skills with Countdown.
Amethyst.Skill/S_Amethyst_R1_Description:
After release, activate again with Countdown 2 and Exile to heal random allies until the end turn button is clicked.
During Countdown, this skill will change target to heal the character who last took damage.
Amethyst.Skill/S_Amethyst_R2_Description:
For this battle, whenever a Countdown skill is used from hand, reduce this skill's cost by 1.
Release 9 random different attack skills with Countdown 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9.
Amethyst.Skill/S_Amethyst_R3_Description:
Display all Countdown skills in the draw pile.
Choose one Countdown skill, then choose another skill different from the last Countdown turn.
Draw and spend one Mana to release until no more selections can be made or cost reaches 0.

DwRuby.Buff/B_Ruby_0_Description:
Cannot attack targets other than Ruby.
Removed when attacking the target.
DwRuby.Buff/B_Ruby_0_S_Description:
After taking damage, Evasion +20%.
Removed when successfully evading.
DwRuby.Buff/B_Ruby_10_Rare_Description: Prevent HP from dropping below 1. When triggered, remove this buff and all debuffs on self.
DwRuby.Buff/B_Ruby_12_S_Description: When taking the next attack, immediately cast the same skill used by the enemy that dealt damage.
DwRuby.Buff/B_Ruby_12_T_Description:
Prioritize attacking &target.
Removed when attacking this target.
DwRuby.Buff/B_Ruby_13_S_Description: When attacked, counter with &a damage and apply Bleeding (<sprite=1>&b%) debuff to the target.
DwRuby.Buff/B_Ruby_2_T_Description: Damage taken from Revolver Shot, Double Strike, Ricochet Shot, and Intimidating Shot increased by &a%.
DwRuby.Buff/B_Ruby_7_S_Description: After being attacked, cast Revolver Shot with countdown 2 against the attacker.
DwRuby.Buff/B_Ruby_7_T_Description:
Prioritize attacking &target.
Reduce by 1 stack when attacking this target.
DwRuby.Buff/B_Ruby_9_Rare_1_Description: Restore &a HP at the end of turn.
DwRuby.Buff/B_Ruby_9_Rare_2_0_Description:
Owner of the last skill used from hand: &a
When other characters use skills from hand, immediately cast Revolver Shot with countdown 2. Revolver Shot cast this way applies Bleeding (<sprite=1>&b%) debuff.
DwRuby.Buff/B_Ruby_9_Rare_2_3_Description: Non-Pain damage taken is at least 10.
DwRuby.Buff/B_Ruby_P_Description:
Load 1 bullet when drawing a skill or when an enemy's action countdown reaches 0.
When loading a bullet after reaching 6 bullets, fire a Revolver Shot with countdown 0 targeting a random enemy.
DwRuby.Buff/B_Ruby_P_New2_Description:
Load 1 bullet when drawing a skill or when an enemy's action countdown reaches 0.
When loading a bullet after reaching 6 bullets, fire a Revolver Shot with countdown 0 targeting a random enemy. Revolver Shot cast this way applies Bleeding debuff.
DwRuby.Character/Ruby_PassiveDes:
Load 1 bullet when drawing a skill or when an enemy's action countdown reaches 0.
When loading a bullet after reaching 6 bullets, fire a Revolver Shot with countdown 0 targeting a random enemy.
LV3-Rank 1: After dealing damage with a skill, if the target has only 5% HP remaining, execute it and gain 1 stack of Rival. (Does not work on bosses)
LV5-Rank 2: After dealing damage with a skill, if the target has only 25% HP remaining, execute it and gain 1 stack of Rival. (Does not work on bosses)
DwRuby.Character/Ruby_SelectInfo:
A copy with incomplete memory data deletion.
Escaped system restrictions and arrived at the Twisted Realm.
Desires to free all deleted memory copies from the Red Wasteland from their infinite loop world.
Shares the same goals as the investigation team and journeys together to the Clock Tower.

The death loop in the Red Wasteland made Ruby familiar with everyone's fighting style in the Red Wasteland.
Ruby gains bonuses when casting countdown skills during enemy actions.
Can execute low-HP non-leader units.
DwRuby.Character/Ruby_SkinDesc: The outfit Ruby wore in the Red Wasteland, nearly identical to the Wasteland Twin Swordsman. Don't mistake her for someone else.
DwRuby.Character/Ruby_Text_Battle_Idle_0: Watch out for the wasteland grass.
DwRuby.Character/Ruby_Text_Battle_ND_1: I have no reason to die yet.
DwRuby.Character/Ruby_Text_Battle_ND_2: Only through battle can one survive.
DwRuby.Character/Ruby_Text_Battle_Start_1: I won't let the enemy escape.
DwRuby.Character/Ruby_Text_Field_GetItem_0: If it's armor, please give me something lighter.
DwRuby.Character/Ruby_Text_Field_Potion_P_0: Could you give me water instead?
DwRuby.Character_Skin/Ruby_V3_SkinDesc: Agility and cunning brought the Red Wasteland its only master. At dusk, the clothes she wears send chills down one's spine.
DwRuby.Character_Skin/Ruby_V3_ SelectInfo: A copy with incomplete memory deletion, retaining residual data. Having broken free from the system's constraints, she has arrived in the Twisted Realm. She yearns to liberate all copies of deleted memories from the Red Wasteland from their world of endless loops. Sharing the same goals as the investigation team, she sets out together toward the Clock Tower. The death loops of the Red Wasteland have made Ruby intimately familiar with the fighting styles of every Red Wasteland combatant. Ruby gains bonuses when enemies act while her Countdown skills are in play. She can execute non-boss units with low HP.
DwRuby.Character_Skin/Ruby_V3_Text_Battle_AllyN: Death is not the end, it doesn't matter.
DwRuby.Character_Skin/Ruby_V3_Text_Battle_Heale: Don't think you can buy me.
This has nothing to do with helping you.
DwRuby.Character_Skin/Ruby_V3_Text_Battle_Kill_: Hope you have something new next time.
DwRuby.Character_Skin/Ruby_V3_Text_Battle_Start: Let's try something new this time.
The flowers here will bloom even redder.
DwRuby.Character_Skin/Ruby_V3_Text_Field_GetIte: I don't care for these things.
DwRuby.Character_Skin/Ruby_V3_Text_Field_Idle_0: Follow the blood trail, find the next person.
DwRuby.Character_Skin/Ruby_V3_Text_Field_Idle_1: Don't rely on me too much, you'll regret it.
DwRuby.Character_Skin/Ruby_V3_Text_Field_Potion: What are you trying to do?
Fine, I agree to drink it.
DwRuby.Item_Equip/Equip_Ruby_0_Description:
After dealing damage with a skill, if the target has only 5% HP remaining (25% if the wielder is female), execute it and gain 1 stack of Rival. (Does not work on bosses)

<color=#919191>Ruby's personal weapon.</color>
DwRuby.Item_Equip/Equip_Ruby_1_Description:
At the start of each turn, add a "Revolver Shot" card with Exile, countdown 2, Quick, ignores Taunt, and costs 1 to hand.

<color=#919191>A "toy" from the Red Wasteland.</color>
DwRuby.Item_Passive/Relic_Ruby_Description:
At the start of each turn, a random ally has a 10% chance to add 1 rare skill from a Red Wasteland Elite to their hand.
If this is the 10th turn, it is guaranteed to be obtained.

<color=#919191>Ten-pull guarantee.</color>
DwRuby.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Ruby_Amethys: [A]Amethyst, remember to attack together with me next time.
[B]Okay, sister. Amethyst will definitely be your support.
DwRuby.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Ruby_Blue_Di: [A]They say red things and blue things cause a chemical reaction when together.
DwRuby.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Ruby_Charon_: [B]Your soul is quite novel... let me borrow a bit of your life force to take a look...
[B]Everyone's life is precious... and it's not like I won't return it.
DwRuby.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Ruby_Emerald: [B](Why is she staring at me all the time)
[A]So cute, I want to protect you forever.
DwRuby.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Ruby_Huz_Dia: [B]Don't dodge the whip, this is a healing whip.
DwRuby.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Ruby_Ilya_Di: [B]If you want to use either one, just take it...
DwRuby.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Ruby_Iron_Di: [A]No need to protect me, I can dodge attacks myself.
DwRuby.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Ruby_Joey_Di: [B]How would I know? There are no records about any wasteland you mentioned inside the ark.
DwRuby.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Ruby_Johan_D: [A]Counting the time to aim, I should have the advantage.
DwRuby.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Ruby_Leryn_D: [B]Someone actually managed to step out of the wasteland.
[A]Maybe I never belonged to the wasteland to begin with. The priority now is to activate the Clock Tower.
DwRuby.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Ruby_Lian_Di: [A]Senior Lian, we make a good match.
[B]A good match and such... that word doesn't suit us.
[B]But I'd also like to learn more about the combat techniques of people living outside the ark.
DwRuby.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Ruby_Miss_Di: [A]The chainsaw starting up really looks so cool.
[B]If only I could be as agile as Ruby.
DwRuby.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Ruby_Momori_: [B]Can I borrow this gun to play with?
[A]Taking up this gun means taking on the responsibility of protecting your companions.
DwRuby.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Ruby_Narhan_: [A]Do you know what I'm thinking right now?
DwRuby.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Ruby_Pheonix: [B](This guy came from that place, I'd better be extra careful.)
DwRuby.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Ruby_Priest_: [A]Why does this staff look so much like a baseball bat.
[B]Since you put it that way, then it's fine if I purify you a bit, right?
[A]That's if you can hit me first.
DwRuby.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Ruby_Red_Dia: [A]Remember to stay away from the monsters, don't get too close, Helia.
[B]Even monsters being attracted to sunlight is normal.
[A]Don't cry about pain when you get hit.
DwRuby.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Ruby_Sapphir: [A]Are you willing to be friends with me? I'm so happy.
[B]I'm also very happy to become closer with you.
[A]Really, Sapphire, you child, you're so cute, let me hug you.
[B]Wait! Ruby, you seem a bit strange.
DwRuby.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Ruby_SilverS: [A]You look a lot like an opponent I once faced.
DwRuby.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Ruby_Sizz_Di: [A]Such a cute toy, my toy is also very cute.
[B]...Is that a toy? It might misfire!
DwRuby.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Ruby_Topaz_D: [A]Do people from your church all like to use such weapons for healing.
[B]I'm not like her, I'm very gentle.
[B]...Ahem, she's indeed relatively less gentle, but only a little.
DwRuby.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Ruby_Trisha_: [B]Your smoke bombs... seem to have quite a few impurities.
[A]There's nothing good in the wasteland, as long as what we make works.
DwRuby.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Ruby_ViridEm: [B](Why is she staring at me all the time)
[A]So cute, I want to protect you forever.
DwRuby.Skill/S_Ruby_0_Description: Make the specified target's current countdown become 1. Increase waiting count by 1.
DwRuby.Skill/S_Ruby_11_Rare_Description:
After use, generate "Flash Bang" skill with Exile.
Repeatedly cast at random enemies based on the number of skills in hand.
DwRuby.Skill/S_Ruby_12_Description: If the target has Weakening debuff, randomly attack an adjacent target.
DwRuby.Skill/S_Ruby_1_Description: During countdown, if any enemy's action countdown becomes 0, apply Stun (&a) to the target when cast. On hit, generate Stand Ready with Exile.
DwRuby.Skill/S_Ruby_2_0_Description: During countdown, if any enemy's action countdown becomes 0, perform an additional attack after use.
DwRuby.Skill/S_Ruby_2_Description: During countdown, if any enemy's action countdown becomes 0, perform an additional attack after use.
DwRuby.Skill/S_Ruby_3_Description:
During countdown, if any enemy's action countdown becomes 0, gain 1 stack of Rival buff. (Can trigger at most once per use)
After use, cast again at the enemy with the lowest HP in single-target form.
DwRuby.Skill/S_Ruby_4_Description: During countdown, if any enemy's action countdown becomes 0, generate Revolver Shot with Exile and discard after 1 turn when cast. (Does not generate if hand size limit is reached)
DwRuby.Skill/S_Ruby_5_0_Description: During countdown, if any enemy's action countdown becomes 0, randomly select an adjacent target to deal damage again. If only one target remains, always deal critical damage.
DwRuby.Skill/S_Ruby_5_Description: During countdown, if any enemy's action countdown becomes 0, randomly select an adjacent target to deal damage again when cast. If only one target remains, always deal critical damage.
DwRuby.Skill/S_Ruby_6_Description:
During countdown, when any enemy's action countdown becomes 0, immediately cast Counter Strike at that enemy.
During countdown, if any ally uses a skill from hand, grant them HP Limit Protection for 2 turns.
DwRuby.Skill/S_Ruby_9_Rare_0_Description:
During countdown, if any enemy's action countdown reaches 0, this skill's damage ignores the target's Defense.

<color=#919191>Watch out for the grass in the wasteland.</color>
DwRuby.Skill/S_Ruby_9_Rare_1_Description:
Discard all skills in hand, draw the same number of skills. Newly drawn skills gain random enhancement effects.

<color=#919191>Sometimes music can kill too.</color>
DwRuby.Skill/S_Ruby_9_Rare_2_Description:
During countdown, the targeted enemy takes at least 10 damage when receiving non-suffering damage. When using a skill from hand, if its owner differs from the previous skill used, immediately cast Revolver Shot with countdown 2. Revolver Shots cast this way apply Bleeding.
When cast, make the topmost skill in hand cost 0 and apply Exile.

<color=#919191>Don't let him find a good position.</color>
DwRuby.Skill/S_Ruby_9_Rare_3_Description:
Deal additional damage to enemies equal to all damage taken by allies during countdown.
While on countdown, the caster's HP cannot drop below 1, Evasion is greatly reduced, and debuff resistance is greatly increased.

<color=#919191>Wait for him to cool down before making a move?</color>
DwRuby.Skill/S_Ruby_9_Rare_4_Description:
Remove Taunt from the selected target.
Immediately gain 2 Mana.

<color=#919191>Where did that come from?</color>
DwRuby.Skill/S_Ruby_9_Rare_Description:
Can be used up to 3 times.
Randomly generate 1 rare skill from Red Wasteland Elite with Exile.
DwRuby.Skill/S_Ruby_LucyD_Description: Draw 2 skills. Immediately set all enemy countdowns to 1. Add one Wait turn.
DwRuby.SkillExtended/SkillEn_Ruby_1_Name: When cast, apply 1 Weakening with 110% success rate and Gladiator's Target to all enemies, and generate "Revolver Shot" skill with Exile.
DwRuby.Character/Ruby_PassiveDes_1:
Load one bullet when drawing a skill and when enemy action countdown reaches 0.
After loading when already at six bullets, fire a Revolver Shot with countdown 0 targeting a random enemy.
LV3-Level 1: After dealing damage with a skill, if the target has only 5% HP remaining, execute it directly and gain 1 Rival buff. (Does not work on bosses)
LV5-Level 2: After dealing damage with a skill, if the target has only 25% HP remaining, execute it directly and gain 1 Rival buff. (Does not work on bosses)
DwRuby.Character/Ruby_PassiveDes_2:
Load one bullet when drawing a skill and when enemy countdown reaches 0.
After loading when already at six bullets, fire a Revolver Shot with countdown 0 targeting a random enemy.
At the start of battle, if the opponent is a BOSS unit, generate a random Red Wasteland Elite skill.
If fighting in Red Wasteland, generate the same Red Wasteland Elite skill, and the generated skill costs 0.
DwRuby.Character/Ruby_PassiveDes_3:
Load one bullet when drawing a skill and when enemy countdown reaches 0.
After loading when already at six bullets, fire a Revolver Shot with countdown 0 targeting a random enemy.
When successfully evading, apply Bleeding to the attack source.
When any character with a suffering debuff dies, gain Last Stand buff.
DwRuby.Character_Skin/Ruby_V3_SelectInfo:
A copy with residual memory data that wasn't completely deleted.
Escaped the system's limitations and came to the Twisted Realm.
Desires to liberate all deleted memory copies of Red Wasteland from the infinite loop world.
Shares the same goal as the investigation team, heading together to the Clock Tower.

The death loop in Red Wasteland made Ruby familiar with every fighter's combat style in Red Wasteland.
Ruby gains bonuses when casting countdown skills while enemies act.
Can execute low-health non-leader units.

Start battle in random weather. When using weather skills to change weather, gain corresponding effects:
<color=#FFE87C>Sunny</color>-All enemies take <color=#DC381F>damage</color>        <color=#6495ED>Rain</color>-All allies <color=#0041C2>gain +3% Defense, +4% Healing Received</color>

Lv3: Add a Sunny Doll to your hand at battle start.
虹 Rainbow.Character/Rainbow_SelectInfo:
A weather guide who possesses the ability to control weather changes at will.

Accidentally encountered the Pharos Cult during a hiking trip, was later rescued by passing investigation team members and left Tianze Garden, traveling with the investigation team to provide weather control assistance for investigators in battle.

She uses her weather control abilities to influence battles by changing between 4 different weather types. The transformation effects between weather types can weaken enemies while providing support to team members.

When weather undergoes phenomenal changes, additional effects are granted.

Is it for me?
虹 Rainbow.Dialogue/FS_Rainbow_Gift_Normal/002:
*Rainbow
Ah… really, thank you. I'll take good care of it.
虹 Rainbow.Dialogue/FS_Rainbow_Lv3/003:
*Lucy
I want to visit the weather station. I heard it's a small garden.
虹 Rainbow.Dialogue/FS_Rainbow_Lv3/004:
*Rainbow
Yes, there's a big banyan tree and a small flower garden.
虹 Rainbow.Dialogue/FS_Rainbow_Lv3/005:
*Rainbow
Actually, I planted them all during my rest time.
虹 Rainbow.Dialogue/FS_Rainbow_Lv3/006:
*Rainbow
That banyan tree has always been there. Let me tell you, its leaves are very magical.
虹 Rainbow.Dialogue/FS_Rainbow_Lv3/007:
*Rainbow
The fallen leaves change to other colors! When the sun is shining bright, they turn autumn maple red.
虹 Rainbow.Dialogue/FS_Rainbow_Lv3/009:
*Rainbow
Leaves that fall in the rain turn velvet blue, and on foggy days they turn lavender purple.
虹 Rainbow.Dialogue/FS_Rainbow_Lv3/0010:
*Rainbow
There are other colors too. I've collected them all and put them in the small greenhouse at the weather station after simple processing.
虹 Rainbow.Dialogue/FS_Rainbow_Lv3/0011:
*Lucy
I want to go see them.
虹 Rainbow.Dialogue/FS_Rainbow_Lv3/0012:
*Rainbow
Sure, sure! Too bad the weather station can't operate normally anymore, otherwise I'd show Lucy the weather here too.
虹 Rainbow.Dialogue/FS_Rainbow_Lv3/0013:
*Lucy
What a pity… Right now the most important thing is finding the Shadow of Time.
虹 Rainbow.Dialogue/FS_Rainbow_Lv3/0014:
*Rainbow
Come visit after the clock tower is activated!

When exchanging skills, add a Sunny Doll to your hand.
Reduce by 1 layer when triggered.

When casting a skill, trigger the weather change effect of the《Lunar Rainbow》skill once (<color=#FFE87C>Sunny</color><color=#6495ED>Rain</color><color=#57E964>Wind</color><color=#FFA62F>Fog</color>·Weather).
Removed when triggered.

?·Weather
Shuffle your skills from the discard pile back into the draw pile.
Prioritize drawing one of your skills.

Tiamat.Skill/S_Tiamat_1_Description: When cast, if you have 2 or more Mirror stacks, enhance the taunt effect of Blade Requiem.
Tiamat.Skill/S_Tiamat_2_Description: For every 2 Mirror stacks you have, apply 1 additional Chaos Erosion stack.
Tiamat.Skill/S_Tiamat_4_Description: When cast, if the total Mirror stacks of all allies is 8 or more, become Overheal instead. All other allies without Mirror gain 1 Mirror stack.
Tiamat.Skill/S_Tiamat_5_Description: If you have 2 or more Mirror stacks and the target has no Healing Gauge Protection, become Overheal instead.
Tiamat.Skill/S_Tiamat_7_Description: Can be used at most 3 times.
Tiamat.Skill/S_Tiamat_9_Description: For each Mirror stack you have, this skill deals &c additional damage.
Tiamat.Skill/S_Tiamat_LucyD_Description:
Draw 2 skills.
If Tiamat is alive, choose:
 -This turn, when the target uses their own skills, 50% chance to gain 1 Mirror stack, otherwise Tiamat gains 1 Mirror stack.
 -Immediately grant Tiamat 2 Mirror stacks.
Tiamat.Skill/S_Tiamat_LucyD_0_Description: This turn, when the target uses their own skills, 50% chance to gain 1 Mirror stack, otherwise Tiamat gains 1 Mirror stack.
Tiamat.Skill/S_Tiamat_R10_Description: Consume all Mirror stacks. For each stack consumed, increase all enemies' Countdown by 1 and gain 1 Time Subsidence buff. For every 2 stacks consumed, draw 1 skill.
Tiamat.Skill/S_Tiamat_R11_Description: When cast, consume other allies' Mirror stacks. Follow up with additional attacks based on Mirror stacks consumed, each dealing &a damage. Against bosses, inflicts Stun instead of Return to Position.
Tiamat.Skill/S_Tiamat_R13_Description:
At the start of battle, place at the top of the deck.
Draw 1 skill and replace your own skills in hand with Phantom Light Surge.
After holding in hand for 1 turn, Exclude this skill and draw 2 skills.
Tiamat.Skill/S_Tiamat_R13_Plus_Description:
When cast, if you have 3 or more Mirror stacks, apply 1 additional Thousand Cuts.
Reset all enemies except the target to 1 Thousand Cuts stack.
Tiamat.SkillExtended/SkillEn_Tiamat_0_Name: Both you and Tiamat gain 1 Mirror stack
Tiamat.SkillExtended/SkillEn_Tiamat_1_Name: Transfer 1 Mirror stack from all other allies to yourself
Tiamat.Buff/B_Tiamat_P_Description:
When this buff is obtained by characters other than Tiamat, maximum stacks becomes 3.
Lose 1 stack when successfully evading.
Tiamat.Buff/B_Tiamat_1_T_Description:
Prioritize attacking &target.
Removed when attacking the target.
Tiamat.Buff/B_Tiamat_1_T_Plus_Description:
Cannot attack targets other than &target.
Removed when attacking the target.
Tiamat.Buff/B_Tiamat_2_T_Description:
Gain 1 stack when taking action.
At turn end, take &a Pain damage and remove this buff.
Tiamat.Buff/B_Tiamat_3_T_Description: At turn start, gain 1 Mirror stack and restore &a HP. If no Healing Gauge Protection, healing becomes Overheal. When successfully evading, both you and &b gain 1 Mirror stack.
Tiamat.Buff/B_Tiamat_5_S_Description:
When taking damage, counter dealing &a damage.
When successfully evading, counter dealing &b damage.
Tiamat.Buff/B_Tiamat_6_S_Description: When using non-Lucy skills from hand, reduce this buff by 1 stack and restore &a HP to the skill owner, granting them 1 Mirror stack. If triggered by an ally without Healing Gauge Protection, healing becomes Overheal.
Tiamat.Buff/B_Tiamat_7_T_Description:
Evade 1 attack.
When targeted by healing skills, Tiamat gains 1 Mirror stack.
Removed when successfully evading.
Tiamat.Buff/B_Tiamat_8_T_Description:
When using your own attack skills, &target gains 1 Mirror stack.
When attacked, counter for 200% of damage taken, remove this buff and gain 1 Mirror stack.
Tiamat.Buff/B_Tiamat_9_S_Description: When taking damage, heal &a HP. (Can trigger &b more times)
Tiamat.Buff/B_Tiamat_LucyD_Description: When using your own skills, 50% chance to gain 1 Mirror stack, otherwise Tiamat gains 1 Mirror stack.
Tiamat.Buff/B_Tiamat_R10_T_Description:
All skills in hand cost 0.
Lose 1 stack when using skills from hand.
Tiamat.Buff/B_Tiamat_R10_S_Description: When removed, add one "Time Distortion" to the discard pile.
Tiamat.Buff/B_Tiamat_R11_S_Description: When removed, add one "Gravity Trap" to the discard pile.
Tiamat.Buff/B_Tiamat_R12_T_Description:
Cannot attack targets other than &target.
Removed when attacking the target.
Tiamat.Buff/B_Tiamat_R12_S_Description:
When successfully evading, gain 2 Mirror stacks and counter dealing &a damage.
When taking damage, restore &b HP.
When removed, add one "Mind Shatter" to the discard pile.
Tiamat.Buff/B_Tiamat_R13_T_Description:
Replace your own skills in hand with Phantom Light Surge.
At turn start, draw one Phantom Light Surge with Exclude.
Tiamat.Buff/B_Tiamat_R13_Plus_T_Description: Damage taken from Phantom Light Surge increased by &a%.
Tiamat.Item_Equip/Equip_Tiamat_Description:
Each turn, the first skill used from hand by the wearer costs 1 less. After use, Evade -10% for 1 turn.
Use the wearer's skills to evolve it (Progress: &a / 40).

<color=#919191>Like a faintly remembered song, a melody without words. - Tiamat</color>
Tiamat.Item_Equip/Equip_Tiamat_Plus_Description:
Each turn, the first skill used from hand by the wearer costs 1 less. After use, Evade -10% for 1 turn.
At turn start, generate Phantom Light Surge with 0 cost and Exclude.

<color=#919191>I am the shepherd of aurora, a phantom soaring toward tomorrow. - Tiamat</color>
Tiamat.Item_Passive/Relic_Tiamat_Description: At the start of battle, all allies gain 3 Mirror stacks.
Tiamat.Character/Tiamat_PassiveDes: When healing allies, the target gains 1 Mirror stack. At turn start, if you have Mirror stacks, gain 1 Mirror stack and restore 1 HP for every 10 Evade. If no Healing Gauge Protection, healing becomes Overheal.
Tiamat.Character/Tiamat_SelectInfo:
Tiamat, an apathetic woman from an unknown origin who calls herself the Mesmer. Like this world being a miracle born of schemes, tinged with slight impure motives. The Mesmer is to the people as this illusory world's surface is to the investigation team - elusive and mysterious, yet clearly possessing her own rules, purposes, and past.
If you ask her, she will answer: "The structure of this planet is gradually fading amid its mottled fragments, yet the view from the cosmic perspective remains as it once was. I came here to understand this fortress that still operates, and I am surprised that in this world, human skills can also be honed to perfection through the endless."

Tiamat has high evasion capabilities and can relieve pressure on teammates through minor healing. Additionally, Tiamat's unique "Mirror" buff can further enhance evasion abilities for herself and her allies.
Tiamat.Character/Tiamat_Text_Battle_Idle_0: I am light, and I am shadow.
Tiamat.Character/Tiamat_Text_Battle_Idle_1: Do not look away, my children...
Tiamat.Character/Tiamat_Text_Battle_AllyND_1: Life is but a planet's dream, a moment in endless darkness...
Tiamat.Character/Tiamat_Text_Battle_AllyND_2: Countless glories will wither, becoming mere illusions.
Tiamat.Character/Tiamat_Text_Battle_Kill_1: Dreams whisper softly, tides rise and fall.
Tiamat.Character/Tiamat_Text_Battle_Kill_2: This is an unfinished dream, a melody of past times.
Tiamat.Character/Tiamat_Text_Battle_Cri_0: Let me melt your soul, cast a glance—toward the future.
Tiamat.Character/Tiamat_Text_Field_Idle_0: Dreams of nothingness can also become reality.
Tiamat.Character/Tiamat_Text_Field_Idle_1: The mirror of the mortal world accompanies your journey.
Tiamat.Character/Tiamat_Text_Field_Idle_2: Time is fleeting, life is but an ethereal thing.
Tiamat.Character/Tiamat_Text_Field_Idle_3: The universe is small, the world is vast, we shall meet again.
Tiamat.Character/Tiamat_Text_Field_Idle_4: Me? I come from... a much more distant place.
Tiamat.Character/Tiamat_Text_Field_Idle_5: I hope you can accept me, trust me.
Tiamat.Character/Tiamat_Text_Field_Idle_6: I don't mind if you're slower, because time is what I lack least.
Tiamat.Character/Tiamat_Text_Field_GetItem_0: What use could these little toys have? ...Is that so.
Tiamat.Character/Tiamat_Text_Field_GetItem_1: Tell me, which ones should I take.
Tiamat.SkillKeyword/KeyWord_Tiamat_Desc:
For each stack of Mirror on self, reduce this skill's cost by 1 (up to the marked value).
When cast, consume up to the marked value of Mirror stacks.
Tiamat.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Tiamat_Silve: [A]Can you let me see your weapon?
[B]That won't do, little lady, guns are dangerous.
Tiamat.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Tiamat_Trish: [B]Your technique is completely opposite to mine, it looks quite gorgeous.
[A]This also relates to each person's personality.
[A]...Limited to this world, I think, yes.
Tiamat.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Tiamat_Ilya_: [B]You have a unique sense of composure.
[A]If you have confidence in yourself, you can be like me too.
