Tiamat.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Tiamat_Joey_: [B]You're dressed way too frivolously... how did you join the investigation team?
[B]I feel like you have many things left unsaid.
Tiamat.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Tiamat_Narha: [B]Who exactly are you? I can't read your heart at all.
[A]Because your ability only works on ordinary people.
[B]Not ordinary... well, it's not strange for someone to have methods specifically to counter mind reading.
Tiamat.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Tiamat_Pries: [B]I rarely see you, do you have faith?
[B]Would you like to try? God is gentle...
[A]But often the truths we hold onto depend only on our own worldview.
Tiamat.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Tiamat_Leryn: [B]Your body recovers so quickly, is it some secret technique?
[A]As long as my vital organs aren't destroyed, I won't die.
[B]We don't need to discuss things so bloodily.
[A]I thought you'd be interested in my body's limits.
[B]...I won't deny it. But rather than research, I care more about you all.
Tiamat.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Tiamat_Sizz_: [B]Beautiful big sister, where are you from?
Tiamat.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Tiamat_Johan: [B]Everyone has their own driving force to move forward, for me it's revenge.
[A]What I'm learning includes the revenge you speak of—but I don't particularly like it.
Tiamat.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Tiamat_Huz_D: [B]You have a queen-like aura... could it be you have interests in that area?
[B]That's wonderful, elegant and beautiful, many people must like you.
[A]There are more who hate me, but I do have a lover.
Tiamat.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Tiamat_Azar_: [B]If there's nothing, please stay away from me.
[A]Haha, is that so. How have I bothered you?
Tiamat.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Tiamat_Pheon: [A]Weak moral concepts in humanoid society, lacking empathy.
Tiamat.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Tiamat_Lian_: [B]You don't seem to know swordsmanship, would you like to learn?
[A]Thank you for your kindness, but not right now.
[B]Alright, you can find me anytime if you want to learn.
Tiamat.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Tiamat_Red_D: [B]So, who's stronger between Selena and me?
Tiamat.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Tiamat_Blue_: [B]Like... no wait, like... what kind of like do you mean?
[B]Then I suppose it would be... like, yes.
Tiamat.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Tiamat_Hein_: [B]You look strong. Want to fight sometime?
Tiamat.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Tiamat_Iron_: [A]But we're good at the same things.
[B]...At least saying that makes me feel better.
Tiamat.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Tiamat_Miss_: [B]Hi there, beautiful. Why aren't you talking?
[B]Aw, don't be so distant. Want something to eat? Here's some grilled meat.
[A]...Thank you. Please give me another piece.
[B]Hahaha, no problem! Just tell me whatever you need!
Tiamat.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Tiamat_Charo: [B]Do you have any cool, dark magic spells?
[A]I do, but it's not quite what you're thinking.
Tiamat.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Tiamat_Momor: [A]Seeing you always reminds me of someone.
[A]Someone who causes as much trouble as you.
[A]Being reliable and causing trouble don't contradict each other.
Tiamat.Character/Tiamat_SkinDesc: Tiamat's most commonly used outfit that can barely be called clothing, convenient for washing. It won't hinder her when participating in various activities. Her lower body is bare - want to check? ...Just kidding, bow your head obediently before the Empress!
Tiamat.Character_Skin/Tiamat_Swim_SkinDesc:
A swimsuit personally designed by Tiamat to blend in with the vacation activities of humanoid beings. Rather than a swimsuit, it's more like beachwear. She can fly anyway, so it doesn't matter.
"Come enjoy this brief yet eternal moment."
Tiamat.Character_Skin/Tiamat_Swim_SelectInfo:
Tiamat, an apathetic female from an unknown origin who calls herself the Mesmer. Like this world being a crafted miracle, accompanied by a hint of impure motives. The Mesmer is to everyone as the surface of this illusory world is to the investigation team - elusive and mysterious, but clearly having her own rules, purposes, and past.
If you ask her, she will answer: "The structure of this planet is gradually fading amid its bizarre and mottled state, yet the view from the cosmic perspective remains as it once was. I came here to understand this fortress that still operates. What surprises me is that in this world, human skills can also be refined to perfection through endless practice."

Tiamat possesses high evasion ability and can relieve pressure on teammates through minor healing. Additionally, Tiamat's unique "Mirror" buff can further enhance the evasion ability of herself and her allies.
Tiamat.Dialogue/Ark/01: You just stand here all the time. Why don't you chat with others?
Tiamat.Dialogue/Ark/02:
*Tiamat
I'm not used to communicating with words.
Tiamat.Dialogue/Ark/03: ...You talk so strangely. Does that mean you prefer body language or something?
Tiamat.Dialogue/Ark/04:
*Tiamat
Using your concepts to understand, it's an ability like telepathy.
Tiamat.Dialogue/Ark/05: Really? Sounds impressive, but still suspicious. Are there others in the Ark who use such abilities?
Tiamat.Dialogue/Ark/08:
*Tiamat
Unfortunately, I can't demonstrate it to you because this ability only works on my offspring and individuals with whom I've established intimate relationships.
Tiamat.Dialogue/Ark/12: What about the other one? What do you mean by intimate relationships? Isn't our relationship intimate enough?
Tiamat.Dialogue/Ark/14:
*Tiamat
In your language, spousal relationships are usually also called intimate relationships.
Tiamat.Dialogue/Ark/16:
*Tiamat
Lucy, you should spend some time reading more books.
Tiamat.Dialogue/ClockTower/02:
*Tiamat
Too bad even such scenes will eventually become tiresome, even this conversation between you and me.
Tiamat.Dialogue/ClockTower/02_O1_01:
*Tiamat
Plans? Maybe, but I don't want to tell you.
Tiamat.Dialogue/ClockTower/02_O1_03:
*Tiamat
Simply put - after the world resets, you still have many things to do. As long as you don't give up seeking the future, we'll meet again.
Tiamat.Dialogue/ClockTower/02_O2_02:
*Tiamat
...Universal cycles - civilizations, life, and even entire worlds will ultimately start over. All you and I can grasp is the present.
Tiamat.Dialogue/ClockTower/02_O2_03:
*Tiamat
So, just don't let yourself have regrets.
Tiamat.Dialogue/FS_LV1/03:
*Tiamat
Do you always have that expression?
Tiamat.Dialogue/FS_LV1/05:
*Tiamat
I have many ways of expressing myself, such as using direct mental communication, and putting thoughts directly into action.
Tiamat.Dialogue/FS_LV1/08: Am I? I think I'm pretty normal. It's not strange for people to rarely show expressions, right? I'll fight alongside you all anyway.
Tiamat.Dialogue/FS_LV1/09:
*Tiamat
I'm not used to bringing my thoughts to the surface. You're unwilling to let your emotions be released.
Tiamat.Dialogue/FS_LV1/10: So we're both poker-faced then. Let's not get too hung up on such details.
Tiamat.Dialogue/FS_LV2/01: Tiamat, uh, the name's too long. Can I call you Tia?
Tiamat.Dialogue/FS_LV2/03: If I'm being offensive, I apologize in advance. We've been working together on missions for a long time, so I really want to ask.
Tiamat.Dialogue/FS_LV2/05: Okay... I want to know, do you not feel pain?
Tiamat.Dialogue/FS_LV2/07: Because you show no fear toward blades, bullets, and such things. It's easy to sense your difference when behind you - like you don't care about these things.
Tiamat.Dialogue/FS_LV2/08:
*Tiamat
Well-trained soldiers should be able to do that too.
Tiamat.Dialogue/FS_LV2/09: They should, but are you one?
Tiamat.Dialogue/FS_LV2/10:
*Tiamat
I'm not... but you're right. I don't worry about damage of this level. Although the body here can't withstand heavy attacks, my original endurance is far stronger than what you see.
Tiamat.Dialogue/FS_LV2/11:
*Tiamat
If you think it would be better for me to react to those injuries more like you all do, I can try.
Tiamat.Dialogue/FS_LV2/12: No, being around you does feel quite safe, except sometimes it makes me wonder if you're actually human... uh, I don't mean it that way.
Tiamat.Dialogue/FS_LV2/15:
*Tiamat
I possess mental and illusion abilities that ordinary humanoids can't achieve, as well as the self-healing constitution you just mentioned.
Tiamat.Dialogue/FS_LV2/16:
*Tiamat
Your abilities here are all built up through repeated battles and with the aid of some fictional methods.
Tiamat.Dialogue/FS_LV2/17: You're talking too fast. What do you mean? Are you saying I can't actually use a sword?
Tiamat.Dialogue/FS_LV2/18:
*Tiamat
Yes, and no. What I can tell you is that I'm skilled in illusion defense, and my body's self-healing ability isn't from acquired adjustments and learning, but my own power.
Tiamat.Dialogue/FS_LV2/19:
*Tiamat
Whether here or elsewhere, I remain true to myself.
Tiamat.Dialogue/FS_LV2/20: So like a superhuman or something.
Tiamat.Dialogue/FS_LV2/21:
*Tiamat
You could understand it that way. Originally, I'm about two meters and forty centimeters tall, with self-healing speed far faster than now.
Tiamat.Dialogue/FS_LV2/22:
*Tiamat
Not just blades and swords—even large-caliber bullets would have difficulty causing actual damage.
Tiamat.Dialogue/FS_LV2/23: Is this also a type of "illusion"?
Tiamat.Dialogue/FS_LV2/24:
*Tiamat
The essence of illusion is that people only believe what they choose to believe.
Tiamat.Dialogue/FS_LV2/25: It's getting harder to understand. Here, the bread is done baking—eat up.
Tiamat.Dialogue/FS_LV2/26:
*Tiamat
Mm, thank you. Could I have a few more pieces?
Tiamat.Dialogue/FS_LV3/01:
*Tiamat
To understand psychic power, you must start with layered structures. The universe is like a hamburger—most life forms can only perceive a limited number of layers.
Tiamat.Dialogue/FS_LV3/02:
*Tiamat
For example, almost all individuals can perceive material reality, but they struggle to sense layers composed of pure energy.
Tiamat.Dialogue/FS_LV3/03: Oh, that's a bit hard to understand. You're saying matter and energy are separate?
Tiamat.Dialogue/FS_LV3/04:
*Tiamat
No, they're actually together. I'm just using this example because you can't see it or directly interact with it.
Tiamat.Dialogue/FS_LV3/05:
*Tiamat
For instance, consciousness is based on your brain, but it doesn't exist only in matter—it also extends into many energy layers.
Tiamat.Dialogue/FS_LV3/06:
*Tiamat
Therefore, influencing the world is generally categorized into two major types. Science and magic are the first type—they're both methodologies, ways of using various layers to affect other layers.
Tiamat.Dialogue/FS_LV3/07:
*Tiamat
Whether it's shooting with a gun or launching a flame arrow from a magic circle, there's no difference between them.
Tiamat.Dialogue/FS_LV3/09:
*Tiamat
The other type is psychic power. Psychic power doesn't rely on equipment assistance, but depends on an individual's non-material layer abilities to directly project force across various layers.
Tiamat.Dialogue/FS_LV3/10:
*Tiamat
My illusions are this type of ability. To me, space and reality can both be shaped and changed.
Tiamat.Dialogue/FS_LV3/11: That's amazing... I never thought you were so knowledgeable. I thought illusions were just simple things like creating mirages.
Tiamat.Dialogue/FS_LV3/12:
*Tiamat
I learned this knowledge later on. For me, directly manipulating energy layers comes naturally.
Tiamat.Dialogue/FS_LV3/13: There are so many geniuses around me... So how do you use psychic illusions?
Tiamat.Dialogue/FS_LV3/15: Can't? Why? I was able to use the healing spells others taught me before.
Tiamat.Dialogue/FS_LV3/16:
*Tiamat
Because your spells are unique to this world, preset rules of this space.
Tiamat.Dialogue/FS_LV3/17:
*Tiamat
Your body cannot support psychic spells, just like no matter how hard you try, you can't see gravitational waves with just your physical body.
Tiamat.Dialogue/FS_LV3/18: Then what's special about psychic power?
Tiamat.Dialogue/FS_LV3/19:
*Tiamat
Psychic power truly exists—like mathematics, it can be used anywhere. Actually, spells are too, but your spells are toys that only belong here.
Tiamat.Dialogue/FS_LV3/20: How troublesome... I can't understand those spells in books anyway. Using a sword is better.
Tiamat.Dialogue/FS_LV3/21:
*Tiamat
In terms of results, swordsmanship is indeed more practical. Actually, I know some swordsmanship too. Want to try?
Tiamat.Dialogue/FS_LV3/23:
*Tiamat
Using a giant sword as large as your body to pierce through defenses, with attacks as gentle as a butterfly.
Tiamat.Dialogue/FS_LV3/24: Uh... let me think about it.
Tiamat.Dialogue/FS_LV4/03:
*Tiamat
I know you're going to find Azar.
Tiamat.Dialogue/FS_LV4/07: Well, since you put it that way.
Tiamat.Dialogue/FS_LV4_Failed/1:
[y]Tiamat[g] just quietly looks into the distance. She remains calm about everything that's currently happening.
[sys](※ Insufficient tokens or specific conditions not met.)
Tiamat.Dialogue/FS_LV4_Simple/1:
*Tiamat
Go stand before him and let him see your irritatingly brilliant light.
Tiamat.Dialogue/Gift_Cake/1:
*Tiamat
Could I trade for another piece with an illusion performance?
Tiamat.Dialogue/Gift_Cake/2:
*Tiamat
Mm, it tastes good and is rich in calories. Actually, my food preferences are related to my body.
Tiamat.Dialogue/Gift_Cake/3:
*Tiamat
Something like that. High consumption... mm...
Tiamat.Dialogue/Gift_Coffee/2:
*Tiamat
Speaking of which, by human standards, shouldn't coffee count as a type of fruit juice?
Tiamat.Dialogue/Gift_Coffee/3:
*Tiamat
It's not? Then it's definitely not soy milk either...
Tiamat.Dialogue/Gift_Coffee/4:
*Tiamat
How strange. What exactly is coffee?
Tiamat.Dialogue/Gift_DVD/1:
*Tiamat
More than logic or knowledge, your emotional aspects attract me more. Though these stories have been processed, they're... quite interesting.
Tiamat.Dialogue/Gift_DVD/2:
*Tiamat
Lucy, don't you have someone you like?
Tiamat.Dialogue/Gift_DVD/3:
*Tiamat
For humans, procreation should be very important. I suggest...
Tiamat.Dialogue/Gift_DVD/4:
*Tiamat
It seems you don't like this topic. Never mind then.
Tiamat.Dialogue/Gift_Milk/2:
*Tiamat
Unfortunately, relying on it for calories is still somewhat difficult.
Tiamat.Dialogue/Gift_Milk/3:
*Tiamat
Perhaps it could be paired with some sweets...
Tiamat.Dialogue/Gift_Normal/1:
*Tiamat
You're giving this to me? Mm, I'll accept it.
Tiamat.Dialogue/Gift_Normal/2:
*Tiamat
To consider your feelings, I should mention beforehand that I might dispose of things that aren't very practical.
Tiamat.Dialogue/Gift_Normal/3:
*Tiamat
...Mm, as long as it's fine with you.
Tiamat.Dialogue/Gift_SFNovel/1:
*Tiamat
Imagination is both cruel and romantic. Just as you lead people to seek light in this cold world, Lucy, human imagination is also the light of progress.
Tiamat.Dialogue/Gift_SFNovel/2:
*Tiamat
These works each have their own characteristics, but my favorite are still those stories that never give up when facing disasters from nature and within civilization.
Tiamat.Dialogue/Gift_SFNovel/3:
*Tiamat
Perhaps it has something to do with me originally being a gestalt consciousness.
Tiamat.Dialogue/Gift_SFNovel/4:
*Tiamat
Gestalt? ...Never mind, I was just talking about the stories in these novels.
Tiamat.Dialogue/KingRoom/1:
*Tiamat
It's time to face the person we must face.
Tiamat.Dialogue/KingRoom/3:
*Tiamat
Are you excited, afraid, or sad?
Tiamat.Dialogue/Master/01:
*Tiamat
Lucy, what do you want to say?
Tiamat.Dialogue/Master/02: I came to check on your condition.
Tiamat.Dialogue/Master/03:
*Tiamat
You don't need to worry about me.
Tiamat.Dialogue/Master/04: Mm... I'm not worried about you. Your behavior confuses me.
Tiamat.Dialogue/Master/05: I don't remember who said it, but "lies never hurt anyone—truth is the sharp knife." Returning to the real world, those who wake up won't be us as we are now. I have a headache.
Tiamat.Dialogue/Master/08:
*Tiamat
No one ever said consciousness couldn't exist independently. The Ark Project has gone very far. I wanted to see, so I stood before you.
Tiamat.Dialogue/Master/09: You know the truth? Then why didn't you say so earlier?
Tiamat.Dialogue/Master/11: This is very important to me!
Tiamat.Dialogue/Master/12:
*Tiamat
Is it really important to you?
Tiamat.Dialogue/Master/13: What do you mean? Why wouldn't it be important?
Tiamat.Dialogue/Master/14:
*Tiamat
Existential crises are everywhere. After individual death, there's no reincarnation—death is true death. Death brings no purpose.
Tiamat.Dialogue/Master/15:
*Tiamat
When you recognize this, recognize that you're always deceived by "meaning," you start questioning the meaning of your own existence.
Tiamat.Dialogue/Master/17:
*Tiamat
I'm not denying its importance, but you should focus elsewhere.
Tiamat.Dialogue/Master/20:
*Tiamat
Through choice after choice, in contingency, humans become themselves. No absolute rule binds living beings—even moral standards are just what you think you've created...
Tiamat.Dialogue/Master/22:
*Tiamat
The world itself has no rules, logic is chaotic, and human absolute freedom gradually evolves into a form of self-deception. This deception makes you think you have no freedom of choice, believing in those pale "truths."
Tiamat.Dialogue/Master/23: I don't understand. What are you saying?
Tiamat.Dialogue/Master/24:
*Tiamat
Convincing yourself that "there's no choice but to end the project" is a form of excuse.
Tiamat.Dialogue/Master/25:
*Tiamat
Because in reality, no matter what choice you make, you'll never know if another choice would have been better. You'll always have regrets. Between "existence" and "essence," we are first "existence."
Tiamat.Dialogue/Master/26:
*Tiamat
Rushing to stop Azar and the Administrator because you want to participate in and influence this existential crisis.
Tiamat.Dialogue/Master/27:
*Tiamat
Suppose there was no Ark Project—where would you be then? Would this satisfy everyone's wishes? If someone desires an end, it's actually everywhere.
Tiamat.Dialogue/Master/29: The things you're saying, I don't understand. For me, I only get angry when facing bad behavior. So right now I'm not angry, but I need to let him know that what I'm doing cannot be ignored.
Tiamat.Dialogue/Master/31:
*Tiamat
Let's go, dear. The universe is small, the world is large—we will meet again.
Tiamat.Dialogue/Master_Simple/1:
*Tiamat
Life is but a planet's dream, a moment in endless darkness. Countless glories will fade, layer upon layer, weaving together civilization's epic poem.
Tiamat.Dialogue/Root/02: You look much calmer than the others. Did you already know?
Tiamat.Dialogue/Root/03:
*Tiamat
I have stronger acceptance capabilities than you all.
Tiamat.Dialogue/Root/05: Are you really okay? Then I'll go check on the others first, okay?
Tiamat.Dialogue/Root/08:
*Tiamat
If this place is merely a virtual existence, then how can you be so certain that the so-called "truth" is the truth?
Tiamat.Dialogue/Root/10:
*Tiamat
A box can be nested within countless layers of boxes.
Tiamat.Dialogue/Root/11:
*Tiamat
Since memories can be deleted, given enough time, you can create countless layered worlds stacked upon each other.
Tiamat.Dialogue/Root/12: ...I think I understand what you mean, but I'm certain the outside is the real world.
Tiamat.Dialogue/Root/15: Well, as long as you can accept it. We'll see each other later.
Tiamat.Dialogue/Root/19:
*Tiamat
How many times have you heard our conversation now, you who exists outside the box?
Tiamat.Dialogue/Root/20:
*Tiamat
However, being able to meet here at least shows I've done quite well, doesn't it.
Tiamat.CharText/Enemy/Light/Ally/Tiamat: Very nice... but not quite suitable for me.

汐 Tide.Skill/S_Tide_1_Description: Additionally restore &a HP (50% Healing Power) to the target.
汐 Tide.Skill/S_Tide_10_Description:
Choose one:
-Gain &a Healing Gauge (90% Healing Power).
-Gain a buff that increases Healing Received by 40% for 1 turn.
-Gain a buff that increases Critical Healing by 15% for 1 turn.
When an ally is in critical condition, gain all of the above effects.
汐 Tide.Skill/S_Tide_10_1_Description: Gain a buff that increases Healing Received by 40% for 1 turn.
汐 Tide.Skill/S_Tide_10_2_Description: Gain a buff that increases Critical Healing by 15% for 1 turn.
汐 Tide.Skill/S_Tide_3_Description: Target restores Healing Gauge equal to 50% of Maximum Health.
汐 Tide.Skill/S_Tide_4_Description: When the target has Healing Gauge, this skill is cast as a critical hit.
汐 Tide.Skill/S_Tide_5_Description:
When cast, deal 30% Healing Power as Pain damage (<color=purple>&a</color>) to all allies. This Pain damage cannot cause them to become unable to battle.
This skill's damage is increased by the total Healing Gauge of the current party (<color=purple>&b</color>).
When killing a target, prioritize drawing one of your own skills with 0 Mana cost.
汐 Tide.Skill/S_Tide_6_Description:
Resolve all Pain debuffs on the target, then chain heal yourself for an amount equal to: resolved damage + &a (100% Healing Power).
Target ally's fixed ability costs become 0 for this turn.
汐 Tide.Skill/S_Tide_7_Description:
<color=#FFFFFF>Gain Healing Gauge</color> <color=#00FF00>&a</color>
(30% Healing Power + your level)
Add a Salt Wave to your hand.
汐 Tide.Skill/S_Tide_8_Description:
<color=#FFFFFF>Gain Healing Gauge</color> <color=#00FF00>&a</color>
(50% Healing Power)
Draw 1 skill.
汐 Tide.Skill/S_Tide_9_Description:
<color=#FFFFFF>Gain Healing Gauge</color> <color=#00FF00>&a</color>
(150% Healing Power)
After casting, chain heal yourself for &b HP (120% Healing Power).
汐 Tide.Skill/S_Tide_Lucy_Description:
Draw 2 skills.
Target ally gains Healing Gauge equal to their Maximum Health.
If target ally is at full HP, gain 1 Wait Count instead.
汐 Tide.Skill/S_Tide_R1_Description:
Restore all Healing Gauge.
After casting, Healing Gauge gained during this battle is increased by an additional 6 points.
汐 Tide.Skill/S_Tide_R2_Description:
While this skill is in hand, whenever an ally takes damage, cast this skill targeting yourself, then reduce the turn count for discarding after X turns by 1.
When actively casting this skill, restore 1 Mana.
When discarding this skill, restore all your Healing Gauge.
汐 Tide.Skill/S_Tide_R3_Description:
When drawing this skill, gain this skill's buff.
During the turn you draw this skill, your chain healing and healing that exceeds Healing Gauge will add equal damage to this skill, up to a maximum of &a (600% Healing Power).
汐 Tide.SkillExtended/Ex_Tide_1_Name: On hit, gain Healing Gauge equal to 30% of your Maximum Health
汐 Tide.SkillExtended/Ex_Tide_2_Name: Can be cast on allies. When targeting allies, chain heal HP equal to damage dealt instead
汐 Tide.Buff/B_Tide_4_Description: If you have Healing Gauge at the end of your turn, restore &a HP (40% Healing Power).
汐 Tide.Item_Passive/Relic_Tide_1_Description:
When the Dark Mist turn arrives:
All allies gain Damage Immunity for 1 turn.
All enemies gain +100% Damage Taken debuff for 1 turn.
汐 Tide.Character/Tide_PassiveDes:
When any ally in the party receives healing with "0" healing amount, gain Healing Gauge equal to Tide's Level + 2.

When casting healing skills or buff effects, if the target ally is in critical condition, the healing amount is increased by 20%.
汐 Tide.Character/Tide_SelectInfo:
Tidal Watcher, Lighthouse Keeper.

Since the strange epidemic spread from the fishing village, she has seen fewer and fewer fishing boats on the sea from the lighthouse. The fisherman's song she wrote has gradually been drowned out by the endless sound of waves.
Her salt crystal healing technique was inherited from generations of lighthouse guardians. It actually releases healing effects through light refracted by salt crystals as a medium.
She can control the ups and downs of the ocean tide and release healing techniques through her salt crystal lantern.
汐 Tide.Character/Tide_Text_Battle_Kill_1: In the name of the lighthouse keeper!
汐 Tide.Character/Tide_Text_Battle_Start_1: The lighthouse will guide the way...
汐 Tide.Character/Tide_Text_Field_Idle_0: I can't hear the waves here...
汐 Tide.Character/Tide_Text_Field_Idle_1: Beware of threats beyond the light...
汐 Tide.Character/Tide_Text_Field_Potion_P_0: Very different from the taste prepared in the fishing village.
汐 Tide.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial__Dusk_Dialog: [B]It's not fear, it's just that my lantern has a strange resonance with you...
汐 Tide.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial__Rainbow_Dia: [B]The lantern is too bright, it will expose our position.
汐 Tide.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial__Tide_Dialog: [B]Ex...excuse me, have you found that new wick?
[B]The lighthouse can hold on a bit longer...
汐 Tide.Skill/S_Tide_New_Description: During this battle, this skill's healing amount will increase by the amount that exceeds the target's Healing Gauge.

Kiseki.Kiseki/ModDescription:
New Characters:

Altina Orion

From: The Legend of Heroes: Trails of Cold Steel

Adds 8 normal skills + 2 rare skills + 1 Lucy skill + 1 skill enhancement + 2 non-learnable generated S-Crafts

Rean Schwarzer

From: The Legend of Heroes: Trails of Cold Steel

Adds 8 normal skills + 2 rare skills + 1 Lucy skill + 1 skill enhancement + 2 non-learnable generated S-Crafts

New Equipment:

1 legendary equipment

Source Material:

Falcom Wiki
In-game voice lines
In-game screenshots etc. + AI-generated images
Will be changed immediately if copyright infringement occurs.
Kiseki.Kiseki/Common/Keyword/BreakValue_Desc: When Break Value reaches 100, consume all points to inflict Stun (100%), enhanced by the probability bonus of the last attacker.
Kiseki.Kiseki/Common/Keyword/Unbalance_Desc: Break Value received while Unbalanced becomes 1.5x.
Kiseki.Kiseki/Common/Keyword/SpeedUp_Desc: When Acceleration Value reaches 100, consume 100 points to gain a corresponding character skill from the deck (or discard pile if deck is empty) and make it gain (recover equivalent consumed AP after use, max 3 points) and gain Swiftness.
Kiseki.Kiseki/Common/Buff/SpeedUp_Desc_Ext: (recover equivalent consumed AP after use, max 3 points)
Kiseki.Kiseki/Rean/Character/Text_Battle_Idle: Now's not the time to get distracted!
Kiseki.Kiseki/Rean/Character/Text_Battle_Kill: Let's take care of the next one.
Kiseki.Kiseki/Rean/Character/PassiveDes: Gain CP when spending AP and taking damage (support from Link status also grants CP). Can use S-Crafts when CP exceeds 100. At 200 CP, skill damage becomes 1.5x.
Kiseki.Kiseki/Rean/Character/SelectInfo: Rean Schwarzer, who uses a tachi as his weapon, has an honest and sociable personality. The adopted son of Baron Schwarzer, a northern noble of the Empire, he was once very concerned about his past and his identity as an adopted child. To find a new "path," he decided to enroll in the military academy. He eventually came to terms with it and affirmed his identity as the eldest son of the Schwarzer family. He encountered the "Sword Saint" Yun Kafai and learned the Eight Leaves One Blade style, reaching the initial transmission level at only 17 years old. He harbored fear of the "special power" hidden within his body. Later, when saving his sister in the old school building and in battle with Laura's father, he displayed a completely different dominant force. Later, Cassius, at Yun Kafai's request, granted Rean the [Arcane Transmission]. After Rean sparred with sword-wielding Cassius, Cassius used his own swordsmanship to simulate Rean's inner demons. After Rean's victory, he officially qualified for the Arcane Transmission and gained the qualification to call himself [Sword Saint].
Kiseki.Kiseki/Rean/Skill/S_Rean_0_Desc: Establish a tactical link with another character, increasing both characters' Attack Power slightly.
Kiseki.Kiseki/Rean/Skill/S_Rean_1_Desc: A blazing Crimson Slash that unleashes an arc-shaped strike with hellfire. (Also attacks enemies on both sides) (Break 10)
Kiseki.Kiseki/Rean/Skill/S_Rean_1_Desc2: Unleashes a strike wreathed in crimson flames, an extremely fierce Crimson Slash. (Also attacks enemies on both sides) (Break 20)
Kiseki.Kiseki/Rean/Skill/S_Rean_2_Desc: Split enemies in an instant with an extremely sharp blade. (Also attacks enemies on both sides) (Break 20)
Kiseki.Kiseki/Rean/Skill/S_Rean_2_Desc2: Brings all obstacles to destruction, a keenly sharp strike in the dark night. (Also attacks enemies on both sides) (Break 30)
Kiseki.Kiseki/Rean/Skill/S_Rean_3_Desc: Unleash strikes at divine wind speed, attacking twice like a raging torrent. (Delay 1)
Kiseki.Kiseki/Rean/Skill/S_Rean_3_Desc2: Strike enemies at maximum speed, two attacks like a gale and raging torrent. (Delay 2)
Kiseki.Kiseki/Rean/Skill/S_Rean_4_Desc: Unleash blazing hellfire shockwaves, perform multiple spiral strikes, causing target to become Unbalanced. (Break 30)
Kiseki.Kiseki/Rean/Skill/S_Rean_4_Desc2: Continuously unleash spiral strikes wreathed in purple flames without pause, causing target to become Unbalanced. (Break 60)
Kiseki.Kiseki/Rean/Skill/S_Rean_5_Desc: Immediately gain 50 Acceleration Value, increase all allies' Acceleration Value by 25 at the start of each turn, gain 1 card exchange when cast.
Kiseki.Kiseki/Rean/Buff/B_Rean_5_Desc: Restore 25 Acceleration Value at the start of each turn
Kiseki.Kiseki/Rean/Skill/S_Rean_6_Desc: Gain 200 Acceleration Value, gain 2 card exchanges when cast.
Kiseki.Kiseki/Rean/Skill/S_Rean_7_Desc: In the fleeting moment when leaves fall, slice enemies and the battlefield into fragments with an extremely sharp strike.
Kiseki.Kiseki/Rean/Skill/S_Rean_8_Desc: A strike that only a Sword Saint who has mastered technique can perform, representing the essence of the Eight Leaves. (Break 10)
Kiseki.Kiseki/Rean/Skill/S_Rean_9_Desc: Assume a defensive formation stance. When using skills (non-follow-up) to damage targets, deal additional Break Value based on AP cost. (20 per point, minimum 10)
Kiseki.Kiseki/Rean/Buff/B_Rean_9_Desc: When using skills (non-follow-up) to damage targets, deal additional Break Value based on AP cost. (20 per point, minimum 10)
Kiseki.Kiseki/Rean/Enforce/S_En_Rean_1_Name: Add 1 Countdown, gain 50 Acceleration Value after use.
Kiseki.Kiseki/Rean/Skill/S_Rean_LucyD_Desc: Gain 100 Acceleration Value, gain 1 card exchange when cast.
Kiseki.Kiseki/Rean/Skill/S_Rean_Rare1_Desc: Can only be used by consuming 100 CP. Placed at the top of the deck at battle start. Enter a state of no thought or desire, unleash true power, enhance some skills, and immediately gain 100 Acceleration Value. (Will enter Weakened state after effect ends)
Kiseki.Kiseki/Rean/Skill/S_Rean_Rare2_Desc: Assume an offensive stance, lasting until after the next 4 attack skills are used, making skills grant Swiftness when cast (if already has Swiftness, gain 1 AP instead).
Kiseki.Kiseki/Rean/Buff/B_Rean_Rare2_Desc: Next &a attack skills grant Swiftness (if already has Swiftness, gain 1 AP instead)
Kiseki.Kiseki/Altina/Character/Text_Battle_Cri: I'll end this with one strike!
Kiseki.Kiseki/Altina/Character/PassiveDes: Gain CP when spending AP and taking damage (support from Link status also grants CP). Can use S-Crafts when CP exceeds 100. At 200 CP, skill damage becomes 1.5x.
Kiseki.Kiseki/Altina/Character/SelectInfo:
Affiliated with the Imperial Army Intelligence Division, code name 'Black Rabbit.' In S.1192, she was created as Millium's successor Oz.

Like Millium Orion's "Airgetlam," Altina has a jet-black puppet completely synchronized with herself—the combat shell "Claiomh Solais."

Under the Intelligence Division's 'request,' she served as Rean's support and surveillance for over a year by the side of the 'Ashen Chevalier.' After Rean Schwarzer was appointed as an instructor at the 'Branch Campus II,' she also enrolled with secret orders. While acting as a student of 'Class VII,' she gradually built deep bonds with Rean and her other classmates.
Kiseki.Kiseki/Common/Equip/Equip_Kiseki1_Desc: Increase wearer's CP gain rate by 60%
Kiseki.Kiseki/Common/Equip/Equip_Kiseki1_1_Desc: Increase wearer's CP gain rate by 40%
Kiseki.Kiseki/Common/Equip/Equip_Kiseki1_2_Desc: Increase wearer's CP gain rate by 20%
Kiseki.Kiseki/Common/Keyword/Delay_Desc: After dealing damage, delay the target's action countdown
Kiseki.Kiseki/Common/Keyword/TurnDelay_Desc: After dealing damage, delay the target's skill with the shortest countdown to a later turn.
Kiseki.Kiseki/Altina/Skill/S_Altina_0_Desc: Precisely analyze enemy weaknesses, reducing their Attack Power and Evade, and inflict Unbalance status.
Kiseki.Kiseki/Altina/Skill/S_Altina_1_Desc: Drive away targets with high-precision & high-density searing lasers that cover the battlefield (Break 20), dealing &a damage to characters on both sides of the selected target (Break 10).
Kiseki.Kiseki/Altina/Skill/S_Altina_2_Desc: Supply healing energy with Claiomh Solais and deploy an enhanced physical defense barrier.
Kiseki.Kiseki/Altina/Buff/B_Altina_2_Desc: Restore 30 CP at the start of each turn.
Kiseki.Kiseki/Altina/Skill/S_Altina_3_Desc: Mercilessly swing down Claiomh Solais' blade, cutting through all matter. (Delay 2)
Kiseki.Kiseki/Altina/Skill/S_Altina_3_Desc2: Mercilessly swing down Claiomh Solais' blade, cutting through all matter. (Temporal Delay 1)
Kiseki.Kiseki/Altina/Skill/S_Altina_4_Desc:
Deploy a black barrier, adding a shield that blocks (or reflects in annihilation mode) 2 instances of damage, and increase Aggro.
Also applies the effect once to the Tactical Link target.
Kiseki.Kiseki/Altina/Skill/S_Altina_5Rare_Desc: Placed on top of the deck at the start of battle. Claiomh Solais switches to giant sword mode, replacing S-Crafts and modifying some skill effects.
Kiseki.Kiseki/Altina/Skill/S_Altina_6_Desc: Merge with Claiomh Solais, raining down large-scale bombardment and intense slashing attacks. (Delay 1)
Kiseki.Kiseki/Altina/Skill/S_Altina_7_Desc: Suppress the battlefield with Claiomh Solais transformed into a giant sword, then hurl it at the enemy formation for annihilation. (Temporal Delay 1)
Kiseki.Kiseki/Altina/Skill/S_Altina_8_Desc: Forcefully swing and slam Claiomh Solais, dealing damage and Break Value (50) to the target and adjacent enemies, and dealing double Break Value to Unbalanced targets.
Kiseki.Kiseki/Altina/Skill/S_Altina_9Rare_Desc: Deploy a protective shield that reflects all attacks.
Kiseki.Kiseki/Altina/Skill/S_Altina_10_Desc: Strike with Claiomh Solais to deal damage to an enemy, hitting Unbalanced enemies as a critical hit and applying Break Value (40).
Kiseki.Kiseki/Altina/Skill/S_Altina_11_Desc: Establish a Tactical Link with another character, slightly reducing the linked target's Aggro. Some skills will also affect the Tactical Link target.
Kiseki.Kiseki/Altina/Enforce/S_En_Altina_1_Name: Grant Altina 20 CP. When the user is under Altina's Tactical Link, add one blocking effect.
Kiseki.Kiseki/Altina/Skill/S_Altina_LucyD_Desc:
Draw 2 skills.
Apply Detect Weakness to the target.

Turquoise.Buff/B_Turquoise_10_T_Description:
Prioritize attacking &target.
Reduce by 1 stack when attacking this target.
Turquoise.Buff/B_Turquoise_3_T_Description:
When taking damage, take 2 additional shots from Silverstein, each dealing &a damage.
Removed when triggered.
Turquoise.Buff/B_Turquoise_R15_T_Description: Your skills with the Simulate keyword trigger their Simulate effect even while in the deck and discard pile.
Turquoise.Buff/B_Turquoise_R17_S_Description: Other allies' skills with the Simulate keyword in hand also provide special bonuses to yourself.
Turquoise.Character/Turquoise_PassiveDes:
Turquoise's starting skills consist of 5 special skills, including 1 Cyan Attack in the innate ability slot, 2 Cyan Attacks, 1 Cyan Protection, and 1 Cyan Healing. (In Blood Mist difficulty, the 6th skill is also a Cyan Attack)
When forgetting Turquoise's skills in the information window, you can obtain a skill book of the forgotten skill.

3rd Level: Gain 1 "Turquoise Insight" item. When used, choose 1 of Turquoise's exclusive skills to learn.
Turquoise.Character/Turquoise_SelectInfo:
The mysterious girl Turquoise from somewhere in the Twisted Lands visited all investigation team members and townspeople after boarding the ark, hoping to learn their combat techniques.
After teaching her some techniques, everyone discovered that this girl could not only use their moves with near perfection, but could even use mana to simulate their equipment.
While studying the equipment simulated by Turquoise, the institute's scientists were amazed to find they could even slightly use the corresponding investigator's abilities.
After that, Turquoise chose to settle on the ark and join the investigation team.

Having learned the combat experience of all ark personnel, Turquoise can share her learned abilities with other members.
Turquoise can simulate any investigator's exclusive weapon and give the owner the ability to use their skills in skill form.
Turquoise.Character/Turquoise_Text_Battle_AllyND_0: I've learned some first aid measures too.
Turquoise.Character/Turquoise_Text_Battle_Cri_0: The weak point is here, found it!
Turquoise.Character/Turquoise_Text_Battle_Cri_1: Let me show you what I've learned!
Turquoise.Character/Turquoise_Text_Battle_Kill_1: No matter how many come, it's useless.
Turquoise.Character/Turquoise_Text_Battle_ND_0: (In this situation... I should position myself further back.)
Turquoise.Character/Turquoise_Text_Battle_Start_0: Time to show the results of my learning.
Turquoise.Character/Turquoise_Text_Battle_Start_1: What should I use this time?
Turquoise.Character/Turquoise_Text_Field_GetItem_0: If you need equipment, I can actually create it.
Turquoise.Character/Turquoise_Text_Field_GetItem_1: It's something I haven't seen before.
Turquoise.Character/Turquoise_Text_Field_Idle_0: Go this way, I remember how to get there.
Turquoise.Character/Turquoise_Text_Field_Potion_P_: They all look the same, I can't remember them at all.
Turquoise.Character/Turquoise_Text_PharosLeader_0: ...If I kill you here, the cult leader will teach me that move.
Turquoise.Character/Turquoise_Text_PharosLeader_1: ...I was blinded by my thirst for knowledge.
Turquoise.Character/Turquoise_Text_PharosLeader_2: ...Thank you for helping me practice my techniques.
Turquoise.Item_Consume/Item_Turquoise_Description: Display all of Turquoise's exclusive skills and choose 1 to learn.
Turquoise.Item_Equip/Equip_Turquoise_Description: At the start of battle, display 5 random investigators' exclusive equipment, choose 1 and gain that equipment item's effect for this battle. Then, immediately trigger the "Brilliant Idea" skill effect targeting yourself.
Turquoise.Item_Passive/Relic_Turquoise_Description: Whenever the draw pile is shuffled, immediately trigger the "Brilliant Idea" skill effect targeting a random ally. The skill generated this way enters the draw pile instead of your hand. Then, draw 1 skill.
Turquoise.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Turquoise_Am: [B]Here, this book is for you to read.
[A]An astrology book? Will I be able to control the stars after reading it?
[B]Not quite, this is my special talent~
Turquoise.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Turquoise_Az: [B]What is your purpose in coming here?
[A]I'm just a student, and you are my teacher.
Turquoise.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Turquoise_Bl: [A]This book is called "Book of Total Lunar Eclipse". The book says to discard 1 hand card...
Turquoise.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Turquoise_Ch: [A]Teacher, now I'm also a Dark Priest.
[B]Someone is actually willing to walk this dark path with me...
[B]Please don't get any ideas about this weapon...
[A]Don't worry, I still have some self-awareness.
Turquoise.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Turquoise_Em: [B]Take it if you want it, this thing has been mass-produced long ago.
[A]Actually, I've already learned it, but I have great doubts about the Green.
Turquoise.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Turquoise_He: [A]When you're angry, perhaps books can help you.
[B]It's more satisfying to go chop people up.
Turquoise.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Turquoise_Hu: [A]Using a whip to heal is too crazy.
[A]Teacher is right, I still need to learn much more.
Turquoise.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Turquoise_Il: [B]I don't have much left to teach you, I'm very weak...
[A]You are the strongest teacher I've encountered. Please have more confidence.
Turquoise.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Turquoise_Ir: [A]You could actually go without wearing armor.
[B]People who can't see their faces usually seem cooler in others' imagination.
Turquoise.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Turquoise_Jo: [A]Which of these books did you write?
[B]...I'm just driven by obsession to constantly become stronger, but you should find a path more suitable for yourself.
[A]Teacher, only a purer heart can reach the pinnacle.
Turquoise.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Turquoise_Le: [B]Do you still remember the outside world?
[A]Isn't this it, teacher? What are you talking about?
Turquoise.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Turquoise_Li: [A]I want to practice with teacher one more time.
[B]I'm completely helpless with you. Come again when we return to town.
Turquoise.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Turquoise_Mi: [B]Like this, starting the chainsaw engine... heya!
[A]It's fired up! So that's how it works!
Turquoise.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Turquoise_Mo: [B]Do you have confidence to smash all the enemies flat?
[B]...Since you learned the tone quite well, I'll waive the tuition fee this time☆
Turquoise.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Turquoise_Na: [B](At this moment our consciousness is connected.)
[A](How nice, teacher, I don't need to speak out loud.)
Turquoise.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Turquoise_Ob: [A]I'm going to tell Quartz on you!
Turquoise.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Turquoise_Ph: [B](Looking around) (How do I feel like someone's staring at me...)
Turquoise.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Turquoise_Pr: [A]I feel like I've borrowed divine power, teacher!
[B](Smile) It's good that you can learn it, worthy of being God's daughter.
[A](After scaring people unconscious, it's easy to heal them.)
Turquoise.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Turquoise_Qu: [A]My staff, can you return it to me now?
[B]Here you go, I can already replicate the magic wand.
Turquoise.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Turquoise_Re: [B]Don't push yourself too hard, the power of the sun is not easy to learn.
[A]Thank you, teacher. Someday I'll be able to learn it.
Turquoise.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Turquoise_Ro: [A]To be able to switch between so many weapons so skillfully in such a short time...
[A]Mr. Roland, I want to learn this!
[B]But to be able to copy weapons without needing any equipment... I suppose that's magic for you.
Turquoise.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Turquoise_Ru: [B]Why do you keep staring at my sword.
[B]It's rest time now, if you want to touch it, go ahead.
Turquoise.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Turquoise_Sa: [A]There's actually a sword I cannot copy.
Turquoise.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Turquoise_Si: [A]I still need more practice with shooting accuracy.
[B]Now is the time for live ammunition practice. Seize the opportunity.
[A]When teacher isn't around, I can also summon Eve by myself now.
[B]You can learn even this? Simply incredible.
[A]It's nothing special to just copy a sample.
Turquoise.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Turquoise_To: [A]I haven't seen this book in the church.
[B]This book records gods and demons, there's only one copy.
[A]Can you let me take a look?
[B]I'll give it to you when I'm done reading.
Turquoise.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Turquoise_Tr: [B]If it were someone from the Pharos Cult, that would be dangerous.
[A]Hehe, thank you for your teaching, teacher.
Turquoise.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Turquoise_Vi: [B]Take it if you want, this thing has been mass-produced for a long time.
[A]Actually, I've already learned it, but I have serious doubts about Virid.
Turquoise.Skill/S_Turquoise_10_Description:
On hit, convert 50% of damage dealt into Shield for 1 turn.
<color=#6ac6cc>Simulate: Once per battle, Taunt all enemies at the start of the turn.</color>
Turquoise.Skill/S_Turquoise_11_Description:
Generate "Magic Thread" that costs 1, with Swiftness. Discarded after 1 turn, Exclude.
<color=#6ac6cc>Simulate: Once per battle, at the start of the turn, reduce the cost of healing skills owned by you in the draw pile by 1.</color>
Turquoise.Skill/S_Turquoise_12_Description:
When cast on a target not in Taunt state, this skill's "Small Fry" debuff will not be applied.
<color=#6ac6cc>Simulate: Damage dealt to targets in Taunt state is increased by 20%.</color>
Turquoise.Skill/S_Turquoise_13_Description:
Discard the highest cost skill in hand.
If the fixed ability cannot be used, refresh the fixed ability.
<color=#6ac6cc>Simulate: Once per battle, at the start of the turn, make the fixed ability gain Innate.</color>
Turquoise.Skill/S_Turquoise_14_Description:
Repeatedly choose skills in hand to discard until 5 skills remain in hand. Reduce the cost of the next skill used from hand based on the number of skills discarded.
<color=#6ac6cc>Simulate: Once per battle, at the start of the turn, generate Shield equal to 50% of maximum health for the entire battle.</color>
Turquoise.Skill/S_Turquoise_18_Description:
While in hand, if you took damage from an ally this turn, hit in Critical form.
<color=#6ac6cc>Simulate: Damage exceeding the target's health will be added to the damage/healing of the next skill you cast. (Maximum 25)</color>
Turquoise.Skill/S_Turquoise_19_Description:
If there are no skills owned by you in hand, evade the next attack with 100% chance.
<color=#6ac6cc>Simulate: Critical Hit Chance +20%, Critical Damage +50%.</color>
Turquoise.Skill/S_Turquoise_1_Description:
On kill, immediately trigger Foresight once.
<color=#6ac6cc>Simulate: If the owner of this skill is a support character, Attack Power +3; otherwise, Healing Power +3.</color>
Turquoise.Skill/S_Turquoise_20_Description:
Choose one effect to trigger:
 -Find Bread: Chance to obtain 1 bread (base 10% chance, +10% for each enemy on field, can only find 1 bread per battle)
 -Carry: Spend 50 gold to place the last skill used from hand on top of the draw pile. (Excludes skills exiled during battle, excludes this skill itself)
 -Eat Bread: Spend 1 bread to draw 2 skills.
 -Throw Bread: Spend 1 Mana and 1 bread to deal &a damage to the enemy with lowest health. Recover the thrown bread after battle.
<color=#6ac6cc>Simulate: Once per battle, when taking fatal damage, Exclude a random skill with the same name and block this damage. (Prioritizes your own skills)</color>
Turquoise.Skill/S_Turquoise_20_Plus_0_Description: &a% chance to obtain 1 bread. (This option disappears after successfully obtaining bread)
Turquoise.Skill/S_Turquoise_20_Plus_1_Description:
Spend 50 gold to place the last skill used from hand on top of the draw pile. (Excludes skills exiled during battle, excludes this skill itself)
Last skill used from hand: &a
Turquoise.Skill/S_Turquoise_20_Plus_3_Description:
Spend 1 Mana and 1 bread to deal &a damage to the enemy with lowest health.
Recover the thrown bread after battle.
Turquoise.Skill/S_Turquoise_21_Description:
Deal <color=purple>&a Pain damage</color> to target. (Based on Healing Power)
<color=#6ac6cc>Simulate: Armor Penetration +50%</color>
Turquoise.Skill/S_Turquoise_22_Description:
While in hand or used as fixed ability, cost is reduced by 3.
<color=#6ac6cc>Simulate: At the start of the turn, draw 1 "Moon Fragment" skill from the deck.</color>
Turquoise.Skill/S_Turquoise_23_Description:
While in hand or used as fixed ability, cost is reduced by 3.
<color=#6ac6cc>Simulate: At the end of the turn, draw 1 "Sun Fragment" skill from the discard pile.</color>
Turquoise.Skill/S_Turquoise_2_Description:
Deal &a additional damage based on the number of skills cast this turn.
<color=#6ac6cc>Simulate: At the start of the turn, cast "Unfinished Phantom Sword" on a random enemy.</color>
Turquoise.Skill/S_Turquoise_3_Description: <color=#6ac6cc>Simulate: Hit in Critical form when attacking enemies with Attack Action countdown 1.</color>
Turquoise.Skill/S_Turquoise_4_Description:
Grant the selected ally 1 Block buff.
<color=#6ac6cc>Simulate: Counterattack every 2 attacks received, dealing &a damage.</color>
Turquoise.Skill/S_Turquoise_5_Description:
<color=#FFA636FF>Sheathe: After casting on a random enemy, draw this skill again.</color>
<color=#6ac6cc>Simulate: All attack and healing skills in hand gain Critical.</color>
Turquoise.Skill/S_Turquoise_6_Description: <color=#6ac6cc>Simulate: When casting skills targeting enemies, apply Poison debuff to the target; when casting skills targeting allies, apply Continuous Healing buff to the target.</color>
Turquoise.Skill/S_Turquoise_7_Description: This skill can be used while unable to act. Apply Insight debuff to all enemies. Remove one CC debuff from target and clear its overload. When successfully removed/cleared, apply Mental Trauma debuff to a random enemy. (Takes effect at most once per cast) Simulate: All attack skills in hand gain Tracking and Ignore Taunt.
Turquoise.Skill/S_Turquoise_8_Description:
<color=#FFA636FF>Burn: All Pain and Weakening debuffs on enemies have their duration increased by 1 turn.</color>
<color=#6ac6cc>Simulate: When casting skills from hand, gain Burn buff.</color>
Turquoise.Skill/S_Turquoise_9_Description: Deal &a Pain damage to self. If this causes you to enter dying state, apply 2 additional Erosion debuffs to target. Simulate: When casting ally-targeting skills from hand, apply Ignore Taunt buff to that ally.
Turquoise.Skill/S_Turquoise_C_1_Description: Generated skills gain random Synergy enhancement effects. (Only appears for investigators in the party)
Turquoise.Skill/S_Turquoise_C_2_Description: Generated skills have their cost reduced by 1.
Turquoise.Skill/S_Turquoise_C_3_Description: Generated skills draw 1 skill when cast.
Turquoise.Skill/S_Turquoise_C_5_Description: Generated skills gain Ignore Taunt and Critical.
Turquoise.Skill/S_Turquoise_C_7_Description: Generated skills gain random enhancement effects from 2 other options.
Turquoise.Skill/S_Turquoise_LucyD_Description:
Randomly display 3 exclusive skills from targets and 1 exclusive skill from Turquoise, then choose 1 skill.
Then randomly display 3 enhancement effects from the following and choose 1 effect.
Afterward, generate the chosen skill. The generated skill gains Once and the chosen enhancement effect.

Enhancement effects:
 -Random Synergy enhancement
 -Cost reduced by 1
 -When cast, draw 1 skill
 -Gain Swiftness
 -Gain Ignore Taunt and Critical
 -Ignore target's Defense
 -2 other random enhancement effects.
Turquoise.Skill/S_Turquoise_R15_Description:
At the start of battle, place on top of the draw pile.
When cast, immediately trigger the effect of "Brilliant Idea" skill once.
This skill's "Gem Resonance" buff will be applied to all allies.
Turquoise.Skill/S_Turquoise_R16_Description: Perform additional attacks based on the total equipment count of all allies, each attack deals &a/&b/&c/&d/&e damage based on equipment rarity. This skill and its additional attacks ignore target's Defense.
Turquoise.Skill/S_Turquoise_R17_Description: While owning this skill, other ally skills in hand with the Simulate keyword will also provide special buffs to you. Simulate: Once per battle, at the start of the turn, immediately trigger the effect of "Brilliant Idea" skill once targeting yourself.
Turquoise.Skill/S_Turquoise_Relic_Description:
Randomly display 3 exclusive skills from targets and 1 exclusive skill from Turquoise, then select 1 skill.
Then randomly display 3 enhancement effects from the following and select 1 effect.
Afterwards, generate the selected skill. The generated skill has Once and the selected enhancement effect.

Enhancement effects:
 -Random Synergy Enhancement
 -Cost Reduction by 1
 -Draw Skill when used
 -Swiftness attached
 -Ignore Taunt, Critical attached
 -Ignore Defense of target
 -2 other random enhancement effects.
Turquoise.SkillExtended/Ex_Turquoise_18_Des:
Deal &a additional damage. If there are multiple targets, split the damage among them.
When targeting allies, damage is converted to healing.
Turquoise.SkillExtended/SkillEn_Turquoise_0_Name: Additional attacks based on current number of equipment. Each attack deals 40%/55%/70%/85%/100% of Attack Power as damage based on equipment rarity.
Turquoise.SkillExtended/SkillEn_Turquoise_1_Enforc: Attack skill with damage multiplier, or healing skill with healing multiplier
Turquoise.SkillExtended/SkillEn_Turquoise_1_Name: Cost Reduction by 1, Swiftness attached, but damage/healing reduced by 50%.
Turquoise.SkillKeyword/KeyWord_Turquoise_Desc: While held in hand, provides special buffs to the skill owner. (Only 1 of multiple skills with the same name takes effect per ally)
Turquoise.CharText/Enemy/Light/Ally/Turquoise: So this is what the book described.
Turquoise.CharText/Enemy/Witch/Ally/Turquoise_Low: I still have so many books to read, so many things to learn...

SuzakuinMomiji.Skill/S_szk_1_Description:
When killing an enemy, draw this skill again.
<color=#FFA636FF>Sheathe: Use this skill and generate <color=#FFB6C1>"Swallow Cut 2"</color>.</color>
SuzakuinMomiji.Skill/S_szk_10_Description:
On hit, select 1 attack skill from hand and discard it.
When used against a target with <color=#DC143C>See Through</color> debuff, hit as a critical hit.
<color=#FFA636FF>Sheathe: Gain 1 Mana and draw 1 skill.</color>
SuzakuinMomiji.Skill/S_szk_11_Description: <color=#FFA636FF>Sheathe: Use this skill and generate <color=#9ACD32>"Isn't Vodka Bad?"</color>, with discard after 2 turns.</color>
SuzakuinMomiji.Skill/S_szk_12_Description:
When used, all allies gain 1 stack of <color=#00FA9A>Suzaku Hyper Drrrrrryyy!</color> buff, and apply 1 stack of <color=#DC143C>See Through</color> debuff to all enemies.
When killing an enemy, gain 2 Mana.
<color=#FFA636FF>Sheathe: Immediately use "Quick Slash" once and draw 1 skill.</color>
SuzakuinMomiji.Skill/S_szk_2_Description:
When killing an enemy, draw 1 skill.
<color=#FFA636FF>Sheathe: Use this skill and generate <color=#FF69B4>"Swallow Cut 3"</color>.</color>
SuzakuinMomiji.Skill/S_szk_3_Description: <color=#FFA636FF>Sheathe: Use this skill and generate <color=#FF1493>"Swallow Cut 4"</color>.</color>
SuzakuinMomiji.Skill/S_szk_4_Description: <color=#FFA636FF>Sheathe: Use this skill and generate <color=#C71585>"Swallow Cut 5"</color>.</color>
SuzakuinMomiji.Skill/S_szk_6_Description: <color=#FFA636FF>Sheathe: Use this skill and generate <color=#8B0000>"Horizontal Slash Death Blow"</color>.</color>
SuzakuinMomiji.Skill/S_szk_6_0_Description:
If target's HP is no higher than 45%, set target's HP to 0.
<color=#FFA636FF>Sheathe: Use this skill.</color>
SuzakuinMomiji.Skill/S_szk_7_Description:
Draw 1 skill. The drawn skill gains Swiftness.
Apply 1 stack of <color=#DC143C>See Through</color> debuff to all enemies.
All allies each remove 1 random Pain debuff.
SuzakuinMomiji.Skill/S_szk_8_Description:
On hit, select 1 attack skill from hand and discard it.
<color=#FFA636FF>Sheathe: Gain 1 Mana and draw 1 skill.</color>
SuzakuinMomiji.Skill/S_szk_9_Description:
When used against a target with the <color=#DC143C>See Through</color> debuff, damage is increased by 20%. When killing an enemy, discard the bottom skill from hand.
<color=#FFA636FF>Sheathe: Use this skill.</color>
SuzakuinMomiji.Skill/S_szk_LucyD_Description: Look at skills in deck in order and select 1 skill to draw. Grant it Swiftness and reduce its cost by 1.
SuzakuinMomiji.Skill/S_szk_rare_1_Description:
Discard all skills and draw (discarded skill count + 1) skills. Drawn skills gain Swiftness and cost is reduced by 1.
Gain corresponding stacks of <color=#6A5ACD>God's Eyes and Hands</color> buff based on discarded skill count, apply corresponding stacks of <color=#DC143C>See Through</color> debuff to all enemies.
SuzakuinMomiji.Skill/S_szk_13_Description: <color=#FFA636FF>Sheathe: Return this skill to hand with Swiftness, Critical, Tracking, Exclude, and cost reduced by 3 (once only).</color>
SuzakuinMomiji.Skill/S_szk_rare_2_Description: At the start of battle, place at the top of deck. Grant 1 skill Critical for this battle, restore 1 Mana when exchanged or discarded.
SuzakuinMomiji.SkillExtended/Ex_szk_1_Name: After use, gain 1 stack of <color=#00FA9A>Suzaku Hyper Drrrrrryyy!</color>, <color=#FFA636FF>Sheathe: Gain 1 stack of <color=#6A5ACD>God's Eyes and Hands</color>.</color>
SuzakuinMomiji.Buff/B_szk_1_Description:
When taking damage from attacks, immediately use <color=#5F9EA0>"Quick Slash"</color> once.
Reduce by 1 stack when triggered.
SuzakuinMomiji.Character/Suzakuin Momiji_PassiveDes:
Gain 1 stack of <color=#6A5ACD>God's Eyes and Hands</color> buff at the start of battle; gain 1 stack of <color=#6A5ACD>God's Eyes and Hands</color> buff when killing an enemy.
Apply <color=#DC143C>See Through</color> debuff to a random enemy at the start of each turn.

<color=#919191>Switch brain circuits to ultra-high-speed predictive framework, and perform ultra-precise action prediction of opponents based on collected information, making opponents completely seen through. Normal people can hardly escape from <color=#6A5ACD>God's Eyes and Hands</color>.</color>
SuzakuinMomiji.Character/Suzakuin Momiji_SelectInfo: The eldest daughter of the swordsmanship family Suzakuin, possesses the special divine curse <color=#6A5ACD>"God's Eyes and Hands"</color> that allows her to analyze opponents' movements and find optimal solutions for victory through calculation. She has reached the realm of All Laws Have No Self in swordsmanship and is a rare swordsmanship master. During another training journey, she accidentally arrived at the Twisted Land due to an incident and is a trustworthy presence in the investigation team.
SuzakuinMomiji.Character/Suzakuin Momiji_Text_Battle_Ki: Though not ten beauties, now it's also ten perfections.
SuzakuinMomiji.Character/Suzakuin Momiji_Text_Field_Idl: Did you know there's a type of non-alcoholic beer?
<color=#6A5ACD>God's Eyes and Hands</color>... no need to activate it now.
Wonder if the divine curse will work.
SuzakuinMomiji.Character/Suzakuin Momiji_Text_Field_Get: Let's continue forward and finish this quickly.
SuzakuinMomiji.Character/Suzakuin Momiji_Text_Field_Pot: Doesn't feel as good as... barley juice.
SuzakuinMomiji.Character/Suzakuin Momiji_Text_PharosLea: The forbidden relationship between student and teacher... is not allowed.
Uwahwah, what was that just now?
SuzakuinMomiji.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Suzakuin Mom: [B]Can your sword block my bullets?
[A]Already seen through.
[B]Fighting with such a relaxed attitude?
[A]Well, being relaxed is actually better.
[A]In the swordsmanship arena, divine curses like yours are quite rare.
[B]R-really...
[A]Yes, with your abilities, you'd definitely shine in our world.
[A]Your potions taste really good.
[B]That's not how you use them, why is everyone like this...
[B]Are you also analyzing enemy movements?
[A]Yes, my God's Eyes and Hands has already analyzed it.
[A]This type of weapon is completely unseen even in the swordsmanship arena.
[B]Hm? What did you say?
[B]The shield's damage level is quite low.
[A]After all, I saw through most of the attacks.
[B]Momiji-san gives a very reassuring feeling.
[A]Ahaha, don't rely on me too much, I'm quite lazy you know.
[A]Wow, you fight with your eyes closed, sensing with your heart?
[B]Why did you slash towards me during that last battle...
[A]Your healing looked too much like an attack.
[A]Today's mood is three phantom swords!
[B]I don't really understand what you're saying...
[A]Wow. What kind of creature is this, a phoenix?
[B]Hehe, I am the great Phoenix.
[B]Using defensive analysis to counter-attack, seeing through the enemy's movements.
[A]This is my exclusive divine curse.
[B]Where did you conjure up that equipment from...
[A]My world's technology level is more advanced.
[B]Such lightweight armor also has defense?
[A]Trust in the protective barrier of origami craftsmanship!
[B]I can sense the dark bloodline within you...
[A]Uh, it might actually be some fox demon bloodline.
[A]Miss Chain is always so energetic.
[B]Miss Momiji, come burn with me!
[A]Ah, I'll pass on that.
[B]Such incredible speed, even faster than my spark arrows.
[A]I'm a swordsman known for divine speed.
[A]Are you sisters?
[A]I also have several younger sisters, though in this world they're quite different from what I remember.
[B]Any interest in joining the Momori Group?
[A]Zzz... (sleeping)
[A]Such a huge creature, our world couldn't possibly have something like this.
[B]It seems this is where worlds overlap.
[A]Are you also a swordsman?
[B]No... speaking of which, you're also using a katana, yet with completely different techniques. I should really learn from you.
[B]I've always wanted to ask, how is big sister here so young?
[A]Ah, stop it, stop it! I don't even want to think about it.
SuzakuinMomiji.Character/Suzakuin Momiji_CampSelectWord: You're bringing me along? Ah, I was hoping to rest though.
SuzakuinMomiji.Character_Skin/SuzakuinMomiji2_SkinDesc: Momiji's school uniform, typically worn in non-combat situations.

ysml.Skill/S_ysml_4_Description: Cost is reduced based on the number of healing skills in hand. Protect all allies' Healing Gauge for two turns.
ysml.Skill/S_ysml_5_Description: Stun all enemies. Reduce Mana by 1.
ysml.Skill/S_ysml_6_Description: When the target's action countdown is 1, refund the consumed Mana and cast again.
ysml.Skill/S_ysml_7_Description: If this is the first skill used this turn, reduce cost by 1. On hit, taunt all enemies and generate 8 Barrier.
ysml.Skill/S_ysml_8_Description:
Generate 10 Barrier.
<color=#919191>Those who threaten us must be expelled.</color>
ysml.Skill/S_ysml_R1_Description: Apply unresistable Stun to all enemies. Immediately summon one Ishar-mla (Beast).
ysml.Buff/B_ysml_7_Description: <color=#919191>Accelerated blood cell apoptosis, suppressed bone marrow hematopoiesis</color>
ysml.Buff/B_ysml_10_Description: When taking damage less than 8, the damage becomes 8.
ysml.Buff/B_ysml_12_Description: When dying, restore 6 HP to all allies.
ysml.Buff/B_ysml_13_Description: The next skill used is cast twice.
ysml.Buff/B_ysml_14_Description: Next time acting, all enemies take 15 damage and 1 Neural Damage.
ysml.Buff/B_haisi0_1_Description: Lose 50% of maximum HP at the start of each turn.
ysml.Character/ysml_PassiveDes: At the start of each turn, restore 3 HP to all allies. Every 5 turns, choose to summon one Ishar-mla (Beast).
ysml.Character/ysml_SelectInfo: Unknown background, unknown origin, an extremely mysterious existence in Rhodes Island. After learning about the possibility of returning to the past through finding Shadows of Time, she joined the investigation team. Ishar-mla possesses special 'Authorities' and can manipulate mysterious and powerful beasts to assist in battle. However, according to Kal'tsit, unless she actively requests it, it's best not to invite her to participate in investigations.
ysml.Character/ysml_Text_Battle_Idle_0: The song will seep into your hearts.
ysml.Character/ysml_Text_Battle_Idle_1: Don't be afraid, my kin... it will be soon.
ysml.Character/ysml_Text_Battle_ND_1: If only I could hold on a little longer...
ysml.Character/ysml_Text_Battle_AllyND_0: This place will eventually return to what it once was...
ysml.Character/ysml_Text_Battle_Kill_0: The air and land... are too dry.
ysml.Character/ysml_Text_Battle_Kill_1: Come with me, return with me to our eternal homeland.
ysml.Character/ysml_Text_Battle_Kill_2: Then, please listen to this song from the deep sea...
ysml.Character/ysml_Text_Battle_Start_0: Fighting together with others? Who am I fighting with?
ysml.Character/ysml_Text_Battle_Start_1: No more lives should be lost.
ysml.Character/ysml_Text_Battle_Start_2: When they hurt me with their weapons... what will it feel like?
ysml.Character/ysml_Text_Battle_Cri_0: They will become our blood kin. Their original way of living was too painful.
ysml.Character/ysml_Text_Battle_Cri_1: Struggling will only bring more needless panic.
ysml.Character/ysml_Text_Field_Idle_0: What do you want to do? I will obey.
ysml.Character/ysml_Text_Field_Idle_1: These things... I've seen too many of them.
ysml.Character/ysml_Text_Field_GetItem_0: That place... could it also be a dream?
ysml.Character/ysml_Text_Field_Potion_P_0: What flows in my body is no longer blood, but I feel satisfied.
ysml.Character/ysml_Text_PharosLeader_0: Did your past self ever imagine such a future?
ysml.Character/ysml_Text_PharosLeader_1: Strange, so strange. Is this my future?
ysml.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_ysmL_SilverS: [B]The things you summon seem more terrifying than the monsters.
ysml.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_ysmL_Trisha_: [B]After that big guy appeared, the battlefield was full of shadows.
ysml.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_ysmL_Ilya_Di: [A]You manipulate lightning and ice? Such authority was once beyond us.
[A]Yet in the end, we mastered it too.
[B]I'm very weak... that's hardly any authority at all.
ysml.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_ysmL_Joey_Di: [B]A monster that summons monsters. You're way too suspicious.
ysml.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_ysmL_Narhan_: [B]There are such life forms in other worlds.
[A]We are far more than just this.
ysml.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_ysmL_Priest_: [A]I can indeed be called a 'beast', but different from those in your religion.
ysml.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_ysmL_Leryn_D: [B]May I ask... are you composed of human cells?
ysml.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_ysmL_Sizz_Di: [B]What you summoned... is it a companion like Eve?
[A]Yes, it is my blood kin, and you could say it is me.
ysml.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_ysmL_Johan_D: [A]Emotion... the Collective has never learned from you.
[A]But why can I empathize with you?
ysml.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_ysmL_Huz_Dia: [A]Fish? Hehe, we do come from the sea.
ysml.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_ysmL_Azar_Di: [B](Why would there be something like this in the Ark...)
ysml.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_ysmL_Lian_Di: [B]In battle, can you make that thing attack from another direction?
[B]If it stays in front, there's no formation to speak of.
ysml.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_ysmL_Hein_Di: [B]Let that monster face me in combat!
[A]Such behavior is no different from suicide.
ysml.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_ysmL_Iron_Di: [B]Even with armor protecting me, I couldn't take a single hit from that monster.
[A]It doesn't matter, it won't attack you.
ysml.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_ysmL_Charon_: [B]Are you using some kind of spirit summoning?
[A]That is my Authority, I can call upon the Collective.
[A]But calling it is merely awakening myself.
ysml.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_ysmL_Red_Dia: [B]Are you some kind of monster? Or a fairy?
ysml.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_ysmL_Blue_Di: [B]Your power... isn't it affected by other things?
[A]Adapting to everything is our trait, I can assimilate everything.
ysml.SkillExtended/Ex_ysml_1_Name: Apply 1 Neural Damage to all enemies
ysml.Skill/S_ysml_LucyD_Description: Draw 2 skills. Apply 1 Neural Damage to all enemies.
ysml.Character/ysml_SkinDesc: The leader of creatures called Seaborn, Ishar-mla and her blood kin.
ysml.Character_Skin/ysml_Skin1_SelectInfo: One of Skadi the Corrupting Heart's forms. When She decides to perfect this vessel, the Seaborn shall ascend from Terra to the endless sea of stars above the sky.
ysml.Character_Skin/ysml_Skin1_SkinDesc: Struggle Bloodline Series/Sublimation. She dwells within the ruins of an Iberian cathedral soaked by the sea, her song flowing from her throat into the ears of every Seaborn.
ysml.Character_Skin/ysml_Skin2_SkinDesc: Chaos and impulse brought forth the sole master of the crimson plains. Through such emotions, she created her beloved creation.

Ralmia.Buff/B_Ralmia_0_Description: Each time you play an <color=#97FFFF>Artifact</color> skill, restore 1 Mana and draw 1 skill.
Ralmia.Buff/B_Ralmia_1_Description:
Each time you play an <color=#97FFFF>Artifact</color> skill, restore 1 Mana.
<color=#97FFFF>Artifact</color> skills in hand gain Swiftness.
Ralmia.Buff/B_Ralmia_2_Description: Draw 1 skill at the end of the turn.
Ralmia.Buff/B_Ralmia_P_Description: In this battle, &a types of <color=#97FFFF>Artifacts</color> have been used.
Ralmia.Character/Ralmia_CampSelectWord: "Optical mobility, ascension complete! I can even outrun light itself!"
Ralmia.Character/Ralmia_PassiveDes: At the start of each turn, gain 1 [Breaking Sound Barrier].
Ralmia.Character/Ralmia_SelectInfo: The fastest progress created the fastest machine. She surpasses sound and approaches the speed of light. That is a velocity flesh and blood cannot reach. No person or thing can catch up to her anymore.
Ralmia.Skill/S_Ralmia_10Rare_Description: If [<color=#97FFFF>Artifact</color> types used in this battle] is 6 or more, deal an additional %a(150%) damage to all enemies.
Ralmia.Skill/S_Ralmia_12_Description: Choose - Select and play 1 from [Swift Artifact] [Defensive Artifact].
Ralmia.Skill/S_Ralmia_13Rare_0_Description:
Restore all Healing Gauge of the target.
Remove all debuffs.
Ralmia.Skill/S_Ralmia_13Rare_1_Description:
Become immune to the next damage taken.
Restore %a(100%) HP.
Ralmia.Skill/S_Ralmia_13Rare_2_Description:
For each <color=#97FFFF>Artifact</color> skill played this turn, deal &a(25%) additional damage.
Current additional damage: &b
Ralmia.Skill/S_Ralmia_13Rare_Description:
When played, if this card has Swiftness, add 1 [Guardian Artifact] and 1 [Protective Artifact] to hand.
When played, if [<color=#97FFFF>Artifact</color> types used in this battle] is 6 or more, add 2 [Cannon Artifacts] to hand.
Ralmia.Skill/S_Ralmia_1_Description: Fast. Nothing special other than that.
Ralmia.Skill/S_Ralmia_2_Description: Draw 1 skill. Heal yourself for %a HP.
Ralmia.Skill/S_Ralmia_6_Description:
Can only target <color=#97FFFF>Artifact</color> skills.
Reduce its cost by 1 and generate 3 copies with Exclude to the deck.
Ralmia.Skill/S_Ralmia_7_Description:
Preferentially draw 2 <color=#97FFFF>Artifact</color> skills.
For each <color=#97FFFF>Artifact</color> skill not drawn, restore 1 Mana.
Ralmia.Skill/S_Ralmia_8_Description: Choose - Select 2 types from [Analyzing Artifact] [Ancient Artifact] [Mystical Artifact] [Brilliant Artifact], and generate 2 skills of each with Exclude to the deck.
Ralmia.Skill/S_Ralmia_9_0_Description:
While in hand, reduce cost by 1 for each <color=#97FFFF>Artifact</color> skill played.
Choose - Select and play 1 from [Defensive Artifact] [Sharp Artifact] [Swift Artifact].
Ralmia.Skill/S_Ralmia_9_1_Description: Instantly defeat non-Elite and non-Boss units.
Ralmia.Skill/S_Ralmia_9_Description: Choose - Select 1 from [Analyzing Artifact] [Ancient Artifact] [Brilliant Artifact] [Paradigm Transfer] and add it to hand.
Ralmia.Skill/S_Ralmia_LucyD_Description:
Select 2 skills from the discard pile to hand.
If <color=#97FFFF>Artifact</color> skills are selected, set their cost to 0.
Ralmia.Skill/S_Ralmia_P_Description: Grant Swiftness to the target skill.
Ralmia.SkillExtended/SkillEn_Ralmia_1_Des: Select an Artifact in your hand and reduce its skill cost by 1.
Ralmia.SkillKeyword/KeyWord_Artifact_Desc: Divine instruments created by ancient gods.
Ralmia.SkillExtended/SE_Ralmia_C_0_Name: This skill is treated as an <color=#97FFFF>Artifact</color>.

“店长” 'ShopKeeper'.Skill/S_ShopKeeper_1_Description:
Deal additional damage equal to current gold ÷ 100.
When in debt, deal damage equal to gold ÷ (-250) instead.
“店长” 'ShopKeeper'.Skill/S_ShopKeeper_2_Description:
Each time you spend/gain gold, this skill's gold cost is reduced by 10G and deals additional &a (10%) damage.
When in debt, each time you spend/gain gold, this skill's gold cost increases by 10G and deals additional &a (10%) damage. End turn after using.
“店长” 'ShopKeeper'.Skill/S_ShopKeeper_3_Description:
When drawn while in debt, spend 30G to draw 1 skill.
Drawn skills cost an additional 20G to use.
“店长” 'ShopKeeper'.Skill/S_ShopKeeper_4_Description: When in debt, lose Once. When played, spend up to 2 Mana. For each Mana spent, draw 1 skill. Skills drawn this way cost an additional 10G to use.
“店长” 'ShopKeeper'.Skill/S_ShopKeeper_6_Description:
When hitting an enemy, gain 1 Mana.
When in debt, costs no gold and gains Swiftness and Ignore Taunt, but cannot gain Mana.
“店长” 'ShopKeeper'.Skill/S_ShopKeeper_7_Description:
On hit, gain 10G.
The more enemies hit, the more gold gained.
“店长” 'ShopKeeper'.Skill/S_ShopKeeper_8_Description:
On hit, gain gold equal to the target's remaining HP. Maximum 30G.
When in debt, additionally gain 1 common item and advance Black Mist by 2 turns after use.
“店长” 'ShopKeeper'.Skill/S_ShopKeeper_9_Description:
On hit, randomly bounce between targets 3 times, with damage reduced by 50% each bounce.
When in debt, no longer bounces but gains +50% Critical Hit Chance and +50% Critical Damage. Mana becomes 0 after use.
“店长” 'ShopKeeper'.Skill/S_ShopKeeper_P_0_Description: After use, remove all your Overload. For each Overload removed, prioritize drawing one of your skills. Drawn skills have their gold cost reduced to 0.
“店长” 'ShopKeeper'.Skill/S_ShopKeeper_P_1_Description: After use, remove all Overload from the target. For each Overload removed, draw 1 skill. Drawn skills cost an additional 50G to use.
“店长” 'ShopKeeper'.Skill/S_ShopKeeper_P_2_Description:
When spending Mana, reduce this skill's discard countdown by 1.
When this skill is excluded, end turn and draw 1 skill.
“店长” 'ShopKeeper'.Skill/S_ShopKeeper_R1_Description:
On hit, 88% chance to gain 88G.
8% chance to deal an additional 88 damage.
“店长” 'ShopKeeper'.Skill/S_ShopKeeper_R2_Description: Shuffle copies of all skills in hand into the top of the draw pile. Then add Exclude, discard after 2 turns, and Swiftness to all skills in hand, and change them to use gold instead of Mana at 10G per Mana cost.
“店长” 'ShopKeeper'.Skill/S_ShopKeeper_R3_Description:
Discard the top 3 skills from your hand, then draw 3 skills.
If 3 skills were discarded, shuffle this skill into the draw pile.
“店长” 'ShopKeeper'.SkillExtended/Ex_ShopKeeper_1_Name:
Once
After use, increase all relic counters by 1 and trigger turn start/end button press effects once.
“店长” 'ShopKeeper'.SkillExtended/Ex_ShopKeeper_C_Des: Pay additional gold when playing this skill
“店长” 'ShopKeeper'.Buff/B_ShopKeeper_4_Description: Each time you are attacked or take an action, gain 10G.
“店长” 'ShopKeeper'.Buff/B_ShopKeeper_5_Description:
Gold costs for skills are paid with this character's HP instead.
HP paid equals half the required gold amount.
“店长” 'ShopKeeper'.Buff/B_ShopKeeper_R3_0_Description: Draw 1 skill at the start of turn.
“店长” 'ShopKeeper'.Buff/B_ShopKeeper_R3_1_Description:
Increases "New Product Launch" gold cost by 10G per stack.
When in debt, each stack provides +12% Attack.
Reduce by 2 stacks when shuffling.
“店长” 'ShopKeeper'.Buff/B_ShopKeeper_R3_2_Description: When not in debt, each stack reduces gold cost of skills in hand by 5G, minimum 0G.
“店长” 'ShopKeeper'.Character/ShopKeeper_PassiveDes:
Shopkeeper's exclusive skills consume <color=#FDD017>gold</color>.

Purchase items in shops at 50% discount and ignore gold purchase restrictions.

Enter debt state when gold becomes negative. Mana is reduced while in debt.
When drawing Lucy skills while in debt, Lucy skills are excluded and generate a special Shopkeeper skill instead.

Items now only provide half their value when converted to gold.
“店长” 'ShopKeeper'.Character/ShopKeeper_SelectInfo:
Violet.
Shopkeeper and bartender of Four Seasons Tavern.
Her daily hobbies are mixing drinks and doing business. Since Four Seasons Tavern is located in Monsoon Fishing Village, Violet often meets all kinds of people.
The epidemic in the fishing village has caused business to decline, with only a few old friends still visiting.
Currently worried about finding a new location for the tavern's relocation.
“店长” 'ShopKeeper'.Character/ShopKeeper_Text_Field_Idle_0: Let me mix you a drink while we have time.
“店长” 'ShopKeeper'.Character/ShopKeeper_Text_Field_Idle_1: Never mind, I didn't bring my shaker.
“店长” 'ShopKeeper'.Character/ShopKeeper_Text_Field_GetItem_: Is there still room in storage?
“店长” 'ShopKeeper'.Item_Equip/Equip_ShopKeeper_1_Descriptio:
For every 200 gold, equipper gains +1% Critical Hit Chance.
For every 500 gold, equipper gains +5% Accuracy.
For every 1000 gold, equipper gains +1 Attack Power.
When gold is negative, for every -2000 gold, gain double the above effects but Maximum Health becomes 50%.

Lumiore.Buff/B_Lumiore_12Rare_Description: Whenever a skill in hand is exchanged/discarded, deal %a damage to a random enemy and restore %b HP to the ally with the lowest HP. Can trigger up to 20 times per turn.
Lumiore.Buff/B_Lumiore_13Rare_Description: Whenever a skill in hand is exchanged/discarded, deal %a damage to all enemies. Can trigger up to 20 times per turn.
Lumiore.Buff/B_Lumiore_14Rare_Description: Healing Gauge Protection. Damage taken is reduced to 0.
Lumiore.Buff/B_Lumiore_6_Description: Healing Gauge Protection. All resistances increased.
Lumiore.Character/Lumiore_PassiveDes:
At the start of battle, gain 1 Maximum Mana. If awakened (Maximum Mana exceeds 7), some cards gain additional effects.
Awakening: At the start of battle, draw 1 additional skill.
Lumiore.Character/Lumiore_SelectInfo:
I'm so tired of hearing that having a single wing is "unusual".
But... being unusual means being the most special!
I'll prove it. As the eldest sister, as everyone's role model!
So, my adorable little brothers and sisters! Leave everything to your big sister from now on!
Lumiore.Skill/S_Lumiore_0_Description: Discard 1 skill from the bottom of your hand and draw 1 skill.
Lumiore.Skill/S_Lumiore_13Rare_Description:
Restore 2 Mana.
If [cards discarded this battle] is greater than 4, discard 2 skills and draw 3 skills.
Lumiore.Skill/S_Lumiore_14Rare_0_Description: Reduce your HP to 1. All allies gain the buff [Last Stand] for 1 turn: Healing Gauge Protection, damage taken is reduced to 0.
Lumiore.Skill/S_Lumiore_14Rare_Description:
Reduce your HP to 1. All allies gain the buff [Last Stand] for 1 turn: Healing Gauge Protection, damage taken is reduced to 0.
Excitement 1 - Add 1 copy of Zooey, the Great Peacekeeper with 4 cost and no Excitement effect to your deck. Draw 1 skill.
Lumiore.Skill/S_Lumiore_2_0_Description: If [cards discarded this turn] is 1 or more, deal &a damage to a random enemy.
Lumiore.Skill/S_Lumiore_2_Description: If [cards discarded this turn] is 1 or more, deal &a damage to a random enemy.
Lumiore.Skill/S_Lumiore_3_Description:
Excitement 1 - Discard 1 skill and draw 1 skill.
Awakening - Draw 2 skills instead.
Lumiore.Skill/S_Lumiore_4_Description:
Add 1 [Fortress Crab] with Exclude to your hand (0 cost, deal &a damage).
Excitement 2 - Swiftness; discard 1 skill and draw 2 skills.
Lumiore.Skill/S_Lumiore_5_Description:
When played, discard 2 of your skills and increase your Maximum Mana by 1.
If [cards discarded this battle] is greater than 2 (not including this skill), draw 3 skills.
Lumiore.Skill/S_Lumiore_6_0_Description: Awakening - Deal &a damage instead. Gain buff for 1 turn: Healing Gauge Protection. All resistances increased.
Lumiore.Skill/S_Lumiore_6_0_Name: Black and White Rampage, Noir & Blanc
Lumiore.Skill/S_Lumiore_6_Description:
Discard - Add 1 copy of Black and White Rampage, Noir & Blanc with 0 cost and Exclude to your hand, deal &a damage instead.
Awakening - Deal &b damage instead. Gain buff for 1 turn: Healing Gauge Protection. All resistances increased.
Lumiore.Skill/S_Lumiore_6_Name: Black and White Rampage, Noir & Blanc
Lumiore.Skill/S_Lumiore_7_1_Description: Deal &a damage to a random enemy.
Lumiore.Skill/S_Lumiore_7_Description:
Choose - Choose and play 1 from [Rowen's Roar] or [Baidi's Claw].
Awakening - Change from [Choose] to [Play Both].
