Rowen's Roar: Increase your Maximum Mana by 1.
Baidi's Claw: Deal &a damage to a random enemy.
Lumiore.Skill/S_Lumiore_8_Description:
Increase your Maximum Mana by 1.
Awakening - Heal yourself for &a. Draw 2 skills.
Lumiore.Skill/S_Lumiore_9_0_Description: If the enemy is injured, deal an additional &a damage.
Lumiore.Skill/S_Lumiore_9_Description: Add 1 [Silver Ice Breath] to your hand.
Lumiore.Skill/S_Lumiore_LucyD_Description:
Prioritize drawing the 2 highest cost skills from your deck.
Awakening - Draw 3 instead of 2.
Lumiore.SkillKeyword/KeyWord_Excitement_Desc: Skills with [Excitement] can be played at reduced cost for weaker effects when you don't have enough Mana.
Lumiore.SkillKeyword/KeyWord_LumioreWake_Desc: Skills with [Awakening] gain additional effects when Maximum Mana is 7 or greater.
Lumiore.SkillKeyword/KeyWord_LumioreWaste_Desc: Skills with [Discard] trigger additional effects when discarded.
Lumiore.Character_Skin/LumioreSkin_SkinDesc:
Unlike my plain big brother, big sister is dazzling as always today!
—Argente, Purest Silver
If you think I'm a cute little brother, then don't make me run errands!
—Noir, Black-Winged Brother

Amiya.Buff/B_Amiya_10_CivilightEterna_Descript: Immune to death once. Good night, Your Highness.
Amiya.Buff/B_Amiya_4_mood_Description: Each stack reduces Attack by 6%. Upon reaching 5 stacks, clear all stacks and trigger Stun (Stun effect can only trigger 5 times).
Amiya.Buff/B_Amiya_7_ring_Description: Upon reaching 5 stacks, immune to death. In "Lord of Fiends" form, restore all HP and cannot cast skills.
Amiya.Buff/B_Amiya_8_king1_Description:
Restore Mana.
Each time a skill is cast, lose 10% Max Health, restore 1 Mana, and draw 1 card. Lose an additional 10% Max Health at the end of each turn.
Amiya.Buff/B_Amiya_8_king_Name: Birth of the Lord of Fiends
Amiya.Character/Amiya_PassiveDes:
At the start of each turn, add "Emotional Absorption" to the first skill that doesn't have it.
(When cast, draw 1 card and restore 2 Mana. If discarded, draw 1 card and restore 1 Mana instead. The same skill can stack this effect.)
Amiya.Character/Amiya_SelectInfo: Amiya, the leader of Rhodes Island, possesses extremely high resistance and single-target burst capability. She can provide significant team bonuses, but Amiya has very low HP and most skills cost health. Please monitor Amiya's condition at all times.
Amiya.Character/Amiya_Text_Battle_Cri_0: Phew, I should be able to rest for a little while now.
Amiya.Character/Amiya_Text_Battle_Healed_0: Doctor, please... listen to me for a moment, will you?
Amiya.Character/Amiya_Text_Battle_Idle_0: I'm fine... Everyone, please pull yourselves together!
Amiya.Character/Amiya_Text_Battle_Kill_0: What should I use to answer your injustice?
Amiya.Character/Amiya_Text_Battle_ND_0: If battle is unavoidable... Those were the words taught to me by someone I once trusted most.
Amiya.Character/Amiya_Text_Field_GetItem_0: Doctor, let me handle the cleanup.
Amiya.Character/Amiya_Text_Field_Idle_0: Doctor, are you alright? Do you want to rest for a bit? Let me help you. Don't worry, I'm fine. As long as you rest well, that's enough.
Amiya.Character/Amiya_Text_Field_Potion_P_0: Doctor... lately... have I become a bit unlike myself? That nameless rage that occasionally rises... is it mine?
Amiya.Item_Equip/E_Amiya_Crown_Description:
When equipped by a female, gain an additional 30% Physical Lifesteal.
When equipped by a male, take 15% Max Health damage with each attack and draw 1 card.
Amiya.Skill/S_Amiya_L_Description: This skill gains "Emotional Absorption". Add "Unyielding" to an ally.
Amiya.Skill/S_Amiya_b1_Description: This skill gains "Emotional Absorption". Prioritize using other investigators' attack skills from the deck for follow-up attacks. Operation begins. Let's go!
Amiya.Skill/S_Amiya_b2_Description: Add 1 stack of "Wrathful Cerulean Flame" to all allies. ——I bear the anger of many.
Amiya.Skill/S_Amiya_b4_Description:
This skill gains "Emotional Absorption".
Deal 30%(&a) Max Health damage to self.
Amiya.Skill/S_Amiya_b5_Description:
This skill gains "Emotional Absorption".
Lose 50%(&a) Health.
Next skill triggers twice.
If not used after one turn, discard and exclude.
Amiya.Skill/S_Amiya_fx1_dx_Description:
Reduce own Max Health by 30%.
Cast "Leader" on a random enemy.
If Emotional Absorption is 5 stacks or more, can choose to cast "Chimera", "Ying Xiao - Shadowless", or "Birth of the Lord of Fiends".
Amiya.Skill/S_Amiya_k1_Description: Restore all Health. Add 1 stack of "Emotional Absorption" to up to 4 cards in hand. Gain 1 stack of "Birth of the Lord of Fiends". Clear "Emotional Absorption".
Amiya.Skill/S_Amiya_k1_Name: Birth of the Lord of Fiends
Amiya.Skill/S_Amiya_m1_Description: Lose 50% Health&a. Cast on an enemy a number of times equal to "Emotional Absorption" stacks + 1. Everyone believes in me!
Amiya.Skill/S_Amiya_m2_Description: Lose 50% Health&a. Repeat casting an additional number of times equal to the number of enemies hit + 1. Are you afraid of me?
Amiya.Skill/S_Amiya_re1_qml_Description: This skill gains "Emotional Absorption". If "Emotional Absorption" is less than 5 stacks, take 50% Max Health damage after skill ends. If "Emotional Absorption" is 5 stacks or more, clear all "Emotional Absorption", cast Chimera once more ignoring Defense, and lose 80% Max Health. ——Are you afraid of me?
Amiya.Skill/S_Amiya_re2_sword_Description:
This skill gains "Emotional Absorption".
If "Emotional Absorption" is less than 5 stacks, cast slashes ignoring Defense a number of times equal to "Emotional Absorption" stacks, and take <color=purple>60% Max Health damage</color>.
If "Emotional Absorption" is 5 stacks or more, clear "Emotional Absorption", cast 10 slashes ignoring Defense, clear all "Emotional Absorption", gain 1 stack of "Wrathful Cerulean Flame", and take <color=purple>80% Max Health damage</color>.
Amiya.Skill/S_Amiya_s1_0_Description: <color=purple>Always critical hit, ignores Defense, deals additional damage based on "Ying Xiao - Unsheathed" damage.</color>
Amiya.Skill/S_Amiya_s1_Description: Add 1 stack of "Wrathful Cerulean Flame" to self and follow up with "Ying Xiao - Slash". Don't... don't make me angry.
Amiya.Skill/S_Amiya_s2_Description: Deal additional damage to the enemy with the lowest Health. If there is only one target, deal &a additional damage. Your thoughts, your Arts, I can cut through them all.
Amiya.SkillExtended/Amiya_Ex_0_Des:
Draw 1 card and restore 2 Mana. If discarded, draw 1 card and restore 1 Mana instead.
Can stack.

Yuuka.Skill/S_yuuka_1_Description: Take Cover when hitting an enemy.
Yuuka.Skill/S_yuuka_4_Description: All allies Take Cover. Cost becomes 0 while in Cover.
Yuuka.Skill/S_yuuka_5_Description:
Ignore Defense.
Deal bonus damage equal to 60% Attack Power 2 times.
Yuuka.Skill/S_yuuka_6_Description: After using this skill, allies who have skills in hand Take Cover.
Yuuka.Skill/S_yuuka_8_Description: Gain a Shield equal to &a (80% Healing Power).
Yuuka.Skill/S_yuuka_R1_Description: Gain a Shield equal to 314% Healing Power.
Yuuka.Skill/S_yuuka_R2_Description: Gain a Shield equal to 168% Healing Power.
Yuuka.Skill/S_yuuka_R3_Description: Yuuka and the ally with the lowest HP Take Cover.
Yuuka.Buff/B_yuuka_2_Description: While in Cover, using skills restores 20% of Max. Health.
Yuuka.Buff/B_yuuka_3_Description: The Evade rate of 'Block Rate' gained from taking Cover is increased by an additional 12%.
Yuuka.Buff/B_yuuka_4_Description: The Armor of 'Block Rate' gained from taking Cover is increased by an additional 12%.
Yuuka.Buff/B_yuuka_7_Description:
Take Cover when receiving damage from an enemy.
The Evade rate of 'Block Rate' gained from Evasion is increased by an additional 8%.
Lose 1 stack when receiving damage from an enemy.
Yuuka.Buff/B_yuuka_7_T_Description:
Cannot attack enemies other than Yuuka.
Removed after attacking the target.
Yuuka.Buff/B_yuuka_8_Description: While in Cover, gain a Shield equal to 50% Healing Power for 2 turns.
Yuuka.Buff/B_yuuka_R1_Description: On Evade, extend the Q.E.D Shield by 1 turn.
Yuuka.Buff/B_yuuka_R3_Description: Gains a stack when a skill is used, and loses a stack at the end of the turn. Cannot go below 1 stack.
Yuuka.Character/yuuka_PassiveDes:
At the start of the turn, Yuuka has a 35% chance to Take Cover, gaining the 'Block Rate' buff with +24% Evade rate.
If other allies in the party Take Cover, they also benefit from the 'Block Rate' effect.

Terrain Adaptability: A~B
Yuuka.Character/yuuka_SelectInfo:
Member of Millennium Science School, treasurer of the student council "Seminar."
A prominent mathematical genius even among Millennium's STEM-rich student base, she oversees the budget management of Millennium.
Her specialty is the abacus, and she has a habit of using it to calm herself when troubled by complex matters.
Yuuka.Character_Skin/yuukaskin_SelectInfo:
Hayase Yuuka. Member of Millennium Science School, treasurer of the student council [Seminar].
A prominent mathematical genius even among Millennium's STEM-rich student base, she oversees the budget management of Millennium Science School.
Her specialty is the abacus, and she has a habit of using it to calm herself when bogged down by complex matters.
Yuuka.Character_Skin/yuukaskin_SkinDesc:
Member of Millennium Science School, the treasurer of Seminar who changed into a gym uniform to participate in the Kivotos Grand Fest.
<color=#919191>Quite the look.</color>
Yuuka.Character_Skin/yuukaskin02_SkinDesc: Member of Millennium Science School, the treasurer of Seminar who changed into pajamas for a relaxing rest. Though she must always present herself in perfect working condition, the stress and sleeplessness brought on by endless troubles make it hard to say she gets proper rest. She prepared a soft pillow and comfortable pajamas... but with a certain someone causing chaos in Millennium at all hours, the day she can finally sleep soundly still seems far away.

MiyuMod.Buff/B_Miyu_4_Description:
Attack skills apply (<sprite=0>&a%) 'Weak Point Identified' to the target.
Each debuff applied consumes 1 stack.
MiyuMod.Buff/B_Miyu_R0_Description:
When dealing non-Pain damage, deal <color=purple>Pain damage</color> equal to &a of the user's Attack Power.
(Up to 20 times)

Remaining: &m
MiyuMod.Buff/B_Miyu_R1_Description:
When attacked, this effect is removed and 1 "Rabbit4 Aim" is generated in hand.
If the target resists this debuff or its duration expires, the skill is added to the discard pile instead.
MiyuMod.Buff/B_Miyu_R3_Description: Gain Stealth when not already in Stealth.
MiyuMod.Buff/B_miyu_stealth_Description: Greatly reduces the chance of being targeted.
MiyuMod.Character/Miyu_PassiveDes: At the start of each turn, if not in Stealth, Miyu gains Stealth.
MiyuMod.Character/Miyu_SelectInfo:
A sniper from the RABBIT Platoon of SRT Special Academy. Though she had hoped her sniping talent would help her thrive in SRT, the school suddenly closed. She now lives in a park with her platoon members. Her near-invisible presence is an asset on sniper missions — but it means even her allies tend to forget she exists. Callsign: "RABBIT4".
"W-We're fighting now?"
MiyuMod.Character/Miyu_Text_Battle_AllyND_0: Wuu... I knew I'm completely useless...
MiyuMod.Character/Miyu_Text_Battle_Healed_0: Eh, this? Is this... for me?
MiyuMod.Character/Miyu_Text_Battle_Kill_0: I can't get in everyone's way...
MiyuMod.Skill/Miyu_skill_10_Description:
Draw 1 skill.
Add 1 'Pre-Mission Recon' to the discard pile.
MiyuMod.Skill/Miyu_skill_11_Description: Ambush: Can be used one additional time this turn.
MiyuMod.Skill/Miyu_skill_2_Description: Gain Stealth. If already in Stealth, draw 2 skills instead.
MiyuMod.Skill/Miyu_skill_3_0_Description:
Add 'Quick, Hide...' to the discard pile.
Ambush: Draw 1 skill.
MiyuMod.Skill/Miyu_skill_3_1_Description:
Gain Stealth.
Add 'Quick, Hide...' to the discard pile.
MiyuMod.Skill/Miyu_skill_3_Description:
Choose one to generate in hand:
'L-Let's Try It.' or 'S-So Scary...'
MiyuMod.Skill/Miyu_skill_4_0_Description:
Cannot be used on the turn it is obtained.
Generate 1 'Tough Fishing Trip' in hand.
MiyuMod.Skill/Miyu_skill_5_Description:
Cannot be used.
Ambush: Becomes usable.
MiyuMod.Skill/Miyu_skill_6_Description:
While this skill is on Countdown, each time an attack skill is used, this skill is immediately applied to a random enemy.

Remaining: &a
MiyuMod.Skill/Miyu_skill_7_Description:
Reduce the cost of skills in hand by 1 (excluding Lucy's skills).
Ambush: Hits with a Critical.
MiyuMod.Skill/Miyu_skill_7_Name: An Attack from an Unexpected Angle
MiyuMod.Skill/Miyu_skill_9_Description:
Draw 1 skill.
Add 1 'On-Site Survey' to the discard pile.
MiyuMod.Skill/Miyu_skill_LucyD_Description:
Cannot be used.
At the start of the turn, if this skill is in hand, draw 1 skill.
MiyuMod.SkillKeyword/Keyword_Miyu_Desc:
Gain bonus effects while in Stealth.
Using an Ambush skill removes Stealth.

Hibiki.Hibiki/Character/Text_Battle_Idle: It's okay even if I'm alone.
Hibiki.Hibiki/Character/PassiveDes: The Phoenix of the battlefield enters a 3-turn repair state before death. After repair completion, refit to Верный, gaining 20% Defense, 20% Maximum Health, and 20% Night Battle CI chance. In Верный state, when other allies die, discover one exclusive rare skill and two common skills.
Hibiki.Hibiki/Character/SelectInfo: A calm and steady shipgirl. Compared to the other three sisters of DesDiv 6, Hibiki is rather quiet. However, she has a passionate side in battle, shouting 'Ura!' with very Russian characteristics as she charges. Hibiki doesn't seem to like grooming herself, as her hair appears slightly messy in her artwork. Throughout her life, she fought continuously, suffering severe damage multiple times and having to return to port for repairs, but was never sunk.
Hibiki.Hibiki/Character/SK_Verniy_Desc: After the holder dies, the skill is not discarded. If the user is not Hibiki, transform into Hibiki.
Hibiki.Hibiki/Skill/S_Hibiki_0_Desc: Escort target character. 33% chance to intercept single-target follow-up damage skills aimed at the escorted target. 33% chance to follow-up attack when escorted target attacks. Generate one Protect.
Hibiki.Hibiki/Skill/B_Hibiki_0_Desc: &a% chance to intercept single-target follow-up damage skills aimed at target. &b% chance to follow-up attack when supported target attacks.
Hibiki.Hibiki/Skill/S_Hibiki_0_1_Desc: Protect target and grant &a Barrier to escorted target.
Hibiki.Hibiki/Skill/S_Hibiki_1_Desc: Scout enemy information, increasing target's chance to receive critical hits and reducing Evade rate. Effects are doubled against newly appeared targets.
Hibiki.Hibiki/Skill/B_Hibiki_1_Desc: When new enemies appear, reduce their Evade rate and increase their chance to receive critical hits.
Hibiki.Hibiki/Skill/S_Hibiki_2_Desc: Artillery attack deals damage. Always critical hit against scouted targets.
Hibiki.Hibiki/Skill/S_Hibiki_3_Desc: Launch torpedo attack against target. On hit, reduce Defense.
Hibiki.Hibiki/Skill/S_Hibiki_4_P1_Desc: Increase Attack, reduce Defense. Also increase Artillery coefficient by 20% and Torpedo coefficient by 40%.
Hibiki.Hibiki/Skill/S_Hibiki_4_P2_Desc: Increase escort follow-up chance. Escort interception can intercept non-follow-up skills.
Hibiki.Hibiki/Skill/B_Hibiki_4_P2_Desc: Escort follow-up chance increased to 50%. Escort interception can intercept non-follow-up skills.
Hibiki.Hibiki/Skill/S_Hibiki_5_Desc: Charge toward enemies, increasing Aggro, chance to receive critical hits, and Defense. Generate one Ram.
Hibiki.Hibiki/Skill/S_Hibiki_5_1_Desc: Deal 25% of current health as damage to self, deal &a additional damage.
Hibiki.Hibiki/Skill/S_Hibiki_6_Desc: After turn ends, perform one additional night battle attack (coefficient equal to Artillery). 20% chance to trigger CI attack (coefficient increased by Torpedo coefficient).
Hibiki.Hibiki/Skill/B_Hibiki_6_Desc: After turn ends, perform one additional night battle attack (coefficient equal to Artillery). &a% chance to trigger CI attack (coefficient increased by Torpedo coefficient).
Hibiki.Hibiki/Skill/S_Hibiki_7_Desc: Choose a skill to gain Trust. Draw one card.
Hibiki.Hibiki/Skill/S_Hibiki_8_Desc: Can only be used in Close Combat state and not in critical condition. Fire main guns, deal 2x Artillery coefficient damage to area enemies, plus current health (&a) damage. Enter critical condition after use.
Hibiki.Hibiki/Skill/S_Hibiki_Rare_1_Desc: Complete repairs quickly (can only be used in repair state).
Hibiki.Hibiki/Skill/S_Hibiki_Rare_2_Desc: Artillery coefficient increased by 50%, Torpedo coefficient increased by 100%, Night Battle CI chance increased by 30%.
Hibiki.Hibiki/Skill/B_Hibiki_Rare_2_Desc: Artillery coefficient increased by 50%, Torpedo coefficient increased by 100%, Night Battle CI chance increased by 30%.
Hibiki.Hibiki/Skill/S_Hibiki_LucyD_Desc: Draw a desired skill from deck and attach Trust to it.

Chtholly.Buff/B_Chtholly_0_Description:
For each stack of Memory Loss, gain +3% Attack Power and +3% Critical Hit Chance.
When Memory Loss stacks reach 6 or more, effects are doubled, and when Memory Loss stacks increase, gain an additional stack. All skills ignore Taunt.
When Memory Loss reaches 10, enter Sleepwalking until Memory Loss stacks are cleared to 0.
Chtholly.Buff/B_Chtholly_1_Description: Cannot act. Removed when Memory Loss is cleared to 0.
Chtholly.Buff/B_Chtholly_2_Description: Damage taken is increased based on the caster's debuff stacks. Each stack increases damage taken by 2%.
Chtholly.Buff/B_Chtholly_3_Description: At the end of turn, remove this effect and draw cards equal to Memory Loss stacks (up to 6 cards).
Chtholly.Buff/B_Chtholly_4_Description:
Whenever an investigator is inflicted with a debuff, take &a damage.
Whenever Memory Loss exceeds 6, duration increases by 1 turn.
Chtholly.Buff/B_Chtholly_5_Description:
Can use skills while unable to act.
When this effect is removed, take 3 Pain damage for each stack of Memory Loss gained during this effect (calculated as total sum).
Upcoming damage: &a
Chtholly.Buff/B_Chtholly_6_Description: When gaining Memory Loss, draw a Redemption skill from discard pile/deck, reduce its cost by 1 before playing, then remove this effect.
Chtholly.Buff/B_Chtholly_7_Description:
Memory Loss cap becomes 9.
When Memory Loss stacks are 6 or more, gain 1 Mana at the start of each turn and prioritize drawing one of your own skills.
Chtholly.Buff/B_Chtholly_8_Description:
For each stack of Memory Loss gained in this area, increase Maximum Health by 1 (including before gaining this buff).
Each time a non-Memory skill is used, gain +1 Attack Power this turn.
When receiving healing, a random other ally receives the same amount of healing.
Chtholly.Buff/B_Chtholly_9_Description:
Can use one skill per turn while unable to act. Excess Memory Loss deals 2 damage to a random unit.
While Sleepwalking, when Memory Loss changes for the first time each turn, randomly cast an exclusive skill (excluding same-name skills of unique skills).
When Sleepwalking is removed, this buff is also removed.
Current: &a
Chtholly.Buff/B_Chtholly_e1_Description: Only active when only Weakening or CC debuffs are present.
Chtholly.Character/Chtholly_PassiveDes:
Chtholly fights at the cost of memories.
After casting Chtholly's non-Memory skills, gain 1 stack of Memory Loss.
When using Memory skills, reduce Memory Loss by 1 stack.
Chtholly.Character/Chtholly_SelectInfo:
The happiest girl in the world

Chtholly possesses powerful physical damage output and Pain debuffs, but as a trade-off, requires careful management of Memory Loss levels.
Chtholly.Item_Equip/E_Chtholly_1_Description: If the wearer is affected by Weakening or CC debuffs, gain +300% Weakening and CC Resist.
Chtholly.Item_Equip/E_Chtholly_2_Description: After the wearer receives a debuff, reduce damage taken by 25% this turn.
Chtholly.Item_Equip/E_Chtholly_3_Description: Damage dealt to Pharos enemies is increased by 40%.
Chtholly.Item_Passive/I_Chtholly_1_Description:
At the start of battle, the ally with the lowest health gains 1 stack of "Debuff Resist" buff.
When our side first receives a debuff each turn, gain 1 Mana.

----Witness
Chtholly.Item_Passive/i_Chtholly_2_Description: At the end of each turn, restore 4 health to investigators who received debuffs this turn.
Chtholly.Skill/S_Chtholly_0_Description: Memory Can be used while unable to act. When Memory Loss stacks are 5 or less, lose an additional 2 stacks. Can use skills while unable to act this turn.
Chtholly.Skill/S_Chtholly_11_Description:
When cast, if Memory Loss stacks are not 10 and not 0, you may choose to attack up to 2 additional times (random targets), gaining 1 Memory Loss stack per extra attack.
Then if Memory Loss becomes 10 due to this effect, exclude this skill.
Chtholly.Skill/S_Chtholly_1_Description: When Memory Loss stacks are 3 or more, this skill ignores Taunt, becomes Swiftness, gains Critical and Tracking, and draws a skill when used.
Chtholly.Skill/S_Chtholly_3_Description:
This skill does not increase Memory Loss when cast.
If current Memory Loss stacks are 5 or less, double current stacks; otherwise increase to a maximum of 10.
Chtholly.Skill/S_Chtholly_4_Description: Memory Reveal 3 of your non-Memory exclusive skills, then choose one to cast. If Memory Loss stacks before using this skill were 2 or more and are higher after casting the chosen skill, take the chosen skill into your hand.
Chtholly.Skill/S_Chtholly_5_Description:
For each stack of Memory Loss, damage is increased by &a.
After hitting, if the target's remaining health is less than 1/10 of the damage dealt, reduce their health to 0.
If you have Memory Loss but no more than 5 stacks, increase Memory Loss to 5 stacks.
Current bonus damage: &b
Chtholly.Skill/S_Chtholly_6_Description: When there are no Memory skills in hand, additionally apply one stack of Death Erosion to all enemies.
Chtholly.Skill/S_Chtholly_7_Description: Memory Add "Reflection" effect to 2 random skills of yours in discard pile, hand, and deck. (Reflection: Treated as Memory skill; if not excluded after casting, return to hand; removed after playing)
Chtholly.Skill/S_Chtholly_8_Description: Based on your current Memory Loss stacks, each stack deals Pain damage to all enemies equal to their per-turn debuff damage, reduces our side's debuff duration by 1 turn, and deals 2 Pain damage to yourself.
Chtholly.Skill/S_Chtholly_9_Description:
Unique
When you become unable to act, add this skill from discard pile/deck to your hand.
Give yourself "Fighting Spirit".
Can be used while unable to act.
Chtholly.Skill/S_Chtholly_Lucy1_Description:
Draw two skills.
When Chtholly is alive, trigger the following effect:
Choose: Reminisce (lose 2 Memory Loss) / Forget (gain 2 Memory Loss).
Chtholly.Skill/S_Chtholly_lucy2_Description:
Draw two skills.
If Chtholly is unable to act, allow her to use skills while unable to act this turn.
Chtholly.Skill/S_Chtholly_r1_Description: Memory, Unique Can be used while unable to act. Memory Loss stacks become 0, prioritize drawing 3 of your own skills, gain "Unforgettable" buff.
Chtholly.Skill/S_Chtholly_r2_Description:
Cannot be used.
If you are Sleepwalking at the start of battle, exclude this skill, set Memory Loss stacks to 0, then gain Turn the Tide.
When you enter near-death state, draw this skill from discard pile/deck.
While in hand, when you take attack damage while near-death, exclude this skill, then prevent damage, set Memory Loss stacks to 0, restore all health, and gain Turn the Tide.
Memory Loss count in current area: &a
Chtholly.Skill/S_Chtholly_r3_Description:
Unique
Restore all Mana, clear all Overload, increase Memory Loss stacks by 10 (stop immediately when Sleepwalking occurs).
For each of your own skills in hand, attack 1 additional time.
Give yourself "Stellar Form".
Chtholly.Skill/S_Lucy_public0_Description: When there are no other Lucy skills in hand, draw 3 skills, otherwise draw 2 skills.
Chtholly.Skill/S_Lucy_public1_Description:
Draw 4 skills.
Discard any Lucy skills among them.
Chtholly.SkillExtended/S_EX_Chtholly_1_Name: When Chtholly's Memory Loss is 2 or more, cost -1; when Chtholly's Remember is 6 or more, cost -3 instead.
Chtholly.SkillExtended/S_EX_Chtholly_2_EnforceStr: Attack skills with cost no less than 1.
Chtholly.SkillExtended/S_EX_Chtholly_2_Name: When Chtholly is not Sleepwalking, damage +30%; otherwise, reduce 2 Memory Loss.
Chtholly.SkillExtended/S_EX_Huim_Des: This skill is treated as a Memory skill; if not Excluded after use, return to hand; dismiss after playing.
Chtholly.SkillKeyword/Unique_Desc: After the first use in each battle, subsequent uses or releases of skills with the same name will instead release a random exclusive skill from the character. (Excluding skills with Unique and skills with the same name)
Chtholly.SkillKeyword/onlyo_Desc: After the first use of this skill in each battle, subsequent uses or releases of skills with the same name will instead release a random exclusive skill from the character (excluding skills with Unique).

Frieren.Buff/B_Frieren_1_Description: When using "Basic Healing", reduce 1 stack and draw 1 "Basic Healing".
Frieren.Buff/B_Frieren_3_Description:
Gain additional &a Barrier based on the number of "Basic Shield" in the deck at the start of battle.
Removed after blocking 1 attack.
Frieren.Buff/B_Frieren_4_Description:
Cannot act, removed after taking 3 attacks.

Attacks remaining to break seal: &a
Frieren.Buff/B_Frieren_P_1_Description: Vast mana accumulated over time increases all investigators' Attack Power and Healing Power by &a, and Defense by &b%.
Frieren.Buff/B_Frieren_R1_Description:
For each "Basic Healing" in the deck at the start of battle, reduce damage taken by 10%. After taking an attack, this effect is reduced by 10%, removed when reduced to 0.

Current damage reduction: &a%.
Frieren.Item_Equip/E_Frieren_1_Description: For every 2 skills in the deck at the start of battle, gain an additional 1% Attack Power and Healing Power.
Frieren.SkillExtended/En_Frieren_1_EX_Name: Can be treated as "Basic Attack", base damage multiplier increased by 30%.
Frieren.SkillExtended/En_Frieren_2_EX_Name: Can be treated as "Basic Shield", gain Mana Barrier based on Healing Power when cast.
Frieren.Character/Frieren_PassiveDesc:
Frieren continuously accumulates mana during her journey, and this vast mana can help her traveling companions.
Each common skill or basic skill the party possesses fills with mana, increasing all investigators' Attack Power, Healing Power, and Defense.
The accumulation of mana will gradually become more abundant as the journey progresses.

"Against the mages of this era, basic magic is sufficient."
Frieren.Character/Frieren_SelectInfo:
A mage from another world who claims to be the elven mage from the hero party that defeated the Demon King, rumored to have lived for over a thousand years. After the hero Himmel's death, she began a long journey.

Freiren's vast mana and rich combat experience allow her companions to display even greater power in battle.
Frieren.Character/Frieren_CampSelectWord: Eating should be a happy thing.
Frieren.Character/Frieren_Text_Battle_Healed_0: In this world, it seems healing magic can have some effect even without the Scripture.
Frieren.Character/Frieren_Text_Battle_Idle_0: Though they are not demons, the evil aura they emit is remarkably similar to demons.
Frieren.Character/Frieren_Text_Battle_Idle_1: In the world of magic, what cannot be imagined cannot be achieved.
Frieren.Skill/S_Frieren_1_Description:
For each "Basic Healing" in the deck at the start of battle, gain 1 stack of <color=#3D9CB6>Goddess's Scripture</color>.
If the target ally is in critical condition, restore an additional &a HP.
This skill can be treated as "Basic Healing".
Frieren.Skill/S_Frieren_2_Description:
Ignore 50% Defense, after casting, use all "Basic Attack" in hand on random enemies.
This skill can be treated as "Basic Attack".
Frieren.Skill/S_Frieren_3_Description:
Also gain equal Mana Barrier for self. Draw 1 skill.
This skill can be treated as "Basic Shield".
Frieren.Skill/S_Frieren_4_Description: Can only be used in turns where 3 or more skills have been cast from hand.
Frieren.Skill/S_Frieren_5_Description: Remove all common skills and basic skills from hand, deck, and discard pile. Draw a number of skills equal to the number of skills removed from hand, generate a barrier based on the total mana cost of all removed skills.
Frieren.Skill/S_Frieren_6_Description: Make 1 common skill or basic skill in hand target all enemies/all allies based on its type, gain Exclude.
Frieren.Skill/S_Frieren_7_Description: Discard 1 skill from hand, generate 1 "Basic Attack Magic" owned by the discarded skill's owner, inherit half of the discarded skill's original damage multiplier or healing multiplier to the generated "Basic Attack Magic's" damage multiplier, gain Exclude.
Frieren.Skill/S_Frieren_8_Description: Make 1 attack skill in hand gain Ignore Taunt, can be treated as "Basic Attack", base damage multiplier greatly increased based on <color=#319B92>Accumulated Mana</color>.
Frieren.SkillExtended/S_Frieren_8_1_EX_Descripti: Gain Ignore Taunt, can be treated as "Basic Attack".
Frieren.SkillExtended/S_Frieren_8_EX_Description: Base damage multiplier increased by &a% based on <color=#319B92>Accumulated Mana</color>.
Frieren.Skill/S_Frieren_9_Description: Choose 1 from 3 common attack skills owned by the target ally to generate, generated skill gains Exclude, Swiftness, mana cost becomes 0, base damage multiplier increased by 100%.
Frieren.Skill/S_Frieren_A1_Description:
Draw 2 skills. 1% chance to gain <color=#FAC422>9999</color> gold instead. Each time this skill is used, this chance is permanently increased by 0.3% for this investigation.

Current chance: &a%
Frieren.Skill/S_Frieren_R1_Description: At the start of battle, change the owner of all "Basic Healing" in the deck to self, gain Swiftness.
Frieren.Skill/S_Frieren_R2_Description: At the start of battle, greatly increase the base damage multiplier of all "Basic Attack" in the deck based on <color=#319B92>Accumulated Mana</color>, gain: each time "Basic Attack" is cast, all "Basic Attack" damage is increased by 4 for this battle.
Frieren.SkillExtended/S_Frieren_R2_EX_Descriptio:
Each time "Basic Attack" is cast, all "Basic Attack" damage is increased by 4 for this battle.

Current damage increase: &a

BlueArchive_Aris.Text_Battle_Idle_0: Alice is here. Alice will help.
BlueArchive_Aris.Text_Battle_Idle_1: Light will guide the way, right?
BlueArchive_Aris.Text_Battle_Idle_3: Hero, may the light be with you.
BlueArchive_Aris.Text_Battle_ND_0: The health bar is already turning red!
BlueArchive_Aris.Text_Battle_Start_0: Today Alice's role is light attribute single-target DPS!
BlueArchive_Aris.Text_Battle_Start_2: Monster existence isn't scary at all. Because dark attribute is definitely countered by light attribute.
BlueArchive_Aris.Text_Battle_Cri_2: A righteous strike that crushes evil...
BlueArchive_Aris.Text_Field_Idle_0: What kind of adventure shall we go on today? Alice is ready to embark on the journey together.
BlueArchive_Aris.Text_Field_Idle_1: Hmm. I'm hungry. Eh...? Alice doesn't eat batteries!
BlueArchive_Aris.Text_Field_Idle_2: It's been thousands of years since humans came here... I always wanted to say a line like that.
BlueArchive_Aris.Text_Ex_0: Target confirmed! Energy discharge critical point breakthrough!
BlueArchive_Aris.Text_Ex_3: Infusing will into this radiance... pierce through! Balance collapse!
BlueArchive_Aris.Text_EquipGet: This is... the legendary holy sword... ah, it's a gun.
BlueArchive_Aris.Character/ArisTendou_PassiveDesc:
When this passive is activated, gain the weapon: "Light Sword: Supernova".
While equipped with "Light Sword: Supernova", add "The Beginning of All Miracles" to the deck at the start of battle. This skill transforms into other skills based on Alice's class buff.
When using this skill or its derivative skills, increase Critical Hit Chance by 10% and Critical Damage by 10% for 3 turns. Effects are increased to 1.5x or 2x based on Light Sword energy charge stacks.
BlueArchive_Aris.Character/ArisTendou_SelectInfo:
Tendou Alice, affiliated with Millennium Science School, member of the Game Development Department.
A mysterious girl discovered in the ruins, with completely unknown information including her age. Currently, she has become a hardcore gaming enthusiast who enjoys games together with Momoi, Midori, and Yuzu.

<color=#919191>"...I have been waiting for the moment to be called by that voice."</color>
BlueArchive_Aris.Character/ArisTendou_Text_Field_Idle_0: What kind of adventure will it be today? Alice is ready to embark on the journey together.
BlueArchive_Aris.Character/ArisTendou_Text_Field_Idle_1: Hmm. I'm hungry. Eh...? Alice doesn't eat batteries!
BlueArchive_Aris.Character/ArisTendou_Text_Field_Idle_2: It's been thousands of years since humans came here... I always want to say lines like that.
BlueArchive_Aris.Character/ArisTendou_Text_Battle_Idle_0: Alice is here. Alice will help.
BlueArchive_Aris.Character/ArisTendou_Text_Battle_Idle_1: Light will guide the way, right?
BlueArchive_Aris.Character/ArisTendou_Text_Battle_Idle_3: Hero, may the light be with you.
BlueArchive_Aris.Character/ArisTendou_Text_Battle_Start_0: Today Alice's role is light attribute single-target DPS!
BlueArchive_Aris.Character/ArisTendou_Text_Battle_Start_2: Monster existence isn't scary at all. Because dark attribute is definitely countered by light attribute.
BlueArchive_Aris.Character/ArisTendou_Text_Battle_Cri_1: A righteous strike that crushes evil...
BlueArchive_Aris.Character/ArisTendou_Text_Battle_ND_0: The health bar is already turning red!
BlueArchive_Aris.Buff/B_Aris_Ex_2_Description:
When landing a critical hit, provide healing equal to 50% of damage dealt to a random ally.
Removed after using Fixed Ability.
BlueArchive_Aris.Buff/B_Aris_Job_0_Description:
Once per turn, when using a single-target attack skill to kill the leftmost or rightmost enemy, release it again on adjacent enemies. Attacks released this way have a maximum Critical Hit Chance of 54%.
Removed after using Fixed Ability.
BlueArchive_Aris.Buff/B_Aris_Job_1_Description:
When using single-target attack skills to deal damage, add additional damage equal to 30% of Attack Power.
Critical Hit Chance cap is locked at 70%. Excess is converted to 2x Critical Damage. Current Critical Damage: 150+&a%
Removed after using Fixed Ability.
BlueArchive_Aris.Buff/B_Aris_Job_2_Description:
All allies gain benefits based on their class: Attack Power +1/Healing Power +1/Defense +10%.
Removed after using Fixed Ability.
BlueArchive_Aris.Buff/B_Aris_Rare_0_Description:
Limited to 3 times per turn. Whenever you land a critical hit, add a "General Attack Magic" with Swiftness, Exclude, and "discard after 1 turn" to your hand and set its cost to 0.
Removed after using Fixed Ability.
BlueArchive_Aris.Buff/B_Aris_Rare_1_Description:
The first skill you use each turn will be released twice.
When entering critical condition, remove this effect and restore all health.
BlueArchive_Aris.Item_Equip/Equip_Aris_Description:
At the end of each turn, if not fully charged, gain 1 charge stack (Critical Hit Chance +10%).
Critical Damage increases with Alice's level.
BlueArchive_Aris.SkillKeyword/KeyWord_Job_Description:
This skill gains corresponding class trait benefits when in the Fixed Ability slot.
If this skill doesn't have Exclude:
When released from hand, it doesn't go to the discard pile but replaces the current Fixed Ability.
After being released as a Fixed Ability, it shuffles into the discard pile.
BlueArchive_Aris.Skill/S_Aris_0_Description: Randomly generate Alice's exclusive skill (excluding class cards), and give it Exclude and "discard after 2 turns".
BlueArchive_Aris.Skill/S_Aris_1_Description:
Cannot be used.
While in hand, gain 20% Critical Hit Chance and 25% Critical Damage bonus.
BlueArchive_Aris.Skill/S_Aris_2_Description: Whenever your class buff changes, draw this skill from the deck or discard pile.
BlueArchive_Aris.Skill/S_Aris_3_Description: Can only be used when you have a class buff. After release, remove class buff and return the class card to hand.
BlueArchive_Aris.Skill/S_Aris_4_Description: While in hand, whenever other allies use skills, reduce this skill's Countdown by 1 and increase Critical Hit Chance by 20% and Accuracy by 10%.
BlueArchive_Aris.Skill/S_Aris_5_Description: Release three times total, with each subsequent damage increased by an amount equal to the previous damage.
BlueArchive_Aris.Skill/S_Aris_Ex_0_Name: The World's Laws Are About to Collapse!
BlueArchive_Aris.Skill/S_Aris_Ex_0_Description:
Ignores Defense.
Cost and multiplier increase with Alice's level.
If the target is killed, release again on all enemies at half multiplier. Based on energy charge stacks, increase damage to 1.5x or 2x. After firing, consume all charge stacks.
BlueArchive_Aris.Skill/S_Aris_Ex_1_Description:
(Critical Hit Chance increases with Alice's level)
On critical hit, based on energy charge stacks, multiply final damage by 2x or 3x. After firing, consume all charge stacks.
BlueArchive_Aris.Skill/S_Aris_Ex_Origin_Description:
Prioritize drawing your own class skills.
When you have a class buff, transforms into the corresponding skill.
BlueArchive_Aris.Skill/S_Aris_Ex_Rare_Description:
While in hand, reduce this skill's cost and Countdown by 1 whenever you land a critical hit.
After release, reduce enemy health by an amount equal to this skill's panel damage. (Will not reduce boss enemies below 1.)
BlueArchive_Aris.Skill/S_Aris_Job_2_Description: Heal all other allies for &a HP, based on Alice's Attack Power (60%).
BlueArchive_Aris.Skill/S_Aris_LucyD_Description: Draw 2 skills. If there are boss or cursed enemies on the field, draw 3 skills instead.
BlueArchive_Aris.Skill/S_Aris_Rare_0_Description: Draw "The Beginning of All Miracles" from the deck or discard pile.

grayreaper.Buff/B_Grayreaper_0_Description: You feel warmth in the air...
grayreaper.Buff/B_Grayreaper_6_Description: Defense is increased. Removed when hit.
grayreaper.Buff/B_Grayreaper_8_Description:
Aggro Greatly Increased
When hit, apply Attack Weakening to the attacking enemy.
grayreaper.Buff/B_Grayreaper_R_1_Description: Every turn, gain 2 stacks of Firewood.
grayreaper.Buff/B_Grayreaper_R_2_1_Description: Attack a random enemy each turn.
grayreaper.Buff/B_Grayreaper_R_3_Description: At the start of turn, add 'Miracle' to hand and reduce stacks.
grayreaper.Character/Grayreaper_CampSelectWord: Mysterious object Gray Reaper. Enjoy a pleasant time with mini reapers.
grayreaper.Character/Grayreaper_PassiveDes:
At the start of battle, add 'Beloved Human!' cards to deck equal to the number of other allies.

Each turn, apply Firewood to self equal to the number of surviving allies.
Firewood is consumed when using skills to generate additional effects.
grayreaper.Character/Grayreaper_SelectInfo:
#This report is property of @& Research Institute. Do not remove from premises.
#Contents of this report may be distorted if read outside the research institute.

Object Name - Gray Reaper
Object Risk Level: X

Precautions - Signs of mental contamination have been confirmed in Gray Reaper's manager. Continuous diagnosis and monitoring of this object's manager is required.

Management Method - (The text that follows is distorted and unreadable.)
grayreaper.Character/Grayreaper_Text_PharosLeader_1: (The Golden Reapers are smacking the Gray Reaper like they're really mad.)
grayreaper.Skill/S_Grayreaper_10_Lucydraw_Descripti:
Place on top of deck at the start of battle.
Look at all skills in deck and choose 2 to add to hand.
grayreaper.Skill/S_Grayreaper_1_Description:
Draw 1 skill, prioritizing your own cards.

Consume 2 Firewood to draw 1 additional skill.

Skills drawn by this skill are discarded after 1 turn.
grayreaper.Skill/S_Grayreaper_2_Description:
Apply Healing Gauge Protection to all allies.

Consume 6 Firewood to create a barrier that blocks &a damage.
grayreaper.Skill/S_Grayreaper_3_Description: Apply Firewood to self equal to surviving allies × 1.5.
grayreaper.Skill/S_Grayreaper_4_Description: Consume 4 Firewood to remove a random debuff from target.
grayreaper.Skill/S_Grayreaper_6_Description: Consume 6 Firewood to apply defense increase buff to all allies that is removed when hit.
grayreaper.Skill/S_Grayreaper_7_Description: Consume 4 Firewood to repeat this skill with half damage equal to the number of other surviving allies.
grayreaper.Skill/S_Grayreaper_8_Description: Consume 3 Firewood to apply Healing Gauge Protection to self.
grayreaper.Skill/S_Grayreaper_9_Description: Consume 2 Firewood to apply 'Reaper's Flame Spear' to target.
grayreaper.Skill/S_Grayreaper_R_1_Description:
Apply 5 Firewood to self.
At the start of turn, apply an additional 2 stacks of Firewood.
grayreaper.Skill/S_Grayreaper_R_2_Description: Consume 12 Firewood to apply a buff to Gray Reaper that attacks a random enemy each turn.
grayreaper.Skill/S_Grayreaper_R_3_1_Description: Apply a 50% critical hit chance increase buff to all allies for 1 turn.
grayreaper.Skill/S_Grayreaper_R_3_2_Description: Apply various debuffs to all enemies.
grayreaper.Skill/S_Grayreaper_R_3_Description:
Add 'Miracle' to hand.

Consume all Firewood to gain 'Wish' equal to consumed Firewood ÷ 5.

'Wish' adds 'Miracle' to hand at the start of turn and reduces stacks.
grayreaper.Skill/S_Grayreaper_R_3_T_Description:
One of the following random effects occurs.

- Gain a 30 barrier.
- All allies gain 50% critical hit chance for 1 turn.
- Apply various debuffs to all enemies.
- Draw 3 skills.
- Blue Reaper loses its hat.
grayreaper.SkillExtended/SkillEn_Grayreaper_0_Name: If you have 'Golden Reaper's Grace', damage is increased by 30% and restore 1 Mana.
grayreaper.SkillExtended/SkillEn_Grayreaper_1_Name: If you have 'Golden Reaper's Grace', healing is increased by 20% and draw 1 skill.

Rosmontis.Buff/B_mdx_0_Description: When self/linked ally has Healing Gauge Protection, increase linked ally's/self Attack Power by 8%.
Rosmontis.Buff/B_mdx_10_Description:
Take damage in place of linked ally.
When taking damage, reduce a random Tactical Equipment's cooldown by 1 turn. If all Tactical Equipment is on Standby, deal &a damage to a random enemy.
Rosmontis.Buff/B_mdx_11_Description:
When giving buffs to linked ally, extend the buff duration by 2 turns.
At turn end, for each ally with [Expanded Cognition], reduce duration of all debuffs on self by 1 turn.
Remove if not linked.
Rosmontis.Buff/B_mdx_1_Description: When stack count reaches maximum, extend duration by 3 turns.
Rosmontis.Buff/B_mdx_2_Description:
Target skill: &a
Skill gained after completion: &b
Remove after completion.
Rosmontis.Buff/B_mdx_3_Description:
Non-dormant Tactical Equipment counts as 4.
When effect ends, increase all Tactical Equipment cooldowns by 2 turns.
Rosmontis.Buff/B_mdx_4_Description:
Damage dealt to enemies with Defense 0 or below is increased by 15%.
For each Tactical Equipment not on cooldown, Armor Penetration is increased by 10%.
Rosmontis.Buff/B_mdx_5_Description:
Damage taken is reduced by &a (stack decreases by 1 when taking damage).
Remove after taking damage &a times.
Rosmontis.Buff/B_mdx_6_Description: When taking damage, if attacker has a buff with the same name as &a, take &b damage instead.
Rosmontis.Buff/B_mdx_7_Description:
Next time using own skill from hand, also activate &a.
Remove when effect triggers.
Rosmontis.Buff/B_mdx_8_Description:
When linked ally uses skills 2 times total, if Tactical Equipment is dormant, reduce a random Tactical Equipment's cooldown by 1 turn.
Otherwise, deal &a damage to a random enemy.
Rosmontis.Buff/B_mdx_9_Description: When an enemy with taunt acts, if having non-dormant Tactical Equipment, activate "Decapitation".
Rosmontis.Buff/B_mdx_ip_0_Description: Next battle, add &a to hand and remove this.
Rosmontis.Buff/B_mdx_p0_Description: If linked ally's Healing Gauge is higher than self's Healing Gauge, self gains Healing Gauge Protection.
Rosmontis.Character/Rosmontis_PassiveDes:
At battle start, give [Sensory Link] to self and a random ally.
At battle start, Rosmontis possesses 4 Tactical Equipment.
When Rosmontis reaches level 6, gain "Rosmontis's Embrace".
Rosmontis.Character/Rosmontis_SelectInfo:
A Feline who traced her memories to reach the Ark, said to be an elite Feline with the appearance of a small child.
Never heard of this race, but apparently she looks too much like a cat!
Rosmontis fights by controlling Tactical Equipment with her powerful mind.
Rosmontis.Character/Rosmontis_Text_Battle_AllyND_0: If it hurts, feel free to scream. It'll make you feel a bit better.
Rosmontis.Character/Rosmontis_Text_Battle_Cri_0: If you surrender, you won't get hurt.
Rosmontis.Character/Rosmontis_Text_Battle_Idle_0: Don't worry, I can control my Arts properly.
Rosmontis.Character/Rosmontis_Text_Battle_Idle_1: Give me orders, I'll do it perfectly.
Rosmontis.Character/Rosmontis_Text_Battle_Kill_0: I'll clean up the rest. It'll be over soon.
Rosmontis.Character/Rosmontis_Text_Field_Idle_0: What am I reading? Um, this is a memo from before.
Rosmontis.Character/Rosmontis_Text_PharosLeader_0: If you don't want to see what's about to happen, stay away and don't look.
Rosmontis.Character/Rosmontis_Text_PharosLeader_2: I don't want my family to get hurt. I'll destroy anything that might hurt my family.
Rosmontis.Item_Equip/E_mdx_0_Description:
At the start of each turn, reduce enemy Defense by -8% (<sprite=0>90%, 1/5).
When dealing damage, gain +10% Armor Penetration (1/10, 2 turns).
When attacking enemies with Defense 0 or below, damage dealt is increased by 120%. Also triggers when Armor Penetration reaches 100%.
Rosmontis.Item_Equip/E_mdx_1_Description: When attacking enemies with Defense 0 or below, always deal Critical Hits.
Rosmontis.Item_Passive/Me_mdx_0_Description:
At battle start, copy the last skill used in the last battle in this area and add it to hand (excluding Lucy skills).
If this is the first battle, draw 1 additional skill.
Rosmontis.Item_Passive/Me_mdx_1_Description:
Each turn, record the owner of the first non-Lucy skill used.
At turn end, restore 5 HP to all allies with the same buffs/debuffs as (recorded ally), then clear the record.
Current: &a
Rosmontis.Skill/S_mdx_0_Description:
Attack adjacent enemies simultaneously, dealing &a damage.
If there's only 1 enemy, ignore Defense and always hit.
Rosmontis.Skill/S_mdx_10_Description:
If there's non-dormant Tactical Equipment when used, can be used again this turn. This skill activates Tactical Equipment in order.
Tactical Equipment 1: Effect varies based on current equipment number. &a
Rosmontis.Skill/S_mdx_1_Description: Tactical Equipment 2: Activate "Blade Approaches!" once on leftmost and rightmost enemies. When there's only 1 enemy, don't activate and instead apply 2 stacks of [Wounded].
Rosmontis.Skill/S_mdx_2_Description:
Refund consumed Mana, present 4 exclusive skills and choose 2.
When using a skill with the same name as chosen skills, if current Mana is not 0, consume 1 Mana and add the unchosen skill to hand. It has cost 0, Swiftness, and Exclude.
Rosmontis.Skill/S_mdx_3_Description: Tactical Equipment 3: Activate "Nociceptor n" twice on target. If linked ally has attack skills, activate "Nociceptor P" instead, with activation count increasing by 1 for each qualifying ally.
Rosmontis.Skill/S_mdx_4_Description: If any Tactical Equipment is dormant, reduce a random Tactical Equipment's cooldown by 2 turns.
Rosmontis.Skill/S_mdx_5_Description: If target is already linked, draw 1 skill.
Rosmontis.Skill/S_mdx_6_Description: If there's dormant Tactical Equipment, increase the longest cooldown among them by 2 turns, and give [Tactical Cover] to self and the lowest HP target other than self.
Rosmontis.Skill/S_mdx_7_Description: If 2 or more Tactical Equipment are dormant, additionally give [Invisible Hand] to target.
Rosmontis.Skill/S_mdx_8_Description: If self and target ally have 2 or more buffs/debuffs with the same name, next time self/target ally uses a skill from hand, target ally/self also activates a skill simultaneously.
Rosmontis.Skill/S_mdx_lucy2_0_Description: Reduce all dormant Tactical Equipment cooldowns by 1 turn.
Rosmontis.Skill/S_mdx_lucy2_1_Description: Immediately set the Tactical Equipment with the longest cooldown to Standby.
Rosmontis.Skill/S_mdx_lucy_1_Description:
Draw 1 skill.
Draw 1 skill for each linked ally excluding Rosmontis.
If Rosmontis's non-dormant Tactical Equipment count is equal to or greater than the number of linked allies, restore 1 Mana.
Rosmontis.Skill/S_mdx_lucy_2_Description:
Draw 2 skills. If Rosmontis is alive, the following effect activates.
Choose: Reduce all dormant Tactical Equipment cooldowns by 1 turn / Immediately set the Tactical Equipment with the longest cooldown to Standby.
If no Tactical Equipment is dormant, display additional choice.
Rosmontis.Skill/S_mdx_r1_0_Description: Prioritize attacking enemies without taunt and apply taunt.
Rosmontis.Skill/S_mdx_r1_1_Description:
Attack all enemies with taunt simultaneously.
For each dormant Tactical Equipment, this skill's damage is increased by &a.
Set a random Tactical Equipment to Standby.
Rosmontis.Skill/S_mdx_r1_Description:
Cost is reduced by 1 for each non-Dormant Tactical Equipment, then activate "Rain of Swords".
All Tactical Equipment becomes Dormant.
Rosmontis.Skill/S_mdx_r2_Description:
Can be used up to 3 times.
Increase Barrier by &a for each non-Dormant Tactical Equipment.
All Tactical Equipment becomes Dormant.
Rosmontis.Skill/S_mdx_r3_Description:
All allies with [Sensory Link] use a random exclusive skill.
All allies with [Sensory Link] gain [Expanded Cognition].
All allies gain [Sensory Link].
Rosmontis.SkillExtended/S_ex_mdx_1_EnforceString: Attack skill with cost 1 or more
Rosmontis.SkillExtended/S_ex_mdx_1_Name: Damage dealt by this skill is increased by 20% for each other ally with the same buff as yourself.
Rosmontis.SkillExtended/S_ex_mdx_2_Name: When using a skill, if you and other allies do not have the same debuff, restore 1 Mana. If you do not have the same buff, draw 1 skill.
Rosmontis.SkillKeyword/BattleuseEquip_Desc: Activates when you have X or more non-Dormant Tactical Equipment. When activated, half of X becomes Dormant.
Rosmontis.SkillKeyword/KEY_MDX_R3_Desc: When other Linked allies receive buffs, their duration is extended by 2 turns. At the end of turn, debuff duration is reduced based on the number of Linked allies.
Rosmontis.SkillKeyword/Key_mdx_10_Desc: In order: Cost -1: Ignore Taunt, reduce Fixed Ability cooldown by 1 turn: Draw 1 skill: Apply 1 stack of [Wounded].
Rosmontis.SkillKeyword/Key_mdx_yh_Desc: Each time Tactical Equipment is used, it becomes Dormant for 1 turn. Damage taken is reduced by 1. When attacked, the number of turns until Dormant state is removed increases by 1.
Rosmontis.S_ROSM_10_Des_1: Ignore Taunt. Reduce the cooldown of Fixed Abilities by 1 turn.
Rosmontis.Enemy/Mdx_xushi_Name: Rosmontis - Grip of Reality and Illusion
Rosmontis.Buff/P_xushi_0_Description:
When dealing damage to Investigators, each buff stack they possess increases damage by an additional 2%.
<Hard>: When taking damage from Investigators, each buff stack the source has reduces damage by 2%, up to 80%. Each stack beyond this threshold restores 2% of the damage as HP.
Rosmontis.Buff/P_xushi_1_Description:
At the start of battle and every 2 turns, summon a Tactical Equipment.
Rosmontis' attacks also target all Tactical Equipment.
<Hard>: Number of equipment summoned at battle start +1.
Rosmontis.Buff/P_xushi_2_Description:
⭐: No Investigators fall into Incapacitated state.
⭐: For 3 consecutive turns, no Investigators enter Near Death.
⭐: An Investigator never enters Near Death.
Receive rewards based on completion after battle ends.
Rosmontis.Skill/S_xushi_Reward_Description:
Draw 3 skills.
Transform any Common skills among them into random Rare skills of the holder.
If there are Rare skills among them, shuffle "Vector Breakthrough" into the discard pile.
*Lucy skills count as neither Common nor Rare skills.

HatsuneMiku.Buff/B_HatsuneMiku_4_Description: A very nice Barrier, with love from Hatsune Miku.
HatsuneMiku.Buff/B_HatsuneMiku_6_Description: Heals self for 50% of damage dealt.
HatsuneMiku.Buff/B_HatsuneMiku_7_Description: Increases Attack Power by the number of <color=#7FFFD4>Future Sound</color> stacks on self.
HatsuneMiku.Buff/B_HatsuneMiku_P_Description:
At the end of the turn, restore HP equal to the number of stacks.
Afterward, consume 1 stack of <color=#7FFFD4>Future Sound</color>.
HatsuneMiku.Character/HatsuneMiku_CampSelectWord: "Welcome to my concert! Today's setlist starts with..."
HatsuneMiku.Character/HatsuneMiku_PassiveDes: First Voice - At the start of battle, apply 2 stacks of Future Sound to all allies. Future Sound - At the end of the turn, restore HP equal to the number of stacks. Afterward, consume 1 stack of Future Sound. Chord X - Hatsune Miku's skills trigger bonus effects when used on characters who already have X stacks of Future Sound. Rhythm X - Triggers bonus effects when Hatsune Miku has X stacks of Future Sound.
HatsuneMiku.Character/HatsuneMiku_SelectInfo:
Stack various buffs continuously with song,
the more buffs, the stronger the healing,
and bring the battle to its climax with the power of music!
HatsuneMiku.Skill/S_HatsuneMiku_10_Description:
Remove 1 debuff.
Apply a Barrier equal to the number of <color=#7FFFD4>Future Sound</color> stacks on the target.
HatsuneMiku.Skill/S_HatsuneMiku_10_Name: Kouya to Mori to Mahou no Uta
HatsuneMiku.Skill/S_HatsuneMiku_11Rare_Description: Apply &a stacks of <color=#7FFFD4>Future Sound</color> (100% of Healing Power).
HatsuneMiku.Skill/S_HatsuneMiku_12Rare_0_Description: Apply <color=#7FFFD4>Future Sound</color> until the target has the same number of stacks as the ally with the most <color=#7FFFD4>Future Sound</color> on the field.
HatsuneMiku.Skill/S_HatsuneMiku_13Rare_Description:
Remove all Pain and Weakening debuffs, then apply 39 stacks of <color=#7FFFD4>Future Sound</color>.
Afterward, self dies.
HatsuneMiku.Skill/S_HatsuneMiku_14Rare_Description:
No effect when played. While held in hand:
At the end of each turn, apply 2 stacks of <color=#7FFFD4>Future Sound</color> to all allies.
<color=#00FFFF>Rhythm 3</color> - Apply an additional 2 stacks of <color=#7FFFD4>Future Sound</color>.
<color=#00FFFF>Rhythm 9</color> - Deal &a damage to all enemies (stacks of <color=#7FFFD4>Future Sound</color> on self x 100% of Healing Power).
HatsuneMiku.Skill/S_HatsuneMiku_1_Description: Heal the ally with the lowest HP for &a (100% of Healing Power). Apply 1 stack of Future Sound. Rhythm 3 - Overheal self by 100%. Self gains 1 stack of Future Sound. Rhythm 9 - Cast again on a random enemy.
HatsuneMiku.Skill/S_HatsuneMiku_2_Description:
For each stack of <color=#7FFFD4>Future Sound</color> on self, Critical Hit Chance increases by 10%. Bonus Critical Hit Chance: %a

<color=#00FFFF>Rhythm 3</color> - For each stack of <color=#7FFFD4>Future Sound</color> on self, deal 1 additional damage. Bonus Damage: %b
<color=#00FFFF>Rhythm 9</color> - Return this card to your hand.
HatsuneMiku.Skill/S_HatsuneMiku_3_Description:
For each enemy hit, self gains 2 stacks of <color=#7FFFD4>Future Sound</color>.

<color=#00FFFF>Rhythm 3</color> - Deal an additional &a damage (35% of Attack Power).
<color=#00FFFF>Rhythm 9</color> - Cast again.
HatsuneMiku.Skill/S_HatsuneMiku_4_Description: <color=#54FF9F>Chord 4</color> - Apply &a Barrier to the target (80% of Healing Power).
HatsuneMiku.Skill/S_HatsuneMiku_5_Description: <color=#54FF9F>Chord 2</color> - Additionally apply 1 stack of [Koi wa Sensou].
HatsuneMiku.Skill/S_HatsuneMiku_8_Description:
Add 1 skill from the discard pile to your hand.
Self gains stacks of <color=#7FFFD4>Future Sound</color> equal to that skill's cost.

<color=#00FFFF>Rhythm 3</color> - Reduce that skill's cost by 1.
<color=#00FFFF>Rhythm 9</color> - Reduce that skill's cost by 10.
HatsuneMiku.Skill/S_HatsuneMiku_LucyD_Description: Draw 1 skill. Add 2 [Spring Onion] to your hand.
HatsuneMiku.Skill/S_HatsuneMiku_P_Description:
Draw 1 skill.
<color=#54FF9F>Chord 1</color> - Additionally apply 1 stack of <color=#7FFFD4>Future Sound</color>.

SuzakuinTsubaki.Buff/B_SuzakuinTsubaki_1_Description:
Press this buff to discard the bottom skill in your hand. <color=#808080>Does not activate if you only have one skill in hand.</color>

<color=#808080>To activate this passive, you need to click on this icon manually.</color>
SuzakuinTsubaki.Buff/B_SuzakuinTsubaki_2_Description: At 3 stacks, consume all stacks and deal Pain damage equal to 120% of the enemy's Attack Power.
SuzakuinTsubaki.Buff/B_SuzakuinTsubaki_3_Description: The next skill used is used twice, and deals Pain damage equal to 20% of your Maximum Health to yourself.
SuzakuinTsubaki.Buff/B_SuzakuinTsubaki_4_Description: At 2 stacks, consume all stacks and restore 1 Mana.
SuzakuinTsubaki.Buff/B_SuzakuinTsubaki_5_Description: Reduces <color=purple>Pain damage</color> received to 0. When Pain damage would be received, draw 1 skill and consume 1 stack.
SuzakuinTsubaki.Character/SuzakuinTsubaki_PassiveDes: At the start of each turn, gain 1 stack of <color=#8B0000>Blazing Madness</color>.
SuzakuinTsubaki.Character/SuzakuinTsubaki_SelectInfo:
The youngest of the four Suzakuin sisters, the strongest swordswoman at her academy who reigns supreme in the art of "Blade Way."
After arriving in the Distorted Land, she wields her dual blades as a combat force for the investigation team.
SuzakuinTsubaki.Character/SuzakuinTsubaki_Text_Battle_Ki: In the name of the Suzakuin family!
SuzakuinTsubaki.Character/SuzakuinTsubaki_Text_Field_Idl: For now... no need to draw the second blade.
SuzakuinTsubaki.Skill/S_SuzakuinTsubaki_1_Description:
If the enemy has <color=#F08080>Nameless Wound</color>, perform 5 additional attacks (20 damage each).
<color=#FFA636FF>Sheathe: Enter Sword Preparation and restore 1 Mana.</color>
SuzakuinTsubaki.Skill/S_SuzakuinTsubaki_2_Description: <color=#FFA636FF>Sheathe: Apply 1 stack of <color=#F08080>Nameless Wound</color> to all enemies and enter <color=#7B68EE>Sword Preparation</color>.</color>
SuzakuinTsubaki.Skill/S_SuzakuinTsubaki_3_Description: <color=#FFA636FF>Sheathe: Use this skill and gain 1 stack of <color=#8B0000>Blazing Madness</color>.</color>
SuzakuinTsubaki.Skill/S_SuzakuinTsubaki_4_Description:
On kill, gain 1 stack of <color=#8B0000>Blazing Madness</color>.
<color=#FFA636FF>Sheathe: Use this skill and gain 1 stack of <color=#8B0000>Blazing Madness</color>.</color>
SuzakuinTsubaki.Skill/S_SuzakuinTsubaki_5_Description: <color=#FFA636FF>Sheathe: Use this skill and enter <color=#7B68EE>Sword Preparation</color>.</color>
SuzakuinTsubaki.Skill/S_SuzakuinTsubaki_6_Description: <color=#FFA636FF>Sheathe: Apply 1 stack of <color=#B22222>Fire Mark</color> to all enemies and gain 1 stack of <color=#8B0000>Blazing Madness</color>.</color>
SuzakuinTsubaki.Skill/S_SuzakuinTsubaki_7_Description:
Hitting an enemy with <color=#B22222>Fire Mark</color> guarantees a Critical Hit.
<color=#FFA636FF>Sheathe: Use this skill.</color>
SuzakuinTsubaki.Skill/S_SuzakuinTsubaki_R1_Description:
On kill, gain 1 stack of <color=#8B0000>Blazing Madness</color>.
<color=#FFA636FF>Sheathe: Use this skill on a random enemy, then return it to your hand.</color>
SuzakuinTsubaki.Skill/S_SuzakuinTsubaki_R2_Description:
Whenever a skill is Exchanged or Discarded, reduce this skill's cost by 1.
Sheathe: Perform additional attacks on a random enemy (inflicting <color=#B22222>Fire Mark</color>) based on this skill's current cost, dealing &a damage per hit. Gain 2 stacks of <color=#8B0000>Blazing Madness</color>.
SuzakuinTsubaki.Skill/S_SuzakuinTsubaki_lucy_Description: Draw 2 skills and gain 1 stack of <color=#8B0000>Blazing Madness</color>.
SuzakuinTsubaki.SkillExtended/Ex_SuzakuinTsubaki_1_Name: <color=#FFA636FF>Sheathe: Use this skill and gain 1 stack of <color=#8B0000>Blazing Madness</color>.</color>
SuzakuinTsubaki.SkillExtended/Ex_SuzakuinTsubaki_2_Name: <color=#FFA636FF>Sheathe: Use this skill and enter <color=#7B68EE>Sword Preparation</color>.</color>
SuzakuinTsubaki.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_SuzakuinTsub: [B] Can your blade... actually, never mind.
[A] Huh?
[B] Keeping a spare pair of blades hidden — that's a good habit.
[A] Against a strong opponent, you really do need to go dual-wielding.
[A] You use two blades too?
[B] Yes, though my two blades don't really work in tandem...
[A] I've been told I just win through brute force a lot of the time too...
[A] You carry the burden of being an elite, just like me.
[B] Well, of course. That's what it means to be an elite.
[B] Hmm? I think I can hear your blade...
[A] Wait, is that... the Firebird?
[A] This reminds me of a teammate I had at a tournament.
[B] Was she a priestess too?
[B] The craftsmanship is very similar to Lady Koyo's equipment — maybe even more advanced?
[A] Well, it has been over ten years...
[B] Was my support any good?
[A] Your support in that last fight was right on time.
[A] Are you fighting to find someone you love?
[B] Yes, to find Alice.
[A] I hope you two are reunited soon. I wonder where Tokki is now...
[B] Come on, a crack of the whip and you'll be healed!
[A] Your healing methods are terrifying...
[B] Your sister never complained!
[A] Winning through numbers — it's surprisingly effective.
[B] Phantom blades have more uses than just that, you know.
[A] Is this some kind of Demon Trance?
[B] Demon Trance? I am the great Phoenix!
[B] I really admire how seriously you approach your training.
[A] To grow stronger, training is everything.
[B] Is that blood on your blade?
[A] No, it's the tempering pattern on the steel.
[B] Such light armor still provides protection... have I asked this before?
[A] Trust in the origami craftsmanship!
[B] I can sense it... a dark lineage within you.
[A] N-no, I don't have anything like that! And I definitely don't have fox ears!
[B] You're burning too!
[A] Well, when I use the Firebird, I do feel like I'm burning up.
[B] Blazing like that... I couldn't do something so dangerous.
[A] It's just the flame along the blade when I use it.
[A] Selena is the older sister, then.
[A] I'm the youngest of four sisters — I still have a long way to go to catch up with them.
[B] Ugh, so boring — always such a serious look on your face.
[A] That's just the mindset you need for battle.
[A]You're floating in the air? How remarkable.
[B]Our skills go far beyond even that.
[A]A Razor Wind Slash? I've never seen swordsmanship like that before.
[B]Ha, your swordsmanship is quite impressive as well.

CivilightEterna.Character/CivilightEterna_PassiveDesc: Initially obtains the equipment "Trial of Souls". Upon equipping it, defeating enemies grants the "Convergence of Hope" buff, which lasts the entire run. When "Convergence of Hope" reaches a certain stack count, Civilight Eterna's skills gain enhanced effects. When Soul Stacks >= 25: Choose to gain the branch buff "King's Legacy: Wither" or "King's Legacy: Flourish". - This passive takes effect from level 1
CivilightEterna.Character/CivilightEterna_SelectInfo: Civilight Eterna walks the path of life, leading the souls of the past against the tides of fate. Now, she stands alongside you.
CivilightEterna.Character/CivilightEterna_SkinDesc: Civilight Eterna's everyday outfit. Suitable for any occasion — very practical.
CivilightEterna.Character/CivilightEterna_Text_Field_Idl: Don't rush. I'm right here with you.
CivilightEterna.Character/CivilightEterna_Text_PharosLea: Sorry to keep you waiting. I'm back!
This is not what I wanted!
CivilightEterna.Item_Equip/EQ_CivilightEterna_0_Descript:
All enemies gain buffs: "Attack Power +15%, Healing Power +15%, Maximum Health +20%".

When defeating an enemy:
Normal enemies: Gain 1 stack of "Convergence of Hope".
Elite enemies: Gain 2 stacks of "Convergence of Hope".
Boss enemies: Gain 3 stacks of "Convergence of Hope".

This equipment cannot be obtained through normal means and can only be equipped by Civilight Eterna.
Upgrades when "Convergence of Hope" reaches its maximum stack count.
CivilightEterna.Item_Equip/EQ_CivilightEterna_1_Descript:
At the start of battle, grant all allies a buff: "Critical Hit Chance +10%".
Apply a debuff to all enemies: "Damage Taken +10%" (<sprite=0>300%).

This equipment cannot be obtained through normal means and can only be equipped by Civilight Eterna.
CivilightEterna.Skill/S_CivilightEterna_0_Description:
This skill can be used 3 times.

</color>&lowLayerIcon Soul Stacks >= &ceLowLayer: Grant self 1 stack of "Particles".
</color>&middleLayerIcon Soul Stacks >= &ceMiddleLayer: Gain &healNum (&healPBuffPer% of Soul Stacks) Regeneration.
</color>&highLayerIcon Soul Stacks >= &ceHighLayer: Remove 1 random Pain or Weakening debuff from the target.</color>
CivilightEterna.Buff/B_CivilightEterna_1_Description:
When taking non-Pain damage, restore &dustNum (Soul Stacks) HP.

</color>&lowLayerIcon Soul Stacks >= &ceLowLayer: When taking non-Pain damage, reflect &dustDamage (own "Particles" stacks * &dustRate) Pain damage back to the attacker.
</color>&middleLayerIcon Soul Stacks >= &ceMiddleLayer: When gaining "Particles" while already at max stacks, deal &regDmg (&regDmgPer% Healing Power) damage to a random enemy.
</color>&highLayerIcon Soul Stacks >= &ceHighLayer: Reflected damage is increased by &buffDmg (own &buffDmgPer% buff stacks).</color>
CivilightEterna.Skill/S_CivilightEterna_2_Description:
</color>&lowLayerIcon Soul Stacks >= &ceLowLayer: Gain &barrierNum (&barrierPer% of Healing) Barrier.
</color>&middleLayerIcon Soul Stacks >= &ceMiddleLayer: Healing is increased by &pBuffHealNum (&pBuffHealPer% of Soul Stacks).
</color>&highLayerIcon Soul Stacks >= &ceHighLayer: The target gains the "Fury of Many Souls" buff.</color>
CivilightEterna.Buff/B_CivilightEterna_2_T_0_Description: Critical Hit Chance is additionally increased by "Particles" stacks * &criDustRate.
CivilightEterna.Skill/S_CivilightEterna_3_Description: Apply a Regeneration buff to each target based on &healPer% of their Maximum Health + &pBuffHealPer% of Soul Stacks (&pBuffHealNum), and immediately trigger the target's Regeneration effect once.
CivilightEterna.Buff/B_CivilightEterna_3_T_0_Description:
The maximum number of "Particles" stacks gained from this buff is &maxAddDust.

</color>&lowLayerIcon Soul Stacks >= &ceLowLayer: When applying a Pain debuff to an enemy, &dustDotPer% chance to gain 1 stack of Particles.
</color>&middleLayerIcon Soul Stacks >= &ceMiddleLayer: When applying a Weakening debuff to an enemy, &dustDebuffPer% chance to gain 1 stack of Particles.
</color>&highLayerIcon Soul Stacks >= &ceHighLayer: When applying a CC debuff to an enemy, &dustCCPer% chance to gain 1 stack of Particles.</color>
CivilightEterna.Skill/S_CivilightEterna_4_Description:
Adjust all allies' HP to match the ratio of the ally with the lowest HP (minimum of 1). Grant a group Barrier equal to &barrierPer% of the total downward adjustment.

</color>&lowLayerIcon Soul Stacks >= &ceLowLayer: Allies with more than &proDustNum Particles stacks gain the "Healing Gauge Protection" buff.
</color>&middleLayerIcon Soul Stacks >= &ceMiddleLayer: If the total adjustment value is greater than 0, deal Pain damage equal to the adjustment value to a random enemy.
</color>&highLayerIcon Soul Stacks >= &ceHighLayer: The target gains the "Condolence" buff.</color>
CivilightEterna.Buff/B_CivilightEterna_4_T_0_Description: Gain Attack Power and Healing Power bonuses equal to &attrPer% of current Maximum Health (up to &maxAttrNum).
CivilightEterna.Skill/S_CivilightEterna_5_Description:
Deal Pain damage equal to &costHpPer% of Maximum Health to the target and self.

</color>&lowLayerIcon Soul Stacks >= &ceLowLayer, self and target gain the "Merciful Vision" buff.
</color>&middleLayerIcon Soul Stacks >= &ceMiddleLayer, draw 1 skill on use.
</color>&highLayerIcon Soul Stacks >= &ceHighLayer, additionally gain &highAddDustLayer stacks of "Particles".</color>
CivilightEterna.Skill/S_CivilightEterna_6_Description:
Record the sum of all allies' Maximum Health at the time of use. Attack random enemies &totalAttackTimes (field Particles stacks + &extraAtkTimes) times, dealing &totalDamageNum (&regDmgPer% Healing Power + &pBuffDmgPer% Soul Stacks + &recoverPer% of recorded Maximum Health) damage each hit. Remove all Particles.

</color>&lowLayerIcon Soul Stacks >= &ceLowLayer: Attacks apply the "Crown's Erosion" debuff to the target (<sprite=1>100%).
</color>&middleLayerIcon Soul Stacks >= &ceMiddleLayer: Attacks apply the "Crown's Intimidation" debuff to the target (<sprite=0>100%).
</color>&highLayerIcon Soul Stacks >= &ceHighLayer: Attacks apply the "Crown's Authority" debuff to the target (<sprite=0>100%).</color>
CivilightEterna.Skill/S_CivilightEterna_7_Description:
On use, deal Pain damage equal to &hpDmgPer% of Maximum Health to all allies, and record the sum of all allies' Maximum Health. During the Countdown, using a non-healing skill attacks a random enemy, dealing (&regDmgPer% Healing Power + &pBuffDmgPer% Soul Stacks + &recoverPer% of recorded Maximum Health) damage, up to &maxAtkTimes times.

</color>&lowLayerIcon Soul Stacks >= &ceLowLayer: Allies with more than &proDustNum Particles stacks gain the "Healing Gauge Protection" buff.
</color>&middleLayerIcon Soul Stacks >= &ceMiddleLayer: Attacks randomly apply 1 stack of a Pain debuff (Bleed, Burn, or Poison).
</color>&highLayerIcon Soul Stacks >= &ceHighLayer: After triggering &apAtkTimes follow-up attacks, restore 1 Mana (up to &apTimes times).</color>
CivilightEterna.Buff/B_CivilightEterna_7_T_0_Description:
During the Countdown, using an attack skill attacks a random enemy, dealing &totalDamageNum (&regDmgPer% Healing Power + &pBuffDmgPer% Soul Stacks + &recoverPer% of recorded Maximum Health) damage, up to &maxAtkTimes times.

Remaining uses: &lastAtkTimes
CivilightEterna.SkillExtended/S_CivilightEterna_EN_0_Nam: Damage is increased by 100% of own Maximum Health.
CivilightEterna.SkillExtended/S_CivilightEterna_EN_1_Nam: On play, heal a random ally for 40% of the higher value between Attack Power and Healing Power, and grant 1 stack of "Particles".
CivilightEterna.Skill/S_CivilightEterna_Lucy_Description: Draw 2 skills. If any ally has max Particles stacks, draw 1 additional skill.
CivilightEterna.Buff/B_CivilightEterna_P_Description:
Each turn, restore HP equal to Civilight Eterna's level (&recoverNum) + &healRegPer% Healing Power (&healRegNum).
Each turn, &createDustPer% chance to gain 1 stack of "Particles".
CivilightEterna.Buff/B_CivilightEterna_P_1_Description: The souls follow Civilight Eterna, trusting in the path she leads.
CivilightEterna.Buff/B_CivilightEterna_P_2_Description: Each turn, grant 1 stack of "Particles" to a random ally.
CivilightEterna.Buff/B_CivilightEterna_P_3_Description:
The chance of "I Am Here" gaining "Particles" becomes 100%.
</color><color=#A5AAA3>"I will stay by Amiya's side."</color>
CivilightEterna.Buff/B_CivilightEterna_P_LM_0_Descriptio: When dealing damage to enemies, heal a random ally for 10% of the damage dealt (minimum of 1).
CivilightEterna.Buff/B_CivilightEterna_P_LM_1_Descriptio: When healing exceeds Maximum Health, gain 1 stack of "Shelter of Many Souls".
CivilightEterna.Skill/S_CivilightEterna_R_0_Description:
At the start of battle, place this card on top of the deck.
This skill's effects also grow while in hand.
CivilightEterna.Buff/B_CivilightEterna_R_0_Description:
Attack Power and Healing Power are increased by &normalInitAddNum, and increase by &normalTurnAddLayerNum each turn, up to Civilight Eterna's level (&buffUserLv).
The chance of "I Am Here" gaining "Particles" is increased to &skillR0Per%.
</color>&lowLayerIcon Soul Stacks >= &ceLowLayer: Initial Attack Power and Healing Power bonus becomes &lowInitAddNum.
</color>&middleLayerIcon Soul Stacks >= &ceMiddleLayer: The per-turn increase becomes &middleTurnAddLayerNum.
</color>&highLayerIcon Soul Stacks >= &ceHighLayer: Critical Hit Chance is increased by &addCriNum%.</color>
CivilightEterna.Buff/B_CivilightEterna_R_1_Description:
When dealing damage, increase the damage by the target's Pain debuff stack count (up to &maxDotDmgAdd).

</color>&lowLayerIcon Soul Stacks >= &ceLowLayer: When dealing damage, inflict Stun on the target (<sprite=2> &controlPer%).
</color>&middleLayerIcon Soul Stacks >= &ceMiddleLayer: The damage increase is further boosted by &pBuffDmgNum (&pBuffDmgPer% of Soul Stacks).
</color>&highLayerIcon Soul Stacks >= &ceHighLayer: Duration is increased by &addLifeTime turns.</color>
CivilightEterna.Skill/S_CivilightEterna_R_2_Description:
Remove all Pain and Weakening debuffs from the target and spread them to all enemies.

</color>&lowLayerIcon Soul Stacks >= &ceLowLayer: The target gains the Healing Gauge Protection buff.
</color>&middleLayerIcon Soul Stacks >= &ceMiddleLayer: The target deals damage to a random enemy equal to &healDmgPer% of their Heal over Time value.
</color>&highLayerIcon Soul Stacks >= &ceHighLayer: Additionally gain &highAddDustLayer stack(s) of Particles.</color>
CivilightEterna.Character_Skin/Skin_CivilightEterna_1_Sk: EPOQUE sub-brand [Passe] series selected piece / Condolence. The attire worn by Civilight Eterna as she delves deep into Theresa's data. Through the veil of time, she glimpses the sealed memories of the departed.
CivilightEterna.Item_Passive/T_CivilightEterna_0_Descrip: When the End Turn button is pressed, all support-type characters each deal damage to all enemies equal to 10% of their Healing Power plus 50% of their Heal over Time value.

Noa.Skill/S_Noa_4_Description: Preferentially draw 1 skill from the target character.
Noa.Skill/S_Noa_8_Description: Deals 10% increased damage for each Weakening debuff the target has.
Noa.Skill/S_Noa_R2_Description:
Resets the duration of all Weakening debuffs on the target to infinite turns.
<color=#808080>Qui aimes-tu le mieux, homme énigmatique, dis? </color>
Noa.Buff/B_Noa_1_Description: When a skill is played from hand, copy its debuffs and apply them to that character (excluding 'Secretary's Vote'), then remove one stack.
Noa.Buff/B_Noa_4_Description: Debuffs applied to the target last one additional turn.
Noa.Buff/B_Noa_5_Description: Cannot act. Removed when damage is taken.
Noa.Buff/B_Noa_5_T_Description: Removed when a Critical Hit is received.
Noa.Buff/B_Noa_6_Description: When killed, draw a 'Weakness Record' from the deck or discard pile. Skills drawn this way carry all Weakening debuffs the target had when killed.
Noa.Buff/B_Noa_R1_Description:
Can be targeted by attacks that Ignore Taunt.
The amount of Defense reduced is additionally applied to Maximum Health.
Noa.Buff/B_Noa_R2_Description: When killed, all debuffs are transferred to a single random target. Transferred debuffs cannot be resisted.
Noa.Character/Noa_PassiveDes:
Noa's Weakening and Pain debuff success rates are additionally increased by her Maximum Health value.
For every 15 points of her Maximum Health, extend the duration of Weakening and Pain effects on targets by 1 round.

When Noa applies a Weakening debuff to an enemy, she gains the "Recording" buff upon entering the Cover:
When a target with a Weakening debuff is killed while the "Recording" buff is active,
gain "Terrain Adaptability: S~C".
When a target with a Debuff is killed while maintaining a "Recording" buff,
gain "Terrain Adaptability: S~C".
Noa.Character/Noa_SelectInfo:
A student of Millennium Science School and secretary of the student council "Seminar."
Primarily responsible for recording decisions and meeting minutes of the Seminar, as well as evaluating special permits and registering patents for products developed by Millennium students.
Possesses an exceptional memory, capable of recalling nearly everything she has seen or heard even just once.
Noa.Character/Noa_CampSelectWord: Would you like to accompany me to a world of logic and reason?
Noa.Character_Skin/noaskin1_SkinDesc: The secretary of Seminar at Millennium Science School, dressed in pajamas for a peaceful night's rest. She quietly watches over her adorable junior and her earnest colleague as they get caught up in one misunderstanding after another. Of course, a smile and meticulous record-keeping are always part of the routine.

Jefuty.Buff/B_Jefuty_R1_Description:
Mana cost of cards in hand is reduced.
<color=orange>Ignore Taunt</color><color=orange>
Jefuty.Buff/B_Jefuty_S10_1_Description:
Cannot act.
Removed at the start of your turn. When naturally removed, restore 50% of Max. Health and apply Steady Shot to self.
Each evade during this buff grants 10% Attack Power afterwards.
Current evade count: &a
Jefuty.Buff/B_Jefuty_S1_10_Description: 50% chance to gain one stack at the start of each turn.
Jefuty.Buff/B_Jefuty_S1_6_Description: When attacked, deal &a damage to the attacker before the attack and apply Fatigue.
Jefuty.Buff/B_Jefuty_S1_7_Description: Damage taken is increased by 30%. Loses one stack when damaged.
Jefuty.Buff/B_Jefuty_S2_Description: If unable to evade, reduce damage taken by 40%.
Jefuty.Buff/B_Jefuty_S4_Description:
Records damage dealt to the target by the applier. Damage received from the applier is increased based on the recorded value.
Current increase: &a%
Jefuty.Buff/B_Jefuty_S7_Description:
Loses one stack when damaged.
Each stack increases damage dealt by 10%.
Jefuty.Buff/B_Jefuty_S8_Description:
After attacking, if the target survives, deal additional damage equal to [applier's 100% Attack Power] and lose one stack.
If this Support Fire kills the target, [applier] gains one stack of Killing Feedback.
Jefuty.Buff/B_Mosin_Description: The next attack deals 30% increased damage.
Jefuty.Buff/B_WeaponStation_Description:
Current Mana remaining: &a
Current maximum Barrier: &b
Consumes one Mana to perform a warning shot before an enemy attacks [buff holder].
Click this buff to restore half of the maximum Barrier, up to the cap.
Jefuty.Character/Jefuty_PassiveDesc:
Accuracy +(5×Level)%. After ending your turn, changes to Evade +(5×Level)%.
If no damage was received from enemies, gain additional effects at the start of the next turn based on your level.
Lv. 1–3: Apply one stack of Respite.
Lv. 4–5: Apply two stacks of Respite.
Max: Apply two stacks of Respite. If Respite is at max stacks, apply one stack of "Defense Debuff."
Jefuty.Character/Jefuty_SelectInfo: A girl who crossed through time, possessing powers similar to Lusica.
Jefuty.Character/Jefuty_CampSelectWord: I will carry hope... and press on.
Jefuty.Character/Jefuty_Text_Field_Idle_0: We're short on time. Let's move.
Jefuty.Character/Jefuty_Text_Battle_Idle_0: We don't have time to stand around.
Jefuty.Character/Jefuty_Text_Field_GetItem_0: What's inside this box should be...
Jefuty.Item_Equip/MosinNagant_Description: After a Critical Hit, the next attack deals 30% increased damage.
Jefuty.Item_Equip/Pagodroma_Description: When using a skill, Critical Hit Chance is increased by the highest Defense value among enemy targets, and damage dealt is increased by 70% of the highest Defense value among enemy targets.
Jefuty.Skill/S_Jefuty_1_Description:
Craft a temporary item.
Fragmentation Grenade + Infrared Detection Module = Tracking Mine
Fragmentation Grenade + Fragmentation Grenade = Portable Rocket
Fragmentation Grenade + Incendiary Grenade = Enhanced Incendiary Grenade
Fragmentation Grenade + Blood Bullet = Blood Grenade
Medkit + Medkit = Area Heal Orb
Medkit + Supply Drink = Painkiller
Smoke Grenade + Flashbang = Concussion Grenade
Holographic Sand + Infrared Detection Module = Temporary Cover
