Jefuty.Skill/S_Jefuty_1_1_Description: Affects the target and the units to its left and right.
Jefuty.Skill/S_Jefuty_1_2_Description: Affects the target and the units to its left and right.
Jefuty.Skill/S_Jefuty_1_4_Description: If the target has Reverse Blood, deal an additional &a damage.
Jefuty.Skill/S_Jefuty_1_8_Description: Affects the target and the units to its left and right.
Jefuty.Skill/S_Jefuty_2_Description: Excluded after being used twice in battle.
Jefuty.Skill/S_Jefuty_3_Description:
Drawn at the start of battle.
This skill can be used while unable to act.
Deal &a Pain damage to yourself and remove all debuffs from yourself.
Jefuty.Skill/S_Jefuty_4_Description: Drawn at the start of battle.
Jefuty.Skill/S_Jefuty_5_Description: This skill's cost changes to match the original cost of the last non-rare skill used from hand. Repeat the last non-rare skill used from hand, including any enhanced or weakened effects. Copied skill: &a
Jefuty.Skill/S_Jefuty_6_Description:
This skill's bonus Critical Hit Chance equals the target's Defense, and damage dealt is increased by a percentage equal to the target's Defense.
When this skill kills the target, deal (40 × target's Defense + 40)% Attack Power as Defense-ignoring damage to all enemies.
Jefuty.Skill/S_Jefuty_7_Description: Each enemy killed by this skill grants 1 stack of Killing Feedback to self.
Jefuty.Skill/S_Jefuty_9_Description: This skill cannot be evaded. This skill consumes all remaining Mana and deals &a damage to the target for each Mana actually consumed. Current Damage: &b
Jefuty.Skill/S_Jefuty_Lucy1_Description:
Draw 2 cards. If neither is a Jefuty card, draw 1 more.
If both are Jefuty cards, gain 1 Mana.
Jefuty.Skill/S_Jefuty_R1_Description: When used, preferentially draw 2 of your own skill cards.
Jefuty.Skill/S_Jefuty_R2_Description:
Deal &a pain damage to self.
Deal &b pain damage to the target.
Generate 3 Blood Bullets.
Jefuty.Item_Passive/WeaponStation_Description: At the start of battle, add 1 "Weapon Station" card to your hand.

Poca.Buff/B_Poca_0_Description: When using a skill next time, if &a has a skill with the same cost in hand, &a copies and casts a random one. Removed after triggering.
Poca.Buff/B_Poca_10_Description:
When taking damage, increase the multiplier of all Attack skills in hand by 30%.
After this effect triggers 3 times, Exclude all of your own Attack skills in hand.
Poca.Buff/B_Poca_12_Description: When your Ignore Taunt skills hit an enemy, cast "Parting Shot" on them once. Lose 1 stack after triggering.
Poca.Buff/B_Poca_1_Description:
Takes 20% extra damage when hit by Ignore Taunt skills.

If not under a CC debuff, removed at end of turn or when there is no Avalanche Breaker in the Countdown slot.
When removed, take &a damage.
Poca.Buff/B_Poca_2_Description: The next time a skill belonging to &a is drawn, preferentially draw one of your own skills first.
Poca.Buff/B_Poca_3_Description:
When this effect is applied again, take &a Pain damage.
When dealing damage, &b% chance to reduce by &c%.
Poca.Buff/B_Poca_4_Description:
At the end of the turn, draw one of your own Attack skills from the deck (if none, do not draw).
The drawn skill gains an effect: return to the deck after being used.
Poca.Buff/B_Poca_5_Description: At the end of each turn, add Logistical Work to hand with Swiftness and discard after two turns.
Poca.Buff/B_Poca_6_Description:
Only effective when there is more than 1 ally.
When about to receive damage from an enemy, reduce that damage by 80%.
Then cast a random Attack skill on a random other ally.
When another ally is incapacitated by a skill triggered by this debuff, you become incapacitated.
Poca.Buff/B_Poca_7_Description:
Each time you use a skill, choose to discard a skill in hand with the same cost as the used skill.
Display all skills in the deck with the same cost, choose one to draw and cast.
Removed at end of turn. For each ally who had a skill discarded this way this turn, draw one skill.
Poca.Buff/B_Poca_8_Description:
Increases Attack Power based on the number of your skills in the discard pile.
At end of turn, if the number of your skills cast is greater than the number discarded:
Greater: randomly move one of your skills from the discard pile to the top of the deck.
Lesser: at the start of next turn, draw one skill.
The next time "Naïve Rebellion" is drawn, remove this effect and upgrade "Naïve Rebellion".
Poca.Buff/B_Poca_9_Description: Removed when Entrust is in hand.
Poca.Buff/B_Poca_Level_Description:
Current Progress: &a
Kill Count: &b
Next Step: &c
Poca.Buff/B_Poca_Lucy_Description: The next time a skill belonging to Rosa is drawn, draw one additional skill and reduce its cost by 1.
Poca.Buff/B_Poca_lucy2_Description:
When using a skill, discard one of your own skills.
If the discarded skill is an Attack skill, cast this skill one additional time.
Otherwise, draw one skill and restore 1 Mana.
Removed after triggering.
Poca.Character/Poca_CampSelectWord: Is it my turn? I'll do my best.
Poca.Character/Poca_SelectInfo:
Rosa was once the daughter of a prominent noble family, but the upheaval of war and disaster reduced her to a fallen aristocrat. After some time, she applied for a transfer to the front lines as a Sniper Operator.

Rosa wields a massive siege weapon in battle. The power of her harpoon launcher handles even the most troublesome enemies with ease, and as she accumulates combat experience, Rosa grows ever more adept at wielding it.
Poca.Character/Poca_Text_Battle_AllyND_0: I need to get used to the battlefield too...
Poca.Character/Poca_Text_Battle_Kill_0: Even though we had no quarrel...
Poca.Character/Poca_Text_Field_Idle_0: I wonder if there's somewhere like a salon around here.
Poca.Character/Poca_Text_PharosLeader_0: ......Rosa, believe in yourself. You can do this.
Poca.Character/Poca_Text_PharosLeader_1: I'm going to have to hold a review meeting when we get back......
Poca.Character_Skin/Pocaskin_SkinDesc: The outfit worn by Natalya, Student Council President of Chernobog's #4 Secondary School, when delivering her opening ceremony address.
Poca.Item_Equip/Eq_Poca_0_Description: When your follow-up attacks deal damage, gain a buff that increases Critical Hit Chance by 15% for 2 turns. Stacks up to 5 times.
Poca.Item_Equip/Ex_Poca_p_Description:
After hitting an enemy 2 times, reduce Overload by 1. Limited to once per turn.
Follow-up attacks and counterattacks always Critical Hit.
Deals 15% increased damage to (Cursed and Boss)(5) enemies.
Poca.Item_Passive/Medic_Poca_0_Description:
When discarding an investigator's skill, if there are no other skills belonging to that investigator in hand and that character's HP is at least 1, deal Pain damage to them to reduce their HP to 1, then draw three skills.
Once per battle.

<color=#919191>------Courage and trust.</color>
Poca.Item_Passive/Medic_Poca_2_Description: At the start of battle, for each investigator with the lowest level, display 3 of their exclusive skills and add one of your choice to hand.
Poca.Skill/S_Poca_0_Description:
Draw one skill.
When using a skill next time, if the target has a skill of the same cost in hand, they copy and cast a random one.
Poca.Skill/S_Poca_1_Description: Apply Binding to all enemies that share the same Taunt status as the target.
Poca.Skill/S_Poca_2_Description:
Simultaneously attack the enemy with the most HP.
This skill always Critical Hits when the additional target has more HP.
If there is only one enemy, restore 1 Mana when cast.
Poca.Skill/S_Poca_3_Description: Randomly reduce the cost of one skill in the deck by 1 and grant it Swiftness. (Prioritizes the target ally's skills.)
Poca.Skill/S_Poca_4_Description: On hit, if the target is an enemy with the most HP on the field, attack again via Countdown 1 (at 85% of the original power).
Poca.Skill/S_Poca_5_Description:
If there is an enemy on the field with a different Taunt status than the target, additionally apply 1 stack of Frightened.
If there is only one target and it has Frightened, extend Frightened's duration by 2 turns.
Poca.Skill/S_Poca_6_Description:
Can only be used when there are no other Attack skills of your own in hand.
Shuffle all of your own Attack skills from the discard pile back into the deck.
Poca.Skill/S_Poca_7_Description:
During Countdown, each time another ally uses an Attack skill, this skill's damage decreases by &a.
Each time allies deal &b damage, this skill's Critical Hit Chance increases by 15%.
Each time allies deal or receive &c damage, this skill's damage is amplified by 125%.
On kill, shuffle one "Struggle" into the draw pile.
Current Amplification: &d%
Poca.Skill/S_Poca_8_Description:
Draw one skill.
If your HP is the highest in the party when cast, gain the "Perpetrator?" debuff.
Poca.Skill/S_Poca_9_0_Description: For each Ignore Taunt skill in hand, ignore 25% Defense.
Poca.Skill/S_Poca_lucy1_Description:
Draw two skills.
If Rosa is alive, the next time a skill belonging to Rosa is drawn, draw one additional skill and reduce its cost by 1.
Poca.Skill/S_Poca_lucy2_Description:
Draw 2 skills.

<color=#919191>This doesn't quite taste like my vodka... ---Ilya</color>
Poca.Skill/S_Poca_r1_Description: For each other surviving ally, display 3 of your own exclusive skills and choose one to add to hand with Swiftness, discard after 1 turn, and Exclude.
Poca.Skill/S_Poca_r2_0_Description:
If the ally with the lowest HP is Near Death, restore them to 1 HP.
If you are the ally with the lowest HP, deal &a additional damage.
Poca.Skill/S_Poca_r2_1_Description:
For this battle, each time you take damage, increase this skill's damage by &a.
When this skill deals damage, deal the same amount of Pain damage to yourself.
Poca.Skill/S_Poca_r2_Description: At the start of battle, draw and cast this skill.
Poca.Skill/S_poca_9_Description: For each Ignore Taunt skill in your hand, trigger Parting Shot once (up to 4 times). Prioritizes granting 1 stack of Undaunted to allies that do not already have Undaunted.
Poca.SkillExtended/Ex_Poca_2_Des:
If not Excluded when next used, return to the deck.
Dispels after triggering.
Poca.SkillExtended/S_en_Poca_2_Name: Based on Mana spent, for each point, prioritize having Rosa trigger Parting Shot 2 times.
Poca.SkillExtended/S_en_poca_0_Name: Ignore Taunt. Applies Taunt (110%) debuff to the target when triggered.
Poca.SkillExtended/S_en_poca_1_EnforceString: Attack skills costing 2 or more Mana.
Poca.B_Poca_Level_State_1: All skills in battle Ignore Taunt and shuffle Whale Fall into the deck.
Poca.B_Poca_Level_State_2: Whale Fall does not level up when hunting cursed enemies; only levels up when hunting bosses.
Poca.B_Poca_Level_State_3: Passive follow-up attacks trigger against all enemies. Synergy activation condition changed.
Poca.B_Poca_Level_State_4: Damage bonus from Whale Fall and "985" applies to all enemies.
Poca.B_Poca_Level_State_5: Whale Fall increases damage when hunting any enemy.
Poca.Eq_Poca_en_0:
After hitting an enemy twice, reduce Overload by 1. Once per turn.
Follow-up attacks and counterattacks always Critical Hit.
Damage dealt to cursed and boss enemies is increased by 15%.
Poca.Eq_Poca_en_1:
After hitting an enemy twice, reduce Overload by 1. Once per turn.
Follow-up attacks and counterattacks always Critical Hit.
Damage dealt to enemies is increased by 15%.

Lv. 3: When an attack hits a boss or cursed enemy, deal additional damage equal to 30% of Attack Power.
Lv. 4: Bone Piercer's additional damage ignores Defense.

Can only target cursed or boss enemies.
When this skill kills a cursed or boss enemy, sequentially upgrade the passive, synergy, equipment, and this skill's effects, increasing the damage bonus of "Whale Fall" against cursed or boss enemies during the investigation by 20%.
Poca.S_Poca_r0_State_1: When this skill kills a cursed or boss enemy, sequentially upgrade the passive, synergy, equipment, and this skill's effects, increasing the damage bonus of "Whale Fall" against cursed or boss enemies during the investigation by 20%.

Poca.Character_Skin/Pocaskin_SelectInfo: Rosa attended a secondary school in Chernobog before the Chernobog Uprising, serving as its student council president. After the incident, she joined Rhodes Island and was assigned to the Logistics Department, where she earned an outstanding reputation. Upon her own request, she has since transferred to the frontlines as a Sniper Operator.

PLANA.Buff/B_PLANA_0_Description: Gain 30% of Plana's Attack Power and Healing Power. Each additional stack grants an extra +15%.
PLANA.Buff/B_PLANA_1_Description: When receiving damage, reduce that damage to 1/3. If Plana is alive, negate the damage instead and deal &a Pain damage to Plana. Removed after triggering.
PLANA.Buff/B_PLANA_2_Description:
Cannot act.
Plana is performing maintenance on herself.
PLANA.Buff/B_PLANA_2_OK_Description: At the start of the turn, gain 1 Mana. All other allies gain Support Calculation and Protective Field.
PLANA.Buff/B_PLANA_3_Description: Restore &a HP at the end of the turn.
PLANA.Buff/B_PLANA_5_Description: When healed, draw one card from that ally's cards first and gain &a Barrier. Removed after triggering.
PLANA.Buff/B_PLANA_6_Description: Plana is less likely to be targeted and gains increased Armor.
PLANA.Buff/B_PLANA_7_Description: Each time you play a card, deal &a Pain damage (&b times remaining this turn).
PLANA.Buff/B_PLANA_8_Description: Plana will copy the next card you play.
PLANA.Buff/B_PLANA_9_Description: Plana will never give up on you.
PLANA.Buff/B_PLANA_9_Shield_Description: Plana protects you when you are hurt (&a times remaining).
PLANA.Buff/B_PLANA_9_resist_Description: Plana takes damage in your place.
PLANA.Buff/B_PLANA_Rare_0_Description: Whenever you use a skill that costs 2 or more Mana, restore 1 Mana.
PLANA.Buff/B_PLANA_Rare_1_Description:
At the start of the turn, gain 2 additional Mana.
Plana will not enter sleep mode during this time.
PLANA.Character/PLANA_PassiveDes:
At the start of battle, all other allies gain Support Calculation, and gain Protective Field on the second turn. However, after entering battle, Plana shuts down for maintenance for 1 turn every 3 turns.
Support Calculation: Gain 30% of Plana's Attack Power and Healing Power. Each additional stack grants +15%.
Protective Field: When receiving damage, reduce that damage to 1/3. If Plana is alive, negate the damage instead and deal Pain damage equal to Max HP/5 to Plana. Removed after triggering.
PLANA.Character/PLANA_SelectInfo:
A.R.O.N.A, the OS of the Shittim Chest.
"Plana" is a name given to her by a senior.
PLANA.Character/PLANA_Text_Battle_AllyND_0: Senpai, it's about time to get up......
PLANA.Character/PLANA_Text_Battle_Kill_0: Hmm...... so that's how it's constructed.
PLANA.Character/PLANA_Text_Battle_Start_1: It's time to get to work.
PLANA.Character/PLANA_Text_Field_GetItem_0: So this is how it is here......
PLANA.Character/PLANA_Text_PharosLeader_0: Chaos. That is an incomprehensible course of action.
PLANA.Item_Equip/Equip_PLANA_0_Description:
If the equipped character is not Plana, increases Armor by 10%.
At the start of battle, the equipped character gains Protective Field. Every 3 turns thereafter, gain Barrier equal to twice the current turn count (max 8).
When equipped by Plana, applies to all other allies instead. Barrier is replaced with a Party Barrier (max 10), and the stack cap of Support Calculation is increased by 1.

<color=#919191>"A tablet that appears to be damaged."</color>
PLANA.SkillExtended/SkillEn_PLANA_0_Name: After playing, generate a copy of this skill in hand with Exclude, discarded after two turns.
PLANA.SkillExtended/SkillEn_PLANA_1_Name: Become Once. After playing, activate once more.
PLANA.SkillExtended/SkillEn_PLANA_1_EnforceStr: Non-Once damage skills costing 1 or more
PLANA.Skill/S_PLANA_0_Description: If the top card of the discard pile is not your own skill, generate a copy of it. Otherwise, generate a random Plana exclusive skill. The generated card has Exclude and is discarded after two turns.
PLANA.Skill/S_PLANA_1_Description: Generate &a Party Barrier. Plana copies the next card the target plays and adds it to hand.
PLANA.Skill/S_PLANA_2_Description:
If the target's current HP is less than 75% of the total HP of all other surviving allies, deal damage equal to &a of that total. All other surviving allies split damage equal to half that value.
Otherwise, deal half the damage instead and chain-heal HP equal to half of the damage dealt.
PLANA.Skill/S_PLANA_3_Description:
Lock on to the attack target, increasing damage they take by &a% and reducing their Attack and Armor.
Debuff values scale with Healing Power.
PLANA.Skill/S_PLANA_4_Description: Remove 1 random Debuff from the target. Grant the target L.O.V.E and Have a Rest.
PLANA.Skill/S_PLANA_5_Description:
During the skill's Countdown, generate &a Barrier each time a card is played (up to 10 times).
This card deals additional damage equal to &b based on Healing Power.
Additional damage dealt to the target is reduced by the total Barrier of allies. If the amount reduced exceeds half, grant the target Ballistic Calculation.
PLANA.Skill/S_PLANA_6_Description: Shuffle all cards in hand back into the deck, then draw an equal number of cards. Heal HP based on the number of cards drawn.
PLANA.Skill/S_PLANA_7_Description: Draw 1 card and restore Mana equal to that card's cost. Clear all allies' overload. Additionally heal all allies based on "the number of cards you've played this turn &a" multiplied by a portion of Plana's Healing Power.
PLANA.Skill/S_PLANA_8_Description:
During the Countdown, all allies cannot receive damage. When the Countdown ends, Plana receives Pain damage equal to half the total damage taken during this period and removes 1 random Debuff.
This damage cannot cause death.
PLANA.Skill/S_PLANA_Rare_0_Description:
Play all cards in hand except Lucy's skills, then place a copy of each played skill back into your hand.
This card's cost is reduced by 1 each time you play a card costing more than 2.
PLANA.Skill/S_PLANA_Rare_1_Description:
Cost is reduced based on the number of cards in hand.
Restore all Mana. Each time you use a skill costing more than 2 this turn, restore 1 Mana. Gain 2 additional Mana for the next 2 turns.
Grant all other allies Protective Field and raise Support Calculation stacks to maximum.
PLANA.Skill/S_PLANA_lucy0_Description: Draw 1 skill. Grant the target (stare) and Protective Field.

Labyrinth.Skill/L_lbn_Description:
1. Draw 2 cards.
2. Add a card with 【Welcome Labrynth】 in its name from the discard pile to your hand.
Labyrinth.Character/Labyrinth_PassiveDesc: At the start of battle, add 1 【Welcome Labrynth】 and 1 【Big Welcome Labrynth】 to your deck.
Labyrinth.Character/Labyrinth_SelectInfo: Labrynth is a DARK Fiend archetype from the booster set DBTM. The archetype revolves around effects triggered by Normal Trap Cards removing monsters, as well as synergies with Fiend-type monsters. True to its design, this knight lady welcomes challengers with elaborate traps and mechanisms. The archetype name ラビュリンス has several kanji renderings; the katakana reading is used here as the display name.
Labyrinth.Character/Labyrinth_Text_Field_Idle_0: Now where has the butler gotten to..?
Labyrinth.Character/Labyrinth_Text_Battle_Idle_0: Hmm, which trap should I spring next~?
Labyrinth.Character/Labyrinth_Text_Battle_Start_0: Now then, I, the Silver Labrynth, shall be your opponent!
Labyrinth.Character/Labyrinth_Text_Battle_Healed_0: The battle has only just begun.
Labyrinth.Character/Labyrinth_Text_Field_GetItem_0: Can't attract challengers without leaving some good loot around..
Labyrinth.Character/Labyrinth_Text_PharosLeader_2: You shall be buried in the shadows of this dark game.
Labyrinth.Skill/S_lbn_1_Description: Add a card owned by yourself from your deck to your hand.
Labyrinth.Skill/S_lbn_10_Name: Lady Labrynth of the Silver Castle
Labyrinth.Skill/S_lbn_10_Description:
1. When you play one of your own cards, this card's cost is reduced by 5.
2. This card gains additional attacks equal to the number of your own cards in the discard pile.
Labyrinth.Skill/S_lbn_2_Description: Discard 1 card from your hand, then add a card owned by yourself from your deck to your hand. The added card's cost is reduced by 2 and gains Swiftness.
Labyrinth.Skill/S_lbn_3_Description:
1. Choose one of your own cards in your hand; reduce its cost by 10.
2. Grant yourself 【Teatime!】.
Labyrinth.Skill/S_lbn_4_Description:
1. Discard 1 card from your hand, then add a card owned by yourself from your deck to your hand.
2. Grant yourself 【Hearthside Warmth】.
Labyrinth.Skill/S_lbn_5_Description:
1. Discard 1 card from your hand, then add a card owned by yourself from your deck to your hand.
2. Inflict 【Watch Your Head】 on an enemy.
Labyrinth.Skill/S_lbn_6_Description:
1. Block and counter the enemy's next attack, identical to Lian's block effect.
2. After being held in hand for 1 turn, this card's cost is reduced by 10.
Labyrinth.Skill/S_lbn_7_Description:
1. Add a card owned by yourself from your deck to your hand; reduce its cost by 5 and grant it Swiftness.
2. After being held in hand for 1 turn, this card's cost is reduced by 10.
Labyrinth.Skill/S_lbn_8_Description:
1. Add a card owned by yourself from your deck or discard pile to your hand; reduce its cost by 5 and grant it Swiftness. Then, return 1 card from your hand to your deck.
2. Add the top Chandraglier, Stovie Torbie, or Welcome Labrynth from the discard pile to your hand.
3. After being held in hand for 1 turn, this card's cost is reduced by 10.
Labyrinth.Skill/S_lbn_9_Name: Lovely Labrynth of the Silver Castle
Labyrinth.Skill/S_lbn_9_Description:
1. After playing one of your own cards, this card's damage is doubled (once only).
2. Add one of your own cards from the discard pile to your hand.

IzayoiSakuya.Buff/B_Sakuya_12Rare_Description: During Countdown, the passive "Ability to Manipulate Time" will not activate. All of your skills cost 0 Mana, gain Swiftness, and Countdown 1, but skills cannot be drawn by any means.
IzayoiSakuya.Buff/B_Sakuya_4_Description: When a CC debuff is applied to self, take &a damage.
IzayoiSakuya.Buff/B_Sakuya_4_new_Description: Each time you trigger the bonus effect of "Lunar Magic" or use [Watch "Lunar Dial"], deal %a(30%) damage to a random enemy.
IzayoiSakuya.Buff/B_Sakuya_P_0_Description: Every 4 stacks, add 1 "Watch 'Lunar Dial'" to your hand.
IzayoiSakuya.Character/IzayoiSakuya_CampSelectWord: The "time" in this place feels off. Shall I take care of it?
IzayoiSakuya.Character/IzayoiSakuya_PassiveDes: Ability to Manipulate Time - Each time a skill is played, reduce the Countdown of all of Sakuya's skills currently in Countdown by 1. For each skill whose Countdown is reduced this way, gain 1 Timestop Knife. Dangerous Conjurer - Each time Sakuya plays a skill from the top or bottom of her hand, gain 1 stack of Stopped Clock. When Stopped Clock reaches 4 stacks, add 1 "Watch 'Lunar Dial'" to your hand. Lunar Magic - Some of Sakuya's skills trigger bonus effects when played from the top or bottom of her hand.
IzayoiSakuya.Character/IzayoiSakuya_SelectInfo:
Izayoi Sakuya is a conjurer who plays tricks with her hand and with time.

Skills played from the top or bottom of your hand can trigger bonus effects, and skills can be used to flexibly reorder your hand.

Once enough resources are gathered this way, you can even stop your enemies' time.
IzayoiSakuya.Character/IzayoiSakuya_Text_Battle_Cri_0: Your time is mine to control!
IzayoiSakuya.Character/IzayoiSakuya_Text_Battle_Idle_: Perhaps eel for tonight's dinner... No, why would I even think that.
IzayoiSakuya.Character/IzayoiSakuya_Text_Battle_Kill_: Leaving bodies is such a hassle. I should collect my knives quickly...
IzayoiSakuya.Character/IzayoiSakuya_Text_Field_Idle_0: Oh my, the tea is about to boil.
IzayoiSakuya.Character/IzayoiSakuya_Text_Field_Idle_1: The weather has been rather strange this summer.
IzayoiSakuya.Character/IzayoiSakuya_Text_MasterTarget: Please give my regards to my mistress.
IzayoiSakuya.Character/IzayoiSakuya_Text_PharosLeader: Oh? ............... Please wait a moment. I shall rewind time at once.
For my mistress's sake, I ask that you meet your end here.
IzayoiSakuya.Character/IzayoiSakuya_Text_Witch_0: Purging curses for guests is all part of a maid's duties.
IzayoiSakuya.Character_Skin/IzayoiSakuyaBunny_SkinDes:
Halloween is just around the corner.
All preparations are complete.
My mistress, the Scarlet Devil Mansion, and I.
IzayoiSakuya.Item_Equip/StopWatch_Description: Once per battle, when damage would be taken while at 0 or less HP, negate that damage.
IzayoiSakuya.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_IzayoiSakuya: [A] Azar, what do you make of the "time" in this place?
[B] T-time? ...Do you mean the Clock Tower?
[A] No... hmm. Never mind, forget I said anything.
[B] Are you someone who uses the power of the moon as well?
[A] I suppose... you could say that?
[B] Those knife skills of yours! Could you teach me?
[A] ...It's not a martial art. Besides, knives are dangerous.
[A] An elixir of immortality? I'm sorry, but the Scarlet Devil Mansion has no need for such a sales pitch.
[B] No, no — this one was specially made for you, not the mansion.
[A] ...Somehow that makes it feel even more suspicious.
[B] Well, come find me whenever you change your mind.
[A] Lady Flandre, please enjoy your cake.
[B] Sakuya, Sakuya, could you make a "cake" out of that spiky bush over there?
[A] Hmm? I wouldn't recommend it, but... I'll give it a try next time.
[B] All that fiddling around with little knives in battle — it's so tedious.
[B] Can't you just slash! hack! and cut! like a normal person?
[A] The stew is ready. Would you like some?
[B] ...Thanks.
[B] Whips, throwing knives, vampires... ugh, my head...
[A] You should spend less time playing video games.
[A] What beautiful knife work.
[B] Oh, not at all — I still have a long way to go...
[B] Please stop eyeing the gaps in my armor.
[A] My apologies, it's a bad habit of mine...
[B] Hey! Did you put away all my empty bottles?
[A] Yes. Leaving them out like that was a hazard.
[B] Nooooo! Those were important experimental data!!!
[B] Please, I'm begging you — stop telling me about that Alice from your world.
[A] ...What exactly did they say to you?
[B] Sakuya, where did you learn to use knives like that?
[A] Self-taught, more or less. Is something the matter?
[B] Your grip could use a little refinement. Here, like this.
[A] Miss Chain, let me bandage that for you.
[B] Oh, thank you! With Sakuya around, getting hurt doesn't feel like such a big deal!
[A] I'm not a doctor, please don't get too reckless...
[A] Being able to manipulate fire must be quite handy for cooking out here in the wilderness.
[B] Well, that's true, but... my ability is immortality, not fire manipulation?
[A] Lady Patchouli, are you feeling well?
[B] Yes. No major issues. Surprisingly easier than the "outside world," actually.
[A] Is that so? That's a relief.
[B] Pleease, give me bread——
[A] No. Starting today, I am strictly managing the daily bread rations.
[B] Gaaah!
[B] Your fate... is stained with sin...
[A] I'm sorry, but I don't believe in "fate."
[A] The sun, the moon... are you two missing a star sister?
[B] Not at all. But didn't someone who shoots stars just fly by a moment ago?
[A] Reisen, are the potion supplies holding up?
[B] All the medicine Master gave me is completely gone...
[A] My lady, please enjoy your black tea.
[B] Hmm... you didn't add "that" to it?
[A] It would startle the others. Please bear with it for today.
[B] And yet none of them are even frightened that I'm a "vampire."
[A] Oh my, you look just like... I'm sorry, I must have mistaken you for someone else.
[B] That's alright. People often say I resemble "a certain someone."
[B] Be careful in battle, bullets don't discriminate.
[A] Don't worry. No bullet, no matter how fast, will ever hit me.
[A] Sizz, would you like me to teach you some more nimble finger techniques?
[B] Oh? Sakuya knows sleight of hand too?
[A] I use it quite often when performing magic tricks.
[A] You seem like someone without many worries. How nice.
[B] How rude. It's not that I rarely have worries — I have none at all.
[B] No matter how many times I try, I can't replicate your rapid movement...
[A] That is a technique no human could ever imitate.
[B] Aren't you human?
[A] ...I will still die if I am killed, you know.
[A] Your help with the stew was truly appreciated.
[B] You're too kind, Miss Sakuya. Without your ability, we would have had a disaster just now.
[A] I didn't expect a grass hedgehog to suddenly charge out of the forest...
[B] And it came straight for the stew pot...
IzayoiSakuya.Skill/S_Sakuya_0_0_Description:
Place 1 skill at the top or bottom of your hand.
When this skill is Discarded, draw 1 skill and gain 1 <color=#EEE9E9>Timestop Knife</color>.

IzayoiSakuya.Skill/S_Sakuya_0_2_Description: Place the target skill at the bottom of your hand.

Gain 2 stacks of <color=#00BFFF>Stopped Clock</color>.

After Countdown 1, deal %a damage again.

IzayoiSakuya.Skill/S_Sakuya_4_Description: When this skill's Countdown is reduced by a skill effect, generate a copy of it in the Countdown slot with Countdown reduced by 1 (generated copies cannot generate further copies).

IzayoiSakuya.Skill/S_Sakuya_6_Description: <color=#4169E1>Lunar Magic</color> - The target additionally gains "When attacked, Izayoi Sakuya will perform a counterattack against the attacker."

IzayoiSakuya.SkillExtended/SE_Sakuya_7_Des: Triggers Lunar Magic's additional effect even when not at the top or bottom of your hand.
IzayoiSakuya.SkillKeyword/Keyword_LunaMagic_Desc: This skill has an additional effect when played from the top or bottom of your hand.
IzayoiSakuya.Buff/B_Sakuya_6_0_Description:
When attacked, Sakuya performs a counterattack against the attacker dealing &a damage <color=#FF7A33>(30% of Attack Power)</color>.

IzayoiSakuya.Buff/B_Sakuya_LucyD_2_Description: When a Critical Hit or Evade triggers, draw 1 skill (up to 4 times).
IzayoiSakuya.Item_Passive/R_Sakuya_0_Description: When equipped, remove all Lucy's Curse skills.
IzayoiSakuya.Skill/S_Sakuya_9_Description:
If this skill does not Critical Hit, gain 1 <color=#EEE9E9>Timestop Knife</color> and return this skill to your hand.
If this skill Critical Hits, Exclude this skill.
IzayoiSakuya.Character_Skin/IzayoiSakuya15th_SkinDesc:
What kind of black tea should I brew today?
The cleanup after the banquet must be done without a sound, so as not to trouble anyone.
I have no need for praise or thanks.

Schwarz.Buff/B_Hei_0_Description:
When inflicted with a Weakening debuff, Defense -8%.
Dispelled at the end of the turn.
Schwarz.Buff/B_Hei_10_Description:
When an ally takes damage from an enemy, apply 1 stack of "Grudge" to the attacker.
When hitting an enemy afflicted with "Grudge", spread one of their random Weakening debuffs to other enemies.
Schwarz.Buff/B_Hei_11_Description:
When taking damage, if a Critical Hit is triggered, increase damage taken to &a%.
Reduces by 1 stack when triggered.
Schwarz.Buff/B_Hei_12_Description: Based on the Defense reduction from Shattered, increases damage taken by 60% proportionally.
Schwarz.Buff/B_Hei_13_Description:
While active, Shattered is no longer dispelled at the end of the turn.
Critical Hit damage is increased to 125%.
Schwarz.Buff/B_Hei_1_Description: When an enemy is afflicted with a debuff, Critical Damage increases by 10%.
Schwarz.Buff/B_Hei_2_Description: Starting from the 2nd turn, if no Attack skill was used this turn, dispel this effect at the end of the turn.
Schwarz.Buff/B_Hei_3_Description:
When inflicted with a debuff, increase the damage cap of this effect by &a.
When one of your debuffs is dispelled, take &b damage per stack.
Dispelled when remaining damage reaches 0.
If remaining damage is not 0 when dispelled, take half the remaining damage (up to &d).
Current remaining: &c
Schwarz.Buff/B_Hei_4_Description:
When a buff is applied to self, dispel a random debuff.
When one of your debuffs is dispelled, restore 2 HP per stack via Overheal.
If this effect is dispelled while you have no debuffs, draw a skill.
Schwarz.Buff/B_Hei_5_Description:
Can be targeted while ignoring Taunt.
The first time hit each turn, always triggers a Critical Hit.
When inflicted with a Weakening debuff, reset the above effect.
Schwarz.Buff/B_Hei_6_Description:
While not incapacitated, reduce damage taken by the Client by 20%.
When the Client takes damage, counter for &b damage and apply Breach.
Current Client: &a
Schwarz.Buff/B_Hei_7_Description:
At the end of each turn, if not near death, pay 15 Gold to each active Bodyguard.
Upon reaching near-death, cannot hire Bodyguards for the rest of this battle.

Currently hired: &a
Schwarz.Buff/B_Hei_7_T_Description: Cannot become a Client this battle.
Schwarz.Buff/B_Hei_8_Description:
When inflicted with debuffs applied by &a, their duration is extended by 1 turn.
Damage dealt to targets other than &a is reduced by 10%.
Schwarz.Buff/B_Hei_9_Description: Reduced by 1 stack when attacked, at the end of the turn, or when the Investigator uses a skill from hand.
Schwarz.Character/Schwarz_CampSelectWord: Don't trouble the Lady with such things.
Schwarz.Character/Schwarz_PassiveDes:
When an attack hits an enemy, if it is the first hit on that enemy this turn, apply 1 stack of Shattered.
Shattered: When inflicted with a Weakening debuff, Defense -8%. Dispelled at the end of the turn.
Schwarz.Character/Schwarz_SelectInfo:
A fearsome-looking black panther. After learning of her background, the investigation team unanimously agreed that Trisha might have something in common with her — though Schwarz herself notes that an assassin and a killer are not the same profession.

In another world, Schwarz is the cornerstone of a sniper unit, skilled at breaking open situations for her team. Of course, her individual combat ability is nothing to underestimate either.
Schwarz.Character/Schwarz_Text_Battle_Kill_0: The Lady has mercy. I don't.
Schwarz.Character/Schwarz_Text_Battle_ND_0: ...So it ends like this after all.
Schwarz.Character/Schwarz_Text_Battle_Start_0: Make sure none of them leave.
Schwarz.Character/Schwarz_Text_Field_Potion_P_0: I could bring this to the Lady after the battle.
Schwarz.Character_Skin/Schwarzskin_SkinDesc: Schwarz's attire for operations in specific environments.
Schwarz.Item_Equip/Eq_Hei_0_Description:
On a Critical Hit, inflict a debuff on the target that reduces Defense by 15% for 3 turns (<sprite=0>115%).
When attacking an enemy, each distinct Weakening debuff on the target increases damage by 3%, doubled when there are 3 or more.
Schwarz.Item_Passive/PassiveItem_Hei_0_Descripti: After inflicting 3 debuffs on enemies in a single turn, place the top skill of the discard pile on top of the deck with cost -1. Limit once every 2 turns.
Schwarz.Skill/S_Hei_0_Description:
On a Critical Hit, hit an enemy afflicted with Shattered.
If not a Critical Hit, add a Swift, cost-1 "Sharp Eye" to your hand with 1 turn of Discard and Exclude.
On a Critical Hit, 50% chance to increase damage to 180%.
Schwarz.Skill/S_Hei_1_Description:
When hitting a target afflicted with Shattered, increase all their Weakening debuffs by 1 stack.
If at least 3 Attack skills have been used this turn, this skill becomes 0-cost Swift.
Schwarz.Skill/S_Hei_2_Description: Preferentially grant Crossfire to another allied DPS-class unit.
Schwarz.Skill/S_Hei_4_Description: If the target is yourself, dispel one debuff.
Schwarz.Skill/S_Hei_6_Description: While in hand, whenever a debuff on the field is dispelled, damage increases by &a.
Schwarz.Skill/S_Hei_8_Description:
Attack/Healing/Other skills in hand increase this skill's damage by &a/&b/&c.
When played, you may choose to discard all skills of one type to double their damage bonus.
Current: &d/&e/&f   &g
Schwarz.Skill/S_Hei_9_Description:
If an enemy has already acted this turn, hit as a Critical Hit and gain Swiftness (until leaving hand).
When hitting an enemy afflicted with a Weakening debuff, apply 1 stack of "Momentary Breach" to them.
Schwarz.Skill/S_Hei_Lucy_Description:
Draw two skills.
If Schwarz is alive, take a "Make Tea" into hand with Exclude and two turns of Discard.
If Schwarz has the "Make Tea" buff, restore 1 Mana.
Schwarz.Skill/S_Hei_R1_Description:
Cannot be used; drawn at the start of battle.
While this skill is in hand, it can be used when a character kills an enemy or falls near death.
Schwarz.Skill/S_Hei_R2_Description:
Always hits.
Apply a number of "Momentary Breach" stacks equal to the total Mana spent this turn.
On a Critical Hit, damage is increased to 160%.
Schwarz.SkillExtended/Skillen_h_0_Name: When targeting an enemy afflicted with Shattered, restore 1 Mana.
Schwarz.SkillExtended/Skillen_h_1_Name: Ignore 50% Defense; apply "Momentary Breach" to all targets a number of times equal to the Mana spent (<sprite=0>110%).
Schwarz.SkillKeyword/Baobiao_Desc: Multiple Bodyguards can protect the same Client simultaneously.
Schwarz.Character_Skin/Schwarzskin_SelectInfo: Need my help? Leave this to me — no need to trouble the Lady.

Yuzu.Skill/S_Yuzu_1_Description:
Until end of turn, Innate attacks also target enemies adjacent to the primary target.
If there is only one enemy, trigger the Passive Lv2 effect one additional time.
Yuzu.Skill/S_Yuzu_2_Description:
Until end of turn, Innate attacks deal &a(90% Attack Power) additional damage.
Innate Critical Damage +26%.
Yuzu.Skill/S_Yuzu_3_Description:
Until end of turn, Innate attacks used actively gain +42% Critical Damage.
Innate attacks triggered by the passive always land as Critical Hits.
Yuzu.Skill/S_Yuzu_4_Description:
Until end of turn, Innate Critical Hit Chance +20%.
Innate attacks randomly target one additional enemy.
If there is only one enemy on the field, draw one skill.
Yuzu.Skill/S_Yuzu_5_Description: Until end of turn, Innate Critical Damage +25%.
Yuzu.Skill/S_Yuzu_6_Description:
Innate attacks deal &a(60% Attack Power) additional damage.
Trigger the Passive Lv2 effect one additional time.
When used, repeat once for each Innate skill on cooldown; if the skill on cooldown belongs to a [Millennium Science School] student, repeat one extra time. (Repeats &b times.)
Yuzu.Skill/S_Yuzu_7_Description:
Until end of turn, Innate attacks deal &a(90% Attack Power) additional damage.
All until-end-of-turn effects granted to Innate, except 'Cardboard Box', are extended into the next turn.
Yuzu.Skill/S_Yuzu_8_Description:
Until end of turn, Innate attacks deal &a(140% Attack Power) additional damage.
When drawn, draw one additional skill.
Yuzu.Skill/S_Yuzu_9_Description:
Until end of turn, Innate attacks deal &a(100% Attack Power) additional damage.
Until end of turn, when Innate deals damage, preferentially draw one of Yuzu's skills and reduce its cost by 1.
Yuzu.Skill/S_Yuzu_R1_Description: Until end of turn, Innate attacks deal &a(50% Attack Power) additional damage and change their target to all enemies.
Yuzu.Skill/S_Yuzu_R2_Description:
Until end of turn, Innate attacks deal &a(360% Attack Power) additional damage and deal &b(120% Attack Power) splash damage to adjacent enemies.
When this skill is used again, instead deal &c(100% Attack Power) additional damage and deal &d(30% Attack Power) splash damage to adjacent enemies.
Yuzu.Buff/B_Yuzu_5_Description: At the start of the next turn, gain the buff "Until end of turn, Innate Critical Damage +&a%." Removed after landing a Critical Hit.
Yuzu.Buff/B_Yuzu_P_Description:
Yuzu's Innate skill has been enhanced until end of turn.
These enhancements carry over to the next turn.
Yuzu.Character/Yuzu_PassiveDes:
Can use the Innate skill.
The Innate skill refreshes every turn and comes with Innate.
The Mana cost of the Innate skill is always 1.

Lv2: At the end of the turn, if the Innate skill was not used, it is automatically used against the enemy with the most debuff types, dealing -50% damage. Treated as a bonus attack.
Lv3: The Innate skill can be used even when unable to act.
Lv4: Critical Damage +22%, and all Terrain Adaptability ratings become SS.

Terrain Adaptability: A~C
Yuzu.Character/Yuzu_SelectInfo: Hanaoka Yuzu. President of the Game Development Club at Millennium Science School. A lover of both playing and making games — her passion for them is no ordinary thing.
Yuzu.Character_Skin/YuzuSkin_SkinDesc: Even dressed differently from usual, Yuzu is still Yuzu — though her range of activities seems to have expanded just a little. Together with everyone in the Game Development Club, she faces all manner of challenges head-on.
Yuzu.System/StatDesc/YuzuDraw: <color=#00FFFF>On damage, draw one skill and reduce its cost by 1.</color>
Yuzu.Character_Skin/YuzuSkin_SelectInfo: Hanaoka Yuzu. President of the Game Development Club at Millennium Science School. A lover of both playing and making games — her passion for them is no ordinary thing.

Muelsyse.Buff/B_Muelsyse_01_Description: At the end of the turn, restore 3 HP for each of your own skills in hand.
Muelsyse.Buff/B_Muelsyse_02_Description:
Critical Hit damage received is reduced to 1.
After receiving a Critical Hit, counter with a Basic Attack. If the user is a Flowing Shape, counter with a Flowing Shape Attack.
Consumes 1 stack after receiving a Critical Hit.
Muelsyse.Buff/B_Muelsyse_02_P_Description: Flowing Shape Heal and Flowing Shape Protection apply 1 stack of "Yielding Counter" to the target.
Muelsyse.Buff/B_Muelsyse_03_Description: After receiving an attack, Overheal 5 HP.
Muelsyse.Buff/B_Muelsyse_04_Description: When an attack deals damage, restore HP equal to 20% of the damage dealt.
Muelsyse.Buff/B_Muelsyse_04_P_Description: When the Flowing Shape deals damage through attacks, Overheal HP equal to 20% of the damage dealt, and chain-heal HP equal to 20% of the damage dealt.
Muelsyse.Buff/B_Muelsyse_05_Description: When receiving a non-colorless debuff, if not in a near-death state, take 10 Pain damage to block the debuff, then remove it.
Muelsyse.Buff/B_Muelsyse_05_P_Description: At the end of the turn, no longer naturally lose HP, and Overheal HP equal to 10% of max HP. However, each time a debuff is applied, immediately take 15 Pain damage.
Muelsyse.Buff/B_Muelsyse_05_P_Name: Dew Collection: Pure Water is Life
Muelsyse.Buff/B_Muelsyse_06_Description: Effect is enhanced while a Flowing Shape exists.
Muelsyse.Buff/B_Muelsyse_06_P_Description: The Flowing Shape's enemy-targeting skills ignore Taunt. When the Flowing Shape deals damage through attacks, apply 1 stack of "Erosion".
Muelsyse.Buff/B_Muelsyse_07_Description: At the end of the turn, if you have your own skills in hand, draw 1 additional skill of yours from the deck.
Muelsyse.Buff/B_Muelsyse_08_P_Description:
The Flowing Shape's base Attack Power is generated based on the target's Healing Power.
The Flowing Shape's base Healing Power is generated based on the target's Attack Power.
Muelsyse.Buff/B_Muelsyse_09_P_Description:
Whenever the Flowing Shape is successfully afflicted with a debuff, increase all allies' resistance to that debuff type by 15% for 3 turns.
After the Flowing Shape dissipates, the cooldown to summon a Flowing Shape again is reduced.
Muelsyse.Buff/B_Muelsyse_10_P_Description: Dew Collection: When using a Flowing Shape skill in hand, deal follow-up damage equal to 40% of the Flowing Shape's Attack Power to a random enemy. Whenever an enemy falls, generate 1 Flowing Shape Attack in hand.
Muelsyse.Buff/B_Muelsyse_P_ColdDown_Description:
Cannot summon a Flowing Shape temporarily.
Reduce 1 stack each time any skill is used from hand.
(The more Dew Collection buffs the dissipated Flowing Shape had, the higher the initial stack count of this debuff.)
Muelsyse.Buff/B_Muelsyse_P_Description:
Exists as a Flowing Shape.
Has no HP limit; dissipates when HP drops below 0.
Naturally loses HP equal to 30% of max HP at the end of each turn.
Muelsyse.Buff/B_Muelsyse_R2_Description: Effects can only be gained when no debuffs are present.
Muelsyse.Buff/B_Muelsyse_R2_P_Description:
Flowing Shape Heal can remove 1 random debuff from the target.
When the Flowing Shape dissipates, apply "Pristine Purity" to all other allies.
Muelsyse.Buff/B_Muelsyse_R3_P_Description:
When the Flowing Shape's copied target receives damage, reduce that damage to 1, but the Flowing Shape loses an additional 10 HP at the end of the current turn (stacks).
After the Flowing Shape's copied target uses a non-generated skill from hand, add a copy of that skill to hand. The copied skill is a Flowing Shape skill with Exclude and Swiftness, costs 0, is discarded after 1 turn, and has 80% reduced damage and healing.
Muelsyse.Buff/B_Muelsyse_R3_T_Description:
Damage received is reduced to 1, but causes the Flowing Shape to lose additional HP at the end of the turn.
After using a non-generated skill from hand, add a copy of that skill to hand. The copied skill is a Flowing Shape skill with Exclude and Swiftness, costs 0, is discarded after 1 turn, and has 80% reduced damage and healing.
Muelsyse.Buff/B_Muelsyse_R4_Description:
This buff is only temporarily removed when transforming into a Flowing Shape.
When actively using your own Once or Excluded skills, if all of your skills in hand, deck, and discard pile are Once or Excluded skills, heal all allies &a HP and preferentially draw 1 of your own skills (once per turn, &b). If there are no more of your own skills in hand, deck, or discard pile, gain the consumable "Muelsyse's Tear" and remove this buff.
Muelsyse.Buff/B_Muelsyse_S2_Description:
Damage received is reduced by the Flowing Shape's Defense (up to 35%).
Removed when the Flowing Shape dissipates.
Muelsyse.Buff/B_Muelsyse_S2_T_Description: The Barrier value is based on the Flowing Shape's Healing Power.
Muelsyse.Character/Muelsyse_PassiveDes:
Can use a Fixed Ability to summon a Flowing Shape to fight in place of herself:
When the Flowing Shape appears, it copies the designated ally's current stats as its base stats (Defense and Evade are copied at up to 30%).
While the Flowing Shape is in combat, Muelsyse's skills are temporarily removed from battle, but special Flowing Shape skills will appear in the deck.
While the Flowing Shape is in combat, Muelsyse's equipment is temporarily unavailable, and her original buffs and debuffs will disappear.
The Flowing Shape naturally loses HP at the end of each turn.
When the Flowing Shape's HP drops below 0, it dissipates and switches back to Muelsyse, temporarily preventing another Flowing Shape from being summoned.
The more Dew Collection buffs the dissipated Flowing Shape had, the longer the cooldown before switching to a Flowing Shape again.
Muelsyse.Character/Muelsyse_SelectInfo:
Muelsyse, Director of Rhine Lab's Ecological Section, specializes in using a water doppelgänger — the Flowing Shape — to fight in her place.

Muelsyse can use a Fixed Ability to summon a Flowing Shape to assist allies in battle, making her an extremely flexible support character.
Muelsyse.Item_Consume/Item_Muelsyse_Consume_Descr: Overheal the target for 15 HP and forcibly remove all non-colorless debuffs from the target.
Muelsyse.Item_Equip/Item_Muelsyse_Equip_Descripti:
Gain 1 Mana at the start of the turn.
All effects of this equipment only apply during the first turn of battle.

<color=#919191>"I bring life and hope."</color>
Muelsyse.Item_Passive/Item_Muelsyse_Relic_Descrip:
At the start of the turn, if no allies have any debuffs, draw 1 additional skill, and all allies gain +8% Attack Power and Healing Power for this turn. Otherwise, remove 1 random debuff from a random ally.
<color=#919191>The Elves were left so alone upon the land of Terra, cradling dust, strangers in a foreign land.</color>
Muelsyse.Skill/S_Muelsyse_01_Description: <color=#87ab6d>Dew Collection: Place 2 Flowing Shape Heals into hand; Flowing Shape's Healing Power +2.</color>
Muelsyse.Skill/S_Muelsyse_02_Description: <color=#87ab6d>Dew Collection: The Flowing Shape gains 3 stacks of "Yielding Counter." Flowing Shape Heal and Flowing Shape Protection apply 1 stack of "Yielding Counter" to the target.</color>
Muelsyse.Skill/S_Muelsyse_03_Description:
The target taunts all enemies.
<color=#87ab6d>Dew Collection: Place 1 Flowing Shape Protection into hand; Flowing Shape's max HP +10. When the Flowing Shape appears, it taunts all enemies and gains "Surging Current."</color>
Muelsyse.Skill/S_Muelsyse_04_Description: <color=#87ab6d>Dew Collection: Flowing Shape's Attack Power +2; place 1 Flowing Shape Attack into hand; the Flowing Shape's attacks Overheal itself for HP equal to 20% of the damage dealt, and chain-heal for HP equal to 20% of the damage dealt.</color>
Muelsyse.Skill/S_Muelsyse_05_Description:
Restore all allies' HP limit.
<color=#87ab6d>Dew Collection: Place 1 Flowing Shape Heal into hand; Flowing Shape's max HP +20, Healing Power +3. At the end of each turn, the Flowing Shape no longer naturally loses HP and instead Overheals a small amount of HP, but takes 15 Pain damage immediately each time a debuff is applied.</color>
Muelsyse.Skill/S_Muelsyse_06_Description: <color=#87ab6d>Dew Collection: Place 1 Flowing Shape Attack into hand. The Flowing Shape's enemy-targeting skills ignore Taunt. When the Flowing Shape deals damage through attacks, apply 1 stack of "Erosion."</color>
Muelsyse.Skill/S_Muelsyse_07_Description: <color=#87ab6d>Dew Collection: When the Flowing Shape appears, consume all remaining Mana. For each point of Mana consumed, place 1 random Flowing Shape skill into hand, and increase the Flowing Shape's max HP by +5, Attack Power by +1, and Healing Power by +1. The number of Flowing Shape skills added to the deck is doubled.</color>
Muelsyse.Skill/S_Muelsyse_08_Description:
Can only be used when there are no Attack skills in hand. Draw 3 non-Attack skills from the deck.
<color=#87ab6d>Dew Collection: When the Flowing Shape is generated, its base Attack Power is determined by the target's Healing Power, and its base Healing Power is determined by the target's Attack Power. Place 1 Flowing Shape Heal into hand.</color>
Muelsyse.Skill/S_Muelsyse_09_Description:
Reduce the duration of all allies' debuffs by 2 turns.
Reset the cooldown of Summon Flowing Shape.
<color=#87ab6d>Dew Collection: Place 1 Flowing Shape Heal into hand. Whenever the Flowing Shape is successfully afflicted with a debuff, increase all allies' resistance to that debuff type by 15% for 3 turns.
After this Flowing Shape dissipates, the cooldown to summon a Flowing Shape again is reduced.</color>
Muelsyse.Skill/S_Muelsyse_10_Description:
All other of your own skills in hand gain the following effect: after being used, place a copy of that skill into hand. The copied skill gains Exclude, is discarded after 1 turn, and gains Swiftness.
<color=#87ab6d>Dew Collection: When using a Flowing Shape skill in hand, deal follow-up damage equal to 40% of the Flowing Shape's Attack Power to a random enemy. Whenever an enemy falls, generate 1 Flowing Shape Attack in hand.</color>
Muelsyse.Skill/S_Muelsyse_11_Description:
Immediately activated when drawn.
Draw 1 skill and apply <color=#87ab6d>"Moisturized"</color> to 3 random skills in hand.
<color=#87ab6d>Moisturized</color>: Damage and healing +3. When used, Overheal the skill's owner for 1 HP and apply <color=#87ab6d>"Moisturized"</color> to adjacent skills. At the end of the turn, apply <color=#87ab6d>"Moisturized"</color> to other skills in hand. <color=#87ab6d>"Moisturized"</color> has additional effects on Flowing Shape skills.
Muelsyse.Skill/S_Muelsyse_Consume_Description: Overheal the target for 15 HP and forcibly remove all non-colorless debuffs from the target.
Muelsyse.Skill/S_Muelsyse_Lucy_Description:
If Muelsyse is in her original form, view all skills with a <color=#87ab6d>Dew Collection</color> entry in the deck and discard pile, and select 2 to draw (if no qualifying skills exist, draw skills to fill up to 2).
If Muelsyse is in Flowing Shape form, preferentially draw 3 Flowing Shape skills, then restore the Flowing Shape's HP to its maximum (this healing effect triggers only once per battle).
If Muelsyse is incapacitated, draw 2 skills, then Exclude this skill.
Muelsyse.Skill/S_Muelsyse_P_Description:
Muelsyse switches to fighting as a Flowing Shape. The Flowing Shape's base stats match the target's current stats.
Add 1 random Flowing Shape skill to hand.
Muelsyse.Skill/S_Muelsyse_R1_Description: Generate up to 5 distinct exclusive skills of your own in empty hand slots, with Exclude.
Muelsyse.Skill/S_Muelsyse_R2_Description:
Forcibly remove all non-colorless debuffs from all allies.
If the user has no debuffs, this skill costs 1 less Mana.
<color=#87ab6d>Dew Collection: Place 2 Flowing Shape Heals into hand. The Flowing Shape's Flowing Shape Heals also remove 1 random debuff. When the Flowing Shape dissipates, apply "Pristine Purity" to all other allies.</color>
Muelsyse.Skill/S_Muelsyse_R3_Description:
Cannot be used.
<color=#87ab6d>Dew Collection: When the Flowing Shape's copied target receives damage, reduce that damage to 1, and the Flowing Shape loses an additional 10 HP at the end of the current turn (stacks).
After the Flowing Shape's copied target uses a non-generated skill from hand, add a copy of that skill to hand. The copied skill is a Flowing Shape skill with Exclude and Swiftness, costs 0, is discarded after 1 turn, and has 80% reduced damage and healing.
After the Flowing Shape dissipates, "Exclusive Doppelgänger" is not returned to hand but is instead directly Excluded.</color>
Muelsyse.Skill/S_Muelsyse_R4_Description:
Draw this skill at the start of battle and immediately use it.
Add Once to all of your own non-Once/non-Excluded skills.
Muelsyse.Skill/S_Muelsyse_S0_Description: When used from hand, lose 10% of Max. Health.
Muelsyse.Skill/S_Muelsyse_S1_Description: When used from hand, lose 10% of Max. Health.
Muelsyse.Skill/S_Muelsyse_S2_Description: When used from hand, lose 10% of Max. Health.
Muelsyse.SkillExtended/Extended_Muelsyse_10_Des: After use, add a copy to your hand. The copied skill gains Exclude, is discarded after 1 turn, and gains Swiftness.
Muelsyse.SkillExtended/Extended_Muelsyse_11_2_Des: Apply Healing Gauge Protection to the target for 2 turns.
Muelsyse.SkillExtended/Extended_Muelsyse_11_Des: Damage and Healing +3. On use, Overheal the skill's owner by 1 HP, and apply "Moisturized" to adjacent skills.
Muelsyse.SkillExtended/Extended_Muelsyse_Lucy_Des: The Flowing Shape can no longer be healed.
Muelsyse.SkillExtended/Extended_Muelsyse_R3_0_Des: Damage and Healing multiplier reduced by 80%.
Muelsyse.SkillExtended/Extended_Muelsyse_R3_Des: After use, add a copy of this skill to your hand. The copy is a Flowing Shape skill with Exclude and Swiftness, costs 0 Mana, but has its damage and healing multiplier reduced by 80%.
Muelsyse.SkillExtended/SkillEn_Muelsyse_01_Name: On use, if self has no debuffs, damage multiplier is increased by 30%. Otherwise, remove 1 random debuff from self.
Muelsyse.SkillExtended/SkillEn_Muelsyse_02_Name: On use, if Muelsyse is in Flowing Shape form, Overheal the Flowing Shape's Max. Health by 50%, and preferentially draw 1 Flowing Shape skill from the deck.
Muelsyse.SkillKeyword/Keyword_Dew_Desc: This effect triggers when this skill is removed from hand due to Summon Flowing Shape.

Yeqi_.Buff/B_awaken_yq_Description: Once stacks are maxed, "Lost Christmas" can be used.
Yeqi_.Buff/B_crystall_Description:
At the start of each turn, take &a (5% of Inori's max HP × stacks) Pain damage.
At the end of the turn, if Crystallization stacks ≥ 5, inflict Full Crystallization on self.
Yeqi_.Buff/B_lose_CH_Description: Defense is converted to a negative value.
Yeqi_.Buff/B_reflex_Description: When taking damage, deal &a (equal to Barrier value) damage back to the source.
Yeqi_.Buff/B_robot_Description:
Funeral deals additional &b (20% of Inori's Attack Power) damage to the target after each attack.
Only one Funeral can exist at a time.
Yeqi_.Buff/B_shield_Description: Gain +1 Barrier at the start of each turn.
Yeqi_.Buff/B_sword_owner_Description: The bearer of the Singer's Dark Blade.
Yeqi_.Buff/B_waterfall_yq_Description: Gain 1 Mana at the start of each turn.
Yeqi_.Skill/S_echo_Description: Activate 2 times. Activate 1 additional time targeting the bearer of the "Singer's Dark Blade".
Yeqi_.Skill/S_lock_Description:
Apply 1 additional stack of "Void Resonance" to the "Singer's Dark Blade" bearer.
If self does not have "Hardened Crystal Armor", apply 1 stack of "Hardened Crystal Armor".
Generate a Barrier of &a (50% of Inori's lost HP) points.
Yeqi_.Skill/S_lose_CH_Description: Cost is reduced by 10 when "True Name Awakening" stacks are maxed.
Yeqi_.Skill/S_myself_yq_Description: Generate a Barrier of &a (60% of max HP) points.
Yeqi_.Skill/S_reflex_Description:
Deal additional &a (equal to number of enemies) hits of &b (10% of own Attack Power) damage.
Apply 1 additional stack of "Refraction Crystal Armor" to the bearer of the "Singer's Dark Blade".
If self has the "True Name Awakening" effect, generate a Barrier of &c (30% of max HP) points.
Yeqi_.Skill/S_robot_Description: Inori summons Funeral to assist a target ally in battle.
Yeqi_.Skill/S_shot_yq_Description:
Generate a Barrier of &a (20% of Inori's Attack Power) points.
Apply 1 stack of "Cover" to all allies.
Yeqi_.Skill/S_song_yq_Description:
Remove all debuffs from all allies.
Restore &a (20% of the user's max HP) HP to all allies.
Yeqi_.Skill/S_virus_Description:
Generate a Barrier of &a (20% of max HP) points.
Apply 1 additional stack of "Regenerating Crystal Armor" to the bearer of the "Singer's Dark Blade".
Yeqi_.Skill/S_waterfall_yq_Description:
Remove all skill overloads.
Generate a Barrier based on remaining Mana. (Each 1 Mana generates 3 Barrier).
Apply 1 additional stack of "Surge Crystal Armor" to the bearer of the "Singer's Dark Blade".
Yeqi_.Skill/S_weapon_Description:
Apply 2 additional stacks of "Void Resonance" to the bearer of the "Singer's Dark Blade".
Cause the bearer of the "Singer's Dark Blade" to deal 3 "Sword Qi" attacks against the target.
Yeqi_.Skill/S_xuwu_Description:
Apply 1 stack of "Void Resonance" to self and the bearer of the "Singer's Dark Blade".
Generate a Barrier of &a (40% of Inori's remaining HP) points.
Yeqi_.SkillExtended/SK_yq_Name: If bearing the "Singer's Dark Blade", apply 2 stacks of "Hardened Crystal Armor" to self.
Yeqi_.Character/yeqi_PassiveDesc:
Place the "Singer's Dark Blade" into the backpack upon entering the first area.
The "Singer's Dark Blade" grows stronger as Inori levels up (takes effect when equipped).
Yeqi_.Character/yeqi_SelectInfo:
A girl who wields the power of the Void, capable of manifesting a mysterious and unique crystal at will. Her singing has the power to purify the hearts of others. Beneath her calm exterior lies a terrifying force.

Inori's Void takes the form of an immense greatsword, capable of drawing out power beyond the wielder's limits. At the same time, Inori excels at manifesting crystals of various forms to protect her allies and obstruct her enemies.
Yeqi_.Character/yeqi_CampSelectWord: Can I stay by your side? I want to know more about you... and everyone else, so...
Yeqi_.Character/yeqi_Text_Battle_Kill_0: Those who hurt others must be prepared to be hurt themselves.
Yeqi_.Character/yeqi_Text_Battle_Cri_0: Even if I'm a monster, even if these feelings are a lie — I will still protect you.
Yeqi_.Character/yeqi_Text_Battle_Start_0: As much as I can, I don't want to kill anyone. So please... don't come any closer.
Yeqi_.Character/yeqi_Text_Battle_Healed_0: Please stay by my side. Because I will always be here for you.
Yeqi_.Character/yeqi_Text_Battle_ND_1: Believe in yourself. I know you can. Because I already belong to you.
Yeqi_.Character/yeqi_Text_Field_Idle_0: This is... my new song. If you don't mind, give it a listen.
Yeqi_.Character/yeqi_Text_Battle_Idle_0: Try to unravel it — maybe it's possible. But if you never try, you'll never know.
Yeqi_.Character/yeqi_Text_PharosLeader_2: I'm sorry... I don't know why...
Yeqi_.Item_Equip/yeqi_Sword_Description:
This equipment's stats increase as Inori levels up.
When using a skill, deal additional "Sword Qi" damage equal to 40% of Attack Power to the target (triggers once per turn).
Damage taken is reduced, with the reduction increasing as Inori levels up.

NamieFamily.Buff/B_NF_GG_0_Description:
When dealing damage, additionally deal &extraAtkTimes follow-up attack(s) of &damage (&perDamage% Attack Power) damage. When the cumulative follow-up count reaches &burstTimes, that follow-up is instead replaced with &burstDamage (&perBurstDamage% Attack Power) damage, then this buff loses 1 stack.

Current cumulative follow-up count: &atkCount
NamieFamily.Buff/B_NF_GG_1_Description:

NamieFamily.Buff/B_NF_MM_1_Description:
When damage is dealt &needAtkTimes times, restore &addApNum Mana and look at the top &viewCardNum skills in your deck, then add 1 to your hand. This buff loses 1 stack.

NamieFamily.Buff/B_NF_MM_2_Description: After using a Fixed Ability, if "On-Stage Ready" fails to refresh the Fixed Ability, consume 1 stack of this buff to immediately refresh the Fixed Ability.
NamieFamily.Buff/B_NF_MM_3_Description:
When taking non-Pain damage, the linked enemy takes Pain damage equal to &dmgPer% of the damage taken. If either party is defeated, this debuff is removed.

NamieFamily.Buff/B_NF_PP_0_Description: Gain 1 stack when taking damage. At max stacks, deal damage equal to 100% Attack Power to all enemies and remove this debuff.
NamieFamily.Buff/B_NF_PP_2_Description: The next non-Fixed skill played from hand has a &rate% chance to be used again. If it triggers, the repeat chance is halved. If it does not trigger, this buff is removed.
NamieFamily.Buff/B_NF_PP_P_1_Description: The next skill played from hand costs &apDownNum less Mana. Removed after use.
NamieFamily.Buff/B_NamieFamily_P_Description:

NamieFamily.Character/NamieFamily_CampSelectWord: The Namie crew, reporting for duty!
NamieFamily.Character/NamieFamily_PassiveDes:
<b>Fixed Ability is fixed to SWITCH! When using skills from hand, accumulate stacks of On-Stage Ready, up to 3. After gaining stacks, if already at max and the Fixed Ability is unavailable, refresh the Fixed Ability and clear all stacks.

<color=#919191>- This passive takes effect from Level 1.</color>

All of Namie's kids are top-notch!!!
Mizuki is very caring!
Goldenglow is very diligent!
Pepe is a total airhead!!!

Narukami_Yu.Character/P_Narukami_PassiveDes:
Yu Narukami switches Personas after using a skill, gaining the corresponding bonus.

Izanagi: Physical skill damage is increased by 10 and always Critical Hits.
Alice: Curse skill instant-death chance is increased by 10%.
Lucifer: Add a copy of Luck Reading to your hand.
Tamlin: Reduce the cost of Electric skills by 2.

Yu Narukami uses the power of bonds to obtain stronger skills after using basic skills.
Narukami_Yu.Character/P_Narukami_SelectInfo: Yu arrived from the east through the TV — a mysterious young man. After becoming an Investigator, he quickly formed bonds with the Ark's residents and has a deep understanding of the "Fog." Yu has striking good looks and is a charming gang leader, while harboring the deep power of bonds.
Narukami_Yu.Skill/S_Narukami_10_2_Description:
Elizabeth unleashes Megidolaon dealing 9999 damage.
If this skill's cost is less than 5, damage is reduced to 50.
Narukami_Yu.Skill/S_Narukami_10_Description:
If there is at least 1 Shadow in your TV, draw a Megidolaon.
Otherwise, add 2 copies of Midnight Channel to your hand.
Narukami_Yu.Skill/S_Narukami_1_2_Description: Deal moderate Electric damage to 1 enemy. Medium chance to inflict Electrified.
Narukami_Yu.Skill/S_Narukami_1_3_Description: Deal heavy Electric damage to all enemies. High chance to inflict Electrified.
Narukami_Yu.Skill/S_Narukami_1_4_Description: Deal massive Electric damage to 1 enemy. Inflict Electrified.

Narukami_Yu.Skill/S_Narukami_2_4_Description:
Deal 8 hits of minor Physical damage to 1 enemy.
Reduce this skill's cost by 1 at the end of each turn. If this skill's cost is less than 3, it deals only 1 hit.

Narukami_Yu.Skill/S_Narukami_3_2_Description: Medium chance to instantly kill 1 enemy with Curse.
Narukami_Yu.Skill/S_Narukami_3_3_Description:
High chance to instantly kill all enemies with Curse.
This skill does not inflict instant death if its cost is 5 or if targeting a boss.

Low chance to instantly kill 1 enemy with Curse.
(Instant death is not treated as a debuff and has no effect on bosses.)

saber.Buff/Assassin_P_0_Description: When dealing damage, &a% chance to instantly kill the target.
saber.Buff/Assassin_P_B_Description:
Instant-kill chance +&a%

<color=#808080>Hark! The Evening Bell hath revealed thy name!</color>
saber.Buff/Assassin_daogao2_Description: Draw 1 additional skill and gain 1 Mana each turn.
saber.Buff/Assassin_daogao_Description:
Draw 1 additional skill and gain 1 Mana each turn.
Removed when taking damage.
saber.Buff/Assassin_kuwei_B_Description: When taking damage, this debuff increases that instance of damage by 20%.
saber.Buff/Assassin_siwang_Description: When the effect expires, the target dies. Deals damage equal to 10% of max HP against Bosses. Ineffective against certain special enemies.
saber.Buff/Assassin_sizhiyuan_B_Description: Negates death once and restores HP to &a.
saber.Buff/Assassin_zheduan_Description: The next instance of damage dealt is guaranteed to Critical Hit.
saber.Buff/Berserker_P_0_Description: Negates death once and removes one random debuff from self.
saber.Buff/Berserker_Protection_B_Description:
&a takes attacks in place of the protected ally.
Also grants &a Defense and Healing Gauge Protection.

<color=#808080>Reassurance — that was the only feeling. That broad back before my eyes, like a fortress wall... no, even thicker than any wall. Truly, this was the most reassuring "bulwark" here.</color>
saber.Buff/Berserker_bilei_B_Description:
Cannot act during this effect's duration.
When taking damage from an enemy, the attacker takes 50% of that damage in return.

<color=#808080>Gray muscles like iron, a towering frame more imposing than a lion — standing still, it would be only natural to mistake him for a wall or a pillar.
Yet when he runs, he is swift as the wind, and the way he swings his stone axe shows no sign of lost reason. A nimble steel fortress that rises again and again no matter how desperately it is struck down — truly, Berserker is the strongest.
You are the only shield the girl can rely on, a thick cocoon wrapped around her loneliness and fragility. Your back is sturdier than the walls of Einzbern Castle.
The reason he became a shelter against the storm, ultimately transcending even myth, was not the Command Seals. I believe it was, without a doubt, the gentleness of the one called Berserker.</color>
saber.Buff/Berserker_duangu_B1_Description:
Takes 5 <sprite=1>Pain damage each action.

<color=#808080>To be struck head-on by such overwhelming force — being shattered to pieces is only natural.</color>
saber.Buff/Berserker_duangu_B2_Description:
Takes an additional 2 <sprite=1>Pain damage when attacked.

<color=#808080>You tried to run, and now your sinews and bones are shattered — what will you do now?</color>
saber.Buff/Berserker_duanxie_B_Description: Removed after using an attack skill.
saber.Buff/Berserker_fangxie_Description:
When this effect ends, takes damage equal to 20% of current HP (max 20).

saber.Buff/Berserker_kuanghua_Description: Damage dealt is increased by 33%. Removed when HP exceeds 50%. Overheals HP equal to 20% of damage dealt. When attacking enemies with attack skills, 50% chance to target the wrong enemy. Such a terrifying war god — who in all the world could stand against it?

Removed at the start of the opponent's turn.
saber.Buff/Leryn_baoju_B_1_Description: At the start of the turn, if fewer than 4 skills are in hand, draw up to 4.
saber.Buff/Leryn_baoju_B_Description: Whenever HP is reduced by taking damage, remove 1 stack and gain 8 Healing Aura.
saber.Buff/Mement_baoju_B_Description: 50% chance to not fall into a near-death state.
saber.Buff/Prime_baoju_B_0_Description:
Forces enemies to attack self.
Healing Gauge cannot be reduced.
saber.Buff/Ruler_P_0_Description: <color=#808080>In the name of my Lord, I bestow upon thee divine grace.</color>
saber.Buff/Ruler_P_1_Description: <color=#808080>In the name of my Lord, I bring down holy judgment upon thee!</color>
saber.Buff/Ruler_caijue_0_Description: The next instance of damage dealt is reduced by 50%.
saber.Buff/Ruler_canran_B1_Description: <color=#808080>I offer my whole self, entirely, to my Lord!</color>
saber.Buff/Ruler_honglian_B1_Description:
Convert 50% of Healing Power into Attack Power.
Gain 1 「<color=#B22222>Crimson Holy Sword</color>」 each turn.
Convert all of your drawn skills into 「<color=#B22222>Crimson Holy Sword</color>」.
saber.Buff/Ruler_honglian_B_Description:
<color=#DC143C>The heavens declare the glory of the Lord; the skies proclaim the work of His hands.
Day after day they pour forth speech; night after night they reveal knowledge.
They have no speech, they use no words; no sound is heard from them.
Their voice goes out into all the earth, their words to the ends of the world.
In the heavens He has pitched a tent for the sun; it rises at one end of the heavens and makes its circuit to the other.
Here is my end;
Here is my fate;
Here is my life!
My days are like an evening shadow; I drift away like a locust.
My bow I cannot rely on; my sword cannot save me.
With only this one thing that remains, I pray it may protect his steps.
O Lord! Into Your hands I commit this life————
L'espoir vient apres de sespoir！
（Hope shall come after despair）</color>
saber.Buff/Ruler_jiushu_0_Description: When taking damage, Overheal &a HP. The path to salvation lies within.
saber.Buff/Ruler_lingdao_B_Description: <color=#808080>To save the nation and its people — this is an obligation I cannot refuse!</color>
saber.Buff/Ruler_shengjian_B_Description: Upon death, randomly spreads to another ally.
saber.Buff/Ruler_shengyan_B_Description: When dealing damage, additionally inflict 10% Pain <sprite=1> damage.
saber.Buff/SaberBuff_Description: At the start of each turn, Artoria restores 4 HP.
saber.Buff/Saber_challenge_Description:
Prioritize attacking &target.
Removed when the target is attacked.

<color=#808080>Challenged by the King herself — now let's see if you have the nerve to accept...</color>
saber.Buff/Saber_challenge_plus_Description:
Cannot attack targets other than &target, and takes damage each turn.
Removed when the target is attacked.
Cannot reduce Healing Gauge.

<color=#808080>A duel with the King? The very thought sends a shiver through the heart!</color>
saber.Buff/Saber_fengshi_Description: <color=#808080>Being eroded by the force of the wind pressure!</color>
saber.Buff/Saber_jianta_Description: <color=#808080>This unit is being trampled by the King's horse!</color>
saber.Buff/Saber_jiejie_A1_Description:
<color=white></color>Apply 「<color=#A0AC8F>Wind Erosion</color>」 when dealing damage.
Ignore</color> 「Taunt</color>」.

<color=#808080>This Noble Phantasm is protected by powerful sorcery — it is not that the sword itself is transparent.
The wind wrapping around the blade alters the refraction of light, making the sword's shape invisible.
Even without reaching a vacuum state, the wind enveloping the blade is lethal, greatly amplifying the destructive power of each slash.</color>
saber.Buff/Saber_jiejie_A_Description:
<color=white>Apply 1 stack of</color> 「<color=#A0AC8F>Wind Erosion</color>」 when dealing damage.
Ignore</color> 「Taunt</color>」.

<color=#808080>This Noble Phantasm is protected by powerful sorcery — it is not that the sword itself is transparent.
The wind wrapping around the blade alters the refraction of light, making the sword's shape invisible.
Even without reaching a vacuum state, the wind enveloping the blade is lethal, greatly amplifying the destructive power of each slash.</color>
saber.Buff/Saber_jiejie_B1_Description:
Apply 1 stack of 「<color=#A0AC8F>Wind Erosion</color>」 to the attacker when attacked.
Gain 6 Barrier each turn.

<color=#808080>An alternate application of Invisible Air — unlike its former sharp, offensive form, this form is better suited for protection. Perhaps it is a manifestation of Artoria's own will to shield others.</color>
saber.Buff/Saber_jiejie_B_Description:
Apply 1 stack of 「<color=#A0AC8F>Wind Erosion</color>」 to the attacker when attacked.
Gain 6 Barrier each turn.

<color=#808080>An alternate application of Invisible Air — unlike its former sharp, offensive form, this form is better suited for protection. Perhaps it is a manifestation of our King's will to shield others.</color>
saber.Buff/Saber_jisui_Description:
All Armor has been shattered!

<color=#808080>This is — the sword that breaks steel!</color>
saber.Buff/Saber_lingdao_B_Description: <color=#808080>Where our King's sword points, there our hearts follow!</color>
saber.Buff/Saber_luxin_Description: Restore 4 HP and gain 1 Mana at the start of each turn. Additionally, gain 1 Mana whenever a skill is used.
saber.Buff/Saber_wudi_Description: Immune to damage for one turn.
saber.Buff/Saber_xingguang_A_Description: <color=#808080>She is the darling of the stars.</color>
saber.Buff/Saber_xingguang_B_Description: <color=#808080>Staring into brilliant starlight always comes at a price.</color>
saber.Buff/Saber_xuli_Description:
Cannot act.
<color=#808080>
This radiance is the hope of the stars — proof of life that illuminates the land! Bear witness, sword of promised victory——!</color>
saber.Buff/Saber_xunli_Description:
Cannot coexist with 「<color=#FF4500><color=red></color>Hero Creation</color></color>」.
Gain 1 「<color=#00BFFF>Mana</color>」 each turn.

<color=#808080>Solitude, too, is the price of becoming King.
Thinking back to that bright and beautiful afternoon —
would that pure and lovely girl regret pulling out that sword?
Perhaps she never did...</color>
saber.Buff/Saber_yingxiong_B_Description:
Cannot coexist with 「 <color=#F0BCAF>Lonely Pilgrimage</color>」.

<color=#808080>One does not become King by drawing the sword — rather, it is because one is already King that the sword yields to their hand...</color>
saber.Buff/Saber_zhaojia_B_Description:
Deal &a (20% of own Max. Health) damage to the attacker when attacked.
Destroyed upon being attacked.

<color=#808080>Such a feeble attack!</color>
saber.Buff/Saber_zhengbei_Description:
Cannot act.
Removed when one of your own skills is discarded.
saber.Buff/ShadowPriest_baoju_B_Description: When dealing damage: apply 1 stack of 「Soul Erosion」 to the target and restore 20% of the damage dealt as HP.
saber.Buff/ShadowPriest_baoju_B_Name: Feats of the God of Hades
saber.Buff/SilverStein_baoju_B_Description:
When a non-Swiftness skill is played:
Critical Hit Chance +20%
Critical Damage +15%
Attack Power +1

Removed when attacked.
saber.Character/Assassin_CampSelectWord: Fear not, O Contractor. The Old Man of the Mountain answers your summons. I have no name. You may call me by whatever name is easiest for you.
saber.Character/Assassin_PassiveDes:
The Hassan among Hassans, the Assassin among Assassins — slayer of gods, death itself.
· Uncrowned Arms Mastership: First Hassan's Critical Damage is increased by 33% and Armor Penetration by 10%. Once per turn, when an enemy unit dies, enter 「<color=#483D8B>Breath of the Hidden</color>」.
· Abyss of Death: Each time damage is dealt, there is a 2% chance to Instant Kill the target. Against Bosses or certain special enemies, deal 200% damage instead.
When this effect triggers, toll the 「<color=#808080>Evening Bell</color>」.

<color=#808080>- This passive takes effect from Level 1.</color>
saber.Character/Assassin_SelectInfo:
A mysterious figure who appeared to aid Lucy in her moment of crisis. Towering in stature, wearing a skull mask, with an aged voice and wielding a great sword. He calls himself "Assassin · Old Man of the Mountain." His true name is unknown, yet both Jeanne and Artoria show him a certain degree of respect — even Heracles reacts to his presence.

The Old Man of the Mountain is a powerful and silent assassin (?) who pronounces death upon any enemy that stands in his way with his great sword. He possesses formidable single-target damage and a unique instant-kill mechanic.
saber.Character/Assassin_Text_Battle_AllyND_0: Meaningless. This is all so utterly meaningless...!
saber.Character/Assassin_Text_Battle_Cri_0: There is no place in this world for those without faith.
saber.Character/Assassin_Text_Battle_Idle_0: To sow death and wither the green fields.
saber.Character/Assassin_Text_Battle_Kill_0: Can you hear that bell tolling...
saber.Character/Assassin_Text_Battle_ND_0: I am but bones... returning only to the earth...
saber.Character/Assassin_Text_Battle_Start_1: Let your corpses pile up here one by one.
saber.Character/Assassin_Text_Field_GetItem_0: Like building a tower of corpses.
saber.Character/Assassin_Text_Field_GetItem_1: I hear the bell... today's heads seem particularly heavy...
saber.Character/Assassin_Text_Field_Idle_0: I am nothing but a wraith lurking in the darkness. I have no desires of my own. I simply follow your will.
saber.Character/Assassin_Text_Field_Idle_1: The bond of master and servant is an exchange of purpose. You save lives; I return them. All things are light and shadow, O Contractor.
saber.Character/Assassin_Text_Field_Idle_2: ...Perhaps it is owing to the long ages I have walked. Even in the light, my heart remains undisturbed.
saber.Character/Assassin_Text_Field_Idle_3: You are an unbeliever... yet you seem to be someone worthy of trust. Your spirit in particular is beautiful. A will that cannot be shaken by anything — that is precisely what we need...
saber.Character/Assassin_Text_Field_Idle_4: A fine journey. Fine memories. Fine... truly a fine end for me. I hope that when this battle is over, I may truly vanish at last, O my Contractor.
saber.Character/Assassin_Text_MasterTarget: My Lord. In this place, my life has at last found its light of salvation.
saber.Character/Assassin_Text_PharosLeader_2: Give them a push from behind.
saber.Character/Assassin_Text_Witch_1: You have already made your choice.
saber.Character/Berserker_PassiveDes: The valiant and fearless Heracles completed 12 tasks deemed "impossible," an achievement known as the Twelve Labors. These trials granted him tremendous power, but also a curse. ·Pelt of the Nemean Lion: Heracles' body has been tempered beyond limit. Damage from enemies below a certain threshold is reduced to 1. The threshold is 2x his current level (max 9). ·Tusk of the Erymanthian Boar: Heracles' mind has been eroded. When current HP falls below 50%, he enters Mad Enhancement. ·Heart of the Lernaean Hydra: Heracles' life force continuously regenerates. Throughout the entire run, Heracles will refuse death eleven times, and each time randomly removes one debuff. ·Girdle of Hippolyta: Heracles is peerless in valor. Damage dealt is increased by 5% of the target's maximum HP (max 50). - This passive is active from level 1.
saber.Character/Lancer_CampSelectWord: Yo. Servant Lancer, answering the summons. Relax, Master!
saber.Character/Lancer_PassiveDes:
Cú Chulainn, the peerless great hero of Celtic and Ulster legend, is both the "Child of Light" who carries the blood of the sun god Lugh and an unrivaled war god who carved a path through countless armies.

·Having trained in spearmanship from a young age, Cú Chulainn wields unparalleled lance techniques. At the start of each turn, generate
"Spearmanship · Follow-Through · Shooting Star"
·Blessed by the sun god, Cú Chulainn is called the Child of Light. For each point of HP lost, Defense is
increased by 1% (max 33%).
