·Cú Chulainn commands the demonic lance, whose edge pierces ordinary defenses. Armor Penetration is increased by 25%.
saber.Character/Lancer_SelectInfo:
A dashing young man who suddenly leapt into battle against Artoria, though he calmed down after Heracles grabbed him and spun him around a few times. By his own account, it was simply that a rare chance for a truly satisfying fight made it impossible for him to hold back against a former rival. He may sound like a battle maniac, but in everyday company he's actually more like a rough-and-tumble older brother.

Cú Chulainn is a fierce and fearless warrior who specializes in flashy spear techniques to control his enemies. Chaining consecutive lance skills together will yield bonus effects.
saber.Character/Lancer_Text_Battle_Idle_0: Ah... bored to death. Isn't it about time we got to fighting, Master?!
saber.Character/Lancer_Text_Battle_Kill_1: Hah? That was supposed to be full power?
saber.Character/Lancer_Text_Battle_Start_1: Warm-up? Don't need one! I'm already fired up!
saber.Character/Lancer_Text_Field_GetItem_0: My spear is finally approaching divine territory... just kidding, it's not that simple.
saber.Character/Lancer_Text_Field_Idle_0: Hah? I do follow my Master's orders, you know. That's the Ulster way.
saber.Character/Lancer_Text_Field_Idle_1: Thrilling battles and worthy prey. Add a good Master on top of that, and this hound is perfectly content.
saber.Character/Lancer_Text_Field_Idle_2: As long as I get to fight freely, I've got no complaints. Well, patience, then.
saber.Character/Lancer_Text_Field_Potion_P_0: Reminds me of my training in the Land of Shadows.
saber.Character/Lancer_Text_MasterTarget: Fate's something you just can't escape.
saber.Character/Lancer_Text_PharosLeader_0: Want a taste of the cursed crimson lance?
saber.Character/Lancer_Text_PharosLeader_2: As they say, a red thorn is like a rose.
saber.Character/Ruler_CampSelectWord: Servant Ruler. Jeanne d'Arc. I'm so glad to meet you.
saber.Character/Ruler_PassiveDes: Jeanne d'Arc acts as an agent of divine authority, passing judgment upon the world and showering it in the Lord's radiance. Slightly reduces several attributes of all enemies and slightly increases several attributes of all allies.
saber.Character/Ruler_SelectInfo:
A resolute young woman who claims to be a "Heroic Spirit," brought back by Artoria from the Misty Garden. As for why she was in the Misty Garden, Jeanne and Artoria only smiled... Though she is said to be a "Saint," one would imagine she and Pressel would have plenty to talk about.

Jeanne d'Arc is a steadfast cleric whose exceptional command abilities allow her to greatly enhance her allies' capabilities, while also healing them with various powers. When necessary, she will not hesitate to sacrifice herself in order to claim the strength needed for victory.
saber.Character/Ruler_Text_Battle_AllyND_0: No matter how thorny the path, we can only press forward.
saber.Character/Ruler_Text_Battle_AllyND_1: As long as this banner stands, we will not fall!
saber.Character/Ruler_Text_Battle_Idle_1: Leave it to me — stand behind me!
saber.Character/Ruler_Text_Battle_Kill_0: May the Lord's will be done!
saber.Character/Ruler_Text_Battle_Start_0: Here we go! Lord, grant me strength.
saber.Character/Ruler_Text_Battle_Start_1: If we must fight to move forward, then let us defeat our enemies!
saber.Character/Ruler_Text_Field_GetItem_0: It seems I've grown a little stronger.
saber.Character/Ruler_Text_Field_GetItem_1: Keep growing. You might call it a leap forward.
saber.Character/Ruler_Text_Field_Idle_0: I will be by your side, always. Whether in hardship or sorrow, as long as we are together, I know we can overcome it! Come now, let us do our best, Master!
saber.Character/Ruler_Text_Field_Idle_1: Yes, I am indeed your Servant. My duty is to protect and guide you as best I can.
saber.Character/Ruler_Text_Field_Idle_2: As Servant and Master, let us continue to work hard together from here on!
saber.Character/Ruler_Text_Field_Idle_3: Master, if you don't get moving, you'll never become a truly worthy Master, you know?
saber.Character/Ruler_Text_Field_Idle_4: I may not know the knightly code, but I know well what it means to be a standard-bearer. Make sure to keep up with me, Master.
saber.Character/Ruler_Text_PharosLeader_0: I'm terribly sorry, but I will defeat you!
saber.Character/Saber_CampSelectWord: I have come in answer to your summons. Tell me — are you my Master?
saber.Character/Saber_PassiveDes:
Artoria carries the blood of dragons. This immense power grants her an extraordinary abundance of magical energy, which she draws upon with every breath. At the start of each turn, Artoria restores 4 HP and gains 1 <color=#00BFFF>Mana</color>.


<color=#919191>- This passive is active from level 1.</color>
saber.Character/Saber_SelectInfo:
A knight who appears to be a frail young girl, yet claims to be a "Heroic Spirit." She is said to have appeared suddenly in Lucy's room, addressing Lucy as "Master." Ordinarily, a Heroic Spirit should not exist aboard the Ark — a curious matter indeed...

Artoria is a powerful knight who can deal massive damage to enemies through sword techniques and magical energy, while also drawing enemy aggro to protect her allies.
saber.Character/Saber_Text_Battle_AllyND_0: Tend to the wounded. The battle continues.
saber.Character/Saber_Text_Battle_Cri_1: The time has come to settle this...
saber.Character/Saber_Text_Battle_Idle_0: Stay calm. Do not let your guard down.
saber.Character/Saber_Text_Battle_ND_0: To fall... in a place like this...
saber.Character/Saber_Text_Battle_Start_1: Come at me with everything you have.
saber.Character/Saber_Text_Character_0: Even if I were to return to the form I held as king, our oath would remain unchanged. My holy sword is yours to command.
saber.Character/Saber_Text_Character_1: Your guidance brings me comfort. There is a warmth to it that I cannot quite explain. If my sword still holds even a little strength, I will dedicate it wholly to your service, Master.
saber.Character/Saber_Text_Field_Idle_0: Mm. I sense something ahead... Let us investigate.
saber.Character/Saber_Text_Field_Idle_1: This battle is fought to save humanity. The weight of our responsibility is immense, Master.
saber.Character/Saber_Text_Field_Idle_2: I once pursued the Holy Grail with a certain purpose, but that is in the past now. If it serves evil, it must be corrected.
saber.Character/Saber_Text_Field_Idle_3: A Servant must follow their Master — but it would be ideal if we could trust one another.
saber.Character/Saber_Text_Field_Idle_4: And yet... yes. I once harbored a small fantasy. What kind of life might I have lived, had I never drawn the sword of kingship?
saber.Character/Saber_Text_Field_Potion_P_0: How do you find it? I hope it meets your expectations.
saber.Character/Saber_Text_PharosLeader_0: A fine opportunity. Allow me to teach you a lesson.
saber.Character/Saber_Text_Witch_1: Very well, let us settle this—
saber.Item_Equip/Assassin_Azrael_Description:
When dealing damage to an enemy, 5% chance to inflict Instant Kill. Against Bosses, deals 150% damage instead.
On Critical Hit: Deal additional damage equal to 20% of the damage dealt.

When equipped by First Hassan: Every 10 enemies slain, toll the "<color=#808080>Evening Bell</color>".
Current: &a/10

<color=#808080>An utterly ordinary greatsword.
Soaked through with the faith of one man who swung it and believed in it his entire life.

It is said that because this man always walked the boundary between life and death,
every strike of his blade carries an Instant Kill effect.
Though the chance is low,
even the mightiest of foes risks being instantly slain.
One who dwells at the boundary has long grown accustomed to death,
and having merged with death itself, possesses resistance to Instant Kill and Charm.</color>
saber.Item_Equip/Berserker_fujian_Description:
When taking damage from an ally, deal equal damage that ignores Defense to a random enemy unit.

When equipped by Heracles: Deal 200% of that damage instead.

<color=#808080>This is no Noble Phantasm. A crude sword so rough it seems more appropriate to call it a boulder than an axe. Forged from the foundation stone of a temple, it also served as the catalyst for summoning Berserker. Only one with superhuman strength could wield this weapon freely.</color>
saber.Item_Equip/Lancer_qiang_2_Description:
The first time you take damage each turn, perform 1 counterattack dealing &a damage.

When equipped by Cú Chulainn: Generate one "Magic Spear Throw" each turn.

<color=#919191>A cursed lance that always pierces the heart of its target upon thrusting.
The certain-kill thrust of the demonic lance Gáe Bolg.
In truth, it is because the lance piercing the heart is the established result that the lance is thrown from the hand — a reversal of cause and effect.
Because the lance has already struck the heart before it is thrown, in a situation where the outcome is predetermined, there is no way to defend or evade regardless of the method used.</color>
saber.Item_Equip/Lancer_qiang_Description: <color=#808080>Win 5 battles with this demonic lance equipped, and it will unleash its remaining power.</color>
saber.Item_Equip/Ruler_jian_Description: When using an attack skill, Overheal all allies for HP equal to 15% of your own Healing Power. When equipped by Jeanne d'Arc: Generate "Crimson Holy Sword" each turn. The sword Jeanne d'Arc carried in life, now drawn from its scabbard. Gleaming silver and radiant with light — this is no mere ornamental blade! As for why it was never used, perhaps the Saint simply preferred a certain long, flowing kind of weapon... Ah, no! Surely the Saint, in her boundless compassion, simply could not bear to let this holy silver blade become an instrument of slaughter!
saber.Item_Equip/Ruler_jian_low_Description: When using an attack skill, Overheal all allies for 1 HP. After using 20 attack skills, it will be unleashed. Current: &a/20. Jeanne d'Arc's sword before its awakening. As for why it was never used... that remains a mystery.
saber.Item_Equip/Ruler_shengqi_Description:
Exchange count +1.

When equipped by Jeanne d'Arc: All allies take 10% less damage.<color=#B22222></color>

<color=#808080>The banner Jeanne d'Arc carried in life, manifested as a companion weapon upon her becoming a Heroic Spirit. Incidentally, Jeanne exclusively uses this banner to attack. She invariably defends herself before those subjected to banner justice with the explanation that "the tip has a spearhead attached, so surely the revelation is telling me to beat people with this banner, right?" Please stop her.</color>
saber.Item_Equip/Saber_Avalon_Description:
When taking damage at 0 HP or in a near-death state, block that damage, restore 50% of maximum HP, and grant yourself "Invincible".
This effect cannot trigger again until you recover at camp.
Current status: &a

<color=#808080></color>When equipped together with "<color=#F0BC1F>Excalibur</color>":
Maximum HP +30%
Damage taken -25%
Debuff resistance +44%<color=#F0BC1F></color>
When equipped by Artoria:
Gain 1 stack of Parry each turn.</color>
saber.Item_Equip/Saber_Calibur_Description:
When equipped by Artoria: Speed +1, Armor Penetration +10%.

<color=#808080>Whoso pulleth out this sword from this stone, is the rightwise born King of England!
Upon defeating a powerful enemy, this sword shall be promoted.</color>
saber.Item_Equip/Saber_Calibur_low_Description:
<color=#808080>Whoso pulleth out this sword from this stone, is the rightwise born King of England!
Take it forth and show the measure of your kingship.
Defeat 2 powerful enemies, and this sword shall be drawn.</color>
saber.Item_Equip/Saber_ExCalibur_Description:
When equipped together with "Avalon":
At the start of battle, generate "<color=#F0BC1F>Noble Phantasm Release · Excalibur</color>".<color=#F0BC1F></color>
When equipped by Artoria:
Speed +1
Armor Penetration +20%
At the start of battle, grant yourself "<color=red><color=#FF4500>Hero Creation</color></color>".

<color=#808080>"That sword is the noble yet sorrowful dream held in their final moments by every soldier who vanished on the battlefield across all of time — past and future alike. Such will is worthy of pride, such faith must be upheld. The ever-victorious king calls aloud the true name of the miracle in hand, and that name is — Excalibur."</color>
saber.Item_Passive/Assassin_xiang_Description:
All members' Critical Hit Chance +5%.
Once every two turns, gain 1 Mana on a critical hit.
<color=#808080>An incense that brings tranquility to the heart.
The drifting smoke guides you to a realm of deep stillness.
May the soul find peace.</color>
saber.Item_Passive/Berserker_huiyi_Description:
All attack skill damage +4, and dealing them inflicts 3 Pain <sprite=1> damage to yourself.

<color=#808080>——A fleeting place of refuge.
A fragile yet proud young girl,
and her winter memories in this place.</color>
saber.Item_Passive/Lancer_liuxing_Description:
When taking damage, deal 3 damage to the attacker.

<color=#808080>When I was still a boy, I once saw a star burn itself out.

Without hesitation, swift and decisive,
leaving only the faintest trace before vanishing—a shooting star.
Many friends saw it as a fleeting sorrow.
But in my heart, a quiet certainty flickered.

"This body will one day be like that star,
　burning out everything while still young, then disappearing without a trace."

Before I knew it, a smile had crossed my face.
That is fine. For a warrior, that is a very fine fate.
From childhood, I accepted this in my heart.</color>
saber.Item_Passive/Saber_ma_Description:
Speed +2.
Deal 3 damage to all enemies each turn and apply Trample.

<color=#808080>O King who was once a girl, give the order!
Even to the ends of the earth,
Don Stallion shall surely obey!</color>
saber.Item_Passive/Saber_wangguan_Description:
Mana +1.
Draw an additional skill on even-numbered turns.

<color=#808080>So the legend goes:
a king is one who is noble and sacred, beyond all reach.
The end is always a future full and prosperous.
So say the stars.
Yet ages shift, and lives change.
The reign of kings must inevitably fall to ruin.</color>
saber.RandomEvent/Saber_bajian_EventDetails:
A sword plunged into a stone.
Inscribed upon the stone: Whoso pulleth out this sword is rightwise born King of England!
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Assassin_Aza: [A] Lost one, canst thou hear the Evening Bell?
[A] Listen well. The Evening Bell hath already revealed thy name...
[A] Thy head... I shall claim it another time...
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Assassin_Ber: [A] Thou art a warrior worthy of admiration. A pity thy mind is not whole at this moment...
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Assassin_Blu: [A] Thou dost not seem to be one for company...
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Assassin_Cha: [B] Whoa! The skull is breathing fire!
[A] Do not be alarmed. This flame will not burn thee...
[B] It really doesn't! How amazing! (reaches out)
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Assassin_Hei: [B] Are you strong? Care to spar with me?
[A] I have no desire for thy head...
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Assassin_Huz: [B] How do you move so silently?
[A] It is earned through years of hard training.
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Assassin_Ily: [B] Why do you use a greatsword?
[B] Um, doesn't it interfere with assassination?
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Assassin_Iro: [B] You seem like a very reliable companion.
[B] Ha! A man of few words!
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Assassin_Joe: [B] You're so mysterious. Just where do you come from?
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Assassin_Joh: [A] Fool blinded by hatred—surrender thy head!
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Assassin_Lan: [A] Child of Light of Ireland, what has brought thee to this place?
[B] Well... probably just a desire to fight, I suppose.
[A] If that is not thy intent, I shall not press thee.
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Assassin_Ler: [B] Can something like you even stay alive?
[A] I have simply not yet died...
[A] I shall return to dust in time. There is no need for surprise...
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Assassin_Lia: [A] Thou... do not push thyself too hard...
[A] If thou fallest, thy companions will suffer as well...
[B] I... I hadn't thought of that...
[A] Walk slowly. Do not force thyself...
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Assassin_Mis: [B] I have to say, you're really terrifying.
[A] Do not fear. I am thy companion...
[B] True enough. Your presence is intimidating, but your armor is seriously cool!
[B] Huh? Why aren't you saying anything?
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Assassin_Mom: [B] U-um... could I touch your sword?
[B] Oh! Surprisingly easy to talk to!
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Assassin_Phe: [B] I didn't expect to find something stranger than myself.
[A] I am but an ordinary old man...
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Assassin_Pri: [B] I can feel it—you are filled with faith.
[B] Can someone like you truly have faith?
[A] Throughout my life, I shall walk in the light of my Lord...
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Assassin_Red: [B] Hey, can you do me a favor?
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Assassin_Rul: [A] Holy maiden Jeanne d'Arc, thy sacrifice commands admiration...
[A] Not so. Thy deeds are remembered by the world...
[B] Thank you for your kind words.
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Assassin_Sab: [A]King of Knights, have you found your answer on this journey?
[A]Whatever the case, you must follow your true heart......
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Assassin_Sil: [A]I have no quarrel with you, but......
[A]You would do well to put that gun away......
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Assassin_Siz: [B]Old man, this is my friend. Her name is Eve.
[B]Old man, why are you ignoring me?
[A]I have no wish to shatter your illusions......
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Assassin_Tri: [A]The Hundred-Faced Hassan? (draws sword) Hand over your head!
[A]Only the scent of the Hundred-Faced Hassan... I was mistaken......
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Lancer_Azar_: [A]Hah, how long are you going to keep wearing that fake mask of yours?
[A]Hmph, you know perfectly well what I mean!
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Lancer_Berse: [A]You're a fine rival, Berserker. Good thing we're on the same side.
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Lancer_Charo: [B]A cursed demonic spear... you must be one of the shadow-walkers.
[A]Shadow-walkers? What in the world is that?
[A]What! Have you been to the Land of Shadows?
[B]What! What is the Land of Shadows?
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Lancer_Hein_: [A]Oh? You dare challenge me? Let's go!
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Lancer_Huz_D: [A]Ugh, this brings back some bad memories.
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Lancer_Ilya_: [A]Why so gloomy? Come on, smile a little!
[A]Kid, have a little confidence in yourself.
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Lancer_Iron_: [B]The unstoppable spear against the immovable shield, hm?
[B]I'll pass. We've got hard battles ahead of us.
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Lancer_Johan: [A]Oh? Then I can only wish you luck.
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Lancer_Leryn: [A]Hah, why does everyone keep wanting to study this spear?
[B]Could you let me examine it for a bit?
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Lancer_Lian_: [A]Hey, lighten up a little, little lady!
[A]Right, sorry, sorry. You're a proud warrior in your own right.
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Lancer_Miss_: [A]Honestly, you're a pretty carefree person, aren't you?
[B]Mr. Cú Chulainn, is that a confession?
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Lancer_Momor: [B]Hehe, you're such a little fish♥, old man.
[A]I don't know what to do with you.
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Lancer_Narha: [B]That spear... how on earth does it......
[B]Honestly, I just can't wrap my head around it.
[A]Hahaha! If you can't figure it out, just stop thinking about it! Have a drink!
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Lancer_Pheon: [A]What a shame. I was just thinking it's rare to find such a plump bird.
[B]Who are you calling a plump bird, you rude jerk?!
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Lancer_Pries: [B]Cú Chulainn, would you be interested in learning about......
[A]N-No, no, no! That won't be necessary!
[A](quietly) I have no intention of getting caught up in another religious affair.
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Lancer_Red_D: [B]Hey, lend me your spear for a bit.
[B]To give my adorable little sister a good scare, of course.
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Lancer_Silve: [B]Being called "old man" by someone from thousands of years ago......
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Lancer_Trish: [B] That spear — it can always strike the enemy's heart when thrown?
[B] That's incredible! Can you show me?
[A] Hah? You want to try it out?
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Ruler_Assass: [A] I did not expect to find you here as well.
[B] I am here to lend my aid......
[A] With you here, this journey shall go smoothly.
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Ruler_Azar_D: [B] Excuse me, what are you doing?
[B] That look on your face...... what does it mean?
[A] I can see through True Names. And you......
[B] Don't leave me hanging like that......
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Ruler_Berser: [A] Even a warrior as mighty as you can have his sanity eroded.
[A] Still, having you with us gives me great confidence.
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Ruler_Blue_D: [A] So adorable — it makes me want to tease you a little~
[A] I'm only joking! How about you become my little sister instead!
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Ruler_Charon: [B] (whispers) Jeanne, using magic like this — I won't be punished by God, will I?
[A] (pretends to raise her standard) I shall deliver divine punishment right now!
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Ruler_Hein_D: [B] Someone like you — (gesturing at her hitting people with the standard) — can really call herself a saint?
[A] (indignantly) There is a spearhead fitted to this standard — surely that is divine inspiration from my Lord!
[B] Hah? What kind of inspiration is that?
[A] Inspiration to use this flag to deliver judgment upon others!
[B] What kind of twisted logic is that!
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Ruler_Huz_Di: [B] Oh my, I wonder what it feels like to be struck by a saint~?
[B] I mean, the feeling of being hit with that whip of yours.
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Ruler_Ilya_D: [B] What does "Ruler" mean — like a measuring ruler?
[A] No. It means arbiter. I pass judgment upon the world in my Lord's name.
[B] You sound very confident in yourself......
[A] Not in myself — I have absolute faith in my Lord.
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Ruler_Iron_D: [B] I will protect all of you. You should not be standing so close.
[A] Sir, I have been fighting on the battlefield this whole time, you know?
[A] Don't let my appearance fool you — I charge straight into enemy lines all the time!
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Ruler_Joey_D: [B] A saint? I don't believe in that sort of thing.
[A] That's fine. Whether you believe or not, we are at least allies for now.
[B] True enough. But I'll be keeping an eye on you.
[A] (attempts to poke him in the eyes) As it happens, I rather like that~
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Ruler_Johan_: [B] If God truly exists, then why did she have to......
[A] When I was bound to the stake, that same thought crossed my mind.
[A] But afterward, my country was restored. It was then that I understood — to gain something, you must first lose something.
[A] Tell me — what were you trying to gain, when you lost her?
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Ruler_Lancer: [B] Well, well~ if it isn't the great Saint herself?
[A] You — still as frivolous as ever.
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Ruler_Leryn_: [B] That flag of yours — it never seems to get damaged?
[A] Correct. It is my Noble Phantasm.
[A] It is indeed remarkable. I believe there is no other explanation for it but a miracle.
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Ruler_Lian_D: [A] It is thanks to you that our losses have been so few.
[A] My, what a delightful young lady you are.
[B] ⁄(⁄ ⁄ ⁄ _  ⁄ ⁄ ⁄)⁄ S-saying something like that so suddenly......
[A] If you were in my army, I might have had you take over for Gilles~
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Ruler_Miss_D: [A] I couldn't possibly accept that. I am but a simple village girl. If you ask me, you are the true beauty here.
[B] You have such a way with words! Is that a saint thing?
[A] (at a loss) Being a saint doesn't cover that sort of thing, I think?
[B] Hahaha, never mind that! It's the thought that counts! Here, have some grilled meat!
[A] Mm, this is delicious! May God's blessings be upon you.
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Ruler_Momori: [A] Come to think of it, you have quite the peculiar verbal tic~
[A] (imitating Momori) "Small fry❤ small fry❤" — something like that?
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Ruler_Narhan: [B] Your mind... it is pure white?
[A] Ah, perhaps it is my Lord's radiance that watches over me?
[B] I think I'll be going now.
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Ruler_Pheoni: [B] I am a Phoenix! How dare you compare me to some ordinary creature?
[A] And quite the little glutton too! (quietly) Just like a certain ahoge......
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Ruler_Priest: [A] I'm sorry, but could you keep a little distance from me?
[A] The way you swing that execution stake around — it's rather impressive.
[A] But it makes me feel a terrible urge to tie you to it, hehehe......
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Ruler_Red_Di: [A] Sisters with completely opposite personalities... how wonderful, how wonderful.
[A] Because it means you'll never feel lonely. Seeing you two reminds me of the children of France.
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Ruler_Saber_: [A] How long will this take to end?
[B] You're the Ruler and even you don't know — how would I?
[A] You know, the more I see of this world, the more compassion I feel for it......
[B] That is precisely why we are here.
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Ruler_Silver: [B] What? Going to show off your boundless love?
[A] No, I mean — could you let me be the one to cook it?
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Ruler_Sizz_D: [B] Sister Jeanne, are you really a saint?
[A] I believe I am nothing more than an ordinary village girl.
[A] (pats her head) If I were a true saint, perhaps... France could have ended its turmoil sooner......
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Ruler_Trisha: [B] Saint Jeanne d'Arc — that does sound rather admirable.
[A] Eh, does it? I am nothing more than an ordinary village girl.
[B] No village girl has your kind of... combat ability.
[A] And so I say — all of this is a gift from my Lord.
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Saber_Red_Di: [A]Nothing. I just find myself talking to myself from time to time.
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Saber_Silver: [B]Why use magic for guns when you could use magic directly......
[A]Because you are a unique kind of...... person.
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Saber_Sizz_D: [B]I have a question for you. Why do you look so worn down from battle, yet remain so composed?
[A]To be honest...... I am already used to battle.
[A]After all the battles I've been through, there are things you'd rather not know......
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Saber_Trisha: [B]Knight, how do you deal with stab wounds?
[A]Assassin-class Servants are formidable foes, but I wouldn't worry too much about them.
[B]I have treated many fatal stab wounds before.
[A]I understand. For your information, I once encountered an Assassin who was an unparalleled swordsman...... and already a cut above the rest.
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_saber_Assass: [A]I pay my respects to you, First Hassan.
[B]King of Knights, there is no need for such formality......
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_saber_Azar_D: [A]You are strange. You are hiding something.
[B]Master? You mean Lucy? Rest assured, I would never harm her.
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_saber_Berser: [A]I did not expect to find you here.
[A]You are a mighty warrior. I am at ease knowing Lucy has you to protect her.
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_saber_Blue_D: [A]You two are truly a fine pair of sisters.
[A]I mean, you two get along very well.
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_saber_Charon: [B]Wow! What is that? An invisible sword? What kind of magic is this?
[A]It is simply wind wrapped around the blade. Nothing particularly remarkable.
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_saber_Hein_D: [A]A knight does not resort to needless violence.
[B]Tch. Lots of rules for someone so small.
[A]We could always have an eating contest instead.
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_saber_Huz_Di: [B]You're a queen too? Do you share the same... hobby?
[A](Shakes head.) I would never wish suffering upon my people.
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_saber_Ilya_D: [B]Saber? What a curious title. Would that make me a Saber as well?
[A]Perhaps! Come to think of it, I once met a Saber who wielded two swords.
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_saber_Iron_D: [B]Little lady, stand behind me. I'll protect everyone.
[A]But I am no helpless little girl.
[A]At the very least, we are doing the same thing.
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_saber_Joey_D: [B]Hey, you. You're awfully secretive. Just where did you come from?
[A]Doctor, prying into others' private affairs is hardly a virtue.
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_saber_Johan_: [B]One day, I will have my revenge.
[A]Letting hatred blind you is never a good thing.
[A]Once, a blade of hatred was pointed at my very chest...... and it came from my own child.
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_saber_Lancer: [B]Sure! I've been looking forward to it!
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_saber_Leryn_: [B]Why does your body recover so quickly?
[A]Because I can use mana to restore myself.
[B]Is it a matter of physical constitution?
[A]Perhaps. A Heroic Spirit's body is indeed unlike that of an ordinary person.
[B](Muttering.) ...... A Heroic Spirit...... I'd love to study that further......
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_saber_Lian_D: [A]How does it feel to protect everyone?
[B]...... They are my allies. Protecting them is my duty.
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_saber_Miss_D: [B]Oh my, what a cute little thing. Come here and let big sis give you a hug.
[A](Pushes away, blushing.) ...... Why are you dressed so...... revealingly.
[B]Everyone has their own preferences. Besides, aren't you wearing armor?
[B]Ha ha ha, it's fine! Here, have some grilled meat!
[B](Out of breath.) Hah...... hah...... you really can eat a lot......
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_saber_Momori: [A]Looking at you reminds me of someone.
[B]Who? Are they as cute as me?
[A]She had pink horns. You are both very cute.
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_saber_Narhan: [B]Just who are you? Why can't I read your thoughts?
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_saber_Priest: [B]I've never seen you before. Are you a knight of God?
[A]I am not a knight of God.
[A]As for gods— I have cut one down before.
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_saber_Red_Di: [A]Nothing. It just reminded me— I occasionally come across other versions of myself.
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_saber_Ruler_: [A]How are you holding up? Getting used to things?
[B]Yes. This world is even more... than I imagined.
[A]I understand. That is precisely why our strength is needed.
[B]Indeed. May the Lord watch over us.
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_saber_Silver: [A]Can that gun be driven by magecraft?
[B]Magecraft? Why would a gun ever need something like that......
[A]Well... there was once someone I knew... never mind.
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_saber_Sizz_D: [B]Sister Artoria, why do you look so young but have so much battle experience?
[A]Truth be told...... I have been through countless battles.
[A]The things that happen on such battlefields... are best left unknown to you.
saber.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_saber_Trisha: [B]King of Knights, what do you think of assassins?
[A]Assassin? Formidable opponents— but not exactly honorable.
[B]Is there even such a thing as an honorable assassin?
[A]Well... I once encountered an aged Assassin whose weapon was, of all things, a greatsword......
saber.Skill/Assassin_anning_Description:
Generate "No One to Welcome You Home."

<color=#483D8B>Breath of the Hidden</color>: Skill cost -1.
<color=#808080>Evening Bell</color> (4): Enter <color=#483D8B>Breath of the Hidden</color>.

<color=#808080>How pitiful! You shall know no peace in this life!</color>
saber.Skill/Assassin_baoju_Description:
Ignore Defense.
50% chance to Instant Kill the target; deals 50% bonus damage to Bosses instead. When this effect triggers, toll the <color=#808080>Evening Bell</color>.
On Kill: Enter <color=#483D8B>Breath of the Hidden</color>.
<color=#808080>Evening Bell</color> (8): This Noble Phantasm costs 0.
Can only be used while in <color=#483D8B>Breath of the Hidden</color>.
Can be used while unable to act.

<color=#808080>Rank: C　Type: Anti-Unit Noble Phantasm
Range: 1　Max Targets: 1
Originally an ordinary greatsword, endlessly swung by the First Hassan throughout his life, soaked in the miasma of death within darkened valleys— and thus was it transformed into a Noble Phantasm.
Any target struck by this greatsword, no matter what it may be, even a god, shall be threatened with death. This is death itself, made manifest.</color>
saber.Skill/Assassin_duangu_Description:
This skill deals bonus damage equal to the higher of: 30% of the target's Max HP (up to 60), or 180% of own Attack Power.

<color=#483D8B>Breath of the Hidden</color>: Apply Death Sentence.
<color=#808080>Evening Bell</color> (7): Change the bonus damage to the higher of: 20% of the target's Max HP (up to 100), or 220% of own Attack Power.

<color=#808080>I judge thee! Broken Bones and Torn Sinews!</color>
saber.Skill/Assassin_fuxiu_Description:
Consume all Mana. For each point of Mana consumed, use this skill 2 times; if 0 Mana is consumed, use it only once.
On Kill: Enter <color=#483D8B>Breath of the Hidden</color>.

<color=#808080>Evening Bell</color> (8): Changed to 3 uses per point of Mana consumed.
saber.Skill/Assassin_jiaohui_Description:
On Kill: Draw this skill again.

<color=#483D8B>Breath of the Hidden</color>: Remove one debuff from self.
<color=#808080>Evening Bell</color> (5): 33% chance to toll the <color=#808080>Evening Bell</color>.

<color=#808080>How wretched! You have never known guidance in this life!</color>
saber.Skill/Assassin_neizang_Description:
Increase the Critical Hit Chance of all skills in hand by 100%.

<color=#808080>I judge thee! Rupture the organs!</color>
saber.Skill/Assassin_qixi_Description:
This skill costs 0.

<color=#483D8B>Breath of the Hidden</color>: Draw 1 skill.

<color=#808080>I shall appear at the moment of thy death.</color>
saber.Skill/Assassin_sizhiyuan_Description:
When drawn, use immediately. Draw 1 skill and gain 2 Mana.

<color=#808080>This is the Hassan of Hassans!</color>
saber.Skill/Assassin_xuerou_Description:
If used immediately after being drawn, this skill Criticals.

<color=#483D8B>Breath of the Hidden</color>: Also deal 25% bonus damage.
<color=#808080>Evening Bell</color> (6): Also draw 1 skill and restore 1 Mana on Kill.

<color=#808080>I judge thee! Strip the flesh and bury it in the earth!</color>
saber.Skill/Assassin_yingjie_Description:
The next time the target takes damage, Critical Hit Chance against it is increased by 50%.

<color=#483D8B>Breath of the Hidden</color>: Apply to all enemy units instead.
<color=#808080>Evening Bell</color> (2): Make its duration infinite.

<color=#808080>How hateful! No one shall come to welcome your soul home!</color>
saber.Skill/Assassin_yingjie_Name: No One to Welcome You Home
saber.Skill/Assassin_zhansha_Description:
Deal &a damage 2 additional times.

<color=#483D8B>Breath of the Hidden</color>: Ignore the target's Defense.
<color=#808080>Evening Bell</color> (3): Deal 1 additional hit of damage.

<color=#808080>How laughable! You have gained nothing in this life!</color>
saber.Skill/Assassin_zhengming_Description:
This skill's damage increases by 1% for every 2% of HP the target has lost.

<color=#483D8B>Breath of the Hidden</color>: Draw 1 skill.
<color=#808080>Evening Bell</color>: Shatter the target's Defense.

<color=#808080>How lamentable! You have proven nothing in this life!</color>
saber.Skill/Assassin_zhineng_Description:
Draw 1 skill and gain 1 Mana.
Become unable to act. Each turn, draw 1 additional skill and restore 1 Mana. Dispelled upon taking damage.

<color=#483D8B>Breath of the Hidden</color>: Gain one perfect Evade.
<color=#808080>Evening Bell</color> (8): Can act and will not be dispelled.

<color=#808080>Naive! And so— die!</color>
saber.Skill/Azar_baoju_Description:
Enter Countdown: Grant all skills in hand "Phantom Blade."
For each 0-cost skill in hand, this Noble Phantasm's damage increases by 8.

<color=#808080>Azrael's Projected Noble Phantasm...... What? You don't want it? You have no say in the matter!</color>
saber.Skill/Azar_baoju_Name: <color=#B0E0E6>Noble Phantasm Projection · Phantasmal Greatsword · Calamitous Descent</color>
saber.Skill/Berserker_baoju_Description:
Randomly attack enemy units 9 times, each hit dealing &a damage.
This Noble Phantasm's cost equals own current HP.
Can only be used when NOT in <color=#DC143C>Mad Enhancement</color>, and can be used while unable to act.

<color=#808080>Rank: C~A+
Type: Unknown
Range: Variable
Max Targets: —
Rather than a single armament, this is better described as a style. The Noble Phantasm of the hero Heracles, "Nine Lives," is an all-purpose Noble Phantasm capable of changing its form to suit any opponent. It could be called the "Style: Nine Lives."
Among all the Noble Phantasms Heracles possesses, this is the one he trusts most. Its essence is "9 consecutive strikes released at a speed that overlaps all attacks into one." However, as he was summoned as a Berserker, its Accuracy has been greatly reduced.</color>
saber.Skill/Berserker_baoju_Name: <color=#DEB887>Sealed Noble Phantasm · Nine Lives · Unnamed Axe-Sword</color>
saber.Skill/Berserker_bilei_Description:
Intercept all damage for every other ally.

<color=#808080>Grey muscles like iron, a towering frame more imposing than a lion— if he stood still, it would be natural to mistake him for a wall or a pillar.
And yet when he runs, he moves swift as the wind, and the way he swings his stone axe shows no sign of lost reason. A nimble iron fortress, rising again and again no matter how desperately he is struck down— indeed, Berserker is the strongest.
You are the one shield the girl can depend on, the thick cocoon that wraps around her loneliness and fragility. The wall behind you is more steadfast than the walls of Castle Einzbern.
To become a shelter from the storm, to ultimately surpass even myth— the reason was not the Command Seal. I believe it was nothing other than the gentleness known as Berserker.</color>
saber.Skill/Berserker_cannue_Description:
Deal &a (20% of own current HP) Pain<sprite=1> damage to self.
Can Ignore Taunt to target enemies with less than 50% HP.
If the target has a Weakening<sprite=0> debuff, Critical Hit Chance increases by 40%.
If the target has a Pain<sprite=1> debuff, increase all its debuffs' duration by 1 turn.
If the target has a CC<sprite=2> debuff, ignore 33% Armor.

<color=#DC143C>Mad Enhancement</color>: Attack the units on either side of the target instead, dealing 40% damage. Special effects do not apply; apply Bleeding instead.
If there is only one target, this skill's damage increases by 15%.
saber.Skill/Berserker_cuihui_Description:
If the target's Countdown is 1, set it to 99.

<color=#DC143C>Mad Enhancement</color>: Damage is reduced by 50%, but simultaneously randomly attacks another character. (Does not increase the non-primary target's Countdown.)
saber.Skill/Berserker_duangu_Description:
Deal &a (20% of own current HP) Pain<sprite=1> damage to self.
This skill's damage increases based on the target's current HP— the higher the HP, the greater the damage, up to a maximum of 30% bonus damage. Apply Broken Bones.

<color=#DC143C>Mad Enhancement</color>: Change the damage bonus to: +1 damage for every 4% of HP the target has lost (up to 15). Apply Torn Sinews instead.
saber.Skill/Berserker_juesi_Description:
Placed on top of the deck at the start of battle. Grant self Unyielding Resolve.
When dealt lethal damage with no Twelve Labors remaining: Refuse death and maintain HP at 0 for two turns. Each turn, generate a skill chosen from 3 random personal skills, then die immediately afterward.
saber.Skill/Berserker_jushen_Description: While in hand, each time an ally takes damage, this skill's cost decreases by 1. This skill's damage increases by &b (based on HP lost). On Kill: Deal &a (33% Attack Power) damage to all remaining enemies and Overheal self for &c (20% of this skill's damage). Mad Enhancement: Ignore Defense.
saber.Skill/Berserker_kuangbao_Description:
Deal Pain<sprite=1> damage to the target equal to 50% of their current HP (this damage cannot reduce their HP below 1), and produce additional effects based on the target's role:
· Attacker: Deal 1.5× that value as damage to a random enemy unit.
· Defender: Generate a Barrier equal to 100% of that value.
· Support: Draw 1 skill, restore 1 Mana.
· Saber: Apply effects 1 and 2 simultaneously at half values.
· Assassin: Grant all allies <color=#483D8B>Breath of the Hidden</color>.
· Ruler: Draw 3 skills.
· Lancer: Generate "The Spinning Blue Lancer."
saber.Skill/Berserker_kuangbao_Lancer_Descript:
Enter Countdown: Directly reduce the target's HP by &a.
When dealing damage, 5% chance to Instant Kill; always Instant Kill against Archers (deals double damage against Bosses instead).
saber.Skill/Berserker_kuangbao_Lancer_Name: <color=#3399ff>Living Noble Phantasm · The Spinning Blue Lancer</color>
saber.Skill/Berserker_nuhou_Description:
Deal Pain<sprite=1> damage.
Can be used while unable to act, and clears Stun and Freeze.<color=#DC143C></color>
saber.Skill/Berserker_roulin_Description:
Deal &a (33% of own current HP, minimum 1) Pain<sprite=1> damage to self.
On Kill, this skill's damage permanently increases by 3 (currently &b).

<color=#DC143C>Mad Enhancement</color>: Deal damage randomly 2 times, each at 40%.
saber.Skill/Berserker_shixue_Description: Deal &a (33% of own current HP) Pain damage to self. When attacking a target afflicted with own Bleeding, change their Bleeding to Bloodletting. Mad Enhancement: Changed to Overheal self for 25% of this skill's damage instead. When attacking a target afflicted with own Bleeding, increase the Overheal amount to 50%.
saber.Skill/Berserker_suijia_Description:
Deal &a (15% of own current HP) Pain<sprite=1> damage to self.
Ignore Defense. Critical Hit Chance increases by 50% against targets with Defense greater than 0.

<color=#DC143C>Mad Enhancement</color>: Changed to deal bonus damage equal to 200% of the target's Defense and apply Shatter instead.
saber.Skill/Berserker_zhanyi_Description:
This skill costs 0.
Dispel <color=#DC143C>Mad Enhancement</color> for this turn.

<color=#808080>Even as his mind is eroded, the will to protect his Master does not waver. It is precisely because of this that his Battle Spirit erupts with overwhelming force!</color>
saber.Skill/Berserker_zhiling_Description: Deal Pain<sprite=1> damage equal to 25% of the target's current HP. Draw 2 attack skills with priority and set their cost to 0.
saber.Skill/Blue_baoju_0_Description: Based on the top skill of the discard pile, restore 2 additional HP for each 1 point of its cost (up to 4).
saber.Skill/Blue_baoju_Description:
Countdown: Generate "<color=#FF6347>Noble Phantasm Replica · Tide-Cleaving Manju Pearl</color>" for Helia.
On Release: Based on the topmost skill in the discard pile, restore an additional 2 HP per 1 Mana cost (up to 4).

<color=#808080>Selena's projected Noble Phantasm. The two sisters have always been inseparable, and their Noble Phantasms are no different — nor is the way they use them......</color>
saber.Skill/Control_baoju_Description:
Countdown: Apply "Insight" to all enemies.
On Release: Draw 1 skill.

<color=#808080>Narhan's projected Noble Phantasm, inspired by a fictional master detective. Speaking of that detective — he too was someone who could see right through people's hearts.
"To perceive the human heart with mortal means — truly admirable."
                                                                                          — Narhan</color>
saber.Skill/Control_baoju_Name: <color=#B0E0E6>Noble Phantasm Projection · Elementary, My Dear Friend</color>
saber.Skill/Hein_baoju_Description: This Noble Phantasm's damage is increased by &a (50% of HP lost). If released while near death, damage is increased by &b (150% of HP lost) instead. On kill: Apply 1 Terror to all remaining enemies and Overheal self for &c HP (30% of Max. Health). Hein's projected Noble Phantasm... Hm? Why has this sword turned red?
saber.Skill/Ilya_baoju_Description:
Ignores Defense. Always hits.
Discard 1 skill and deal damage to a random enemy.

<color=#808080>Ilya's projected Noble Phantasm, inspired by a genius swordsman who never existed. This impossible sword technique moves so fast that no one could ever dodge it. For some reason, whenever Ilya uses this technique, she feels filled with confidence......</color>
saber.Skill/Ilya_baoju_Name: <color=#87CEEB>Noble Phantasm Projection · Secret Sword · Swallow Return</color>
saber.Skill/Joey_baoju_Description:
This Noble Phantasm's healing is increased by &a (number of buffs held).

<color=#808080>Joey's projected Noble Phantasm. In a sense, the true owner of this Noble Phantasm really is an elite in every meaning of the word.</color>
saber.Skill/Lancer_baoju_Description:
Countdown: Directly reduce target's HP by &a.
On hit: 20% chance to Instant Kill normal enemies; deals 200% damage to special enemies and Bosses.

<color=#808080>Gáe Bolg, originally an anti-army Noble Phantasm meant to be thrown, was reworked by Cú Chulainn into an anti-personnel technique — his ultimate move and trump card.
It is a technique that reverses "causality", the natural order of things. The moment it is unleashed, the "effect" of "the enemy's heart being pierced" is created first. The "cause" of "the spear hit because the heart was pierced" follows afterward. Without considerable luck, it is a technique that is virtually certain to mean "death upon release." Its mana consumption is low — remarkably efficient for a Noble Phantasm with the powerful effect of "nearly guaranteed destruction of the enemy's heart."
Because the result of "piercing the enemy's heart" already exists at the moment of release, even killing Cú Chulainn first cannot change that outcome — making it impossible to alter the spear's trajectory.</color>
saber.Skill/Lancer_chongzhen_Description:
Cannot be played manually.
While this skill is in hand, if self is near death, it is automatically played and restores 30% of Max. Health. Afterward, draw 3 skills.

<color=#808080>
Cú Chulainn is best suited to show his true worth in large-scale battles.
However, due to his personal preference for one-on-one duels,
almost no one is aware of this fact.</color>
saber.Skill/Lancer_di_Description: When used against a target under Taunt, restore &a HP.
saber.Skill/Lancer_feng_Description: If there is exactly 1 target with a Countdown of 1, always land a Critical Hit against it.
saber.Skill/Lancer_guang_Description:
Randomly remove 1 debuff from self and target ally, and grant immunity to the next debuff applied.
Can be used while Stunned, Frozen, or similar — Mana cost is increased by 1 in those states.
saber.Skill/Lancer_jing_Description: If current HP is below 50%, Mana cost is reduced by 2.
saber.Skill/Lancer_kong_Description:
Toggle the target's Taunt state and deal 50% damage to it and the units to its left and right.
If there is only one target, deal 100% damage and restore 1 Mana.
saber.Skill/Lancer_lucydraw_Description: Choose and draw a specific skill from the deck, reducing its Mana cost to 0.
saber.Skill/Lancer_moshu_Description:
Can only be used 3 times per battle.
Draw 1 skill.

<color=#808080>Bearer of the Nordic runic magecraft inscription — Rune.
Warriors of the Land of Shadows must master all manner of arts
and not rely solely on the spear —
perhaps it was this philosophy of his teacher Scáthach
that led Cú Chulainn to master runic magecraft as well.
As a mage, his ability already approaches the first rate,
yet he rarely uses magecraft himself, finding it too much of a bother.</color>
saber.Skill/Lancer_touzhi_Description:
On dealing damage, 5% chance to Instant Kill (ineffective against Bosses).
On kill: Draw this skill again.
saber.Skill/Lancer_tuchuan_Description:
When used at or above &a HP: Deal &b <sprite=1> damage to self; this Noble Phantasm's damage is increased by &b.
When used at or below &a HP: Restore &c HP to self.

<color=#808080>The greatest and most powerful attack using Gáe Bolg. The so-called "attack that scatters countless barbs upon the enemy" refers to this "Soaring Spear that Strikes with Death." After a running start, the user leaps high into the air and hurls the spear at the ground below with full force. Unlike "Gáe Bolg" (the anti-personnel technique), it lacks the conceptual property of "guaranteed piercing of the enemy's heart," but its power and effective range are far greater. The attack covers the entire area surrounding the target in a carpet-bombing fashion — capable of obliterating a crowd at once, no matter how strong their fortifications or how swiftly they attempt to evade.</color>
saber.Skill/Lancer_tuchuan_Name: <color=#800000>Cursed Noble Phantasm · Soaring Spear that Strikes with Death</color>
saber.Skill/Lancer_xing_Description:
Deals additional effects based on debuffs the target has:
"Knockdown": Deal additional &a damage ignoring Defense.
"Panic": Gain 1 Mana.
"Lacerate": Restore &b HP to all allies.
"Lost": Draw 1 skill.
"Weakness": Gain &c Barrier.
saber.Skill/Lancer_ying_Description: Choose and draw a specific skill from the deck, reducing its Mana cost to 0.
saber.Skill/Laner_shan_Description: Gain a Barrier equal to 33% of damage dealt.
saber.Skill/Leryn_baoju_Description:
Countdown: Grant all allies Well Prepared.

<color=#808080>Leryn's projected Noble Phantasm, from that great Renaissance man.
"This is really from him? I mean... is this even real?"
                                                                                          — Leryn</color>
saber.Skill/Lian_baoju_Description:
Countdown: Grant self Parry.
On kill: Stun all remaining enemies.

<color=#808080>Lian's projected Noble Phantasm. This looks like an incredibly powerful greatsword — it might just suit Lian's bold and sweeping fighting style perfectly.</color>
saber.Skill/Lian_baoju_Name: <color=#EE82EE>Noble Phantasm Projection · Divine Sword · Kusanagi no Tachi</color>
saber.Skill/Mement_baoju_Description:
Countdown: Grant self Tenacity.
On Release: Reduce self to near death; if there is only 1 target, deal an additional &a damage (100% Attack Power).

<color=#808080>Johan's projected Noble Phantasm, from a legendary great hero who fired this earth-shaking arrow with his very life, ending a long and drawn-out war. Perhaps it resonated with Johan's own resolve to risk everything to reclaim his beloved — and so it manifested here!</color>
saber.Skill/Mement_baoju_Name: <color=#F5F5F5>Noble Phantasm Projection · A Single Shooting Star</color>
saber.Skill/MissChain_baoju_Description:
Countdown: Grant all allies Counter.
On Release: Grant all allies 2 stacks of Death's Defiance; if self is currently Burning, additionally apply 2 stacks of Agonizing Burn to all enemies.

<color=#808080>Miss Chain's projected Noble Phantasm. Hm? There's a deep air of resentment emanating from this — it doesn't suit Miss Chain at all! Perhaps it's the vengeful spirits of those felled by that chainsaw making their grudges known......</color>
saber.Skill/MissChain_baoju_Name: <color=#F5DEB3>Noble Phantasm Projection · Rashomon's Great Resentment Rises</color>
saber.Skill/Momori_baoju_Description:
Countdown: Set 1 "Heart's Desire" skill's damage to 0 and Discard it.
On Release: If target has Taunt, remove it; otherwise apply Taunt to the target.
For each "Heart's Desire" in hand, this Noble Phantasm's Mana cost is reduced by 1; this Noble Phantasm's damage is increased by &a (100% of "Heart's Desire" damage value).

<color=#808080>Hehe~ Weakling♡ Weakling~ Did you think I'd introduce my projected Noble Phantasm to you? Dream on! A mere weakling wanting to know... What do you think you're doing!</color>
saber.Skill/Phoenix_baoju_Description:
The mighty Phoenix cannot perform a Noble Phantasm Projection (furious). At least a loaf of bread was generated.

<color=#808080>Hey! Why don't I have a projected Noble Phantasm?! (furious)</color>
saber.Skill/Priest_baoju_Description:
Countdown: "Foresight" — generate "I'll Send You to God!" with its Mana cost reduced by 1 and attached with Exclude.
On Release: Cleanse 2 debuffs.

<color=#808080>Pressel's projected Noble Phantasm, from a great warrior and a great healer! Now, receive the divine mercy of God!</color>
saber.Skill/Priest_baoju_Name: <color=#B0C4DE>Noble Phantasm Projection · I Shall Eradicate All Poison</color>
saber.Skill/Prime_baoju_Description:
Countdown: Grant self Shield of Resolute Will.

<color=#808080>Ironheart's projected Noble Phantasm... You ask why it's a girl's chanting? Well, even a tough old man has a soft side. (laughs)</color>
saber.Skill/Prime_baoju_Name: <color=#DCDCDC>Noble Phantasm Projection · The Now-Distant Ideal City</color>
saber.Skill/Queen_baoju_Description:
Countdown: Remove "Healing Lash" from all allies.
If the target's Countdown is 1, apply Stun to it.

<color=#808080>Huz's projected Noble Phantasm, also from a queen. Well... a true queen and a "queen" in a different sense.</color>
saber.Skill/Queen_baoju_Name: <color=#DDA0DD>Noble Phantasm Projection · My Beloved Iron Chariot</color>
saber.Skill/Red_baoju_0_Description: If self has "Moonlight Curtain", apply 2 stacks of "Solar Flame" to the target. If the target has 2 stacks of "Solar Flame", this Noble Phantasm lands as a Critical Hit.
saber.Skill/Red_baoju_Description:
Countdown: Generate "<color=#87CEFA>Noble Phantasm Replica · Tide-Cleaving Manju Pearl</color>" for Selena.
On Release: If self has "Moonlight Curtain", apply 2 stacks of "Solar Flame" to the target. If the target has 2 stacks of "Solar Flame", this Noble Phantasm lands as a Critical Hit.

<color=#808080>Helia's projected Noble Phantasm. The two sisters have always been inseparable, and their Noble Phantasms are no different — nor is the way they use them......</color>
saber.Skill/Ruler_baoju_Description:
Countdown: Draw 2 skills.

<color=#808080>Rank: A
Type: Barrier Noble Phantasm
Range: 1~10
Max Targets: ???
The Noble Phantasm born from the holy banner Jeanne d'Arc wielded in life. Through angelic blessing, it protects everything within 10 units of the banner. It can convert EX-rank Magic Resistance directly into physical Defense, blocking enemy attacks. However, while the holy banner is raised, Jeanne cannot perform any attacks. Furthermore, the banner continuously accumulates damage from enemy attacks, so overuse will render it unusable.
Luminosité Eternelle — Ruler's Noble Phantasm. By revealing the holy banner, EX-rank Magic Resistance is converted into Defense encompassing protection against physical attacks as well. It is the crystallization of the legend of one who waved her banner on the battlefield and emerged nearly unscathed until the very end.</color>
saber.Skill/Ruler_baoju_Name: <color=#FFD700>Noble Phantasm Release · God is Here With Me!</color>
saber.Skill/Ruler_caijue_Description: Damage is increased by 10% for each buff the target has.
saber.Skill/Ruler_canran_Description:
Reduce self's Attack Power, Defense, Healing Power, Critical Hit, Critical Damage, and Critical Healing by 50% and grant them to the target.

<color=#808080>Listen! All you Heroic Spirits gathered here — each a warrior of unrivaled might! Even sworn enemies, even those from different ages who share no bond — now, entrust your backs to one another! My True Name is 'Jeanne d'Arc' — in the name of God, I shall become your shield!</color>
saber.Skill/Ruler_chongzhen_Description:
Toggle the target's Taunt state.

<color=#808080>Such a small girl, yet she charged into the enemy lines without hesitation. Ah... thinking of this, our tears well up uncontrollably. You are truly a saint! Ah... O Saint! We shall follow in your footsteps!</color>
saber.Skill/Ruler_duxing_Description: <color=#808080>In the name of God, I shall walk this path.</color>
saber.Skill/Ruler_honglian_1_Description:
Reduce self's HP to 1.
Draw 1 skill.
Convert all of self's skills into "<color=#B22222>Crimson Holy Sword</color>".<color=#B22222></color>
saber.Skill/Ruler_honglian_1_plus_Description:
Deal Pain <sprite=1> damage.
Restore HP equal to 25% of damage dealt.
Deal 2 additional damage per stack of "<color=#B22222>Crimson Lotus Hellfire</color>" the enemy has.<color=#B22222></color>
saber.Skill/Ruler_honglian_2_Description:
Reduce self to near death.
Deal Pain <sprite=1> damage.
saber.Skill/Ruler_honglian_Description:
At the start of battle, place this at the top of the deck.
Countdown: "Prayer."
On Release: Choose one of two effects to activate.

<color=#808080>Rank: C (before activation) / EX (after activation)
Type: Anti-Unit Noble Phantasm
Range: ???
Max Targets: ???
La Pucelle — the anti-unit Noble Phantasm used by Ruler, Jeanne d'Arc. A conceptual armament crystallized from her inner mental landscape. Using Saint Catherine's Sword — which Ruler never wielded in life — as a catalyst, it manifests the flames that once burned her body. Using this Noble Phantasm costs Ruler her life. She erases all existence at the cost of her own.
Its Rank is C because the sword is still sheathed — that is, its state before activation. After activation it becomes EX because its destructive power is immeasurable. These flames only harm that which she has judged must be defeated — they cannot be invoked against mere powerful foes or driven by hatred or other emotions.
These flames exist to save something. The flames unleashed for Lucy's sake — surely they too were meant to save something far greater!</color>
saber.Skill/Ruler_jiushu_Description:
Cleanse 1 random debuff.

<color=#808080>I pray to my Lord — save my people. My Lord granted me this body and this banner. Fire spreads across the land, yet I know the way to salvation lies within!</color>
saber.Skill/Ruler_lingdao_Description: <color=#808080>Could a girl who was once a village maiden have ever imagined she possessed such talent? You, who gave your life without hesitation for your homeland — what a noble and magnificent soul you are!</color>
saber.Skill/Ruler_qidao_Description:
Skip all of the enemy's actions this turn.

<color=#808080>Miracles — do they truly exist? There on the stake, I seemed to see my childhood self, the clear sky of France, and the carefree days of my youth. Jeanne d'Arc, O Saint — in the end, did God's divine revelation truly exist? My Lord! I pray to You! I entrust this body entirely to Your will! May France endure forever!</color>
saber.Skill/Ruler_qidao_Name: At the End of Pure Prayer
saber.Skill/Ruler_rongguang_Description: Healing is increased by 1 for each buff the target has.
saber.Skill/Ruler_shenming_Description:
If the target's HP is full, Stun it.
Restore HP equal to 40% of this skill's damage to all allies.
saber.Skill/Ruler_tianqi_Description:
Discard 1 skill and draw 3 skills.

<color=#808080>I heard the voice of God.
A calm voice, as though laced with pain,
bidding me to go and save the people.
A girl who could only dream of tomorrow —
for her village, for her country,
for her Lord, she chose the path of war.

Farewell, Jeanne of Domrémy.
The happiness you once dreamed of
still lingers in the skies above Domrémy.</color>
saber.Skill/Ruler_zhiyin_Description:
Randomly generate 1 non-rare skill from the target's kit, add it to hand with its Mana cost set to 0, and Exclude it.

<color=#808080>May God guide thee.</color>
saber.Skill/Saber_Excalicur_Description:
Enters Countdown: Gain 50% damage reduction and cannot act.
On release: Grant yourself "Invincible".
Ignore target's Defense and apply "Steel-Breaker".
<color=#7FFFAA>Magical Energy Release</color><color=green></color>(5): Can be released.
<color=#F0BCAF>Lonely Pilgrimage</color>: Gain a barrier equal to 30% of Max. Health.
<color=#808080>Invisible Air</color>: Apply 4 stacks of "<color=#A0AC8F>Wind Erosion</color>".
<color=#ED5C26>Sword Skill</color>: Enters Countdown: Draw 2 skills.
Does not count toward <color=#ED5C26>Sword Skill</color>.

<color=#808080>Rank: A++　Type: Anti-Fortress Noble Phantasm
<color=yellow>Excalibur
</color>This is not a man-made weapon, but a divine armament forged by the planet itself. The Noble Phantasm that stands at the pinnacle of holy swords. It is said that the true source of its great power lies in the scabbard rather than the sword, but the scabbard is said to be forever lost.</color>
saber.Skill/Saber_baoju_Description:
Gain 1 Mana.
Generate the Noble Phantasm exclusive to the selected target.
saber.Skill/Saber_baojujiefang_Description: Gain 1 Mana and generate one "<color=#F0BC1F>Noble Phantasm Release · Excalibur</color>".
saber.Skill/Saber_bihu_Description:
Deal (&a) Pain damage to yourself and generate a (&b) barrier for all other allies.

<color=#7FFFAA>Magical Energy Charge</color><color=green></color>
saber.Skill/Saber_chongzheng1_Description:
Remove overload from all allies.
<color=#ED5C26>Sword Skill</color>: Gain a &a (30% Max. Health) Barrier and draw 1 skill.
This skill does not count toward <color=#ED5C26>Sword Skill</color>.
saber.Skill/Saber_chongzheng_Description:
Remove overload and apply "Steel-Breaker".
<color=#ED5C26>Sword Skill</color>: Gain a &a (20% Max. Health) Barrier and draw 1 skill.
This skill does not count toward <color=#ED5C26>Sword Skill</color>.
saber.Skill/Saber_duangang_Description: <color=#ED5C26>Sword Skill</color>: Ignore Defense. Repeat this skill once upon kill.
saber.Skill/Saber_fengwang_Description:
Apply "Challenge".
<color=#7FFFAA>Magical Energy Release</color><color=green></color>(3): Apply "Duel".
<color=#808080>Invisible Air</color>: Apply 1 stack of "<color=#A0AC8F>Wind Erosion</color>".
<color=#808080><color=green>
saber.Skill/Saber_fengya_Description:
<color=green><color=#7FFFAA>Magical Energy Release</color></color>(2): Gain a &a (20% Max. Health) Barrier.
<color=#808080>Invisible Air</color>: Additionally apply 1 stack of "<color=#A0AC8F>Wind Erosion</color>".
<color=#808080>Invisible Air · Dispersed</color>: Apply "Challenge<color=#A0AC8F></color>".
saber.Skill/Saber_gudu_Description:
Grant all allies "Invincible".
Grant yourself "<color=#F0BCAF>Lonely Pilgrimage</color>".
saber.Skill/Saber_jiejie_Description:
Placed at the top of the deck at the start of battle.
Grant yourself "<color=#808080>Invisible Air · Dispersed</color>". If you have 2 or more stacks of "<color=#FF4500>Hero Creation</color>", grant "<color=#808080>Invisible Air</color>" instead.

<color=#808080>This Noble Phantasm is protected by powerful magecraft — it is not that the sword itself is transparent. The wind wrapped around the blade alters the refraction of light, making the sword's shape invisible.</color>
saber.Skill/Saber_lianzhan_Description:
<color=#7FFFAA>Magical Energy Release</color></color>(4): Set Mana cost to 0.
<color=#808080>Invisible Air</color>: If this skill has been in hand for more than one turn, draw this skill again (once per turn).
<color=#808080>Invisible Air · Dispersed</color>: Apply "Duel<color=#A0AC8F></color>".
<color=#ED5C26>Sword Skill</color>: Follow up based on the number of "<color=#A0AC8F>Wind Erosion</color>" stacks on the target, dealing (&a) damage per hit.
<color=#A0AC8F></color><color=#808080><color=green>
saber.Skill/Saber_lingdao_Description:
<color=green></color>Grant other allies "Fearless" and grant yourself "<color=red><color=#FF4500>Hero Creation</color></color>".

<color=green><color=#7FFFAA>Magical Energy Release</color></color>(3): Draw 2 skills.
<color=#F0BCAF>Lonely Pilgrimage</color>: Replace "<color=red><color=#FF4500>Hero Creation</color></color>" with a 20-point Barrier.

<color=#808080>My king!
Artoria possesses a natural talent for leading armies. A king who embodies integrity and selflessness. Her fairness inspired the knights to stand by her side, and gave the common people hope even in times of poverty. Her path as a ruler existed not to command a few powerful warriors, but to lead the many who were powerless.</color>
saber.Skill/Saber_lingzhou_11_Description:
Gain 2 Mana.

<color=#808080>Be filled with magical energy!</color>
saber.Skill/Saber_lingzhou_22_Description: Overheal target for 50% of their Max. Health. Mend thy wounds!
saber.Skill/Saber_lingzhou_2_Description: Overheal target for 30% of their Max. Health.
saber.Skill/Saber_lingzhou_Description:
When drawn, draw 1 additional skill.
Can only be used 3 times per battle.
Upon use, choose from 3 effects.

<color=#808080>In the name of the Command Seal, I order you——</color>
saber.Skill/Saber_ruodian1_Description:
This skill deals bonus damage equal to 10% of the target's Max. Health (max 25).
For each debuff on the target, this skill's damage is increased by 10%.

<color=#ED5C26>Sword Skill</color>: Double the damage bonus provided by each debuff.
saber.Skill/Saber_ruodian_Description:
Strike all debuffs on the target. For each debuff removed, deal additional damage. Remaining debuffs deal 2× bonus damage. Apply additional attacks when the target's HP falls below 50%.

<color=#ED5C26>Sword Skill</color>: Attack in Critical form.
saber.Skill/Saber_shanyao_Description:
Cannot be played.
Placed at the top of the deck at the start of battle.
Applies bonus effects based on the types of all skills (excluding generated skills).
When drawn, draw 1 additional skill.
Gain 1 stack of "Ascension" for each skill played. When the total across all allies exceeds 10, this skill can be played.
On play, generate "<color=#F0BC1F>Promoted Noble Phantasm · Spear of Radiance at the End</color>".
saber.Skill/Saber_shengjian_Description:
For each attack skill in hand when played, this skill's damage is increased by 10%.
If the target is killed, gain 2 Mana.<color=#00BFFF>

<color=#7FFFAA>Magical Energy Charge</color></color>
<color=#ED5C26>Sword Skill</color>: <color=red><color=#FF4500></color></color>Increase bonus damage to 15%.
saber.Skill/Saber_shengqiang_Description:
Cannot be evaded. One-hit kill!
Against Bosses, execute targets below 40% of their Max. Health.
saber.Skill/Saber_shengqiang_Name: <color=#F0BC1F>Promoted Noble Phantasm · Spear of Radiance at the End</color>
saber.Skill/Saber_xingyun1_Description:
Deal an additional &a (30% Attack Power) damage to enemies under "Taunt".

<color=#ED5C26>Sword Skill</color>: Strike as a Critical Hit.
saber.Skill/Saber_xingyun_Description:
Apply "Steel-Breaker".
<color=#ED5C26>Sword Skill</color>: Strike as a Critical Hit.
saber.Skill/Saber_zhaojia_Description:
<color=#ED5C26>Sword Skill</color>: Also apply "Parry" to yourself.
This skill does not count toward <color=#ED5C26>Sword Skill</color>.
saber.Skill/Saber_zuocheng1_Description:
Draw 2 skills<color=red><color=#FF4500></color></color> and increase Max. Mana by 1.

<color=#808080>The reason one becomes king is not because they pulled the holy sword from the stone.
Rather, it is because they were already a king
that they were able to draw the holy sword......</color>
saber.Skill/Saber_zuocheng_Description:
Draw 2 skills<color=red><color=#FF4500></color></color> and increase Max. Mana by 1.

<color=#808080>The reason one becomes king is not because they pulled the holy sword from the stone.
Rather, it is because they were already a king
that they were able to draw the holy sword......</color>
saber.Skill/ShadowPriest_baoju_Description:
Enters Countdown: Grant all allies "Feats of the God of Hades".
For each debuff on enemies, this Noble Phantasm's damage increases by 5.

<color=#808080>Charon's Noble Phantasm Projection, drawn from an empress. Beloved by the gods, graceful and supremely gifted — perhaps this is the image Charon dreams of becoming. Yet when resonating with her, how could Charon know that the other envies her in equal measure?</color>
saber.Skill/SilverStein_baoju_Description:
Enters Countdown: Grant yourself "Uri's Hunter".
This Noble Phantasm's damage is increased by 50% of the target's lost HP (max 50).

<color=#808080>Silverstein's Noble Phantasm Projection, drawn from a legendary hunter. You ask why a crossbow bolt instead of a gun? Come on — a skilled hunter doesn't care whether their weapon is a gun or a bow!</color>
saber.Skill/SilverStein_baoju_Name: <color=#00CED1>Noble Phantasm Projection · The Arrow of Conviction, Loosed</color>
saber.Skill/Sizz_baoju_Description:
Remove 1 random debuff from the target, grant them a &a (60% Healing Power) Barrier, and cleanse their overload.
If Eve's attack count is 2, gain 1 Mana.

<color=#808080>Sizz's Noble Phantasm Projection... huh? There are so many Eves!</color>
saber.Skill/Sizz_baoju_Name: <color=#FFB6C1>Noble Phantasm Projection · A Story for Someone</color>
saber.Skill/Trisha_baoju_Description:
Enters Countdown: Grant all allies "Shadow Clone".
On release: Randomly obtain one rare skill from an ally and set its cost to 0.
20% chance to instantly kill the target (excluding Bosses).

<color=#808080>Trisha's Noble Phantasm Projection, drawn from a (?) supremely skilled assassin.
"Multi-Shadow Clone Jutsu!"
                                            ——Trisha never actually said this.</color>
saber.SkillExtended/Assassin_neizang_ex_Des:
This skill's Critical Hit Chance is increased by 100%.

<color=#808080>I shall judge thee! Rend Thy Innards!</color>
saber.SkillExtended/Skillen_Assassin_1_Name:
Uncrowned Arms Mastership: This skill's Critical Hit Chance +25%. On Critical Hit, draw 1 skill.
(Enhancement limited to skills costing 2 or more Mana.)
saber.SkillExtended/Skillen_Assassin_2_Name: Assassin: Grant yourself "<color=#483D8B>Breath of the Hidden</color>".
saber.SkillExtended/Skillen_Berserker_1_Name: Rampage: For every 2% of Max. Health taken as damage, this skill's damage increases by 1%, up to a maximum of 30%.
saber.SkillExtended/Skillen_Lancer_1_Name: Pierced Heart: Armor Penetration +25% and ignore Taunt. (Attack skills only.)
saber.SkillExtended/Skillen_Lancer_2_Name: First Strike: If used immediately after drawing, draw 2 additional skills. (Limited to skills costing 2 or more Mana.)
saber.SkillExtended/Skillen_Ruler_1_Name: Purification: Can target enemy units, dealing damage equal to 150% of the heal amount.
saber.SkillExtended/Skillen_Ruler_2_Name: Heaven's Revelation: When this skill is drawn, draw 1 additional skill.
saber.SkillExtended/Skillen_Saber_1_Name: Magical Energy Transfer: For every 2 Mana Artoria possesses, this skill's Mana cost is reduced by 1.
saber.SkillKeyword/Assassin_wanzhong_Desc: Gain bonus effects based on the number of times the <color=#808080>Evening Bell</color> has been rung.
saber.SkillKeyword/Assassin_zheduan_D_Desc: Gain bonus effects while under <color=#483D8B>Breath of the Hidden</color>.
saber.SkillKeyword/Berserker_kuanghua_D_Desc: Trigger bonus effects while under "<color=#DC143C>Mad Enhancement</color>".
saber.SkillKeyword/Saber_challenge_D_Desc:
Prioritize attacking Artoria.
Removed when the target is attacked.
saber.SkillKeyword/Saber_challenge_plus_D_Desc:
Cannot attack targets other than Artoria, and takes damage each turn.
Removed when the target is attacked.
Cannot reduce Healing Gauge
saber.SkillKeyword/Saber_fangchu_Desc: </color>Consumes accumulated <color=#00BFFF>Mana</color></color></color></color> to grant attacks additional effects.
saber.SkillKeyword/Saber_jianji_D_Desc: Playing this card does not generate <color=#00BFFF>Mana</color></color>, but grants additional effects if the previous skill used was a <color=#ED5C26>Sword Skill</color></color></color>. If <color=blue><color=#00BFFF>Mana</color></color> is 0 after use, gain 1 <color=blue><color=#7FFFAA><color=#00BFFF>Mana</color>.
saber.SkillKeyword/Saber_jiejie_A_D_Desc:
Armor Penetration +15%
Critical Hit Chance +15%
Critical Damage +35%
Evade +5%
Ignore Taunt
Attacks apply 1 stack of <color=#A0AC8F></color>"<color=#A0AC8F>Wind Erosion</color>"
Aggro Slightly Reduced
saber.SkillKeyword/Saber_jiejie_B_D_Desc:
Healing Gauge Protection
Attack Power -50%
Critical Hit Chance -50%
Critical Damage -50%
Damage Taken -25%
Evade +5%
Gain 6 Barrier each turn
When taking damage, apply 1 stack of <color=#A0AC8F></color>"<color=#A0AC8F>Wind Erosion</color>" to the attacker
Aggro Greatly Increased
saber.SkillKeyword/Saber_jiejie_D_Desc: Grants additional effects when self has <color=#808080>Invisible Air</color> or <color=#808080>Invisible Air · Dispersed</color>.
saber.SkillKeyword/Saber_tianchong_Desc: Fully charges all of self's <color=#00BFFF>Mana</color></color></color>. Each point of Mana charged reduces Mana cost by 1.
saber.SkillKeyword/Saber_xingguang_D_Desc:
Attack Power +10%
Armor +5%

<color=#808080>She is the star's beloved.</color>
saber.SkillKeyword/Saber_xuanmu_D_Desc:
Attack Power -10%
Evade -5%

<color=#808080>Staring directly into a blazing starlight always comes at a price.</color></color>
saber.SkillKeyword/Saber_xunli_D_Desc: Grants additional effects when self has "<color=#F0BCAF>Lonely Pilgrimage</color>".

Ruby_Rose.Item_Equip/Crescent_Roser_Description:
At the start of each turn, randomly toggle the Swiftness property of one of your skills in hand.
<color=#919191>The blade and the barrel point the same way — don't get them mixed up.</color>
Ruby_Rose.Character/Ruby_Rose_PassiveDesc:
Speed +1.
Once per turn, after using two non-Swift skills in a single turn, one random non-Swift skill in hand gains Swiftness.
Ruby_Rose.Character/Ruby_Rose_SelectInfo: Ruby Rose, leader of Team RWBY, wields her signature weapon Crescent Rose and uses a Semblance known as Petal Burst.
Ruby_Rose.Character/Ruby_Rose_Text_Battle_Idle_0: Gotta think about how to handle this.
Ruby_Rose.Skill/S_Ruby_1r_Description: Discard all Scythe's Fury cards in hand and draw an equal number of skills. Repeat the attack once for each non-Swift skill in hand.
Ruby_Rose.Skill/S_Ruby_1_0r_Description: Repeat once for each non-Swift skill in hand.
Ruby_Rose.Skill/S_Ruby_10r_Description: Swift skills in hand lose Swiftness. Delay the target's Action Count equal to the number of skills that lost Swiftness.
Ruby_Rose.Buff/B_Ruby_11healr_Description: At the start of the turn, restore the Healing Gauge.
Ruby_Rose.Buff/B_Ruby_Restr_Description: Cannot act. Automatically removed at the start of the turn.
Ruby_Rose.Buff/B_Ruby_12_Rarer_Description: Whenever a skill is drawn, it gains Swiftness.
Ruby_Rose.Skill/S_Ruby_13r_Description: Gain 10% Evade for each Swift skill in hand.
Ruby_Rose.Skill/S_Ruby_13_0r_Description: Gain 10% Evade for each Swift skill in hand.
Ruby_Rose.Buff/B_Ruby_13atkr_Description: Attack Power is increased by an amount equal to your Evade.
Ruby_Rose.Buff/B_Ruby_13selfr_Description: Whenever you evade, use Silver Eye Burst on the enemy that attacked you.
Ruby_Rose.Skill/S_Ruby_2r_Description: Discard all Close-Range Shot cards in hand and draw an equal number of skills. Repeat the attack once for each Swift skill in hand.
Ruby_Rose.Skill/S_Ruby_2_0r_Description: Repeat once for each non-Swift skill in hand.
Ruby_Rose.Skill/S_Ruby_3r_Description: Toggle the Swiftness property of all skills in hand and remove Overload from all allies.
Ruby_Rose.Skill/S_Ruby_4r_Description: Additionally deals damage equal to half your Attack Power (&a). Can be used repeatedly. Bonus damage increases with each use this turn (&b uses remaining!).
Ruby_Rose.Skill/S_Ruby_5r_Description: Can be used repeatedly this turn. Toggle the Swiftness of the target skill; its owner gains 5% Evade. When stacked to 5, their attack skills cost 2 less Mana and gain Swiftness, Ignore Taunt, Tracking, and guaranteed Critical.
Ruby_Rose.Buff/B_Ruby_5r_Description: Upon reaching 5 stacks, remove Nurture and Bloom.
Ruby_Rose.Buff/B_Ruby_5atkr_Description: Your attack skills cost 2 less Mana and have Swiftness, Ignore Taunt, Tracking, and guaranteed Critical.
Ruby_Rose.Buff/B_Ruby_5atk_0r_Description: Your attack skills cost 2 less Mana and have Swiftness, Ignore Taunt, Tracking, and guaranteed Critical.
Ruby_Rose.Skill/S_Ruby_6r_Description: When played from hand, if this skill has Swiftness, apply "Reckless" to the target. Otherwise, remove all buffs from yourself and apply "Reckless" to yourself.
Ruby_Rose.Skill/S_Ruby_7r_Description: Reduces cost based on the owner's Overload stacks. If not Overloaded: gain a 0-cost copy after use; the copy always Critical Hits. If Overloaded: remove all Overload from the owner and draw skills equal to the number of stacks removed. Current Overload: &a.
Ruby_Rose.Skill/S_Ruby_8r_Description: When played, if this skill has Swiftness, also attack all enemies simultaneously.
Ruby_Rose.Skill/S_Ruby_9r_Description: Reduces cost equal to your Speed. If there is an enemy with 9+ Action Count, deal additional damage (&a).
Ruby_Rose.Skill/S_Ruby_Lucyr_Description: Preferentially draw two skills with different Swiftness states and swap their Swiftness.
Ruby_Rose.SkillExtended/SkillEn_Ruby_0r_Name: Grant Swiftness to a non-Swift skill.

Toujyou.Buff/B_Toujyou_0_1_Description: All attack skills in hand and drawn hereafter gain "Icy Assault." When this buff expires, replace a random half of your cards with the curse "Unbearable Headache."
Toujyou.Buff/B_Toujyou_5_Description: All of your attack skills gain Critical and Tracking.
Toujyou.Buff/B_Toujyou_D1_Description: Drank a strange potion. Defense is reduced by 15%.
Toujyou.Buff/B_Toujyou_DFugu_Description: There are so many ways to eat puffer fish~~
Toujyou.Buff/B_Toujyou_R22_Description: "Bow at the feet of this beautiful girl for the rest of your life."
Toujyou.Buff/B_Toujyou_R2_Description: A beautiful bunny girl stands before you~~
Toujyou.Buff/B_Toujyou_R3_Description:
Restore HP [25% of buff applier's Healing Power] at the start of each turn, and apply different effects depending on the current field:

<color=#EDF40A>Light Field</color>: Activates once every two turns. Draw 1 additional card.
(Next turn: <color=#EDF40A>&a</color>)

<color=#F12B00>Flame Field:</color> The field gains +0.15 Attack Power, +0.15 Healing Power, +3% Critical Hit Chance, Critical Damage, and Critical Healing (stackable). Every other turn, gain 1 turn of Healing Gauge Protection.
(Next turn: <color=#F12B00>&b</color>)

<color=#6924EB>Dark Field:</color> All members randomly apply 2 stacks of <color=#1284F6>"Combo・Minor"</color> to one of their attack skills.
Toujyou.Buff/B_Toujyou_fin1_Description:
At the start of each turn, heal all allies based on the number of <color=#F12B00>"Lucy's Curse"</color> cards recorded when this buff was applied. Each curse restores [5% Healing Power].

Number of <color=#F12B00>"Lucy's Curse"</color> cards when this buff was applied: &a
Toujyou.Buff/B_Toujyou_p_1_Description: All Attack Power, Critical Hit Chance, Critical Damage, Healing Power, and Critical Healing buffs applied to the investigator are increased by an additional 40% and recorded as field bonuses. This bonus persists when switching fields.
Toujyou.Buff/B_Toujyou_p_2_Description: Attack skills in hand gain 2 stacks of "Combo・Minor."
