Toujyou.Buff/B_Toujyou_p_3_Description: Critical Hit Chance increased by 10%. Healing Power increased by 1. When using a recovery skill, additionally Overheal the target by 1 HP.
Toujyou.Buff/B_Toujyou_p_Description:
Total damage taken by current member: <color=#F12B00>&a</color>% Max HP <color=#46a5ff>&b</color><color=#1ae35d>&c</color>

<color=#878c90>"Everything on the battlefield is under my control."</color>
Toujyou.Character/Toujyou_CampSelectWord: Speaking of food — the character "饗 (Kyou)" means to treat someone to a meal, you know.
Toujyou.Character/Toujyou_PassiveDes:
Through battles in another world, Tsukasa Tojo has gained the ability to apply different elemental fields based on the situation.
<color=#F12B00>Flame Field</color>: All positive effects applied by members' skills are increased by 40%.
<color=#6924EB>Dark Field</color>: All members' attack skills gain 2 hits of Combo・Minor.
<color=#EDF40A>Light Field</color>: All members' Critical Hit Chance is increased by 10%, Healing Power increased by 1, and recovery skills additionally Overheal the target by 1 HP.

<color=#EDF40A>Awakening:</color> After using 10 of her own skills, or when a party member has taken non-Pain damage exceeding 80% of their max HP in total, remove all of her own debuffs and add an "Awakening" card to hand. (Can trigger at most twice per battle.)
Toujyou.Character/Toujyou_SelectInfo:
An intel agent said to be fighting in another world, who ended up here after trying on a suspicious swimsuit at a shop.

Tsukasa can alter the elemental properties of the battlefield. It also seems she has a hidden trump card up her sleeve...
Toujyou.Character/Toujyou_Text_Battle_Idle_0: Thinking things over? Let the intel agent give you the answer.
Toujyou.Character/Toujyou_Text_Battle_Idle_1: As an intel agent, intel gathering is my job — I'll leave the fighting to everyone else~
Toujyou.Character/Toujyou_Text_Battle_Idle_2: Feel free to ask me about anything other than enemy intel.
Toujyou.Character/Toujyou_Text_Battle_Kill_0: Enjoy the sole of this beautiful intel agent's shoe~
Toujyou.Character/Toujyou_Text_Battle_ND_0: I need to get back to everyone... I can't fall here......
Toujyou.Character/Toujyou_Text_Battle_Start_0: For the sake of getting back to everyone......
Toujyou.Character/Toujyou_Text_Field_GetItem_0: Based on my intel agent experience, this is definitely a tr— oh wow, that's impressive.
Toujyou.Character/Toujyou_Text_Field_Idle_0: Shall we have a tea party here?
Toujyou.Character/Toujyou_Text_Field_Potion_P_0: Amane would definitely be interested in the potions here~
Toujyou.Character/Toujyou_Text_PharosLeader_1: As expected of me — I broke free from the control!
Toujyou.Character/Toujyou_Text_Witch_1: Looks like I'll have to get serious...
Toujyou.Item_Equip/Serafu_Toujyou_Description:
At the start of every two turns, generate a Barrier equal to 25% of the equipping member's max HP.

<color=#878c90>"— Pulling a weapon out of a phone? Any beautiful girl can do that."</color>
Toujyou.Item_Passive/SecretDiary_Toujyou_Descrip: Follow-up attack Critical Hit Chance increased by 50%. At the start of each turn, delete one "Lucy's Curse" skill from the deck.
Toujyou.Skill/S_T_Toujyou_1_Description: Deal 40% (&a) damage to the target. This is treated as a skill used by the skill's owner.
Toujyou.Skill/S_T_Toujyou_p2_Description: Deal 15% (&a) damage to the target. This is treated as a skill used by the skill's owner.
Toujyou.Skill/S_Toujyou_AbkuZangeki_Description:
This turn, stacks of <color=#1284F6>"Combo・Minor"</color> are doubled when triggered (cannot exceed the maximum stack count), and <color=#1284F6>"Combo・Major"</color> counts 2 additional hits (cannot exceed the maximum stack count).

While in <color=#EDF40A>"Awakening"</color> state, the sum of Critical Hit Chance and Critical Damage bonuses provided by the field is directly applied as a damage multiplier bonus to this skill (Current: &a% Attack Power), and attacks all enemies.
Toujyou.Skill/S_Toujyou_Dance_Description:
Switch to <color=#F12B00>Flame Field</color> when used.

Apply the buff <color=#1284F6>"Dance of Wishes"</color> to all allies.

Add one "Wish Come True" card to hand each turn.
Toujyou.Skill/S_Toujyou_Dance_gene_Description: Apply the positive buff "Wish Come True" to the target for 1 turn. If the target has attack skills in hand, randomly add 1 stack of <color=#1284F6>"Combo・Major"</color> to one of them.
Toujyou.Skill/S_Toujyou_FSwitch_Description: Draw 2 of your own skills first, then switch fields.
Toujyou.Skill/S_Toujyou_Final1_Description:
This skill cannot be replaced by <color=#F12B00>"Unbearable Headache."</color> It can only be used if <color=#F12B00>"Lucy's Curse"</color> has appeared during battle (including curses generated mid-battle).

This skill's healing is additionally boosted based on the number of <color=#F12B00>"Lucy's Curse"</color> cards that have appeared during battle. Each <color=#F12B00>"Lucy's Curse"</color> additionally restores [5% Healing Power] HP.

If used while in <color=#EDF40A>Light Field</color>, apply the buff <color=#2df974>Gathered Hope</color> to yourself for 1 turn, then optionally switch fields.

Number of <color=#F12B00>"Lucy's Curse"</color> cards that have appeared in this battle: &b
Toujyou.Skill/S_Toujyou_Fugukiller_Description:
Apply "Puffer Fish Toxin" to the target.

<color=#6924EB>Dark Field:</color> After using this skill this turn, it can be used again. (Generated copies cannot be reused.)

While in <color=#EDF40A>"Awakening"</color> state, targets all enemies.

<color=#878c90>--- The precise technique comes from the guidance of a certain killer.</color>
Toujyou.Skill/S_Toujyou_Fugukiller_Name: Fillet a Puffer Fish? I Want to Try!
Toujyou.Skill/S_Toujyou_Fugukiller_view_Descript:
Apply "Puffer Fish Toxin" to the target.

<color=#6924EB>Dark Field:</color> After using this skill this turn, it can be used again. (Generated copies cannot be reused.)

While in <color=#EDF40A>"Awakening"</color> state, targets all enemies.

<color=#878c90>--- The precise technique comes from the guidance of a certain killer.</color>
Toujyou.Skill/S_Toujyou_Fugukiller_view_Name: Fillet a Puffer Fish? I Want to Try! (Preview)
Toujyou.Skill/S_Toujyou_FullEnhance_view_Descrip:
<color=#F12B00>Flame Field:</color> The field gains amplified effects for all members: Attack Power +0.5, Healing Power +0.5, Critical Hit Chance/Critical Damage/Critical Healing +4%. Generate a Barrier equal to 25% of the user's max HP.

<color=#6924EB>Dark Field:</color> Targets attack skills in hand. Add 3 stacks of <color=#1284F6>"Combo・Major"</color>, gain Ignore Taunt, and draw 1 card.

<color=#EDF40A>Light Field:</color> Heal a single ally [120% Healing Power], then optionally switch fields. If you choose to keep the <color=#EDF40A>Light Field</color>, gain 1 potion.
Toujyou.Skill/S_Toujyou_Furea_Description:
Apply additional effects based on the current field, then switch fields after attacking. If the Flame Field is kept, apply "Taunt" to all enemies.

<color=#F12B00>Flame Field:</color> Additionally boost field support effects based on the number of enemies: gain +0.15 Attack Power, +0.15 Healing Power, +3% Critical Hit Chance, Critical Damage, and Critical Healing. (Counts up to 3 enemies.)
Toujyou.Skill/S_Toujyou_Lucy1_Description: Draw 2 cards. Randomly add 1 stack of <color=#1284F6>"Combo・Major"</color> to one attack skill. While Tsukasa is alive, also add one "Field! Switch!" card to hand. (Generated skills cost +1 Mana.)
Toujyou.Skill/S_Toujyou_MagicPtn_Description:
<color=#EDF40A>Light Field:</color> At a chance equal to half your current Critical Hit Chance (&a%), gain 1 random potion, then randomly trigger one of the following effects:
・Consume 1 random potion. Optionally switch fields; if <color=#EDF40A>Light Field</color> is kept, add this card to hand again and gain Exclude.
・Consume 1 random potion, then chain heal (50%).
・Gain 1 random potion, stun the target for 1 turn, and reduce their Defense by 15%.

<color=#878c90>"--- It's NOT natural!! "</color>
Toujyou.Skill/S_Toujyou_Mangecyo_Description:
Apply 3 stacks of <color=#1284F6>"Combo・Minor"</color> to all attack skills in hand, and apply 1 stack of <color=#b618fb>"Bunny Girl Domination"</color> debuff.

<color=#EDF40A>"Awakening"</color>: Instead apply 2 stacks of <color=#1284F6>"Combo・Major"</color>, and apply an irresistible, permanent <color=#b618fb>"Bunny Girl Domination"</color> debuff to all enemies.

Afterward, boost field values based on the total number of combo stacks in hand. Each Combo・Minor stack grants +0.05 Attack, +0.5% Critical Hit Chance, +0.5% Critical Damage, +0.5% Critical Healing, and +0.05 Healing Power.
Toujyou.Skill/S_Toujyou_Nabicall_Description:
AP cost is reduced by 1 when this card is a Fixed Ability.
Adds a different card to hand based on the current field. The generated card has Exclude and costs +1 Mana. While in <color=#EDF40A>"Awakening"</color> state, the generated skill costs -1 Mana instead.
<color=#EDF40A>Light Field: "Flash Wave"</color>

<color=#6924EB>Dark Field: "Fillet a Puffer Fish? I Want to Try!"</color>

<color=#F12B00>Flame Field: "Rest in the Shade"</color>
Toujyou.Skill/S_Toujyou_Nabicall_Name: A Call from a Distant Star Cluster
Toujyou.Skill/S_Toujyou_P_0_2_Description: While held in hand, all of your skills cost +1 Mana, and Tsukasa gains a debuff reducing Attack Power and Healing Power by 50%. (Only one copy can be active at a time.)
Toujyou.Skill/S_Toujyou_P_0_2view_Description: While held in hand, all of your skills cost +1 Mana, and Tsukasa gains a debuff reducing Attack Power and Healing Power by 50%. (Only one copy can be active at a time.)
Toujyou.Skill/S_Toujyou_P_0_Description: Enter "Awakening" for 2 turns. Remove all debuffs from yourself. All of your skills gain "Icy Assault." Apply "Trauma" and "Taunt" to all enemies for 2 turns. "Icy Assault": All of your skills gain Swiftness and Critical.
Toujyou.Skill/S_Toujyou_P_1_Description: Apply the Flame Field buff to all members, enhancing the field's support capabilities.
Toujyou.Skill/S_Toujyou_P_2_Description: Deploy the Dark Field, granting all party members' attack skills 2 stacks of "Combo・Minor."
Toujyou.Skill/S_Toujyou_P_3_Description: Deploys a Light Field, greatly increasing the Critical Hit Chance of all allies and providing additional bonuses to all ally healing skills.
Toujyou.Skill/S_Toujyou_RestView_Description:
Switch to <color=#F12B00>Flame Field</color>, then randomly remove one debuff from each ally.
For each debuff removed, amplify the field effect, increasing Attack Power and Healing Power by 0.15, and Critical Hit Chance, Critical Damage, and Critical Healing by 3%.
Toujyou.Skill/S_Toujyou_Rest_Description:
Switch to <color=#F12B00>Flame Field</color>, then randomly remove one debuff from each ally.
For each debuff removed, amplify the field effect, increasing Attack Power and Healing Power by 0.15, and Critical Hit Chance, Critical Damage, and Critical Healing by 2% (activates at least once).
Toujyou.Skill/S_Toujyou_SKkadoview_Description: <color=#6924EB>Dark Field:</color> Randomly select a skill that already has <color=#1284F6>「Combo・Minor」</color> or <color=#1284F6>「Combo・Major」</color>. Preferentially add 2 stacks to <color=#1284F6>「Combo・Major」</color>; if only <color=#1284F6>「Combo・Minor」</color> is present, add 3 stacks instead.
Toujyou.Skill/S_Toujyou_Shinkiro_Description:
Placed on top of the deck at the start.
Protect all allies' Healing Gauge for 1 turn and apply "Mirage" to all members. Then switch to <color=#EDF40A>Light Field</color>.
Toujyou.Skill/S_Toujyou_SkKado_Description:
Switch to <color=#EDF40A>Light Field</color>, then trigger an effect based on the previous field:

<color=#F12B00>Flame Field</color>: All field amplification effects additionally gain Attack Power and Healing Power +0.3, and Critical Hit Chance, Critical Damage, and Critical Healing +4%.

<color=#6924EB>Dark Field:</color> Randomly select a skill that already has <color=#1284F6>「Combo・Minor」</color> or <color=#1284F6>「Combo・Major」</color>. Preferentially add 2 stacks to <color=#1284F6>「Combo・Major」</color>; if only <color=#1284F6>「Combo・Minor」</color> is present, add 3 stacks instead.
Toujyou.Skill/S_Toujyou_Sumairu_Description: Switch fields. If now in <color=#6924EB>Dark Field:</color> add one stack of <color=#1284F6>「Combo・Minor」</color> and one stack of <color=#1284F6>「Combo・Major」</color> to a random attack skill of the target.<color=#6924EB></color><color=#1284F6></color>

Toujyou.SkillExtended/EN_Toujyou_2_Name: Stance Shift: Gain a Barrier equal to 20% of Max. Health when using a skill.
Toujyou.SkillExtended/Ext_Toujyou_1_Des:
After this skill attacks, deal additional hits to the enemy based on the number of stacks, each dealing 40% damage. Then remove this buff.

Toujyou.SkillKeyword/KeyWord_Toujyou_Bani_Desc: Defense is reduced by 30% for 1 turn.
Toujyou.SkillKeyword/KeyWord_Toujyou_F1B_Desc: At the start of each turn, heal all allies based on the number of <color=#F12B00>「Lucy's Curse」</color> stacks recorded when this buff was applied. Each curse provides [5% Healing Power].
Toujyou.SkillKeyword/KeyWord_Toujyou_FireField_D: All Attack Power, Critical Hit Chance, Critical Damage, Healing Power, and Critical Healing increases applied to investigators are boosted by an additional 40%, and are recorded in the field buff. This buff is not lost when switching fields.
Toujyou.SkillKeyword/KeyWord_Toujyou_HikariField: Critical Hit Chance increased by 10%, Healing Power increased by 1. Each time a healing skill is used, the target receives 1 additional point of Overheal.
Toujyou.SkillKeyword/KeyWord_Toujyou_Kakusei_Des: While in the Awakening state, all of your attack skills gain "Ice-Cold Offensive". Upon ending, randomly replace half of your skills with "Unbearable Headache" (<color=#F12B00>"Lucy's Curse" skills</color>).
Toujyou.SkillKeyword/KeyWord_Toujyou_RengekiB_De: Deal 40% additional damage to the target per stack. Each hit from a stack counts as the skill owner casting a skill.
Toujyou.SkillKeyword/KeyWord_Toujyou_RengekiS_De: Deal 15% additional damage to the target per stack. Each hit from a stack counts as the skill owner casting a skill.
Toujyou.SkillKeyword/KeyWord_Toujyou_yamiField_D: Attack skills in hand gain two stacks of <color=#1284F6>「Combo・Minor」</color>.
Toujyou.Dialogue/FS_Toujyou_Gift_Normal/001:
*Tsukasa Tojo
Eh? Is this for me?
Toujyou.Dialogue/FS_Toujyou_Gift_Normal/003:
*Tsukasa Tojo
Unlike a certain gaming nerd, you actually give gifts. Thank you, Lucy!
Toujyou.Dialogue/FS_Toujyou_Gift_Cake/001:
*Tsukasa Tojo
Wow, I absolutely love cake! Did you know some cakes are incredibly expensive? Apparently, the Dallas Red Wedding Cake was adorned with jewelry worth over one million dollars,
with the cake's curves decorated in silver dust, silver "lustre" dust frosting, and 1,200 carats of diamonds.
Toujyou.Dialogue/FS_Toujyou_Gift_Cake/002:
*Tsukasa Tojo
I'd love to eat a cake like that someday.
Toujyou.Dialogue/FS_Toujyou_Gift_Cake/003:
*Tsukasa Tojo
Right, you can't eat the jewels though. Ahh, what a shame.
Toujyou.Dialogue/FS_Toujyou_Gift_Cake/004:
*Tsukasa Tojo
Thank you for the cake, Lucy! Let's all eat it together~
Toujyou.Dialogue/FS_Toujyou_Gift_Doll/001:
*Tsukasa Tojo
Aw~ What an adorable plushie, thank you!
Toujyou.Dialogue/FS_Toujyou_Gift_Doll/002:
*Tsukasa Tojo
But didn't we just beat a few of these things? So the Ark sells plushies of them too, huh.
Toujyou.Dialogue/FS_Toujyou_Gift_Doll/003:
*Tsukasa Tojo
Still, three hedgehogs stacked on top of each other is pretty funny. I wonder if there are other hedgehog types.
Toujyou.Dialogue/FS_Toujyou_Drink_Tea/001:
*Tsukasa Tojo
Black tea... this aroma reminds me of Ceylon tea…
Toujyou.Dialogue/FS_Toujyou_Drink_Tea/002:
*Tsukasa Tojo
Though it's very popular in England, Ceylon tea is actually a general term for teas historically produced in Sri Lanka.
At one point, Sri Lanka accounted for 10% of the world's total tea production. Ceylon tea typically has a bright citrusy aroma — I highly recommend it!
Toujyou.Dialogue/FS_Toujyou_Drink_Tea/003:
*Tsukasa Tojo
Can we get some in the Ark? Wonderful! Let's all have afternoon tea together when we get back~
Toujyou.Dialogue/FS_Toujyou_Gift_Mic/001:
*Tsukasa Tojo
A microphone, huh... Now that you mention it, we were actually forming a band back home.
Toujyou.Dialogue/FS_Toujyou_Gift_Mic/002:
*Tsukasa Tojo
It's true! And we even have two lead vocalists…
Toujyou.Dialogue/FS_Toujyou_Gift_Mic/003:
*Tsukasa Tojo
I really want to get back home and perform a LIVE with everyone again. Let's do our best so we can get back sooner, Lucy!
Toujyou.Dialogue/FS_Toujyou_Lv1/001: Miss Tojo, I heard you came from a unit in another world — something like... the Seraph unit?
Toujyou.Dialogue/FS_Toujyou_Lv1/002:
*Tsukasa Tojo
Yes! Back in our world, humanity is under attack from monsters called Cancer. We're facing a massive crisis.
Toujyou.Dialogue/FS_Toujyou_Lv1/003:
*Tsukasa Tojo
My squadmates and I are part of a Seraph unit, specifically tasked with fighting Cancer.
Toujyou.Dialogue/FS_Toujyou_Lv1/004:
*Tsukasa Tojo
But I tried on a suspicious swimsuit at a shop, and somehow ended up in this world.
Toujyou.Dialogue/FS_Toujyou_Lv1/005:
*Tsukasa Tojo
This has happened to me a few times before, so I'm used to it~
Toujyou.Dialogue/FS_Toujyou_Lv1/006: (She knowingly tried it on anyway... that's such a wild thing to do. Better not to dig too deep into it…)
Toujyou.Dialogue/FS_Toujyou_Lv1/007: I heard Miss Tojo serves as the intelligence officer back in her unit. You must be incredibly sharp.
Toujyou.Dialogue/FS_Toujyou_Lv1/008:
*Tsukasa Tojo
But of course! I am an intel agent, after all. Anything related to the battlefield — I know it all!
Toujyou.Dialogue/FS_Toujyou_Lv1/009:
*Tsukasa Tojo
Feel free to ask me anything~
Toujyou.Dialogue/FS_Toujyou_Lv1/010: But didn't Miss Tojo almost get lost in the forest earlier... and misjudge the direction the enemies were coming from?
Toujyou.Dialogue/FS_Toujyou_Lv1/011:
*Tsukasa Tojo
You can also ask me about how to make a Cornish pasty~
Toujyou.Dialogue/FS_Toujyou_Lv1/012: (Weren't we just talking about combat??) A Cor... what even is a pasty?
Toujyou.Dialogue/FS_Toujyou_Lv2/001:
*Tsukasa Tojo
Lucy, did you know? Tea, sandwiches, cake, and sweets are the essentials of a proper afternoon tea!
Toujyou.Dialogue/FS_Toujyou_Lv2/002:
*Tsukasa Tojo
The tea must be black tea. The most classic sandwich fillings are cucumber, cheese, Scottish smoked salmon, ham with yellow mustard,
and the most iconic sweet is the scone…
Toujyou.Dialogue/FS_Toujyou_Lv2/003: Miss Tojo, you know quite a lot about things outside of combat, don't you.
Toujyou.Dialogue/FS_Toujyou_Lv2/004:
*Tsukasa Tojo
I am an intel agent, after all~ People are always telling me how much I know.
Toujyou.Dialogue/FS_Toujyou_Lv2/005:
(Shouldn't the focus be on combat intel…)
So, what are Miss Tojo's squadmates like?
Toujyou.Dialogue/FS_Toujyou_Lv2/006:
*Tsukasa Tojo
Ah, they're all such an interesting bunch!
Toujyou.Dialogue/FS_Toujyou_Lv2/007:
*Tsukasa Tojo
There's a genius singer who always sizes everyone up with just one eye, a hacker girl with glasses who talks in her sleep,
a former naval captain who can't swim, and a sweet girl with a split personality who occasionally tries to kill me — <color=#6924EB>(*Note from the author: Only Tsukasa thinks this.)</color>
Toujyou.Dialogue/FS_Toujyou_Lv2/008:
Is this a comedy troupe?!
Apart from the girl with the split personality, none of them sound like soldiers at all — wait, no! Having a squadmate who keeps trying to kill you is way too dangerous!
Toujyou.Dialogue/FS_Toujyou_Lv2/009:
*Tsukasa Tojo
Ehh, Lucy, are you the straight-man type?? That's impressive!
Toujyou.Dialogue/FS_Toujyou_Lv2/010: I'm not! I just couldn't help it!
Toujyou.Dialogue/FS_Toujyou_Lv2/012:
*Tsukasa Tojo
Even though she tries to go after me sometimes, she's actually really kind in everyday life.
Toujyou.Dialogue/FS_Toujyou_Lv2/013:
*Tsukasa Tojo
Just the other day she said she wanted to…
Toujyou.Dialogue/FS_Toujyou_Lv2/014:
*Tsukasa Tojo
To… to entrust herself to me… (quietly)
Toujyou.Dialogue/FS_Toujyou_Lv2/015: (Miss Tojo's squadmate sounds like a good person at heart…)
Toujyou.Dialogue/FS_Toujyou_Lv2/016:
*Tsukasa Tojo
Nevermind, nevermind! Let's keep doing our best together, Lucy!
Toujyou.Dialogue/FS_Toujyou_Lv3/001: Come to think of it, Miss Tojo can be really reliable in battle sometimes. It's like she becomes a completely different person.
Toujyou.Dialogue/FS_Toujyou_Lv3/002:
*Tsukasa Tojo
I think I can tell you about it now…
Toujyou.Dialogue/FS_Toujyou_Lv3/003:
*Tsukasa Tojo
I'm able to Awaken during battle, and it seems to let me reclaim power that had been sealed away.
Toujyou.Dialogue/FS_Toujyou_Lv3/004: Huh? Then why not stay Awakened all the time? It looks so cool…
Toujyou.Dialogue/FS_Toujyou_Lv3/006:
*Tsukasa Tojo
I suppose I just want to keep being who I am now, as much as I can.
Toujyou.Dialogue/FS_Toujyou_Lv3/007:
*Tsukasa Tojo
The Awakened me is the me of the past — someone who went through a great deal of pain.
But thanks to a certain turning point, I became who I am today.
Toujyou.Dialogue/FS_Toujyou_Lv3/008:
*Tsukasa Tojo
After remembering the truth of what happened, I did wonder for a while whether I had any right to keep living with such a carefree attitude…
Toujyou.Dialogue/FS_Toujyou_Lv3/009:
*Tsukasa Tojo
But it was my past self who made that choice. I want to trust in myself…
Toujyou.Dialogue/FS_Toujyou_Lv3/010:
*Tsukasa Tojo
Also, my head hurts terribly after Awakening, so I try not to use it unless it's absolutely necessary.
Toujyou.Dialogue/FS_Toujyou_Lv3/011: I see. Even so, I'm sure Miss Tojo would give everything for her teammates without hesitation back in her own world, even if it means getting hurt.
Toujyou.Dialogue/FS_Toujyou_Lv3/012:
*Tsukasa Tojo (Awakened)
But of course! We're going to be together for the rest of our lives.
Toujyou.Dialogue/FS_Toujyou_Lv3/013:
*Tsukasa Tojo (Awakened)
Alright, I've rested enough. She's waiting for me — time to wrap things up and head back.
Toujyou.Dialogue/FS_Toujyou_Lv3/014: Don't Awaken at a time like this! Won't your head hurt!
Toujyou.Skill/S_Toujyou_FullEnhance_State_1: <color=#F12B00>Flame Field:</color> All members' field gains an amplification effect: Attack Power and Healing Power +0.5, Critical Hit Chance, Critical Damage, and Critical Healing +4%.
Toujyou.Skill/S_Toujyou_FullEnhance_State_2: <color=#6924EB>Dark Field:</color> Target an attack skill in hand, add 2 <color=#1284F6>「Combo・Major」</color>, gain Ignore Taunt, and draw 1 card.
Toujyou.Skill/S_Toujyou_FullEnhance_State_3: <color=#EDF40A>Light Field:</color> Heal a single ally for 120% (&a). Afterward, choose to switch fields. If the Light Field is kept, gain 1 potion.
Toujyou.Skill/S_Toujyou_RenGeki_1_state: <color=#1284F6>「Combo・Major」</color>: Can only be attached to attack skills. After the attack skill is used, performs a follow-up attack against the enemy at 40% power per buff stack. These follow-up attacks are treated as the attacker's skill.
Toujyou.Skill/S_Toujyou_State_0: This skill's effect varies depending on the active field. Press Shift to view detailed information.

AkiyamaMizuki.Buff/B_Mizuki_0_Description: Each time healing is received, Overheal self for (stack count) HP.
AkiyamaMizuki.Buff/B_Mizuki_1_Description: All damage received becomes 0. All healing received becomes 0.
AkiyamaMizuki.Buff/B_Mizuki_5_1_Description: Removed when HP reaches 0 or below. Chain-heal self for &a HP <color=#FF7A33>(80% of applier's Healing Power)</color>.
AkiyamaMizuki.Buff/B_Mizuki_6_1_Description: At the start of the turn, Overheal self for 1 HP.
AkiyamaMizuki.Buff/B_Mizuki_8_1_Description: ...... Mizuki's Healing Power is increased while in the "?" state.
AkiyamaMizuki.Buff/B_Mizuki_R0_0_Description:
What's with that look? That look, I knew it...
なにその目 やっぱその目
AkiyamaMizuki.Buff/B_Mizuki_R0_1_Description:
What's with that look? That look, I knew it...
なにその目 やっぱその目
AkiyamaMizuki.Buff/B_Mizuki_R2_0_Description: Prioritized as the attack target of the "Malleus Maleficarum." Salvation If only you could stay here, if only you would never leave me... ここに居てくれるなら 离さず居られたら
AkiyamaMizuki.Buff/B_Mizuki_R2_1_Description: Immediately gain 30 gold. Pouring every effort into not letting slip the heart that longs to yield... 従いたい心根を吐き出さぬように込めて
AkiyamaMizuki.Buff/B_Mizuki_R2_2_Description: Saved by the feeling of being known by no one.
AkiyamaMizuki.Character/Mizuki_PassiveDes:
<color=#DDAACC>"I like cute things, you know ♪"</color>
When receiving non-Pain damage, chain-heal a random ally for (30% of Mizuki's Healing Power).
While in the "?" state, chain-heals also trigger when receiving Pain damage.

<color=#884499>Path of Thorns</color>
When receiving Pain damage, gain 1 stack of "Secret." Upon reaching 8 stacks, transform into the "?" state.
Mizuki in the "?" state gains: +1 Healing Power; all of her own skills in hand are discarded and replaced with "........"

<color=#919191>- This passive takes effect from level 1. </color>
AkiyamaMizuki.Character/Mizuki_SelectInfo:
Video creator for "25-ji, Nightcord de."
Although worried about Mafuyu's increasingly strained relationship with her mother, Mizuki also feels powerless due to being unable to face their own secret.
Through this experience, however, they realize what can be gained through running away, and tells Mafuyu that "it's okay to run away."

Mizuki's skill multipliers are low, but they support the party with a variety of buffs and skill effects.
AkiyamaMizuki.Skill/S_Mizuki_0_Description: <color=#DDAACC>"I think... it's okay to just stay as I am, being myself."</color>
AkiyamaMizuki.Skill/S_Mizuki_1_Description: Deal &a Pain damage to the target (70% of Healing Power). I think this would suit Rin ♪
AkiyamaMizuki.Skill/S_Mizuki_2_Description: ......Is it okay, as long as I like it?
AkiyamaMizuki.Skill/S_Mizuki_3_Description: Draw 1 skill (prioritizing the target's). Mafuyu, did you see my message?
AkiyamaMizuki.Skill/S_Mizuki_3_Name: I Want to Tell You Myself
AkiyamaMizuki.Skill/S_Mizuki_5_Description: Deal &a Pain damage to self (20% of Healing Power). But... I...
AkiyamaMizuki.Skill/S_Mizuki_5_Name: The One Who Gave Me Courage
AkiyamaMizuki.Skill/S_Mizuki_6_Description: All allies except self gain the buff "Overheal 1 HP per turn" for 3 turns. Self and all enemies gain "&a damage per turn (10% of Healing Power)" for 3 turns. I am the rain, the rain that falls across the world.
AkiyamaMizuki.Skill/S_Mizuki_7_Description: Deal &a Pain damage to self (30% of Healing Power). When used by Mizuki, this damage causes "Amia"'s chain-heal to trigger 2 additional times. I hope so...
AkiyamaMizuki.Skill/S_Mizuki_7_Name: In the Gap Between Wishes and Reality
AkiyamaMizuki.Skill/S_Mizuki_8_Description: Deal &a bonus damage (50% of Healing Power). Deal &b Pain damage to self (35% of Healing Power). Gain &c stacks of "Secret" (equal to the number of surviving allies excluding self). All surviving allies except self gain "Doubt." I've always been so good at this...
AkiyamaMizuki.Skill/S_Mizuki_9_Description: Deal &a Pain damage to self (30% of Healing Power) and gain 2 stacks of "Secret." Chain-heal self for &b HP and deal &b damage. (Base value is (100% of Healing Power); the lower your current HP, the weaker the effect — but reaches maximum below 33% or at 100% HP.) Why am I so alone...
AkiyamaMizuki.Skill/S_Mizuki_D_Description: Draw 2 skills (prioritizing the target's). ......Yeah, I had a great time.
AkiyamaMizuki.Skill/S_Mizuki_P_Description: Deal &a bonus damage (80% of Healing Power). Draw 1 skill. ...... ...... ...... ......ah... ......ah... ...... ...... ......
AkiyamaMizuki.Skill/S_Mizuki_R0_Description: Deal &a bonus damage (40% of Healing Power). Chain-heal every ally for &b HP (60% of Healing Power). Grant all allies except self "Healing Received +30%" for 6 turns. Blooming like a monster's flower
AkiyamaMizuki.Skill/S_Mizuki_R1_Description: When this skill is learned, "Amia"'s healing in the "?" state becomes (50% of Healing Power). At the start of battle, place this card on top of the deck. Enter the "?" state. ...... ...... ...... ......ah... ......ah... ...... ...... ......
AkiyamaMizuki.Skill/S_Mizuki_R2_1_Description: While "The Witch" is present, can only target "The Witch." Deal bonus damage to "The Witch" equal to 40% of their maximum HP. (If the target is a Boss, capped at self level x 15.) Latin: The Hammer of Witches.
AkiyamaMizuki.Skill/S_Mizuki_R2_Description: Yes, in the beginning it was such a simple wish...

Mari.Skill/S_Candle_1_Description: Gain a Candle Barrier equal to 30% of Max. Health (&a).
Mari.Skill/S_Candle_10_Description: Gain a Candle Barrier equal to 20% of Max. Health (&a).
Mari.Skill/S_Candle_2_Description: Gain a Candle Barrier equal to 50% of Max. Health (&a).
Mari.Skill/S_Candle_3_Description: Gain a Candle Barrier equal to 50% of Max. Health (&a).
Mari.Skill/S_Candle_4_Description: Gain a Candle Barrier equal to 30% of Max. Health (&a).
Mari.Skill/S_Candle_5_Description: Grant all other allies 1 stack of "Candle Protection".
Mari.Skill/S_Candle_6_Description:
While the Candle Barrier is active, remove a random debuff from yourself.
The removed debuff is applied to all enemies.
Mari.Skill/S_Candle_7_Description: Gain a Candle Barrier equal to 25% of Max. Health (&a). All allies gain Healing Gauge Protection for 1 turn.
Mari.Skill/S_Candle_8_Description:
Can be used while unable to act.
Remove all debuffs from the target and transfer them to yourself.
If the user is an ally, transferred debuffs are instead applied via Candle.
Mari.Skill/S_Candle_9_Description:
Can be used while unable to act. Cannot target other allies.
When targeting yourself, remove all debuffs. Generate a Candle Barrier based on the type of debuffs removed, their corresponding Debuff Resist, and your Max. Health.
(Corresponding &user Debuff Resist * Max. Health)
When targeting an enemy, deal equivalent Pain damage instead.
Mari.Skill/S_Candle_Lucy_Description:
Draw two skills.
If the Candle Barrier is active, apply a random debuff the target currently has, in its current state, to all enemies.
Mari.Skill/S_Candle_R1_Description: After activation, the condition for applying debuffs in Mirage: Candle's Shadow changes from "Candle" to all allies, and the target for synchronized debuff application changes to all enemies. Debuffs applied this way cannot be resisted.
Mari.Skill/S_Candle_R2_Description:
Gain a Candle Barrier equal to 30% of Max. Health (&a).
Upon activation, for each debuff you are afflicted with, the Candle Barrier gains additional points equal to the current Candle level (&b).
Current total: &c
Mari.Skill/S_Candle_R3_Description:
After activation, Candle debuffs gain "Enchantment Level" enhancements.
Candle Thorns Ⅲ: The damage coefficient changes from Attack Power to Max. Health.
Candle Protection Ⅳ: Also generates a Candle Barrier equal to 20% of your Max. Health.
Candle Draw Ⅴ: Success rate: 150%.
Candle Mend Ⅰ: No longer consumes buff stacks upon triggering.
Candle Addon Ⅱ: Upon near-death, remove and heal HP equal to half the base damage.
Mari.SkillExtended/Ex_Candle_1_Name: Gain a Candle Barrier equal to 30% of damage dealt.
Mari.SkillExtended/Ex_Candle_2_Name: Gain 3 points of Candle Barrier for each debuff stack the target has.
Mari.Buff/B_Candle_1_Description:
When the Candle Barrier is attacked, the attacker takes damage equal to &user's Pain Resist * Attack Power (&a).
If that attack destroys the Candle Barrier, the attacker takes that damage a second time.| 
    <color=#919191>Ⅲ</color>
The damage coefficient changes from Attack Power to Max. Health.
Mari.Buff/B_Candle_10_Description:
On hit, apply 1 stack of "Flame Addon" debuff (<sprite=1>&a%) to the target.
Reduces by 1 stack upon successful application.
Mari.Buff/B_Candle_10_0_Description:
This debuff's Pain damage is 10% of the user's Maximum Health.
When an attack lands, apply one stack of "Flame Ignition" debuff (<sprite=1>&a%) to one target.
When receiving Pain damage from the "Flame Ignition" debuff, generate a Candlefire Barrier equal to the number of Candlelight Ignition debuff stacks.
Dispels after receiving healing.|
    <color=#919191>Ⅱ</color>
On near-death, dispels and heals HP equal to half of base damage.
Mari.Buff/B_Candle_2_Description: While the Candle Barrier is active, when attacked, there is a <sprite=2>&a% chance (60% + &user <sprite=1>Resist%) to inflict Stun on the attacking enemy.
Mari.Buff/B_Candle_2_0_Description: Skills grant 1 additional stack of debuffs to the target. Decreases by 1 stack upon triggering.
Mari.Buff/B_Candle_3_Description: When attacked, the damage of "target enemy" skills in your hand is increased by the amount the Candle Barrier was reduced.
Mari.Buff/B_Candle_4_Description: While the Candle Barrier is active, when any debuff is applied to you, that debuff's duration is reduced by 1 turn. (Minimum 1 turn.)
Mari.Buff/B_Candle_5_S_Description:
When you enter a near-death state, consume 1 stack of a buff to generate a Candle Barrier equal to 20% of Max. Health.|
    <color=#919191>Ⅰ</color>
No longer consumes buff stacks upon triggering.
Mari.Buff/B_Candle_5_T_Description:
When entering a near-death state, or when already in a near-death state at the end of a turn, all debuffs on you are transferred to &user, and the transferred debuffs are treated as enemy-applied.
Does not apply to irremovable debuffs.|
    <color=#919191>Ⅳ</color>
Also generates a Candle Barrier equal to 20% of your Max. Health.
Mari.Buff/B_Candle_6_0_Description: At the start of the turn, gain 1 additional stack of "Mirage".
Mari.Buff/B_Candle_7_Description: When the Candle Barrier is destroyed, gain Healing Gauge Protection for 2 turns.
Mari.Buff/B_Candle_8_S_Description: For each Curse skill (&a) in your deck, Attack Power and Max. Health increase by +2%.
Mari.Buff/B_Candle_8_T_Description:
Damage taken is reduced by 10%.
When Candle has 3 or more debuff stacks, damage taken is instead reduced by 25%.
Mari.Buff/B_Candle_P_Description: When a debuff is applied to any ally other than yourself, that debuff is removed and redirected to Candle instead.
Mari.Buff/B_Candle_P_0_Description: When a debuff is applied to any ally other than yourself, that debuff is removed and redirected to Candle instead.
Mari.Buff/B_Candle_R1_Description: In Mirage: Candle's Shadow, the condition for redirecting debuffs changes from "Candle" to all allies, and the target for synchronized debuff application changes to all enemies. Debuffs applied this way cannot be resisted.
Mari.Buff/B_Candle_R2_Description:
For each debuff you are afflicted with, damage taken is reduced by 3%.
When the Candle Barrier is destroyed, the Candle Barrier increases by &a (your current level + number of debuffs) points.
Mari.Buff/B_Candle_R3_Description:
Candle Thorns Ⅲ: The damage coefficient changes from Attack Power to Max. Health.
Candle Protection Ⅳ: Also generates a Candle Barrier equal to 20% of your Max. Health.
Candle Draw Ⅴ: Success rate: 150%.
Candle Mend Ⅰ: No longer consumes buff stacks upon triggering.
Candle Addon Ⅱ: Upon near-death, remove and heal HP equal to half the base damage.
Mari.Buff/B_Candle_S_Description: A special barrier generated by exclusive skills. When the barrier takes damage, the Candle Barrier's shield value is depleted first.
Mari.Character/Candle_PassiveDes:
At the start of each turn, gain 1 stack of "Mirage": when a debuff is applied to any ally other than yourself, the debuff is redirected to Candle instead.
Candle's Reflection: When an enemy applies a debuff to Candle, that debuff is also simultaneously applied to the enemy who applied it.
This passive ability does not apply to irremovable debuffs.

Lv3: When consuming "Mirage" buff stacks, restore HP equal to 15% of Max. Health.
Mari.Character/Candle_SelectInfo:
Arbiter.
Day after day, she carries out the will of the Tribunal here. In her daily duties, she assists fishing vessels with their hunts and guards them at sea.
She was the first to discover the strange plague spreading across the ocean.
She once clashed with the investigation team, but has since joined them and is helping to trace the source of the sea plague.
Mari.Character/Candle_Text_Battle_Start_0: You will taste the full bitter fruit of your misdeeds.
Mari.Character/Candle_Text_Field_Idle_0: A gentle wind, weeping and wailing.
Mari.Character/Candle_Text_PharosLeader_0: Noble or lowly, all are equal before the law.
Mari.Buff/B_Mari_5_Description: While active, provides Defense based on the total number of buffs and debuffs held.
Mari.Buff/B_Mari_7_Description: When &Target uses a skill, apply "Devoted Encouragement" to them once at 20% healing power.
Mari.Buff/B_Mari_P_2_Description: Mystic Barrier: Can absorb Pain damage.
Mari.Buff/B_Mari_R3_Description: When healing, each instance of Maximum Health or Mystic Barrier granted by a passive ability gives 1 stack of Fan Service: all skills in hand cost 1 less Mana this turn. Lose 1 stack upon use.
Mari.Character/Mari_PassiveDesc: When using a skill that targets an ally or all allies, grant Maximum Health and Mystic Barrier based on the number of buffs and debuffs the target has, respectively.
Mari.Character/Mari_SelectInfo:
A sincere and devout girl of the Sisterhood at Trinity General School.
Her cute appearance draws people in at first glance, but many more are captivated by her calm, quiet nature and her ever-present gentle smile — students seeking her counsel never seem to stop coming. Even so, she feels she still has much to grow, and always strives to become as fine a Sister as those who came before her.
Mari.Character_Skin/MSKIN1_SkinDesc:
A Sister of the Sisterhood at Trinity General School, dressed in her gym uniform to participate in the Halo Festival.
Hearing that the tournament was held to pray for peace in Kivotos, she volunteered to serve on the executive committee — only to find the role was filled with endless conflict and trouble. Combined with her natural inability to leave others to fend for themselves, she seems to find herself drawn into one problem after another.
Mari.Character_Skin/MSKIN2_SkinDesc:
A member of the Sisterhood at Trinity General School and a member of the idol unit "Retro Seraphim." What began as idol activities to help others may, in fact, align surprisingly well with the very essence of what it means to be an idol — for Mari's wish of "as long as everyone can be happy" runs deeper than it seems.
"Actually... I've always admired idols, too."
Mari.Skill/S_Mari_1_Description: If the target has any buffs, increase all allies' Maximum Health by 10% of Healing Power for each buff.
Mari.Skill/S_Mari_2_Description: If the target has any debuffs, grant all allies Mystic Barrier equal to 10% of Healing Power for each debuff.
Mari.Skill/S_Mari_3_Description: This skill's Maximum Health effect triggered by the passive ability is doubled.
Mari.Skill/S_Mari_4_Description: When a dying ally is present in the party, grant a dying ally Mystic Barrier equal to the damage amount.
Mari.Skill/S_Mari_5_Description:
Also applies the effect to self when used.
This skill does not trigger the passive ability's effects.
Mari.Skill/S_Mari_6_Description: Draw one of the target's skills with priority.
Mari.Skill/S_Mari_7_Description: When the target uses a skill this turn, apply "Devoted Encouragement" to them once at 20% Healing Power.
Mari.Skill/S_Mari_8_Description:
Also heals self at the same time.
The Maximum Health or Mystic Barrier granted by this skill's passive ability effect is increased by 1.5x.
Mari.Skill/S_Mari_9_Description:
This skill does not trigger Mari's passive ability effects.
If the target has a buff from the passive ability's effect, this becomes an Overheal instead.
Mari.Skill/S_Mari_R1_Description:
Can be used even when unable to act.
Remove all debuffs from the target.
Mari.Skill/S_Mari_R2_Description: This skill's Maximum Health and Mystic Barrier effects triggered by the passive ability are increased by 5x.

dms.Buff/chaofeng_Description:
Forces all enemies to target you.
Removed after being attacked.
dms.Character/dms_PassiveDesc:
At the start of each turn, apply "Opening" to a random enemy.

Dismas has a habit of telling jokes that no one finds funny.
Let's hope you don't laugh.
dms.Character/dms_SelectInfo:
A wary highwayman who swore to guard the old roads he once walked.

Dismas is a versatile fighter, capable of dealing heavy damage to enemy back rows and frequently applying weakening debuffs. He excels at crushing weakened targets and finishing off low-health enemies.
dms.Character/dms_Text_MasterTarget: No way out. Hmph! Let's get this done.
dms.Character/dms_Text_Battle_Kill_0: Aim for the mark, and I never miss.
dms.Character/dms_Text_Battle_Cri_1: Didn't see that coming, did you!
dms.Character/dms_Text_Battle_Start_0: A fine pack of souls bound for hell.
dms.Character/dms_Text_Battle_Healed_0: A little blood never hurt anyone, right.
dms.Character/dms_Text_Battle_Healed_1: Together, we'll send them straight to hell.
dms.Character/dms_Text_Battle_ND_1: One hit like that is plenty.
dms.Character/dms_Text_Field_Idle_0: Once upon a time, I was just a nobody with a knife.
dms.Character/dms_Text_Field_Idle_1: Maybe what we do really does matter...
dms.Character/dms_Text_Battle_AllyND_0: Fear neither the executioner nor death!
dms.Character/dms_Text_Battle_Idle_1: Hurry up, the sun is setting.
dms.Skill/dms_lucy_Description:
Placed on top of the deck at the start of battle.
Draw two cards for each enemy present.

Dismas always spots his enemies before they spot him.
dms.Buff/Fan_ji_Description:
Counter-attack when struck.

Removed after the riposte lands.
dms.Skill/Fensui_Description: Consume "Mark" to Overheal self for 20% of Max. Health.
dms.Buff/Zui_z_buff_Description: Allies may attack this enemy ignoring Taunt.
dms.Buff/jianshou_Description: Gain 1 stack of Armor at the start of each turn.
dms.Buff/jinu_Description: If you're seeing this buff, you know which code I borrowed from.
dms.Skill/Lan_l_Description:
On hit, steal a buff from the target.
Generate 1 healing skill.
Using the generated skill applies the stolen buff to a target.
dms.Character/laobing_PassiveDesc:
Gain a skill book upon leveling up.

Clever words mean nothing to him now — he trusts only the weapon in his hand and the experience earned through hardship.
dms.Character/laobing_SelectInfo:
A seasoned veteran hardened by past regrets and unbreakable resolve. He wields his shield, warhammer, and battle cry to shatter the enemy's defenses.

Barristan is a tank who excels at absorbing and drawing damage. He protects vulnerable allies while still delivering punishing blows. Barristan can be the backbone of any team.
dms.Character/laobing_Text_MasterTarget: I walk away with a clear conscience. I have given everything I had.
dms.Character/laobing_Text_Battle_Kill_0: Beat them until they can't find north!
dms.Character/laobing_Text_Battle_Kill_1: You are not welcome in these lands!
dms.Character/laobing_Text_Battle_Cri_1: Pincer formation! Flank them both sides!
dms.Character/laobing_Text_Battle_Healed_0: Let me lead you through this!
dms.Character/laobing_Text_Battle_Healed_1: I learned this one in the trenches...
dms.Character/laobing_Text_Battle_ND_0: A pathetic excuse for an attack!
dms.Character/laobing_Text_Battle_ND_1: To hell with you — either finish me or get out!
dms.Character/laobing_Text_Field_Idle_0: Let this old dog show you a new trick, shall I?
dms.Character/laobing_Text_Field_Idle_1: You lot are far better than the ones before you.
dms.Character/laobing_Text_Field_Potion_P_0: This should be a fine brandy.
dms.Character/laobing_Text_Battle_AllyND_0: Not while I still draw breath!
dms.Character/laobing_Text_Battle_AllyND_1: You shall not break through my line!
dms.Character/laobing_Text_Battle_Idle_0: Resting on our laurels? Is this really the time?
dms.Character/laobing_Text_Battle_Idle_1: We have no time to waste here.
dms.Character/laobing_Text_PharosLeader_1: I just had the most peaceful dream.
dms.Character/laobing_Text_Field_GetItem_0: Clumsy as I am, I do enjoy tinkering with this sort of thing.
dms.Skill/laobing_chetui_Description: Overheal self for 50% of Max. Health when near death.
dms.Skill/laobing_dunji_Description: If the target has "Stun", inflict Stun.
dms.Buff/laobing_fanji_baofu_Description:
Counter-attack when struck.

Removed after the riposte lands.
dms.Skill/laobing_lucy_Description: Draw two skills and reduce their cost to 0.
dms.Skill/laobing_mengji_Description:
Remove all positive buffs from self.
Damage is increased based on the number of stacks removed.
Current damage bonus: &a.
dms.Skill/Laobing_qiangyuan_Description:
Remove a random CC debuff from the target.
Remove a random Weakening debuff from the target.
dms.Character/leper_PassiveDesc: At the start of each turn, apply 1 stack of "Blind" to self at a base chance of 60%.
dms.Character/leper_SelectInfo:
A warrior, a poet, a man ravaged by disease. His massive sword can deliver devastating ruin — or strike nothing at all.

Baldwin is a self-sufficient hero. His leprosy may interrupt his attacks, but he never falters against weakened foes.
dms.Character/leper_Text_MasterTarget: Spare the others. I am ready.
dms.Character/leper_Text_Battle_Kill_0: Blood and mud mingle as the petals fall.
dms.Character/leper_Text_Battle_Kill_1: Rain in the forest. Summer's last breath before the autumn.
dms.Character/leper_Text_Battle_Cri_0: An avalanche of force — none can withstand it!
dms.Character/leper_Text_Battle_Cri_1: The tide rises. The tide falls.
dms.Character/leper_Text_Battle_Start_0: Open the hunter's eye. Let it lead you to victory.
dms.Character/leper_Text_Battle_Healed_0: I suppose I should be grateful — to persist yet a while longer.
dms.Character/leper_Text_Battle_Healed_1: Heh. My soul still clings to life.
dms.Character/leper_Text_Battle_ND_0: Even the darkest night yields to the brightest dawn.
dms.Character/leper_Text_Battle_ND_1: Death and I are old acquaintances. I do not fear it.
dms.Character/leper_Text_Field_Idle_0: Let us savor this moment of respite.
dms.Character/leper_Text_Field_Idle_1: I had a pleasant dream, and this time…
dms.Character/leper_Text_Battle_AllyND_0: Save your death for another day — protect yourself for now.
dms.Character/leper_Text_Battle_Idle_0: The night grows deepest just before the dawn.
dms.Character/leper_Text_Battle_Idle_1: The prey stands still. Silent as a corpse. Trembling at the end.
dms.Character/leper_Text_PharosLeader_0: The traitors must be dealt with before I depart.
dms.Character/leper_Text_PharosLeader_1: I must endure the punishment others cannot.
dms.Character/leper_Text_Field_GetItem_0: Fortune is fickle, but today she smiles.
dms.Character/leper_Text_Field_GetItem_1: Silence hangs over this place, yet it was left behind.
dms.Buff/leper_fuchou_baoji_Description: Grants 1 stack of Strength at the start of the turn.
dms.Buff/leper_huimie_buff_Description: Attack Power is increased by 20% when taking damage.
dms.Skill/leper_jipo_Description:
Always hits targets afflicted with a Weakening debuff.
Ignores Defense.
dms.Skill/leper_lucy_Description:
Solemnity: Prioritize drawing 3 healing skills and reduce their cost by 1.
Shattered Reflection: Prioritize drawing 3 attack skills and reduce their cost by 1.
dms.Skill/leper_lucy_1_Description: Prioritize drawing 3 healing skills and reduce their cost by 1.
dms.Skill/leper_lucy_2_Description: Prioritize drawing 3 attack skills and reduce their cost by 1.
dms.Skill/leper_mingjian_Description: Remove 5 random stacks of Weakening debuffs from yourself.
dms.Skill/leper_piduo_Description: Always hits targets afflicted with a Weakening debuff.
dms.Skill/leper_shunpi_Description: Always hits targets afflicted with a Weakening debuff.
dms.Skill/leper_suqing_Description:
While this skill is in hand, accumulates 15 damage each time this character takes damage.
Cannot exceed &b.

(Current accumulated damage: &a)
dms.Skill/leper_zhifu_Description: Hitting a Stunned target inflicts &a% Stun.
dms.Buff/liliang_Description: Removed after a skill lands a hit.
dms.Buff/B_Miao_z_Description: Dismas is searching for a weakness.
dms.Buff/S_Miao_z_Description:
Dismas will evade the next attack.
Removed after evading.
dms.Skill/nuhou_Description: Remove Riposte, Guard, and Thorns buffs from enemies.
dms.SkillExtended/Qianghua_bibao_Name: Always Critical Hit against targets with a Weakening debuff.
dms.Skill/Shi_z_Description: On hit, generate a 0-cost Deadly Double Strike.
dms.Buff/Shi_z_d_Description: This target can be attacked while ignoring Taunt.
dms.Skill/Shou_q_Description:
Always Critical Hit against targets with a Weakening debuff.
Remove Opening to inflict &a% Stun on the target.
dms.Character/wenyi_PassiveDesc: At the end of each battle, restore 20% of maximum HP as Overheal to all allies.
dms.Character/wenyi_SelectInfo:
Paracelsus frequently employs untested medicines and bold treatment methods to heal her companions, often testing unproven remedies on herself first to verify their safety.

Paracelsus is a doctor who believes in prevention before the wound is dealt. She not only heals her allies but also inflicts extraordinary suffering on enemies using her corrosive concoctions and her blade.
dms.Character/wenyi_Text_MasterTarget: Not me! I am a learned scholar!
dms.Character/wenyi_Text_Battle_Kill_0: From a professional standpoint, I declare these wretched patients beyond all remedy.
dms.Character/wenyi_Text_Battle_Kill_1: Observe how they wither and perish!
dms.Character/wenyi_Text_Battle_Cri_1: They are flesh and blood, just like any other beast!
dms.Character/wenyi_Text_Battle_Start_0: Enemies, taste the compound I have prepared especially for you!
dms.Character/wenyi_Text_Battle_Start_1: We can cure this place's pestilence. We are the antidote.
dms.Character/wenyi_Text_Battle_Healed_1: I have cheated death once before!
dms.Character/wenyi_Text_Battle_ND_0: The breath of death lingers at the door…
dms.Character/wenyi_Text_Battle_ND_1: When the time comes, all flesh must wither.
dms.Character/wenyi_Text_Field_Idle_0: I suppose a second opinion is sometimes needed.
dms.Character/wenyi_Text_Field_Idle_1: Everything was dreadfully dull before you arrived.
dms.Character/wenyi_Text_Battle_AllyND_1: Don't you die on me! I have a method to test!
dms.Character/wenyi_Text_Battle_Idle_0: Steady, steady. We will claim this victory.
dms.Character/wenyi_Text_Battle_Idle_1: Fatigue finds us so quickly, does it…?
dms.Character/wenyi_Text_PharosLeader_0: The corpse... the corpse is rising again!
dms.Skill/wenyi_buji_Description: Heal the target for 20% of their Max. Health. Then Overheal based on the number of buffs on the target and remove those buffs. Each positive buff heals for 20% of the target's Max. Health. Each negative buff heals for 10% of the target's Max. Health.
dms.Skill/wenyi_lucy_Description:
Randomly select two effects from the following four:
Incense: Restore 2 AP.
Refreshing Poultice: Draw 2 cards.
Unknown Compound: Re-use the last skill you used.
Herbs: Restore 10 HP to all allies.
dms.Skill/wenyi_lucy_chouka_Description:
Draw 2 cards.


(It seems to lighten your body considerably.)
dms.Skill/wenyi_lucy_huilan_Description:
Restore 2 AP.

(It appears to relieve mental fatigue.)
dms.Skill/wenyi_lucy_huixue_Description:
Re-use the last skill that was used.


(It seems to have made you far too energized!)
dms.Skill/wenyi_lucy_suiji_Description:
Restore 10 HP to all allies.


(Seems to be working well.)
dms.Skill/wenyi_meifen_Description: Extend the duration of Pain and Weakening debuffs on the target by 1 turn.
dms.Skill/wenyi_siyin_Description:
Resolve all Pain debuffs on the target.
When resolving, deal up to 4 turns' worth of total damage per stack.
dms.Skill/wenyi_wenyi_baozha_Description:
If the target has "Opening", apply &b% chance of &c Blight Pain per turn and destroy "Opening".
Otherwise, apply &a% chance of &d Blight Pain per turn.

Blight lasts 3 turns.
dms.Skill/wenyi_zhandi_yiliao_Description: If the target's HP is 50% or below, Overheal the target for 25% of their Max. Health. Remove Pain debuffs from yourself and the target.
dms.Skill/Xie_e_Description: Execute units with less than 20% HP.
dms.Buff/Yunxuan_Description: Greatly delays this unit's next action.
dms.Skill/Zhi_m_Description:
On hit, generate a copy with 0 cost.
Deals &a bonus damage when the target's HP is below half.
Execute units with less than 10% HP.
dms.Buff/Zhui_z_huishou_Description:
(Based on Healing Power)
Upon defeat, generates the 'Entangle' skill.
When duration expires, adds 'Entangle' to the deck.

SuzakuinNadeshiko.Buff/B_SuzakuinNadeshiko_4_Description: Whenever this unit uses a Swiftness skill, discard the bottom skill in hand and draw a skill.
SuzakuinNadeshiko.Buff/B_SuzakuinNadeshiko_5_Description: Whenever Blade Draw is triggered, gain 6 Barrier.
SuzakuinNadeshiko.Buff/B_SuzakuinNadeshiko_9_Description: Each time a card is discarded, draw 1 skill and grant it an additional 40% multiplier. Removed after triggering twice.
SuzakuinNadeshiko.Buff/B_SuzakuinNadeshiko_R1_Description: Whenever Blade Draw is triggered, trigger it one additional time.
SuzakuinNadeshiko.Buff/B_SuzakuinNadeshiko_R2_Description: Whenever Blade Draw is triggered on the field, Damage Taken increases by 10% for this turn, up to 40%.
SuzakuinNadeshiko.Character/SuzakuinNadeshiko_PassiveDes: Up to 3 times per turn, when using a skill from hand, preferentially draw one of Suzakuin Nadeshiko's skills from the deck and discard it. If the skill does not belong to Nadeshiko, return it to the top of the deck.
SuzakuinNadeshiko.Character/SuzakuinNadeshiko_SelectInfo:
The second eldest of the Suzakuin family, who suddenly appeared in the Ark during one loop. She is searching for a way back together with her sisters. A master of the blade arts and a true battle maniac.
Beyond Blade Draw, Suzakuin Nadeshiko can unleash "Extreme Blade Draw" based on how many times Blade Draw has been triggered this turn. Rally with the swordswomen of Suzakuin and build an undefeated legend!
SuzakuinNadeshiko.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_SuzakuinNade: [B] So another family ended up falling into this world together...
[A] Well, that's just how it is!
[A] Today's mood: three phantom blades!
[B] Why do you say the same things as your sister...
[B] Isn't there another sister of yours who isn't here, Nadeshiko?
[A] Tsuguko? Yeah, she's really strong. Though I haven't seen her in a long time, even before I came here...
[B] Care to try the power of darkness?
[A] I've got my blade. That's all I need.
[B] Haha, another battle maniac? Come on, then.
[A] Oh, so Hein also loves the blade arts? Let's spar once we're back at the Ark!
[B] Time to heal you up!
[A] Great, now I can keep fighting!
[B] You're a lot more receptive than your little sister, you know.
[A] A dual-wielding swordswoman... that's rare. I think my little sister Tsubaki uses the same style.
[B] Oh, that swordswoman? She's way better than me. Your family is so strong, I feel like you don't even need me...
[A] Th-that's not true! Ilya is plenty strong too. Come on, let's spar.
[B] I just knew Momiji wouldn't be here today...
[B] Your equipment is amazing — lightweight but still has great defense.
[A] How about we ask Leryn to try making a replica?
[A] Why do you always wear that mask?
[B] What would you know? This is the style of us elites.
[A] Is Johan still looking for Alice?
[B] I'll find her... someday. At least you sisters have already reunited.
[A] Well, Tsuguko still isn't here... and honestly I'm not sure whether it'd even be a good thing if she showed up.
[B] Your physical conditioning feels like more than just being an "athlete."
[A] Ehehe, I'm a swordswoman, after all!
[B] You and your sister work really well together.
[A] Oh really? We just trained together a lot when we were little, that's all.
[B] Your blades flash back and forth and the enemy just falls — offense really is the best defense, isn't it.
[A] Ehehe~.
[B] All your move names are so cool!
[A] Right? I think so too!
[B] Such powerful spiritual force, and yet so guileless... truly a rare sight...
[A] Hmm? What are you doing, Narhan?
[A] What a cute bird, let me pet it!
[B] (Resisting) No touching!
[A] Pressel, can you see spirits?
[B] Of course. I will guide them all to rest.
[B] I used to think Selena and I were the only sisters in the Ark.
[A] We all ended up here by accident too!
[B] Your blade can... never mind, you get it.
[A] Huh? What do you mean...?
[B] Miss Nadeshiko always charges straight to the front.
[A] That's just how I've always been — back in training and in competitions too!
[B] Nadeshiko, I'm not here today.
[A] But sis, you're right here! Come on, let's spar!
[A] Tsubaki's grown up so much — am I dreaming right now?
[B] Sis, have you noticed that our eldest sister is actually younger than me right now...?
[A] Now that you mention it, that's true!
[B] It seems like we've come from different timelines. In that case, we need the power of the Shadow of Time even more.
[B] No stealth whatsoever — just charging straight in, huh.
[A] Hehe, that's just how I roll!
[A] Whoa, what an awesome move! Hey, Black Horn, let's spar! (draws blade)
[B] Quite a different personality from your sisters. Alright, come on — feel my Qi Blade Slash!
[A] How strange — it's a power completely unlike anything in our world...
[B] You'll get used to it. Both it and I will only ever be your allies.
SuzakuinNadeshiko.Skill/S_SuzakuinNadeshiko_1_Description:
When an enemy is defeated, return this card to hand.
<color=#FFB3E6>Extreme Blade Draw 2</color>: Repeat this skill &a times based on the number of Blade Draw triggers.
<color=#FFA636FF>Blade Draw</color>: Return this card to hand.
SuzakuinNadeshiko.Skill/S_SuzakuinNadeshiko_2_1_Descriptio:
<color=#FFB3E6>Extreme Blade Draw 2</color>: Choose to sequentially discard 2 attack skills from hand.
<color=#FFB3E6>Extreme Blade Draw 4</color>: Generate True Revision: Thunder Blade III.
SuzakuinNadeshiko.Skill/S_SuzakuinNadeshiko_2_2_Descriptio:
When used, repeat once with Countdown 2.
On hit, discard the bottom skill in hand.
SuzakuinNadeshiko.Skill/S_SuzakuinNadeshiko_2_Description:
<color=#FFB3E6>Extreme Blade Draw 1</color>: Generate True Revision: Thunder Blade II.
<color=#FFA636FF>Blade Draw</color>: Return this skill to hand.
SuzakuinNadeshiko.Skill/S_SuzakuinNadeshiko_3_Description:
<color=#FFB3E6>Extreme Blade Draw 4</color>: When used, remove all debuffs from self and guaranteed Critical Hit.
<color=#FFA636FF>Blade Draw</color>: Recover 2 Mana.
SuzakuinNadeshiko.Skill/S_SuzakuinNadeshiko_4_Description:
<color=#FFB3E6>Extreme Blade Draw 1</color>: Simultaneously attack all enemies sharing the same taunt status.
<color=#FFA636FF>Blade Draw</color>: Gain "Hungry Wolf Sprint" (For 3 turns, whenever this unit uses a Swiftness skill, discard the bottom skill in hand and draw a skill).
SuzakuinNadeshiko.Skill/S_SuzakuinNadeshiko_5_Description:
<color=#FFB3E6>Extreme Blade Draw 5</color>: Convert all of this unit's Barrier into a barrier wall.
<color=#FFA636FF>Blade Draw</color>: Return this skill to hand and multiply this unit's Barrier value by 1.1.
SuzakuinNadeshiko.Skill/S_SuzakuinNadeshiko_5_Name: Black Tortoise Guard Blade: Wave Breaker
SuzakuinNadeshiko.Skill/S_SuzakuinNadeshiko_6_Description:
This skill can only be used when Extreme Blade Draw is 3 or higher.
<color=#FFB3E6>Extreme Blade Draw 4</color>: Set the HP of non-boss units below 90% HP to 0.
<color=#FFB3E6>Extreme Blade Draw 7</color>: When used, restore this unit's Healing Gauge and refresh this unit's Fixed Abilities.
<color=#FFA636FF>Blade Draw</color>: Return this card to hand.
SuzakuinNadeshiko.Skill/S_SuzakuinNadeshiko_6_Name: Divine Blade Certain Kill — Soul Blade: Soul Reaper
SuzakuinNadeshiko.Skill/S_SuzakuinNadeshiko_7_Description:
<color=#FFB3E6>Extreme Blade Draw X</color>: Repeat this skill X times.
<color=#FFA636FF>Blade Draw</color>: View all skills in the deck and draw 1 of them.
SuzakuinNadeshiko.Skill/S_SuzakuinNadeshiko_8_Description: After use, immediately trigger this unit's passive effect twice (does not count toward the usage limit).
SuzakuinNadeshiko.Skill/S_SuzakuinNadeshiko_Lucy_Descripti: Preferentially draw one skill from the target's cards and discard it, then draw 2 skills.
SuzakuinNadeshiko.Skill/S_SuzakuinNadeshiko_R1_Description: <color=#919191>Dance clad in the wild words of power.</color>
SuzakuinNadeshiko.Skill/S_SuzakuinNadeshiko_R2_0_Descripti:
This skill's excess Critical Hit Chance is converted into damage multiplier at triple the rate.
Can only target units with "Crimson Retribution."
<color=#FFB3E6>Extreme Blade Draw X</color>: Cost is reduced by X.
<color=#FFB3E6>Extreme Blade Draw 9</color>: Additionally deal Pain damage equal to 15% of the enemy's Maximum Health.
<color=#FFB3E6>Extreme Blade Draw 13</color>: Exclude this skill.
<color=#FFA636FF>Blade Draw</color>: Return this skill to hand, then choose one skill in hand to discard.
SuzakuinNadeshiko.Skill/S_SuzakuinNadeshiko_R2_0_Name: Divine Heaven-Earth Command — Aizen: Wisdom King Blade
SuzakuinNadeshiko.Skill/S_SuzakuinNadeshiko_R2_Description: Generate a "Divine Heaven-Earth Command — Aizen: Wisdom King Blade."
SuzakuinNadeshiko.SkillExtended/Ex_SuzakuinNadeshiko_2_Nam: <color=#FFB3E6>Extreme Blade Draw X</color>: Multiplier increased.	X multiplied by 40%.
SuzakuinNadeshiko.SkillKeyword/K_SuzakuinNadeshiko_1_Desc: When the number of Blade Draws triggered this turn reaches X, activate a bonus effect.

gmyls.Buff/B_gmyls_0_Description:
Gains an additional stack whenever a unit dies on the field.
When an ally's HP is reduced by Pain damage, deal &b damage and remove one stack.
gmyls.Buff/B_gmyls_P_Description:
Skills deal Pain damage equal to 10% Attack Power to all enemies.
Removed at end of turn, dealing Pain damage equal to 30% Attack Power to all enemies.
gmyls.Buff/B_gmyls_R1_Description:
After taking damage, if HP would fall below 1, set it to 1 instead.
When this buff ends, immediately enter Decoy.
gmyls.Buff/B_gmyls_R2_0_Description:
Whenever an ally's HP changes, take damage equal to 30% multiplier.
If the change was caused by Pain damage, take damage equal to 90% multiplier instead.
Whenever a unit dies on the field, take damage equal to 100% multiplier.
When HP falls below 20%, immediately take damage equal to 200% multiplier and remove this buff.
gmyls.Buff/B_gmyls_R2_1_Description: When a skill is used from hand, take 3 Pain damage.
gmyls.Buff/B_gmyls_R3_0_Description:
Attacks apply 1 stack of Hunting.
The maximum stack count of Hunting is changed to 6.
gmyls.Buff/B_gmyls_ysml_Description: When a skill is used while HP is below 0, restore HP equal to 50% of Attack Power.
gmyls.Character/gmyls_CampSelectWord: If you call my fighting style crazy... I'd take that as a compliment.
gmyls.Character/gmyls_PassiveDes: Once per turn, when receiving a fatal blow, if not in Decoy state, restore all HP, cleanse all debuffs, enter Decoy state, and apply 1 stack of Hunting to all enemies.
gmyls.Character/gmyls_SelectInfo:
A "hunter" who wields a circular saw — though in this day and age, there seems to be little need for the hunt. She possesses a "Decoy" that can take her place in battle, adapting to different battlefield situations.
She calls herself the "Specter," and brings devastating destructive power and exceptional combat skill, carving a path through the Twisted Lands for the expedition with her saw.
gmyls.Character/gmyls_Text_Battle_Cri_0: I'm in a very good mood right now...!
gmyls.Character/gmyls_Text_Battle_Idle_1: Waiting is an art form too.
gmyls.Character/gmyls_Text_Battle_Kill_0: May you stay lucid even in your dreams.
gmyls.Character/gmyls_Text_Battle_ND_1: I suspect our definitions of "danger" are quite different.
gmyls.Character/gmyls_Text_Battle_Start_1: The fun is about to begin.
gmyls.Character/gmyls_Text_Field_Idle_0: Things aren't always as complicated as they seem.
gmyls.Character/gmyls_Text_PharosLeader_0: ......Listen, sovereign of all things vast, murmuring to yourself in the dark......
gmyls.Character/gmyls_Text_PharosLeader_1: It seems... I couldn't keep it under control...
gmyls.Character_Skin/gmylsSpine2_SkinDesc: Carving leaves shadows, as the coin has two sides, day and night divided. When both have come to recognize their own duality, Laurentina possesses the most complete soul — whole as two moons joined.
gmyls.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_gmyls_Accele: [A] Are you joking, sir... how could something like that exist?
gmyls.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_gmyls_Azar_D: [B] You and that Ishar-mla — do you know each other?
gmyls.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_gmyls_Blue_D: [A] Thank you. Our captain seems to have quite good taste in clothing.
gmyls.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_gmyls_Charon: [B] Black and white powers — so cool.
[A] It's really just a difference in outfit colors.
gmyls.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_gmyls_Hein_D: [B] When you go berserk, you're a completely different person from who you are now.
gmyls.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_gmyls_Huz_Di: [B] I came to heal you! Why did you switch to Decoy...
gmyls.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_gmyls_Ilya_D: [A] The only thing standing between you and greatness is confidence.
gmyls.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_gmyls_Iron_D: [B] You have your Decoy, so I guess you don't need me standing in front of you anymore...
[A] It's fine. The other investigators still need your help.
gmyls.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_gmyls_Joey_D: [A] Does a true elite need to keep up this "elite" act at all times?
[B] That's exactly what makes me elite!
gmyls.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_gmyls_Johan_: [B] A hunter, huh... you seem like you're hiding a lot beneath the surface.
gmyls.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_gmyls_Leryn_: [B] "Abyssal Hunters"? Technology so far beyond anything I can comprehend...
[A] This world has many things beyond our understanding too, doesn't it?
gmyls.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_gmyls_Lian_D: [B] Moving freely through the battlefield — you're incredibly strong.
[A] Thank you. That is the finest compliment a hunter could receive.
gmyls.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_gmyls_Miss_D: [B] Charge forward and take them all down!
gmyls.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_gmyls_Momori: [B] Switching to Decoy... it looks just like coming back from the dead. So cool.
[A] Want to learn? It's one of a hunter's techniques.
gmyls.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_gmyls_Narhan: [B] Between you and your Decoy — which one is the real you?
gmyls.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_gmyls_Pheoni: [A] Hmm, this presence... reminds me of the Lord of Fiends...
[B] I have no idea what you're talking about, but yes — this great one is indeed a divine beast.
gmyls.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_gmyls_Priest: [A] Does your god answer your prayers?
[B] Of course. I act according to His divine will.
gmyls.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_gmyls_Red_Di: [B] Is your Decoy a sister, or a puppet?
[A] Another me — in a sense, perhaps a sister too? Heh.
gmyls.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_gmyls_Silver: [B] Using your Decoy to lure monsters — now that's experience talking.
[A] That's the hunter's code of survival, isn't it.
gmyls.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_gmyls_Sizz_D: [A] Or rather — the Decoy is me.
gmyls.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_gmyls_Suzaku: [B] What incredible physical ability... this world never ceases to amaze me.
[A] I'm from another world myself, but even so — your swords and armor are quite different from Ægir's technology.
[B] What an incredible fighting style — moving across the field with your Decoy like a dance. Miss Specter, let's spar!
[A] I'd rather not waste energy on unnecessary things, but... I'll make an exception this once.
[A] You work very hard. You will surely grow very strong.
[B] Thank you. I'll keep getting stronger and catch up to my sisters.
gmyls.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_gmyls_Trisha: [B] A Decoy is the perfect cover.
gmyls.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_gmyls_hlshj_: [A] I saw you once on Rhodes Island. Interesting — when did you get your hands on that curious equipment?
[B] Circumstances led me to it. I've switched to this kind of weapon now.
gmyls.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_gmyls_ysml_D: [A] It's you... but no, in my world, you weren't like this...
[B] Is that so. I remember your kind. You should have been dead by now... Regardless, there's no swarm here. You need not treat me as an enemy.
[B] Finding the Chrono Ark — that is our shared goal.
gmyls.Skill/S_gmyls_10_Description: If this card is in the deck, lose HP equal to 50% Max HP at the start of battle and gain 20% Attack Power (2 turns).
gmyls.Skill/S_gmyls_1_Description: Deal the same amount of damage to the ally with the highest HP, then restore all of your own Healing Gauge. If the target is yourself, no damage is dealt.
gmyls.Skill/S_gmyls_2_Description:
If the enemy does not have Hunting, apply 3 additional stacks of Hunting.
If the enemy has Hunting, deal Pain damage to yourself equal to 30% Max HP.
gmyls.Skill/S_gmyls_3_Description:
If your HP percentage is higher than the target's, lose HP equal to 30% Max HP; otherwise, deal additional Pain damage equal to 40% Attack Power.
Apply Pursuit 3 times (40% multiplier) to the two enemies adjacent to the selected target, and apply Hunting.
gmyls.Skill/S_gmyls_4_Description: After use, return to hand and take Pain damage equal to 50% Max HP.
gmyls.Skill/S_gmyls_5_Description:
Deal additional damage to the enemy equal to 300% of your lost HP.
If this kills the enemy, take Pain damage equal to 30% Max HP.
gmyls.Skill/S_gmyls_6_Description:
Deal Pain damage equal to 10% Attack Power to all units.
<color=#FFA636FF>Decoy</color>: Deal an additional 100% Pain damage to all enemies.
gmyls.Skill/S_gmyls_7_Description:
Based on the number of Hunt Mark stacks on the target, deal 2 Pain damage to yourself that many additional times.
<color=#FFA636FF>Decoy</color>: Deal 150% Pain damage to the target.
gmyls.Skill/S_gmyls_8_Description:
Choose a skill in your hand and generate 2 copies of it.
Cannot choose Rare skills or Lucy's skills.
<color=#FFA636FF>Decoy</color>: Deal Pain damage equal to 30% multiplier to a random enemy a number of times equal to the chosen skill's cost.
gmyls.Skill/S_gmyls_9_Description: Immediately remove the Decoy state once and refresh the number of passive uses for this turn.
gmyls.Skill/S_gmyls_Lucy_Description: Draw 2 skills. Apply 1 stack of "Hunting" to all enemies.
gmyls.SkillExtended/Ex_gmyls_1_Name: Cost reduced by 1. After use, the entire party takes 1 Pain damage.
gmyls.SkillExtended/Ex_gmyls_2_Name: Gain Swiftness, Tracking, and Critical. After use, take 4 Pain damage.
gmyls.SkillKeyword/K_gmyls_0_Desc:
Can be used while unable to act.
If not in Decoy state when used, enter Decoy state.
If already in Decoy state, trigger the skill's special effect.

kiana.Buff/B_kiana_0_Description: All allies' Critical Hit Chance and Evade are increased by 20%.
kiana.Character/Kiana_PassiveDes:
At the start of battle, Kiana bestows the Blessing of the Finality upon all allies. All allies' Attack Power, Critical Hit Chance, and Evade are increased by 20%.

Each time Kiana uses her own skill, she gains 「Descent」.
「Descent」 is consumed when using her Special Skill.
kiana.Character/Kiana_PassiveName: Drawing the Moon's Mark as a Blade
kiana.Character/Kiana_SelectInfo:
Fate once posed a question to the world.
And so, the hero gave her answer.
Across the endless cycle of reincarnation,
she forged a story belonging to everyone.
kiana.Character/Kiana_Text_Battle_Idle_0: If we don't hurry up, I'm gonna burn out over here.
kiana.Character/Kiana_Text_Battle_Idle_1: Can't save the world if I'm running on no sleep.
kiana.Character/Kiana_Text_Battle_Start_1: I'll wrap this up in no time!
kiana.Character/Kiana_Text_Field_GetItem_0: I'll hang onto this — someone'll need it eventually.
kiana.Character/Kiana_Text_Field_Idle_0: Let's keep this pace up — there's still a lot left to do.
kiana.Character/Kiana_Text_Field_Idle_1: Staying grounded is always the way to go.
kiana.Character/Kiana_Text_Field_Potion_P_0: Thank you~ Back from the dead!
kiana.Item_Passive/A_kiana_0_Description:
Immediately gain 1 Mana after defeating an enemy.
Faint Resist is increased by 33%.

<color=#919191>That's a stick. </color>
kiana.Skill/S_kiana_0_Name: May White Blossoms Bloom Eternal in Your Shield
kiana.Skill/S_kiana_10_LucyD_Description:
Triggered by consuming 1 stack of 「Samsara Surge」.

Reduce the cost of all skills in hand by 5.
Then view all skills in the deck and choose 3 to bring to hand.
kiana.Skill/S_kiana_11_Description: If Kiana has the 「Descent」 buff, cast again.
kiana.Skill/S_kiana_12_Description: If Kiana has the 「Descent」 buff, cast again.
kiana.Skill/S_kiana_12_Name: True Resolution of the Wanderer's End
kiana.Skill/S_kiana_13_Description:
Reduce an enemy's HP to 0.
If the target is a Boss, this skill can only be used when the Boss's HP is below 50%.
kiana.Skill/S_kiana_1_Description: Triggered by consuming 1 stack of 「Samsara Surge」.
kiana.Skill/S_kiana_2_Name: Transcending into Feathers with This Immortal Memory
kiana.Skill/S_kiana_4_Description:
Triggered by consuming 5 stacks of Kiana's 「Descent」.

After using this skill, Kiana gains 「Samsara Surge」.
kiana.Skill/S_kiana_5_Description:
Triggered by consuming 5 stacks of Kiana's 「Descent」.

After using this skill, Kiana gains 「Samsara Surge」.
kiana.Skill/S_kiana_6_Name: Blade Forged from the Origin's True Return
kiana.Skill/S_kiana_8_Name: Gifting Star-Dream from the Stellar Abyss
kiana.Skill/S_kiana_9_1_Description: Remove all Debuffs from all allies.
kiana.Skill/S_kiana_9_Description:
Choose — Restore 2 Mana.

Remove all Debuffs from all allies.

Angelina.Buff/B_Agla_0_Description: <color=#7c68a6>Feels a little uncomfortable, but doesn't really affect combat.
Angelina.Buff/B_Agla_1_Description:
Reduced by 1 stack after taking or dealing damage.
&a
Angelina.Buff/B_Agla_3_Description: <color=#ae8575>"You've done so much for everyone. Now, let me do something for you."
Angelina.Buff/B_Agla_4_Description: Whenever a debuff is applied to self, take &a Pain damage.
Angelina.Buff/B_Agla_5_Description:
Stable field generated...
Chain recovery system activated...
  Note: Combat module will automatically enter standby after battle, refocusing on Originium maintenance...
<color=#ae8575>"This is Angelina. How are things on your end?"
Angelina.Buff/B_Agla_6_Description: The base effects provided by Weightless and Swiftness are doubled.
Angelina.Buff/B_Agla_7_Description:
Weightless<sprite=0> is converted into this debuff.
Gains 1 stack when a debuff other than Airborne is applied. If stacks are full, deals &a damage instead.
When hit by Angelina's non-Pain damage, the debuff's duration is extended by 1 turn, up to a maximum of 2 turns. (Up to 3 turns at level 4 or above.)
    <color=#ae8575>"Why doesn't Huz's pipe debuff count?"
Angelina.Character/Angelina_PassiveDes:
At the start of battle, a random enemy carries the Lost Parcel.
· If that enemy dies while the buff is active, randomly generate a number of exclusive skills equal to surviving Investigators (with Swiftness, cost reduced by 1) and choose one from Morale Rising.
· If that enemy is still alive at the start of the third turn:
       Gain 1 Accelerator Field card with cost reduced by 1, Once; gain 1 Mana.

The transport ship has crashed in the Twisted Lands!
   <color=#ae8575>"If you recover the parcel, make good use of it. If things go wrong, I have other plans."
Angelina.Character/Angelina_SelectInfo:
Angelina is a Messenger from the continent of Terra — an offensive support character who specializes in weakening enemies with anti-gravitic Arts.
Angelina actively participates in the investigation team's activities. She needs to hone her skills, investigate the Twisted Lands, and bring detailed intelligence back to Rhodes Island after activating the clocktower.
Since the last incident, many letters and parcels have been lost in the Twisted Lands. Angelina is eager to recover them. To her, the feelings carried within those letters must mean a great deal.
Angelina.Character/Angelina_Text_Battle_AllyND_0: We have to push through this.
Angelina.Character/Angelina_Text_Battle_Idle_0: Whether it's fighting or working, give it everything you've got!
Angelina.Character/Angelina_Text_Battle_Idle_1: Battle is brutal... but I don't want to let you down.
Angelina.Character/Angelina_Text_Battle_Kill_0: When will the fighting ever stop...?
Angelina.Character/Angelina_Text_Battle_Kill_1: I'm actually pretty good at this spell.
Angelina.Character/Angelina_Text_Battle_Kill_2: If I do this first... then that... it might work even better!
Angelina.Character/Angelina_Text_Battle_ND_2:
The harder things get,
    the more I can't give up!
Angelina.Character/Angelina_Text_Field_Idle_0: Want to try the feeling of floating in the air?
Angelina.Character/Angelina_Text_Field_Idle_3: You like my hair? Heh heh, I have my secrets!
Angelina.Character/Angelina_Text_MasterTarget: May you find your own star.
Angelina.Character/Angelina_Text_PharosLeader_0: Leave it to me, Master. I'll suppress them.
Angelina.Item_Consume/Change_Rare_Description:
Changes Angelina's rare skill into one of two random alternatives. (If applicable.)
        <color=#7c68a6>"Miss Angelina has more important matters to attend to."
Angelina.Item_Consume/Star_Gate_Description: Replaces Angelina's rare skill "Dormant Star Gate" with "Tethys Messenger Equipment".
Angelina.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_with_Azar_Di: [A] What do you call that move of yours? It could work really well with mine.
Angelina.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_with_Joey0_D: [B] Are there any parcels for me?
[A] Not yet, but I'll bring them to you the moment they arrive...
[A] Handle with care... don't worry, I've got it!
Angelina.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_with_Shadow_: [B] It's so pret— ahem!... Dark rituals have no need for this.
Angelina.Skill/S_Agla_0_Description:
· Draw 1 skill.
· If used as the first skill this turn, reduce its cost by 1.
Angelina.Skill/S_Agla_10_0_Description:
Choose to obtain one of the Arcane Staff series:
"Arcane Staff - Quick Charge Mode"
"Arcane Staff - Particle Mode"
"Arcane Staff - Anti-Gravity Mode"
         <color=#7c68a6>A few tasty snacks were enclosed with the letter.
Angelina.Skill/S_Agla_10_1_Description:
Choose to obtain one of the Swiftness series:
"Accelerator Field"
"Extra Delivery"
"Local Anti-Gravity Coverage"
          <color=#7c68a6>A notebook filled to the last page was enclosed with the letter.
Angelina.Skill/S_Agla_10_2_Description:
Choose to obtain one of the Weightless series:
"Study"
"Anti-Gravity Suppression"
"Local Anti-Gravity Coverage"
           <color=#7c68a6>"Waga..." The rest of the text has been smeared out.
Angelina.Skill/S_Agla_10_Description:
Choose a card set and randomly obtain one from it. Comes with Swiftness, Exclude, and cost reduced by 1.
          <color=#9c9c9c>Which banner should I pick?
Angelina.Skill/S_Agla_10_LucyD_Description:
· Stun an enemy.
· Draw 2 cards.
     <color=#9c9c9c>"Medicine~"
     "Just looking at this gives me a headache~"
Angelina.Skill/S_Agla_11_Rare_Description:
· Placed on top of the deck at the start of battle and cost is reduced by 1 at the end of each turn.
· Convert all Weightless<sprite=0> on the target into Airborne<sprite=1>.
· After use, generate an "Airborne Module" card with cost increased by 1, Discarded after 2 turns, Exclude.
<color=#ae8575>"The earth, the mountaintops, the clouds, the starry night — they're all beneath our feet now."
Angelina.Skill/S_Agla_1_Description:
