While in hand, each skill used this turn adds 2 to the counter, which resets at the end of the turn. When activated, this skill is repeated based on the counter value +5.
Current additional activation count: &Num
Angelina.Skill/S_Agla_3_Description:
· If the target skill does not have Swiftness: that skill gains Swiftness and restores 1 Mana.
· If the target skill has Swiftness: the Investigator or enemy targeted by that skill gains Swiftness / 2 stacks of Weightless. If the skill does not target an Investigator or enemy, restore 2 Mana instead.
Angelina.Skill/S_Agla_4_1_Description: Weightless reduces Defense by a greater amount. (Stackable.)
Angelina.Skill/S_Agla_4_3_Description: Applying Weightless causes all enemies to lose Taunt.
Angelina.Skill/S_Agla_4_Description:
· Choose a direction to enhance Angelina's Originium Arts.
· If there are no other own skills in hand, draw 1 of Angelina's skills.
Angelina.Skill/S_Agla_5_Description:
· Apply the Swiftness buff to a target ally, then reveal 3 random non-Once exclusive skills from their deck. Choose 1 to generate with Swiftness and Once.
· When used as a Fixed Ability, restore 1 Mana.
Angelina.Skill/S_Agla_6_Description:
· The higher the Weakening Accuracy<sprite=0>, the greater the chance to apply multiple stacks of Weightless, up to 4 stacks. If the enemy carries the Lost Parcel, up to 6 stacks can be applied.
· When used as a Fixed Ability to attack an enemy with the Lost Parcel, restore 1 Mana.
Angelina.Skill/S_Agla_7_Description:
· If targeting an ally, that ally and the Investigator to their left gain Swiftness.
· If targeting an enemy, that enemy and the enemies on both sides gain 2 stacks of Weightless. If there is only one enemy, apply 4 stacks of Weightless instead.
Angelina.Skill/S_Agla_8_Rare_0_Description:
· This card appears near the top of the deck at the start of the game.
· Apply the Swiftness buff to self and a target ally.
<color=#7c68a6>Equipment that folds space via a star gate, reducing Angelina's casting load, extending combat endurance, and prolonging debuff duration.
Angelina.Skill/S_Agla_8_Rare_2_Description: Great reward comes with great risk.
Angelina.Skill/S_Agla_8_Rare_Description:
Unlocks more uses of the Star Gate when skill level is 4 or higher.
<color=#ae8575>&tag
Angelina.Skill/S_Agla_9_Rare_Description: ·Gain a Study card with Swiftness. ·At skill level 5 or higher, the Limit Release buff lasts for 3 turns. "Effect enhanced! Now's the time!"
Angelina.SkillExtended/SkillEn_Angelina_0_Name: On use, grant "Swiftness" to 2 random adjacent Investigators.
Angelina.SkillExtended/SkillEn_Angelina_1_Name: On use, apply 1 stack of "Weightless" to all enemies.
Angelina.B_1_Rare8: <color=#7c68a6>Stable Field Generation Active: This debuff's stack count cannot be reduced by attacks or being hit.
Angelina.B_1_Rare9: <color=#ae8575>"Enemies suppressed! Push forward and finish the fight!"
Angelina.B_2_Rare8: <color=#7c68a6>Chain Recovery System Active: At the end of the turn, a chain heal targeting Angelina is triggered, with healing amount affected by this Investigator's Healing Power.
Angelina.B_2_Rare9_Pow: <color=#ae8575>"Easy there, even Miss Skadi isn't this rough! (>_<)"
Angelina.B_2_Rare9_none: <color=#ae8575>"Get used to it — they'll have a hard time hitting you!"
Angelina.B_2_RareDouble: <color=#ae8575>"This is everyone's hard work paying off!"
Angelina.S_Rare8_123: "Seems to be a miniature version of some kind of megastructure."

MizuharaAina.Buff/B_MizuharaAina_1_Description: The next skill that hits an enemy increases <color=#E5FF56>Combo Energy</color> by &a. After triggering once, removes this buff from all allies.
MizuharaAina.Buff/B_MizuharaAina_3_Description: All allies' <color=#FF98DE>OD Gain</color> is increased by 10%, with additional buff effects.
MizuharaAina.Buff/B_MizuharaAina_7_Description:
Aggro slightly increased;
When attacked, restore the Healing Gauge and gain OD based on damage taken.
MizuharaAina.Buff/B_MizuharaAina_D10_Description: Reduces the enemy's damage by 20%. When gaining OD from this enemy, skills that hit the enemy gain <color=#E5FF56>Combo Energy</color> 2. After resolving, draw 1 card. Then remove this debuff.
MizuharaAina.Buff/B_MizuharaAina_D2_Description: During OD activation, OD damage bonus received is increased by 15%. Once during OD activation, if Armor bonus is greater than 0, it is automatically reduced to 0.
MizuharaAina.Buff/B_MizuharaAina_D3_Description: OD gained from attacking this enemy is calculated with <color=#E5FF56>Combo Energy</color> +1.
MizuharaAina.Buff/B_MizuharaAina_D3_Name: Let's Be Friends with the Fish~
MizuharaAina.Buff/B_MizuharaAina_D4_Description: At the start of each turn, provide 10 OD to allies.
MizuharaAina.Buff/B_MizuharaAina_D5_Description: At the start of each turn, lose HP equal to 10% of max HP (minimum 1). All allies are healed for a fixed 3 HP. This healing effect can only trigger once per turn.
MizuharaAina.Buff/B_MizuharaAina_D9_Description: At the start of the turn, HP decreases by 11% of max health.
MizuharaAina.Buff/B_MizuharaAina_DR1_Description:
Armor is permanently reduced. When acting, receive DoT damage equal to 7% of current HP;
Decomposed proteins are converted into OD energy. Damage from this buff proportionally increases the OD gain of this DoT.
MizuharaAina.Buff/B_MizuharaAina_P_Description:
Fish's <color=#FF98DE>OD Gain</color> increased by: &b%
OD required to gain the next Ocean Heart: &a
<color=#FF98DE>OD Gain</color> bonus at the start of battle: &c%
MizuharaAina.Character/MizuharaAina_PassiveDes: For every 5 OD gained, Aina gains 1 <color=#35F9FF>Ocean Heart</color> (max 10). Each <color=#35F9FF>Ocean Heart</color> increases Aina's <color=#FF98DE>OD Gain</color> by 1.5%. During OD activation, <color=#35F9FF>Ocean Heart</color> consumption is reduced by 1. At the end of the turn, the number of <color=#35F9FF>Ocean Hearts</color> is halved.
MizuharaAina.Character/MizuharaAina_SelectInfo: Aina fully harnesses the power of the ocean, supporting allies with powerful OD through <color=#35F9FF>Ocean Hearts</color>, and can flexibly utilize the Exile deck to make allied tactics more versatile.
MizuharaAina.Skill/S_MizuharaAina_10_Description:
Must target an enemy to activate:
Apply the [Food...] debuff.
When this card is added to your hand from the Exile deck, if Aina is alive, gain 5 <color=#35F9FF>Ocean Hearts</color> and draw one of your own skills with priority.

<color=#35F9FF>Ocean Heart &h1</color>
Extend all of the enemy's debuffs by 1 turn.
MizuharaAina.Skill/S_MizuharaAina_1_Description:
Reduce all enemies' Armor. Additionally increase damage multiplier and <color=#E5FF56>Combo Energy</color> based on the number of enemies.
1 enemy: Increase multiplier by 120%, gain <color=#E5FF56>Combo Energy 8</color>
2 enemies: Additionally increase multiplier by 45%, gain <color=#E5FF56>Combo Energy 3</color>
3 or more enemies: Additionally increase multiplier by 30%, gain <color=#E5FF56>Combo Energy 2</color>

<color=#35F9FF>Ocean Heart &h1</color>
50% of damage dealt is converted into a Barrier. The next ally skill carries 50% of the <color=#E5FF56>Combo Energy</color> used when this skill was activated.
MizuharaAina.Skill/S_MizuharaAina_2_Description:
During OD activation, this skill's cost becomes 0 and gains Swiftness.

Apply <color=#E560FF>OD Vulnerable</color> to an enemy for 3 turns.

<color=#35F9FF>Ocean Heart &h1</color>
Apply <color=#17FF00>[Let's Be Friends with Aina]</color> for 2 turns.
<color=#35F9FF>Ocean Heart &h2</color>
After applying <color=#17FF00>[Let's Be Friends with Aina]</color>, if <color=#EDFAEC>[Taste the Deep Flavor]</color> exists in the deck, add one copy to your hand with cost reduced to 0, then shuffle the deck.
MizuharaAina.Skill/S_MizuharaAina_3_Description:
At the start of battle, increase own <color=#FF98DE>OD Gain</color> by 10%.
Only 2 copies of this card can activate per battle.
This card cannot be played manually from hand. When <color=#35F9FF>Ocean Hearts</color> consumed this turn (including those consumed automatically at turn end) exceed 5, this card is automatically played from hand.
For 2 turns, all allies' <color=#FF98DE>OD Gain</color> is increased by 15%, damage and healing are increased by 10%. Choose 1 card from the Exile deck to return to hand.

<color=#35F9FF>Ocean Heart &h1 </color>Strongly taunt all enemies for 1 turn. Aina gains Healing Gauge Protection for 2 turns.

<color=#F54899>Ocean Hearts consumed this turn: &u1</color>
 
<color=#F54899>Copies activated this battle: &u2</color>
MizuharaAina.Skill/S_MizuharaAina_4_Description:
Stun an enemy for 1 turn, then choose one of the following effects to activate.

<color=#35F9FF>Ocean Heart &h1</color> If the enemy has <color=#17FF00>[Let's Be Friends with Aina]</color>, make that debuff permanent and apply <color=#17FF00>[Become Aina's Food~]</color>.
<color=#35F9FF>Ocean Heart &h2</color> After the above effect, if <color=#EDFAEC>[Make Seafood Sashimi]</color> exists in the deck, add one copy to hand with cost reduced to 0, then shuffle the deck.
MizuharaAina.Skill/S_MizuharaAina_5_Description:
Apply a Barrier equal to twice the current number of <color=#35F9FF>Ocean Hearts</color>.

<color=#35F9FF>Ocean Heart &h1</color>
Apply <color=#17FF00>[Let's All Dig In]</color> to all enemies that have <color=#17FF00>[Become Aina's Food~]</color>.
MizuharaAina.Skill/S_MizuharaAina_6_Description:
This card cannot be used. While multiple copies of this card exist in hand, only one copy's effects will activate.
After spending a cumulative total of 15 AP from hand skills (including those consumed automatically at turn end), this card is Excluded from hand. When this card is Excluded, choose 1 of the top 4 cards of the deck to add to hand, then shuffle the deck.
While this card is in hand, activate <color=#17FF00>[Ocean World Domain]</color>.
When this card returns to hand from the Exile deck, deal damage equal to 5% of max HP to all enemies.
<color=#F54899>AP consumed so far: &ap</color>
MizuharaAina.Skill/S_MizuharaAina_7_Description:
Enter the <color=#17FF00>Cast the Net</color> state.
When this card returns to hand from the Exile deck, heal all members for &heal (60% Healing Power) and enter the <color=#17FF00>Cast the Net</color> state.
MizuharaAina.Skill/S_MizuharaAina_8_Description:
Only 2 copies of this card can activate per battle.

<color=#35F9FF>Ocean Heart &h1</color>
Choose 2 cards in hand other than this card to Exclude, then choose 1 card from the Exile deck to add to hand, then choose 1 card from the deck to add to hand. Both cards' costs are reduced to 1.
<color=#F54899>Copies activated this battle: &u1</color>
MizuharaAina.Skill/S_MizuharaAina_9_Description:
This card cannot be used from hand and is Excluded after 2 turns.
When this card is Excluded, apply <color=#E560FF>Suffocation</color> to all enemies.

Choose 1 card from the Exile deck other than [Ocean — Deep Love] to return to the deck, then shuffle.
When this card returns to hand from the Exile deck, if Aina is alive, consume all <color=#35F9FF>Ocean Hearts</color>, restore 3 <color=#35F9FF>Ocean Hearts</color>, and gain Healing Gauge equal to 30% of max HP.
MizuharaAina.Skill/S_MizuharaAina_Lucy_Description: Draw 1 skill. If Aina is alive, consume half of your <color=#35F9FF>Ocean Hearts</color> (minimum 1) and choose 1 skill from the Exile deck to add to hand.
MizuharaAina.Skill/S_MizuharaAina_R1_Description: When this card is played, consume all <color=#35F9FF>Ocean Hearts</color> and apply <color=#E560FF>Protein Decomposition Toxin</color>.
MizuharaAina.Skill/S_MizuharaAina_R2_Description:
At the start of battle, if Aina is alive, gain <color=#35F9FF>Ocean Hearts</color> based on the number of enemies.
Upon hitting an enemy with this skill, gain 50 OD and additionally deal Pain damage equal to 10% of the target's max HP, then draw 1 of your own skills with priority.
When returning to hand from the Exile deck, restore 1 AP to an ally. This card's cost is permanently increased by 3 for the rest of this battle.
MizuharaAina.SkillExtended/SkillEn_MizuharaAina1_Enfo: Single-target attack skills aimed at enemies
MizuharaAina.SkillExtended/SkillEn_MizuharaAina1_Name: <color=#35F9FF>Ocean Heart 2</color>: When hitting an enemy, additionally gain 15 OD.
MizuharaAina.SkillExtended/SkillEn_MizuharaAina2_Name: When this card returns to hand from the Exile deck, randomly remove 2 cards from the Exile deck, then choose 1 card from the Exile deck to place at the bottom of the deck.
MizuharaAina.SkillKeyword/Key_21_Desc: During OD activation, OD damage bonus received is increased by 15%. Once during OD activation, if Armor bonus is greater than 0, it is automatically reduced to 0.
MizuharaAina.SkillKeyword/Key_22_Desc: OD gained from attacking this enemy is calculated with <color=#E5FF56>Combo Energy</color> +1.
MizuharaAina.SkillKeyword/Key_4_Desc: At the start of each turn, provide 10 OD to allies.
MizuharaAina.SkillKeyword/Key_5_Desc: At the start of each turn, lose HP equal to 10% of max HP (minimum 1). All allies are healed for a fixed 3 HP. This healing effect can only trigger once per turn.
MizuharaAina.SkillKeyword/Key_OceanHeart_Desc: When you have the number of <color=#35F9FF>Ocean Hearts</color> listed on the card, you may choose to consume that number of <color=#35F9FF>Ocean Hearts</color> when activating the skill to trigger additional effects.
MizuharaAina.SkillKeyword/Key_R1_Desc:
Armor is permanently reduced. When acting, receive DoT damage equal to 7% of current HP;
Decomposed proteins are converted into OD energy. Damage from this buff proportionally increases the OD gain of this DoT.
MizuharaAina.SkillKeyword/Key_S7_Desc:
Aggro slightly increased;
When attacked, restore the Healing Gauge and gain OD based on damage taken.
MizuharaAina.SkillKeyword/Key_S9_Desc: At the start of the turn, HP decreases by 11% of max health.
MizuharaAina.SkillKeyword/S_RengekiEnergy_Desc: When a skill hits an enemy, gain additional OD based on the energy amount.
MizuharaAina.SkillKeyword/key_10_Desc: Reduces the enemy's damage by 20%. When gaining OD from this enemy, skills that hit the enemy gain <color=#E5FF56>Combo Energy</color> 2. After resolving, draw 1 card. Then remove this debuff.
MizuharaAina.System/Aina_SkillEn: Synergy: Choose a skill to place at the bottom of the deck.
MizuharaAina.System/Aina_StaticTitleSkill8: Not enough eligible cards in hand.
MizuharaAina.System/Aina_StaticTitleSkill8/2: Buy the Mascot: Choose the second skill to Exclude from hand.
MizuharaAina.System/Aina_StaticTitleSkill8/3: Buy the Mascot: Choose a skill to add to hand.
MizuharaAina.System/Aina_StaticTitleSkill9: Ocean — Deep Love: Choose a skill to return to the deck.
MizuharaAina.System/SystemS_MizuharaAina_1: 50% of damage dealt is converted into a Barrier. The next ally skill carries the same <color=#E5FF56>Combo Energy</color> as this attack.
MizuharaAina.System/SystemS_MizuharaAina_10: Extend all of the target enemy's debuffs by 1 turn.
MizuharaAina.System/SystemS_MizuharaAina_2: Apply <color=#17FF00>[Let's Be Friends with Aina]</color> for 2 turns.
MizuharaAina.System/SystemS_MizuharaAina_2/2: Apply <color=#17FF00>[Let's Be Friends with Aina]</color> for 2 turns. Afterward, if <color=#EDFAEC>[Taste the Deep Flavor]</color> exists in the deck, add one copy to hand and shuffle the deck.
MizuharaAina.System/SystemS_MizuharaAina_3: Strongly taunt all enemies for 1 turn. Aina gains Healing Gauge Protection for 2 turns.
MizuharaAina.System/SystemS_MizuharaAina_4: If the enemy has <color=#17FF00>[Let's Be Friends with Aina]</color>, make that debuff permanent and apply <color=#17FF00>[Become Aina's Food~]</color>.
MizuharaAina.System/SystemS_MizuharaAina_4/2: If the enemy has <color=#17FF00>[Let's Be Friends with Aina]</color>, make that debuff permanent and apply <color=#17FF00>[Become Aina's Food~]</color>. Afterward, if <color=#EDFAEC>[Make Seafood Sashimi]</color> exists in the deck, add one copy to hand with cost reduced to 0, then shuffle the deck.
MizuharaAina.System/SystemS_MizuharaAina_5: Apply <color=#17FF00>[Let's All Dig In]</color> to all enemies that have <color=#17FF00>[Become Aina's Food~]</color>.
MizuharaAina.System/SystemS_MizuharaAina_6: Ocean World: Choose a skill to add to hand.

Viviana.Buff/B_vvan_0_0_Description: Light and Shadow Interplay: When attacked by a skill that carries the Shadow buff, deal Pain damage equal to the attacker's level × 2, then remove this effect.
Viviana.Buff/B_vvan_0_1_Description: Light and Shadow Interplay: When attacked by a skill that carries the Light buff, deal damage equal to the attacker's level × 2, then remove this effect.
Viviana.Buff/B_vvan_1_0_Description: When dealing damage, accumulate an equal amount of Scorch on the target.
Viviana.Buff/B_vvan_1_1_Description: When the Scorch gauge is full, deal &a Pain damage, remove this buff, and trigger Scorch Burst.
Viviana.Buff/B_vvan_1_2_Description: During this period, any Scorch accumulated is automatically removed after being applied.
Viviana.Buff/B_vvan_2_Description:
Engage in a duel with &target! Cannot attack targets other than &target.
Remove one stack when attacking &target.
When attacked by Viviana, the chance for Viviana to gain a Nova Shield is doubled.
Viviana.Buff/B_vvan_3_Description: Remove this debuff when taking an action.
Viviana.Buff/B_vvan_5_1_Description: At the start of next turn, draw one additional card and gain 1 Mana.
Viviana.Buff/B_vvan_P_Shield_Description: Reduces the next instance of non-Pain damage taken to 0.
Viviana.Buff/B_vvan_Rare_0_Description:
· When triggering Light and Shadow Interplay (see Light/Shadow buffs) via your own skill, consume one stack of Focus to randomly generate one of Viviana's attack-exclusive skills with Exclude and Swiftness.
· At the end of the turn, consume one stack of Focus to randomly generate one of Viviana's attack-exclusive skills with Exclude.
Viviana.Character/C_ViViana_PassiveDesc:
· Arts Duelist: Damage dealt is converted to Pain damage before being applied to the target.
· Candlelight: Damage dealt is increased and damage taken is reduced when fighting cursed enemies and bosses.
· Nova: Attacks have a chance to grant a Nova Shield (reduces one instance of non-Pain damage to 0). Maximum one stack.
Viviana.Character/C_ViViana_SelectInfo:
Viviana Droste — a knight and a poet. In battle, her swordplay is varied and elegant, combining light-and-shadow Arts for both offense and defense. As a poet, she is widely read and delights in composing verse.

    Specializes in sword combo chains to deal multi-hit Arts damage to a single target.
Viviana.Character/C_ViViana_CampSelectWord: Mm, who... never mind, I noticed you a while ago.
Viviana.Character/C_ViViana_Text_Battle_Kill_0: This is not the arena. Wounds are not worth recording or rewarding.
Viviana.Character/C_ViViana_Text_Battle_Kill_1: I am waiting for a peace that is long overdue.
Viviana.Character/C_ViViana_Text_Battle_Cri_0: Let time stop on this candleless night.
Viviana.Character/C_ViViana_Text_Battle_Cri_1: Words that shake the soul always come from the storm.
Viviana.Character/C_ViViana_Text_Battle_Start_0: Leave. This is the last warning I will give.
Viviana.Character/C_ViViana_Text_Battle_Start_1: If you snuff out the candle, I cannot guarantee what will happen.
Viviana.Character/C_ViViana_Text_Battle_Start_2: Viviana Droste, by her candle and blade, shall claim victory for you.
Viviana.Character/C_ViViana_Text_Battle_Start_3: The moonlight has only just slipped into the windswept garden, and you already see autumn?
Viviana.Character/C_ViViana_Text_Field_Idle_0: I am willing to listen to the silence of this moment.
Viviana.Character/C_ViViana_Text_Field_Idle_1: You wish for me to remain here?
Viviana.Character/C_ViViana_Text_Field_Idle_3: Let us go. Depart at once and return as soon as we can.
Viviana.Character/C_ViViana_Text_Battle_Idle_0: The moonlight has only just slipped into the windswept garden, and you already see autumn?
Viviana.Character/C_ViViana_Text_Battle_Idle_1: I am willing to listen to the silence of this moment.
Viviana.Character/C_ViViana_Text_PharosLeader_0: Play the death march more beautifully! Draw the violin deeper and lower!
Viviana.Character/C_ViViana_Text_PharosLeader_2: We dig a grave in the sky, and there is room enough to lie there.
Viviana.SkillKeyword/Keyword_vvan_Description: If the last skill Viviana used was the skill specified by the Combo, the additional effect described in the Combo is triggered.
Viviana.Skill/S_vvan_0_0_Description:
On skill use:
<color=#eeca8b>Combo</color> [Swift Blade · Shadow / "Flicker"]: Accumulate 20 Scorch on the target and restore 1 Mana.
Viviana.Skill/S_vvan_0_1_Description:
On skill use:
<color=#eeca8b>Combo</color> [Swift Blade · Light / "Nova"]: Increase damage the target takes before its next action by 10% and deal &a damage.
Viviana.Skill/S_vvan_1_0_Description:
· Additionally deals &a damage to a random adjacent target. If there is only one target, deal the damage to that target.
· On skill use:
<color=#eeca8b>Combo</color> [Blade of Fleeting Shadows / Swift Blade · Shadow]: Restore 2 Mana.
Viviana.Skill/S_vvan_1_1_Description:
· Additionally deal &a damage. If there is only one target, all additional damage lands as a Critical Hit.
· On skill use:
<color=#eeca8b>Combo</color> [Candlelight, Shadow's Rest / Swift Blade · Light]: Deal &a damage to the target.
Viviana.Skill/S_vvan_2_0_Description:
· Choose:
 "Nova" or "Flicker"
  Add the chosen skill to your hand.
Viviana.Skill/S_vvan_2_1_Description:
· When used from hand:
<color=#eeca8b>Combo</color> [Candlelight, Shadow's Rest]: Restore 1 Mana and accumulate 20 Scorch on the target.
· On Countdown skill use:
Generate Swift Blade · Light with Exclude.
<color=#eeca8b>Combo</color> [Swift Blade · Light]: Deal an additional &a damage and accumulate 20 Scorch on the target.
Viviana.Skill/S_vvan_2_2_Description:
· When used from hand:
<color=#eeca8b>Combo</color> [Blade of Fleeting Shadows]: Remove all Overload from yourself.
· On Countdown skill use:
Generate Swift Blade · Shadow with Exclude.
<color=#eeca8b>Combo</color> [Swift Blade · Shadow]: Deal &a damage.
Viviana.Skill/S_vvan_4_Description: When drawn, increase Exchange count by 1.
Viviana.Skill/S_vvan_5_Description:
Choose one poem from a selection of unique verses and add it to your hand.

   Why worry about rhymes — it is thought that weaves the line.
Viviana.Skill/S_vvan_5_0_Description:
Fully restore the Healing Gauge.

<color=#d18d12>Everything is fleeting, everything shall pass.
Viviana.Skill/S_vvan_5_1_Description:
At the start of next turn, draw one additional card and gain 1 Mana.

<color=#d18d12>If Winter comes, can Spring be far behind?
Viviana.Skill/S_vvan_5_2_Description:
Remove the target's Overload and restore 1 Mana.

<color=#d18d12>One who chases shadows is themselves a shadow.
Viviana.Skill/S_vvan_5_3_Description:
Randomly discard the top or bottom card in your hand, then draw two cards.

<color=#d18d12>I prefer the absurdity of writing poetry to the absurdity of not writing it.
Viviana.Skill/S_vvan_5_4_Description:
Increase Exchange count by 2.

<color=#d18d12>The fox dons a young lord's form, and revels in the lantern-lit spring night.
Viviana.Skill/S_vvan_5_5_Description:
Gain Shadowed by Candlelight and "Flicker" with Exclude and Swiftness. "Flicker"'s cost is reduced by 1 and its damage is reduced by 80%.
<color=#d18d12>My days are bright, my nights are blessed.
Viviana.Skill/S_vvan_5_6_Description:
Remove all debuffs from the target.

<color=#d18d12>I sing, and the moon lingers; I dance, and my shadow scatters.
Viviana.Skill/S_vvan_5_7_Description:
Gain one copy each of Swift Blade · Light and Swift Blade · Shadow with Exclude and Swiftness. Cost reduced by 1 and damage reduced by 80%.

<color=#d18d12>"A pale rose" — a pale imagination.
Viviana.Skill/S_vvan_6_Description:
· Choose one of three randomly generated exclusive skills to gain with Exclude.
· After choosing, randomly gain one of Viviana's exclusive skills based on Viviana's attack skills currently in hand, with Exclude.
Viviana.Skill/S_vvan_7_Rare_Description:
· When drawn, generate one Light and Shadow Conversion card.
· When used as a non-fixed skill, gain 3 additional stacks of Focus.
Viviana.Skill/S_vvan_8_rare_Description:
· When drawn, generate one Light and Shadow Conversion card.
· Triggers corresponding effects based on Light/Shadow buffs on enemies: Light buff applies 2 stacks of Pain Burn <sprite=1> to all enemies; Shadow buff applies 1 stack of Frost <sprite=1> to all enemies.
After use, remove all Light/Shadow buffs from all enemies.
· When used as a non-fixed skill, if the Shadow buff is present, apply 1 additional stack of Frost <sprite=1> to all enemies.
· If no relevant buffs are present on the field, draw 1 card.
Viviana.Skill/S_vvan_LucyD_Description: Draw two cards and generate one Light and Shadow Conversion card.
Viviana.Skill/S_vvan_LucyD_0_Description:
· When this skill belongs to Viviana, it counts as the trigger condition for all Combos.
· If the target has Light or Shadow, swap the target's Light and Shadow (triggers Light and Shadow Interplay with fixed damage of 8).
Viviana.SkillExtended/SkillEn_vvan_0_Name: After using a skill, generate one Light and Shadow Conversion card. If the target is an enemy, randomly apply a Light or Shadow buff.

GreaAnne.Buff/B_GA_3_Description: All Debuff Resist +100% and immune to all damage.
GreaAnne.Buff/B_GA_5_Description:
When damage is taken, increase the Attack Power and Armor reduction of this debuff by 20% of the damage taken, up to a maximum reduction of &a% (based on Attack Power).
The reduction resets when the afflicted unit takes an action.
GreaAnne.Buff/B_GA_6_Description: After using 2 skills from your hand other than Princess Summon, generate 1 Princess Summon with Exclude that is discarded after 1 turn.
GreaAnne.Buff/B_GA_7_Description:
Current Bond Resonance: &a
If both Grea's and Anne's skills are used in a single turn (including other Duo skills), Bond Resonance +1. Can only increase by 1 per turn.
At the end of each turn, trigger an equal number of Duo Spells on random enemies based on Bond Resonance.
GreaAnne.Buff/B_GA_8_Description:
After &a turns, reveal all of your rare skills, choose 1 to generate (with Exclude), then remove this buff.
If this buff is applied again while active, reduce the required turns by 1 and restore 1 Mana.
GreaAnne.Buff/B_GA_H_Description:
Preferentially attacks &target.
Damage dealt to &target is reduced by &a% (based on stack count).
Loses 1 stack when attacking &target.
GreaAnne.Buff/B_GA_R2_Description:
For every 3 Focus gained:
Trigger 1 Judgment Spell on the enemy with the highest HP;
Grant &b Barrier (based on Attack Power) to the ally with the lowest combined HP and Barrier.
Triggers after gaining &a Focus.
GreaAnne.Buff/B_GA_charge_Description:
Current Focus: &a
Resets at the end of the turn.
GreaAnne.Buff/B_GA_p_Description: Each instance of damage dealt by self is increased by &a.
GreaAnne.Character/GreaAnne_PassiveDes:
Each time Grea & Anne are targeted by an ally's skill or hit by an enemy attack, they gain 1 stack of 【Bond Seal】, lasting until the end of battle.

Bond Seal: Each stack increases each instance of damage dealt by self by 1.

The maximum stack count of 【Bond Seal】 increases with Grea & Anne's level.
GreaAnne.Character/GreaAnne_SelectInfo: Grea & Anne are an offensive duo specializing in follow-up attacks with their exclusive spells. When targeted by skills, Grea & Anne gain Bond Seal to amplify their damage. They also benefit greatly from Countdown progression, growing stronger as the battle goes on — their power builds into an unstoppable force over time.
GreaAnne.Character/GreaAnne_Text_Battle_Cri_0: Witness the flames of a dragon!
GreaAnne.Character/GreaAnne_Text_Battle_Idle_0: Seeing fire calms me down a little.
GreaAnne.Character/GreaAnne_Text_Battle_Idle_1: Hey? Aren't you going to attack?
GreaAnne.Character/GreaAnne_Text_Battle_Kill_1: Lance of the heroic spirit, pierce through!
GreaAnne.Character/GreaAnne_Text_Battle_ND_1: Ugh... that was reckless of me...
GreaAnne.Character/GreaAnne_Text_Battle_Start_1: No matter what enemies we face, we won't lose!
GreaAnne.Character/GreaAnne_Text_Field_Idle_0: I'm not as smart as Anne, so I have to study hard.
GreaAnne.Character/GreaAnne_Text_Field_Idle_1: I wonder what we should do together with Grea ♪
GreaAnne.Character/GreaAnne_Text_MasterTarget: We'd much rather hear you say "goodbye" than "farewell forever."
GreaAnne.Character/GreaAnne_Text_PharosLeader_0: Now it's three against three, Lucy!
GreaAnne.Character/GreaAnne_Text_PharosLeader_1: Dammit, they've got both of us under control!
GreaAnne.Character/GreaAnne_Text_Witch_0: If we share the burden together, it's nothing!
GreaAnne.Character/GreaAnne_Text_Witch_1: Wow. That's double the suffering, isn't it!
GreaAnne.Skill/S_GA_1_1_Description:
Trigger 1 Burst Spell on the target.
Afterward, reduce self's Overload by 1.
GreaAnne.Skill/S_GA_1_Description:
Trigger 1 Burst Spell on the target.
Afterward, reduce self's Overload by 1.
Can be used 1 additional time this turn.
GreaAnne.Skill/S_GA_2_Description:
While this skill is on Countdown, deal &b damage to all enemies for each Focus gained.
Focus (&a/2): When entering the Countdown slot, for each multiple of the Focus requirement met, this skill deals an additional &b damage when triggered.
GreaAnne.Skill/S_GA_3_Description:
While this skill is on Countdown, Aggro is Greatly Increased, all Debuff Resist +100%, and self is immune to all damage.
Focus (&a/2): When entering the Countdown slot, for each multiple of the Focus requirement met, trigger 1 additional Burst Spell on the target when this skill fires.
GreaAnne.Skill/S_GA_4_Description:
If there are other enemies whose action Countdown differs from the target's by 1 or less, or whose action Countdown is greater than 9, trigger 2 Judgment Spells on those enemies.
If no enemies meet the condition, trigger 1 Judgment Spell on the original target.
GreaAnne.Skill/S_GA_5_Description:
Increase the target's action Countdown by 2.
Focus (&a/4): Also randomly attack 1 other enemy at half damage (does not increase their action Countdown).
GreaAnne.Skill/S_GA_6_Description:
Trigger 1 Judgment Spell on the target.
Afterward, reduce self's Overload by 1 and increase all enemies' action Countdown by 1.
GreaAnne.Skill/S_GA_7_Description:
At the start of battle, place this on top of the deck.
Draw 1 skill.
GreaAnne.Skill/S_GA_8_Description:
Consume 1 stack of Bond Seal.
Focus (&a/3): Critical Hit Chance +100%.
Focus (&a/5): Generate 1 Bond Chain in the deck.
GreaAnne.Skill/S_GA_9_Description:
Trigger 2 Duo Spells on random enemies.
Generate 1 Bond Chant with Exclude that is discarded after 1 turn.
Focus (&a/4): Reduce Countdown to 2.
Focus (&a/6): Reduce Countdown to 1.
GreaAnne.Skill/S_GA_LucyD1_Description:
Draw 2 skills.
If Grea & Anne are alive, Grea & Anne trigger 2 Burst Spells on the target.
If the target's action Countdown equals 1 or is 9 or greater, trigger 1 additional Burst Spell.
GreaAnne.Skill/S_GA_LucyD2_0_Description: Draw 1 skill. Afterward, reduce Lucy's Overload by 1.
GreaAnne.Skill/S_GA_LucyD2_1_Description:
Draw 1 skill. Afterward, reduce Lucy's Overload by 1.
Can be used 1 additional time this turn.
GreaAnne.Skill/S_GA_LucyD2_Description:
Draw 1 skill. Afterward, reduce Lucy's Overload by 1.
If used immediately upon drawing, can be used 2 additional times this turn.
If not used immediately, can only be used 1 additional time this turn.
GreaAnne.Skill/S_GA_R1_Description:
Trigger 3 Burst Spells on all enemies.
If there are 2 or fewer enemies, the triggered Burst Spells gain +100% Critical Hit Chance.
Focus (&a/3): When entering the Countdown slot, for each multiple of the Focus requirement met, trigger 1 additional Burst Spell on all enemies.
GreaAnne.Skill/S_GA_R2_Description: Focus (&a/3): When activated, for each multiple of the Focus requirement met, generate &b Barrier (based on Attack Power).
GreaAnne.Skill/S_GA_R3_Description:
For each stack of Bond Seal, trigger 1 spell on the target (cycling through Burst Spell, Judgment Spell, and Duo Spell in order).
If the target is killed mid-sequence, trigger the remaining spells on other random enemies.
For each Duo Spell triggered, consume 1 stack of Bond Seal.
GreaAnne.SkillExtended/SkillEx_GreaAnne_1_Name: Makes this skill an Overload skill. Restore 1 Mana when used.
GreaAnne.SkillExtended/SkillEx_GreaAnne_2_Name: Also triggers once on Grea & Anne when used.
GreaAnne.SkillKeyword/Ex_GreaAnne_Desc:
Within a single turn, Grea & Anne gain 1 Focus after using any Overload skill or pressing the Wait button. Focus resets at the end of the turn.
When the current Focus X meets requirement Y, this skill gains a bonus effect when triggered or when entering the Countdown slot.

szb_Orchis.Buff/B_Orchis_1_Description:
The first time a Puppet card is played each turn, randomly add two Puppet cards with a level no higher than the played card to your hand.
When taking damage exceeding 30% of your maximum HP, reduce the duration by 1 turn.
szb_Orchis.Buff/B_Orchis_2_Description: Each time a Puppet card is used, inflict "Puppet's Curse" on a random enemy.
szb_Orchis.Buff/B_Orchis_3_Description:
Each time a Puppet card is used, restore 1 Mana (can trigger up to a number of times equal to the level of the highest-level Puppet card played this turn).
Remaining triggers this turn: &a
szb_Orchis.Buff/B_Orchis_4_Description: Each time a Puppet card is used, Overheal all allies by 1 HP.
szb_Orchis.Buff/B_Orchis_7_Description:
At the start of the turn, randomly add a Puppet card with a level no greater than &a to your hand.
When this buff is gained again, increase the level cap of Puppet cards obtained per turn by 1 (cannot exceed 4).
szb_Orchis.Buff/B_Orchis_Rare_1_Description: Each time you perform a Synthesis, draw a skill.
szb_Orchis.Buff/B_Orchis_Rare_2_Description: When using a Puppet card to attack an enemy, deal &a (50% Attack Power) additional damage.
szb_Orchis.Buff/B_Orchis_puppet_lv2_1_Description: At the start of the turn, add a <color=#32C932>Flowery Doll</color> to your hand. Then remove this buff.
szb_Orchis.Buff/B_Orchis_puppet_lv4_2_Description:
Absolute Defense
Block one debuff that would otherwise succeed.
Reduces by 1 stack when attacked.
szb_Orchis.Buff/B_Orchis_puppet_lv4_3_Description:
When using an attack skill, attack the target again with the same damage multiplier.
Reduces by 1 stack each time an attack skill is used.
szb_Orchis.Buff/B_Orchis_puppet_lv6_2_Description:
All Puppet cards gain Critical, Tracking, and +35% Critical Hit Chance when played.
When removed, add one Puppet card of each level from 1 to 6 to your hand.
szb_Orchis.Buff/DB_Orchis_Puppet_lv3_4_Description: When an attack reduces an investigator to near-death, add a "Joker Card" to the deck.
szb_Orchis.Buff/DB_Orchis_puppet_lv6_3_Description:
Damage dealt is reduced by 100%.
Removed at the end of the turn.
szb_Orchis.Character/Orchis_PassiveDes:
When Orchis has adjacent Puppet cards of the same level in hand, they are synthesized into a single higher-level Puppet card.
At the start of each turn, gain a Puppet card two levels below the highest-level Puppet card played last turn. (Minimum Lv0, Maximum Lv4)

When discarding a Puppet card via Exchange, choose one of the following:
Add a skill with the same name as the discarded Puppet card to your hand, then gain 1 Exchange count (max additional Exchange counts gained this way per turn equals character level + 2).
Draw a skill.
Restore 1 Mana.
szb_Orchis.Character/Orchis_SelectInfo:
A self-aware puppet girl who commands Lloyd, a powerful battle golem.

Orchis can synthesize lower-level Puppet cards to obtain more powerful skills, or use buffs to grant each Puppet card additional effects.
szb_Orchis.Character/Orchis_Text_Battle_Idle_0: With Lloyd's power, we won't lose.
szb_Orchis.Character/Orchis_Text_Field_Idle_0: The meaning of existence... I'll grasp it with my own hands.
szb_Orchis.Character/Orchis_Text_Field_Potion_P_0: Does this... work on me too?
szb_Orchis.Character/Orchis_Text_MasterTarget: This time, it's my turn to protect you all.
szb_Orchis.Character/Orchis_Text_PharosLeader_0: Don't you dare take Lloyd away!
szb_Orchis.Skill/S_Orchis_2_Description: When activated, randomly add a Puppet card with a level no greater than 2 to your hand.
szb_Orchis.Skill/S_Orchis_3_Description: When activated, add an <color=#FFFFFF>Improved Marionette</color> to your hand.
szb_Orchis.Skill/S_Orchis_4_Description: When activated, add a <color=#ADD8E6>Marionette</color> to your hand.
szb_Orchis.Skill/S_Orchis_5_Description:
Choose two of the following skills to add to your hand.
-<color=#ADD8E6>Marionette</color>
-<color=#FFFFFF>Improved Marionette</color>
-Armed Enhancement
szb_Orchis.Skill/S_Orchis_5_token_Description: If the target is yourself, choose a Puppet card in hand with a level no greater than 2, Exclude it, and gain a Puppet card with a level 1 higher.
szb_Orchis.Skill/S_Orchis_6_Description:
Add a <color=#ADD8E6>Marionette</color> and an <color=#FFFFFF>Improved Marionette</color> to your hand.
If the remaining Mana after activation is 1 or more, spend 1 Mana to grant the <color=#ADD8E6>Marionette</color> just added: when played or Excluded, add an <color=#FFFFFF>Improved Marionette</color> to your hand. Grant the <color=#FFFFFF>Improved Marionette</color> just added: when played or Excluded, add a <color=#ADD8E6>Marionette</color> to your hand.
szb_Orchis.Skill/S_Orchis_7_Description: When activated, randomly add a Puppet card with a level no greater than 2 to your hand.
szb_Orchis.Skill/S_Orchis_8_Description:
Can only target Puppet cards with a level no greater than 3.
Exclude the selected skill and add a Puppet card with a level 1 higher to your hand.
szb_Orchis.Skill/S_Orchis_9_Description:
Activate repeatedly based on the sum of levels of Puppet cards in hand.
Current number of repeated activations: &a.
szb_Orchis.Skill/S_Orchis_Lucy_1_Description:
Draw two skills.
Restore Mana equal to half the level (rounded down) of the highest-level Puppet card in hand.
szb_Orchis.Skill/S_Orchis_P_1_Description:
Generate a skill with the same name as the discarded Puppet card at the bottom of your hand (if the original skill cannot be synthesized, this skill also cannot be synthesized).
Gain 1 Exchange count (can only trigger up to character level + 2 times per turn).
Remaining triggers this turn: &c.
szb_Orchis.Skill/S_Orchis_Puppet_lv1_2_Description:
<color=#FFFFFF>Puppet Card: Lv1</color>
When this skill is Excluded, add a <color=#ADD8E6>Marionette</color> to your hand.
szb_Orchis.Skill/S_Orchis_Puppet_lv1_3_Description:
<color=#FFFFFF>Puppet Card: Lv1</color>
Cannot be used.
At the end of the turn, if this skill is in hand, deal &a (60% Attack Power) damage to a random enemy.
When this skill is Excluded, if a <color=#ADD8E6>Marionette</color> is in hand, discard a random <color=#ADD8E6>Marionette</color> and add an <color=#FFFFFF>Abused Puppet</color> to your hand.
szb_Orchis.Skill/S_Orchis_Puppet_lv2_2_Description:
<color=#32C932>Puppet Card: Lv2</color>
If this skill is already in hand, it will not appear when obtaining Puppet cards.
Each time you perform a Synthesis, add a <color=#ADD8E6>Marionette</color> to your hand.
szb_Orchis.Skill/S_Orchis_Puppet_lv2_3_Description:
<color=#32C932>Puppet Card: Lv2</color>
When activated, grant a random <color=#ADD8E6>Marionette</color> in hand: when played or Excluded, add a <color=#32C932>Doll Blooming in the Garden</color> to your hand.
szb_Orchis.Skill/S_Orchis_Puppet_lv2_4_Description:
<color=#32C932>Puppet Card: Lv2</color>
When activated, add an <color=#FFFFFF>Improved Marionette</color> to your hand.
szb_Orchis.Skill/S_Orchis_Puppet_lv3_1_Description:
<color=#0068FF>Puppet Card: Lv3</color>
At the end of the turn, if this skill is in hand, deal &a (110% Attack Power) damage to a random enemy.
szb_Orchis.Skill/S_Orchis_Puppet_lv3_3_Description:
<color=#0068FF>Puppet Card: Lv3</color>
When activated, grant three random skills in hand: when played, add a <color=#ADD8E6>Marionette</color> to your hand.
szb_Orchis.Skill/S_Orchis_Puppet_lv3_4_Description:
<color=#0068FF>Puppet Card: Lv3</color>
Applies "You're a Joker Too!" lasting only 1 turn to all other allied units simultaneously.
szb_Orchis.Skill/S_Orchis_Puppet_lv4_1_Description:
<color=#D881EF>Puppet Card: Lv4</color>
This skill and skills with the same name can only trigger the following once per turn: after activation, add a <color=#D881EF>Marionette Tore</color> to your hand.
Can currently trigger this effect: &a
szb_Orchis.Skill/S_Orchis_Puppet_lv5_1_Description:
<color=#FFA500>Puppet Card: Lv5</color>
When played, add a <color=#D881EF>Victoria</color> with doubled damage that <color=#FF0000>cannot be Synthesized</color> to your hand.
szb_Orchis.Skill/S_Orchis_Puppet_lv5_2_Description:
<color=#FFA500>Puppet Card: Lv5</color>
When played, add one Puppet Card of each level from 0 to 3 to your hand at random, then add a <color=#D881EF>Victoria</color> that <color=#FF0000>cannot be Synthesized</color> to your hand.
szb_Orchis.Skill/S_Orchis_Puppet_lv5_3_Description:
<color=#FFA500>Puppet Card: Lv5</color>
When played, if a <color=#ADD8E6>Marionette</color> is in your hand, randomly Exclude one <color=#ADD8E6>Marionette</color> and choose one of the following effects:
- Add a <color=#FF0000>non-Synthesizable</color> <color=#D881EF>Lloyd</color> to your hand.
- Add a <color=#FF0000>non-Synthesizable</color> <color=#D881EF>Marionette Tore</color> to your hand (skills gained after playing this card also <color=#FF0000>cannot be Synthesized</color>).
szb_Orchis.Skill/S_Orchis_Puppet_lv5_4_Description:
<color=#FFA500>Puppet Card: Lv5</color>
When played, add one Puppet of each level from 0 to 3 to your hand at random, then choose one of the following effects:
- Gain 2 stacks of "Lloyd's Protection."
- Add a <color=#0068FF>Marionette Zuno</color> to your hand. If a <color=#0068FF>Marionette Zuno</color> is already in your hand, add a <color=#0068FF>Marionette Toye</color> instead.
szb_Orchis.Skill/S_Orchis_Puppet_lv6_1_Description:
This skill is not counted as a Puppet Card, but when played, it is treated as having used a level 5 Puppet Card this turn.
Deals only 5% damage to allies.
After playing, choose to add either a <color=#D881EF>Lloyd</color> or a <color=#D881EF>Victoria</color> to your hand.
Then, add two random Puppet Cards of levels 1 to 3 to your hand.
szb_Orchis.Skill/S_Orchis_Puppet_lv6_2_Description:
<color=#FF2400>Puppet Card: Lv6</color>
When played, add an <color=#FF2400>Orchis's Puppet · Lloyd</color> to your hand.
szb_Orchis.Skill/S_Orchis_Puppet_lv6_3_Description:
<color=#FF2400>Puppet Card: Lv6</color>
After playing, apply "Lloyd's Suppression" to two random enemy units.
szb_Orchis.Skill/S_Orchis_Puppet_lv6_4_Description:
<color=#FF2400>Puppet Card: Lv6</color>
When added to your hand, the next Puppet Card you play becomes an all-target attack dealing &Damage (300% of Attack Power).
Can be played on turns after the above effect has been triggered, even if not added to your hand that turn.
When this card, after triggering the effect, is played or discarded, add a <color=#FF2400>Stepping Heart · Orchis</color> to your hand. (This effect does not trigger when discarded via Exchange.)
szb_Orchis.Skill/S_Orchis_Rare_1_Description: When played, add 30 <color=#ADD8E6>Marionette</color> cards to your deck.
szb_Orchis.Skill/S_Orchis_Rare_2_Description: When played, add one Puppet Card of each level below the highest-level Puppet Card used in this battle to your hand.
szb_Orchis.SkillExtended/SE_Orchis_6_0_Name: When played or Excluded, add a <color=#ADD8E6>Marionette</color> to your hand.
szb_Orchis.SkillExtended/SE_Orchis_6_1_Name: When played or Excluded, add an <color=#FFFFFF>Improved Marionette</color> to your hand.
szb_Orchis.SkillExtended/SE_Orchis_Puppet_lv2_3_Nam: When played or Excluded, add a <color=#32C932>Doll Blooming in the Garden</color> to your hand.
szb_Orchis.SkillExtended/SE_Orchis_Puppet_lv3_3_Nam: When played, add a <color=#ADD8E6>Marionette</color> to your hand.
szb_Orchis.SkillExtended/SkillEn_Orchis_1_Name: When played, based on the Mana consumed, this is treated as having used a Puppet Card of the same level this turn.
szb_Orchis.SkillExtended/SkillEn_Orchis_2_Name: When played, based on the Mana consumed, add a random Puppet Card of that level or lower to your hand (maximum level 4).
szb_Orchis.S_Sunny_9_1: Deals bonus damage based on the stat influence value of "Radiant Sunlight" on the target.
szb_Orchis.S_Sunny_9_2: Apply "Unable to Act" for 1 turn to the target's "Radiant Sunlight" (&a%<sprite=2>). (Success rate increases based on the stat influence value of your own "Radiant Sunlight.")

Mousse_Z.Skill/S_Mousse_Test_AllCookBuffs_Descrip: Congratulations, you found an Easter egg!

DCovBinah.Skill/allupgrade_Description:
At the start of battle, remove this skill.
Your passive changes to "Activates when your hand size is 5 or fewer."
Liberate all of your skills.
DCovBinah.Buff/allupgradebuf_Description: For this battle, your passive changes to "Activates when your hand size is 5 or fewer." All of your cards trigger their [Liberation] effects.
DCovBinah.Skill/beast_Description:
At the start of battle, remove this skill.
Randomly add one of "Giant Eye," "Long Arms," or "Small Beak" to Binah's skill pool. When Binah resets her skills, she randomly gains a different skill.
When a character obtains all three at once.......
DCovBinah.Skill/bigbeast_Description: The day the far-seeing eyes of the Great Bird, the judging scales of the High Bird, and the all-devouring maw of the Small Bird became one — that was the day calamity descended upon this forest.
DCovBinah.Skill/bigbird_Description: The Giant Eye blots out the light.
DCovBinah.Buff/bigeyes_Description:
At the start of the turn, apply "Enchanted" to all enemy targets.
Enchanted enemies are forced to target themselves and deal +20% damage.
Damage dealt to Enchanted targets is increased by 20%, and dealing damage restores 5 HP.
DCovBinah.Character/Binah_PassiveDesc:
At the start of battle, remove all of your skills and place them into Binah's deck.
When drawing a skill, if your hand contains fewer than 4 skills, obtain a skill from Binah's deck that has not yet been chosen.
Reset the deck once all skills in it have been chosen.
DCovBinah.Character/Binah_SelectInfo:
Once an Arbiter of the City, now a Patron Librarian of the Library's Floor of Philosophy — Binah wields the power of Fairies. Yet her power has not fully awakened.
"All things repeat.
Once the chains are severed, the Librarians of this place undergo yet another cycle.
The important thing, however, is that the cycle was broken at least once."
DCovBinah.Skill/BinahLucy_Description: Draw one skill. Remove all skills with "Exclude" from your hand and draw an equal number of skills.
DCovBinah.Skill/chain_Description:
Increase the target's next action Countdown by 10.
<color=#c2af47>Liberation</color>
DCovBinah.Buff/enchanted_Description:
Forced to attack &target.
Damage dealt is increased by 20%.
Removed after attacking.
DCovBinah.Skill/fairy_Description:
Restore 1 Mana after use.
<color=#c2af47>Liberation: Cost is reduced by an additional 1. Mana restored is reduced by 1.</color>
DCovBinah.Buff/fiarybuf_Description: Upon acting and at the end of the turn, take &stack Pain damage. At the end of the turn, stack count is halved.
DCovBinah.Buff/lockbuf_Description: At the start of the next turn, action Countdown is increased by &stack.
DCovBinah.Skill/pillar_Description:
If the target is about to attack you, Stun the target.
<color=#c2af47>Liberation: Apply 1 stack of Weakening to the target.</color>
DCovBinah.Skill/sbeak_Description: Take Pain damage equal to 15% of your maximum HP. Restore 1 Mana.
DCovBinah.Skill/shockwave_Description:
Grant all allies 3 stacks of Guard.
<color=#c2af47>Liberation: Additionally grant all allies 3 stacks of Encouragement.</color>
DCovBinah.Skill/slock_Description:
Restore 1 Mana. Increase the target's action Countdown by 1 next turn.
<color=#c2af47>Liberation: Additionally increase the target's action Countdown by 1. Additionally apply 2 stacks of Weakening to the target.</color>
DCovBinah.Buff/smallbeak_Description: At the start of the turn, generate a "Small Beak" card in your hand.
DCovBinah.Skill/smallbird_Description:
The Small Beak whispers.
On and on it chatters......
DCovBinah.Buff/Thebeast_Description:
Upon taking damage, remove all positive buffs from the damage source.
All skill costs are reduced by 2 and gain Swiftness.
At the end of the turn, deal Pain damage equal to 3% of maximum HP to all characters except yourself.
DCovBinah.SkillKeyword/upgrade_Description: When used as an Innate skill, cost is unchanged and damage is increased by 30%.

OtherworldInvestigatorLiDailin.Buff/B_LiDailin_7_Description: The next attack is guaranteed to evade.
OtherworldInvestigatorLiDailin.Buff/B_LiDailin_P_VE_Description: <color=#919191>Why is everything spinning? Can it please stop...</color>
OtherworldInvestigatorLiDailin.Character/LiDailin_CampSelectWord: Ha... do I really have to?
OtherworldInvestigatorLiDailin.Character/LiDailin_PassiveDes: Inebriated Passively gains Inebriated (Damage -15%, Evade +15%). Drunk Gains a stack of Drunk (Critical Hit Chance +15%, Critical Damage +5%, max 5 stacks) when evading an enemy attack or whenever a card costing more than 1 Mana is played from hand (excluding Lucy's skills). On a Critical Hit, removes one stack of Drunk. Boozy Breath When evading an enemy attack, has a (75% + Debuff Success rate) chance to inflict Tipsy on the enemy (Critical Hit Chance -5%, max 3 stacks).
OtherworldInvestigatorLiDailin.Character/LiDailin_SelectInfo:
Li Dailin is the only daughter of a martial arts family. Rather than showing her genuine care, her family placed all their hopes on her to carry on their martial legacy. This bred nothing but resentment toward martial arts within her. She eventually cast aside the inherited techniques, the family studio, and her identity as a martial artist — selling it all off as revenge against her past, and choosing a new life of her own.

Li Dailin has low Attack Power but a high Evade rate. Through her cards, she can build up significant Critical Hit Chance to compensate for her low base damage.
OtherworldInvestigatorLiDailin.Character/LiDailin_Text_Battle_Cri_0: Looks like I'm still hitting a little too hard~
OtherworldInvestigatorLiDailin.Character/LiDailin_Text_Battle_Healed_0: Ha~ So you do need me after all?
OtherworldInvestigatorLiDailin.Character/LiDailin_Text_Battle_Healed_1: Ugh... it's a pain, but I'll manage.
OtherworldInvestigatorLiDailin.Character/LiDailin_Text_Battle_Idle_0: I am NOT drunk. Wait.... why are you upside down?
OtherworldInvestigatorLiDailin.Character/LiDailin_Text_Battle_Idle_1: I only had a little~ Maybe around five bottles?
OtherworldInvestigatorLiDailin.Character/LiDailin_Text_Battle_Idle_2: You think I still do martial arts? Please, I forgot all that old stuff ages ago.
OtherworldInvestigatorLiDailin.Character/LiDailin_Text_Battle_Kill_0: So annoying, can you just be quiet!
OtherworldInvestigatorLiDailin.Character/LiDailin_Text_Battle_Kill_1: You're the ones who started it.
OtherworldInvestigatorLiDailin.Character/LiDailin_Text_Battle_Kill_2: Ha... don't push me like that.
OtherworldInvestigatorLiDailin.Character/LiDailin_Text_Battle_ND_0: Soon... I'll drink myself into oblivion.
OtherworldInvestigatorLiDailin.Character/LiDailin_Text_Battle_ND_1: I really did give it my all~
OtherworldInvestigatorLiDailin.Character/LiDailin_Text_Battle_Start_0: Think you could go a little easier on me?
OtherworldInvestigatorLiDailin.Character/LiDailin_Text_Field_GetItem_0: Keep looking — maybe there's a bottle of something around here?
OtherworldInvestigatorLiDailin.Character/LiDailin_Text_Field_GetItem_1: There's booze in a place like this! .... No way....
OtherworldInvestigatorLiDailin.Character/LiDailin_Text_Field_Idle_0: Where's the drink.... is it hidden around here.....?
OtherworldInvestigatorLiDailin.Character/LiDailin_Text_Field_Idle_1: So tired.... is it over yet....
OtherworldInvestigatorLiDailin.Character/LiDailin_Text_Field_Idle_2: One more drink and then I'll sleep~
OtherworldInvestigatorLiDailin.Character/LiDailin_Text_MasterTarget: Just let me have one last sip~ It won't be a problem~
OtherworldInvestigatorLiDailin.Character/LiDailin_Text_PharosLeader_0: You'll get me a bottle as payment, right?
OtherworldInvestigatorLiDailin.Character/LiDailin_Text_PharosLeader_1: Hehehe... did I drink too much? My bad~
OtherworldInvestigatorLiDailin.Character/LiDailin_Text_Witch_1: Buy me a drink after this, deal?
OtherworldInvestigatorLiDailin.Character_Skin/DragonDanceLiDailin_SkinD: What?! Did I turn into a dragon? Fine then — I'll drive away the evil spirits, and everyone else can just enjoy the festival~
OtherworldInvestigatorLiDailin.Character_Skin/FestiveRoarLiDailin_SkinD: Hand over the snacks, or you're next!
OtherworldInvestigatorLiDailin.Character_Skin/RebelLiDailin_SkinDesc: This? It's just a water flask~ I told you, it's a water flask!!
OtherworldInvestigatorLiDailin.Character_Skin/CadetLiDailin_SkinDesc: Huh, are you congratulating me? Thanks~ So, want to celebrate with a drink?
OtherworldInvestigatorLiDailin.Character_Skin/SummerToastLiDailin_SkinD: No jumping in the water when you're drunk~ Hehe, don't worry~
OtherworldInvestigatorLiDailin.Skill/S_LiDailin_0_Description: Activates again on a Critical Hit.
OtherworldInvestigatorLiDailin.Skill/S_LiDailin_1_Description:
<color=#FFA636FF>Gain </color><color=#FF7C34FF>Ignore Taunt</color><color=#FFA636FF> when Drunk stacks exceed 3.</color>
Deals &a <color=#FF7C34FF>(20% of Attack Power)</color> additional damage for each <sprite=0> debuff stack on the target.
OtherworldInvestigatorLiDailin.Skill/S_LiDailin_2_Description:
Attacks 2 additional times. If at least one hit is a Critical Hit, attacks 2 more times.
Does not follow up if the target dies.
OtherworldInvestigatorLiDailin.Skill/S_LiDailin_4_Description:
<color=#FFA636FF>Gain </color><color=#FF7C34FF>Ignore Taunt</color><color=#FFA636FF> when Drunk stacks exceed 3.</color>
Applies 2 stacks of Stun on a Critical Hit.
OtherworldInvestigatorLiDailin.Skill/S_LiDailin_5_Description: Can be used again for 1 Mana.
OtherworldInvestigatorLiDailin.Skill/S_LiDailin_6_Description: On a Critical Hit, has a (<sprite=2>&a%) chance to apply Stun.
OtherworldInvestigatorLiDailin.Skill/S_LiDailin_7_Description: Consumed on the third use. Grants self the Fox Step buff.
OtherworldInvestigatorLiDailin.Skill/S_LiDailin_9_Description:
Can only be used while Inebriated.
Consumes all Inebriated stacks.
Grants self the Medicinal Brew buff (<color=#FFFFFFFF>Restore &a</color> <color=#FF7C34FF>(stacks consumed × 3)</color> <color=#FFFFFFFF>HP per turn</color>, lasts 3 turns).
OtherworldInvestigatorLiDailin.Skill/S_LiDailin_LucyDraw_Description: Inflicts Stun on the target. Draw 3 of the target's skills from the card pool.
OtherworldInvestigatorLiDailin.Skill/S_LiDailin_R0_Description:
Place this card on top of the deck at the start of battle.
For this battle, replace all Inebriated stacks with Drunken Dream stacks, and grant self Striking Tiger.
OtherworldInvestigatorLiDailin.Skill/S_LiDailin_R1_Description:
<color=#FFA636FF>Gain </color><color=#FF7C34FF>Ignore Taunt</color><color=#FFA636FF> when Drunk stacks exceed 3. Cost -1 when Drunk stacks exceed 5.</color>
Attacks again for each Critical Hit (up to 6 times). Each additional attack reduces Critical Hit Chance by 15%.
Attacks from this card cannot be evaded.
OtherworldInvestigatorLiDailin.SkillExtended/SkillEn_LiDailin_1_Name: When played from hand, Li Dailin gains Drunk stacks equal to the card's cost.
OtherworldInvestigatorLiDailin.Skill/S_LiDailin_8_Description: Removes Hammered for this turn and applies Hiccup to self.

Feiyap.Buff/B_Feiyap_0_Description: At the end of the turn, remove 1 stack of this buff.
Feiyap.Buff/B_Feiyap_5_Description: Cannot receive any healing effects from other units.
Feiyap.Buff/B_Feiyap_6_Description:
Cannot die from <color=purple>Pain damage</color>.
Using skills costs no Mana, but inflicts <color=purple>&a Pain damage</color> on self. Each trigger doubles the Pain damage.
Feiyap.Buff/B_Feiyap_7_Description:
Evade the next attack received.
Upon triggering the evade, perform a counterattack dealing &a damage <color=#FF7A33>(100% of Attack Power)</color> and apply 1 stack of "Inner Burn."
Removed after triggering.
Feiyap.Buff/B_Feiyap_Rare_1_Description:
When another ally is targeted by an enemy skill, redirect the target to self.
While this buff is active, the effects of the passive "Hizen Style" are doubled.
When the buff expires, perform additional attacks on random enemies based on the number of times self took damage during the buff's duration, dealing &a damage per hit <color=#FF7A33>(100% of Attack Power)</color>.
Current damage count: &b
Feiyap.Buff/B_Feiyap_Rare_3_Description: Gain increased Attack Power based on the percentage of HP lost. Maximum increase of 300%. A salute to the uncrowned king.
Feiyap.Character/Feiyap_CampSelectWord: Good day, Miss Lucy. I am Feiyap. Take me to the battlefield.
Feiyap.Character/Feiyap_PassiveDes: While self has Healing Gauge Protection, 25% of damage dealt by attacks is converted into healing for self.
Feiyap.Character/Feiyap_SelectInfo:
Among countless fragments of shattered worlds, the Feiyap who chose to become an Ark investigator.
Feiyap is a self-taught samurai who wields a katana known as "Hizen Ichimonji." The death energy and magical power dwelling within the blade grant her the ability to manipulate azure flames — capable not only of burning enemies, but also of taking the shape of a second blade for her to command. To her, the Distorted Land is simply another battlefield, another field of severed heads.

Yet occasionally, through a fleeting glimpse across the countless fragments of shattered worlds, one may catch sight of a Feiyap who has seen "another possibility."
Feiyap.Character/Feiyap_Text_Battle_AllyND_0: Don't you dare die before me.
Feiyap.Character/Feiyap_Text_Battle_Healed_1: You needn't bother for someone like me...
Feiyap.Character/Feiyap_Text_Battle_Idle_0: Hm? What's wrong? Why aren't you cutting someone down yet?
Feiyap.Character/Feiyap_Text_Battle_Idle_1: No need to overthink it. Cut people down, take your wounds — that's all there is to it.
Feiyap.Character/Feiyap_Text_Battle_Kill_1: Dying by my blade is your honor.
Feiyap.Character/Feiyap_Text_Battle_ND_1: Ah... so I too am finally...
Feiyap.Character/Feiyap_Text_Battle_Start_0: Good day. I am Feiyap. Now allow me to kill you.
Feiyap.Character/Feiyap_Text_Battle_Start_1: Nameless and formless — the characters of Hizen.
Feiyap.Character/Feiyap_Text_Field_GetItem_0: Oh my, I'm not sure of its value, but it seems like something good?
Feiyap.Character/Feiyap_Text_Field_Idle_0: What's the matter, need a rest? I'll keep watch.
Feiyap.Character/Feiyap_Text_MasterTarget: To die on the battlefield as a samurai — there is no greater honor.
Feiyap.Character/Feiyap_Text_PharosLeader_1: How many more... have I killed...
Feiyap.Character/Feiyap_Text_PharosLeader_2: The enemy general's head — has been taken by my hand!
Feiyap.Character/Feiyap_Text_Witch_0: Ah, curses... nothing unusual about that.
Feiyap.Character/Feiyap_Text_Witch_1: Feels like my very bones are freezing. No matter — come.
Feiyap.Character_Skin/FeiyapCoffee_SkinDesc:
Among countless fragments of shattered worlds, the Feiyap who chose to become an office worker.
An utterly ordinary girl, simply savoring a leisurely afternoon — all thoughts of work cast far aside.
Feiyap.Character_Skin/FeiyapMaid_SkinDesc:
Among countless fragments of shattered worlds, the Feiyap who chose to become a maid.
Beneath that graceful and refined exterior, what lies hidden — honey, or a blade's edge?
Perhaps only the master she serves will ever know. ♥
Feiyap.Character_Skin/FeiyapMaster_SkinDesc:
Among countless fragments of shattered worlds, the Feiyap who chose to become a sword master.
Thousands of strikes completed in a single instant — followed by a death blow that swallows eternity.
Prepare yourself for the master's wrath.
Feiyap.Item_Equip/E_Feiyap_1_Description: At the end of each turn, this equipment's stats decrease by -5%/-5%/-5%. Stats reset when a Dark Fog turn arrives. Summon the courage that was lost once more.
Feiyap.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDia_Feiyap_Azar_D: [A] Why can you create phantom blades? What's the principle behind it?
[B] You don't need to understand the phantom blade so deeply.
Feiyap.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDia_Feiyap_Caron_: [A] That's right, Charon — exactly like that, erode my life with dark magic...
[B] ...Somehow, I have absolutely no motivation for this.
Feiyap.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDia_Feiyap_Contro: [A] A psychic? That sounds quite fancy.
[B] Heh, just a hollow title. Can't compare to warriors like you.
[A] Heh... I'm just a wandering ronin with nowhere to go.
Feiyap.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDia_Feiyap_Hein_D: [A] Why so quiet? Don't you want to have a good fight?
Feiyap.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDia_Feiyap_Huz_Di: [A] Haah... Miss Huz, right there — press a little harder please...
[B] I'm just treating your wounds, okay?!
[A] This treatment that's almost suffocating... it's absolutely wonderful...
Feiyap.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDia_Feiyap_Ilya_D: [B] Y-you... don't come any closer, what do you want?!
[A] I've heard you are a master of the katana. I've come to challenge you to a duel to the death...
Feiyap.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDia_Feiyap_Joey_D: [A] Hm? Master Joey, did you say something just now?
[B] M-Master Joey?! ...Hmph, you're not so bad!
Feiyap.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDia_Feiyap_Leryn_: [A] From the research institute... don't worry, I'll protect you.
[B] I don't need an attacker type looking after me!
Feiyap.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDia_Feiyap_Lian_D: [B] Hey! Your fighting style is dangerous!
[A] Ahh... the brilliant sight of the instructor throwing herself into harm's way to protect her allies...
Feiyap.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDia_Feiyap_Mement: [A] A bow... what a nostalgic weapon.
[B] Oh? Have you studied archery as well?
[A] In the age of war I came from, you'd die quickly if you weren't proficient in every weapon.
Feiyap.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDia_Feiyap_MissCh: [A] Don't you find fighting with a chainsaw dangerous?
[B] That's exactly what makes it thrilling! Don't you think so?
[A] A samurai should die by an enemy's hand, not by...
Feiyap.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDia_Feiyap_Momori: [A] Little sister Momori, you know that fighting like that is quite dangerous?
[B] Of all people, the last one I want to hear that from is you...
Feiyap.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDia_Feiyap_Phoeni: [B] That's right, that's right! Admire me, revere me, and bring me bread!
[A] But aren't a firebird and a phoenix two different things?
Feiyap.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDia_Feiyap_Priest: [B] My lady, would you be interested in hearing about our great god?
[A] Ah, I'm sorry — I'm an atheist.
[A] Because I killed my god with my own hands.
Feiyap.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDia_Feiyap_Prime_: [B] Don't worry! As long as I'm here, none of you will get hurt!
[A] Would you please let me get hurt a little...
Feiyap.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDia_Feiyap_Silver: [B] I can't stop you from charging ahead on your own, but don't drag the rest of us down with you.
[A] Heheh... don't worry, I won't fall so easily...
Feiyap.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDia_Feiyap_Sizz_D: [B] Senior! Please stop getting yourself hurt on purpose?!
[A] The feeling of flesh being cut open... don't you find it captivating, Sizz?
[B] What's there to be captivated by in something like that...?
[A] Without the resolve to be cut open yourself, you can't so easily draw your blade and cut another, you know?
Feiyap.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDia_Feiyap_TWBlue: [B] U-um, your sword... it's really beautiful...
Feiyap.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDia_Feiyap_TWRed_: [B] Would you stop swinging around that hunk of scrap metal! Why not try magic for once?!
[B] (Eeek... that's terrifying... the look in her eyes is terrifying...!)
Feiyap.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDia_Feiyap_Trisha: [B] You reek of blood. Just what are you...
[A] Oh, Trisha, I just butchered a rabbit. Want to eat together?
Feiyap.Skill/S_Feiyap_0_Description:
If you have Healing Gauge Protection, deal &a additional damage <color=#FF7A33>(50% of Attack Power)</color>.
Otherwise, gain 1 stack of "Crimson Blade Flow".
Feiyap.Skill/S_Feiyap_1_Description:
If you have Healing Gauge Protection, inflict Pain damage on the target twice equal to the total per-turn Pain damage of all debuffs the target holds.
Otherwise, apply 1 additional stack of "Inner Burn".
Feiyap.Skill/S_Feiyap_2_Description:
Choose - Gain 1 stack of "Crimson Blade Flow";
Apply 1 stack of "Inner Burn" to the target.
Feiyap.Skill/S_Feiyap_3_Description: Reveal all of your skills in the deck and discard pile (except "Star Pillar"). Choose 1 to return to your hand.
Feiyap.Skill/S_Feiyap_4_Description:
For each point of HP loss (green HP) you have, this skill deals <color=#FF7A33>&a</color> additional damage <color=#FF7A33>(10% of Attack Power)</color>.
For each Pain debuff stack the target has, this skill deals 10% additional damage.
Feiyap.Skill/S_Feiyap_6_Description:
Grant a random <color=yellow>Enhancement</color> to all skills in hand.
If this skill has any <color=yellow>Enhancement</color>, also grant a random <color=yellow>Enhancement</color> to all skills in the deck.
Feiyap.Skill/S_Feiyap_7_Description:
Set your own HP to 0 and remove all <sprite=0>Weakening debuffs from yourself.
Remove all <sprite=1>Pain debuffs and <sprite=2>CC debuffs from all targets.
Feiyap.Skill/S_Feiyap_8_Description:
Restore the target's Healing Gauge to their maximum HP and remove all Overload from the target.
For each stack of Overload removed, restore 1 Mana.
Feiyap.Skill/S_Feiyap_LucyD_1_Description: Draw 2 skills. If the target has Healing Gauge Protection, draw 1 additional skill.
Feiyap.Skill/S_Feiyap_LucyD_1_Name: A Chance Meeting at an Afternoon Café
Feiyap.Skill/S_Feiyap_LucyD_2_Name: Keeping Watch at the Midnight Bonfire
Feiyap.Skill/S_Feiyap_Rare_2_0_Description:
Inflict Pain damage on the target once equal to the total remaining damage of all Pain debuffs the target holds.
Permanent Pain debuffs are treated as 6 turns for this calculation.
Feiyap.Skill/S_Feiyap_Rare_2_Description: If you have Healing Gauge Protection, generate "Falling Stars".
Feiyap.SkillExtended/SE_Feiyap_C_0_Name: Apply Healing Gauge Protection for 2 turns.
Feiyap.SkillExtended/SE_Feiyap_C_1_Name: If the target has a Pain debuff, restore 1 Mana.
Feiyap.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDia_Feiyap_Caron_: [B] Could you please not look so pleased every time you borrow HP? It's honestly a little unsettling...
Feiyap.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDia_Feiyap_Chrona: [B] The possibilities within you... are far denser than anyone else I've seen.
[A] Perhaps what you're seeing are the countless versions of "me" from parallel worlds.
[B] Is that so? That would explain it...
[B] But then, what kind of existence are you right now, Miss Feiyap?
Feiyap.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDia_Feiyap_Eirin_: [B] Other than Mokou, you're the first human I've seen who's managed to wreck their body this thoroughly.
[A] My apologies, Lady Eirin. I'm sorry to trouble you with my wounds again.
[B] It's no trouble at all for me. Speaking of which, have you ever considered a certain... forbidden medicine?
[A] I'll pass. I still yearn for a permanent peace.
Feiyap.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDia_Feiyap_FAlice: [A] If I die someday, would you turn my body into a puppet?
[A] The thought of my own body being used as material for someone else to control however they please... it's so exciting...
[B] Hey... even if I am a magician, I won't do something so morally reprehensible.
[A] What if I got down on my knees and begged?
Feiyap.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDia_Feiyap_Flandr: [B] Sister Feiyap~! Will you play with Flandre again today?
[A] Of course. What would you like to do today?
[B] Let's play danmaku! Just don't go and die by accident, okay?
[A] Haha, you do ask a lot of me. I'll do my best.
Feiyap.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDia_Feiyap_Hakure: [B] Oh, Feiyap. What are we having for dinner tonight?
[A] Let me think... how about grilled fish?
[B] Ever since we teamed up, all I have to do is sit here and all kinds of delicious food appears.
[B] Ahh~ if this keeps up much longer, I feel like you're going to completely spoil me.
[A] It's just simple home cooking. If Lady Reimu is willing, I can keep making it as long as you like.
Feiyap.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDia_Feiyap_Hinana: [B] Oh! A human samurai! Perfect, come entertain me!
[A] So in a celestial's eyes, we humans are just tools for amusement...
[B] I-I didn't mean it like that...! Hey, what are you laughing at?!
[A] My apologies. Teasing Lady Tenshi is just too entertaining.
Feiyap.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDia_Feiyap_Hourai: [B] W-why are you staring at me like that?
[A] Just as the legends say — you are breathtaking, Lady Kaguya.
[A] Ahh, that long black hair, flowing like a waterfall, so beautiful and graceful... it makes one mad with envy...
[B] Eeek—! Eirin!! There's a weirdo over here!!!
Feiyap.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDia_Feiyap_Inaba_: [B] Ya-yo, Boss! Who are we cutting down today?
[A] Boss? Do I really look like that type?
[B] My instincts are never wrong! Boss will definitely protect us, right?!
Feiyap.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDia_Feiyap_Izayoi: [A] I'm sorry, Lady Sakuya. I'm afraid I need you to tend to my wounds again.
[B] I can see bone through that wound... I'm genuinely worried you might drop dead at any moment.
[A] It's fine. A mere fatal wound — a good night's sleep will fix it right up.
Feiyap.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDia_Feiyap_Kirisa: [B] Oh! It's Feiyap! I gathered a ton of mushrooms — want to make a stew tonight?
[A] As expected of Marisa — not a single poisonous one among them.
[B] Hehe, I'm a mushroom expert — that much is a given.
[A] You didn't taste every variety yourself to find out, did you...
Feiyap.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDia_Feiyap_Kochiy: [B] Feiyap looks about the same age as me! You were probably a high schooler in the outside world too, right? Which school?!
[A] In my era, there was only war. Children had no choice but to take up arms and cut people down.
[B] Oh... I'm sorry... I didn't mean to...
Feiyap.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDia_Feiyap_Little: [A] Ow... aren't you supposed to be the tank? How have you not taken a single hit?
[B] Because I dodged them all, meow~
[A] And every attack you dodged ended up hitting me instead.
Feiyap.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDia_Feiyap_Patcho: [B] Ah. Feiyap. Hand me that book, please.
[A] Lady Patchouli is truly dedicated. Reading even while we're out on the road.
[B] It's just a trashy novel to pass the time. Would you like to read it too?
[A] What a shame. I can't read.
Feiyap.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDia_Feiyap_Reisen: [B] Miss Feiyap~ Your medicine for today has arrived.
[A] Thank you, Miss Reisen. Sorry to ask, but could you apply the medicine to the wound on my back?
[B] The medicine was prepared by Master — I just carried it over. How is it? Does it still hurt?
[A] Thanks to you, I'm already fine.
Feiyap.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDia_Feiyap_Remili: [B] Feiyap, if humans keep getting themselves covered in wounds like this, they'll die very quickly, you know.
[A] If I could die for the Young Mistress, then I…
[B] Your "fate" belongs to me. I will not allow you to die so easily. Do you understand?
Feiyap.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDia_Feiyap_Satsuk: [A] Oh great divine beast of Gensokyo… can even an outsider like me receive your blessing?
[B] Valiant warrior, even if your dreams have long since shattered, become the uncrowned king.
[A] Then I shall take those words to heart, Lady Satsuki Rin.
Feiyap.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDia_Feiyap_Shuyu_: [A] Ow… Aren't you supposed to be a healer? Why haven't you healed anyone?
[B] It's not Shuyu's fault, it's this staff's fault, meow…
[A] What's wrong — is there a problem with the staff? I'm sorry, I shouldn't have doubted you…
[B] The staff is pointing itself at the enemies, meow~
Feiyap.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDia_Feiyap_Suwako: [B] Faith ♪ Faith ♪ Feiyap, won't you come and have faith in me?
[B] Then I'll wait until the very moment before you die and forcibly collect your faith ♪
Feiyap.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDia_Feiyap_Yasaka: [A] As expected of a war god. I can feel an overwhelming pressure just from standing beside you.
[B] Why do you show me such reverence? You seemed perfectly comfortable around that Suwako character.
[A] For someone like me, a war god is the most exalted of all deities.
[B] Ah… a samurai, huh? As I thought, samurai are always such troublesome folk…
[A] I— is it alright to say that…?
[B] If you're a samurai, then drop the stiff act and sit down for a good drink already! You hear me?!
Feiyap.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDia_Feiyap_Yuyuko: [B] Does watching your own life slowly wither away bring you joy? What a strange person you are.
[A] They say that if you bury a body beneath a cherry blossom tree, it will bloom into something beautiful the following year.
[A] If a magnificent flower could bloom from my corpse, wouldn't that be beautiful too?
Feiyap.Character_Skin/FeiyapGyaru_SkinDesc:
A "Feiyap" who is still just a student, found among the countless shards of shattered worlds.
Perhaps a little rough around the edges, but her swordsmanship is beyond doubt — the real deal.
"Ugh, this is such a pain… can we just get this over with?"

GFL_Fairy.Buff/B_GFL_Airstrike_Fairy_0_Description: When enemies appear, deal 9 damage to all enemies.
GFL_Fairy.Buff/B_GFL_Beach_Fairy_0_Description:
Wait Count +1 per turn.
At the start of each turn, if any enemy has a Countdown of 0, delay all enemies' actions by 1 Countdown.
GFL_Fairy.Buff/B_GFL_Combo_Fairy_0_Description:
Persists across areas.
Gains 1 stack at the end of each battle.
Removed when entering Near-Death state or when Combo Fairy is unequipped.
GFL_Fairy.Buff/B_GFL_Command_Fairy_0_Description: Gain 1 extra Soul Stone at the end of each battle.
GFL_Fairy.Buff/B_GFL_Electromagnetic_Fairy_0_Descr: Each time a <sprite=2>CC debuff is resisted, <sprite=2>CC Resist is additionally reduced by 20%.
GFL_Fairy.Buff/B_GFL_Illumination_Fairy_0_Descript:
Black Fog will not arrive.
Removed at the end of battle or when Illumination Fairy is unequipped.
GFL_Fairy.Buff/B_GFL_Landmine_Fairy_0_Description:
Persists across areas.
Removed when Landmine Fairy is unequipped.
When attacked while in Near-Death state, become immune to that attack and deal 40 damage to the attacker, then remove this buff.
GFL_Fairy.Buff/B_GFL_Peace_Fairy_0_Description:
No unit's HP can drop below 1.
Removed at the end of the second turn.
GFL_Fairy.Buff/B_GFL_Provocation_Fairy_0_Descripti:
Cannot restore HP. Dies immediately upon entering Near-Death state.
Prioritized as a target by enemies.
GFL_Fairy.Buff/B_GFL_Rocket_Fairy_0_Description:
Persists across areas.
For the next &num battles, place [Incendiary Missile] in the Countdown zone at the start of each turn.
GFL_Fairy.Buff/B_GFL_Sniper_Fairy_0_Description: Remaining duration is based on player turns.
GFL_Fairy.Buff/B_GFL_Stage_Mark_0_Description:
Tactical Fairy cannot be activated right now.
Removed upon entering the next area or switching Fairies.
GFL_Fairy.Buff/B_GFL_Witch_Fairy_0_Description: At the end of each turn, deal <color=purple>Pain damage</color> equal to 10% of all enemies' lost HP (up to 999) to all enemies.
GFL_Fairy.Item_Passive/Relic_Fairy_Command_Descrip:
A consumable required to activate Fairies.

Gain 1 Fairy Command upon winning each battle.

GFL_Fairy.Skill/S_GFL_Armor_Fairy_View_Description:
Combat Fairy

GFL_Fairy.Skill/S_GFL_Barrier_Fairy_Trigger_3_Desc: Persistently activate the effect of &FairyName until deactivated at the drone.
GFL_Fairy.Skill/S_GFL_Barrier_Fairy_Trigger_4_Desc: Cannot activate the effect of &FairyName right now.
GFL_Fairy.Skill/S_GFL_Barrier_Fairy_View_Descripti:
Combat Fairy
Cost: &use_price Fairy Command(s) per use
At the start of battle, gain &num Barrier based on the investigator's Defense.
GFL_Fairy.Skill/S_GFL_Beach_Fairy_Trigger_3_Descri: Persistently activate the effect of &FairyName until deactivated at the drone.
GFL_Fairy.Skill/S_GFL_Beach_Fairy_Trigger_4_Descri: Cannot activate the effect of &FairyName right now.

Combat Fairy

Wait Count +1 per turn.
At the start of battle, apply a Weakening debuff (<sprite=0> 300%) reducing Attack Power by 20% to all enemies for 3 turns.

GFL_Fairy.Skill/S_GFL_Bombardment_Fairy_1_Descript: Deals double damage to the enemy with the highest HP.
GFL_Fairy.Skill/S_GFL_Bombardment_Fairy_Trigger_3_: Persistently activate the effect of &FairyName until deactivated at the drone.
GFL_Fairy.Skill/S_GFL_Bombardment_Fairy_Trigger_4_: Cannot activate the effect of &FairyName right now.
GFL_Fairy.Skill/S_GFL_Bombardment_Fairy_View_Descr:
Combat Fairy
Cost: &use_price Fairy Command(s) per use
At the start of each even-numbered turn, place [Bombard Command] in the Countdown zone.
GFL_Fairy.Skill/S_GFL_Combo_Fairy_Trigger_3_Descri: Persistently activate the effect of &FairyName until deactivated at the drone.
GFL_Fairy.Skill/S_GFL_Combo_Fairy_Trigger_4_Descri: Cannot currently activate the effect of &FairyName.
GFL_Fairy.Skill/S_GFL_Combo_Fairy_View_Description:
Tactical Fairy
Cost: &use_price Fairy Command/use
Apply [Ultimate Combo] to all allies that do not already have [Ultimate Combo].
GFL_Fairy.Skill/S_GFL_Command_Fairy_Trigger_3_Desc: Persistently activate the effect of &FairyName until deactivated at the drone.
GFL_Fairy.Skill/S_GFL_Command_Fairy_Trigger_4_Desc: Cannot currently activate the effect of &FairyName.
GFL_Fairy.Skill/S_GFL_Command_Fairy_View_Descripti:
Combat Fairy
Cost: &use_price Fairy Command/use
At the end of battle, gain 1 additional Soul Stone.
GFL_Fairy.Skill/S_GFL_Defense_Fairy_Trigger_3_Desc: Persistently activate the effect of &FairyName until deactivated at the drone.
GFL_Fairy.Skill/S_GFL_Defense_Fairy_Trigger_4_Desc: Cannot currently activate the effect of &FairyName.
GFL_Fairy.Skill/S_GFL_Defense_Fairy_View_Descripti:
Combat Fairy

Although her shy personality clashes with her cheerful sister's, their shared passion for games has made them great partners.
ProjectMXCaiYu.Character_Skin/SaibaMidori_skin_SkinDesc: A member of Millennium Science School and illustrator of the Game Development Department, Midori has become... part of C&C. Though she didn't exactly volunteer to wear the maid outfit, she still takes her duties very seriously.

She develops real games alongside her twin sister Midori in the department. Although her cheerful personality clashes with her shy sister's, their shared passion for games has made them great partners.
ProjectMXCaiYu.Character_Skin/SaibaMomoi_skin_SkinDesc: A member of Millennium Science School and scenario writer of the Game Development Department. Mistaken for a C&C member, she ended up in a maid outfit by a stroke of coincidence. Even when caught up in trouble, she faces every setback with her trademark cheerful and upright spirit.
