LibraryOfRuinaYan.Character/RuinaYan_CampSelectWord: To Yan Vismok, following the Oracle Girl into the Twisted Lands...
LibraryOfRuinaYan.Character/RuinaYan_PassiveDes:
This passive activates at level 1.
Each time you level up, gain a Prescript that can be used to learn one non-duplicate random class or general skill. On the first level-up, gain one additional Prescript.

Yan's Fixed Ability randomly cycles between Prescript I: Strength, Prescript II: Protection, Prescript III: Draw Rune, and Prescript IV: Mana Recovery at the start of each turn and cannot be changed.

At the start of battle, each ally with no duplicate skills gains 5 stacks of Locked Potential, losing one stack for each unique skill used. Once all stacks of Locked Potential are removed, gain "Blade Unlocked." (Blood Mist cards in Lucy's deck are ignored.)
LibraryOfRuinaYan.Character/RuinaYan_SelectInfo:
Among the Syndicates of the City, the Backstreet Finger known as the Index is considered the most powerful. Of the Five Fingers, the Index follows the will of the City, using mysterious slips of paper called "Prescripts" to deliver seemingly random orders that must be strictly obeyed.

Members of the Index are chosen by Prescript and must follow them without question, devoting themselves entirely to carrying out whatever task is written. Through fulfilling their duties, they may earn promotion by Prescript — and it was through this very process that Yan became a Messenger.

As a Messenger, Yan receives and delivers Prescripts to those within Index territory, even as he harbors his own doubts about them. Where do they come from? Why was he chosen? The terrible acts he has committed in the name of the Prescripts haunt him, and his faith in the Index has long since crumbled.

In secret, Yan longs to destroy the Index and its Prescripts, and return free will to the City's citizens. So he delivers them in defiance — aiding those burdened with unjust orders, and sometimes forging Prescripts of his own, turning the Index's blind devotion against itself.

Yan is a support DPS who creates order from uncertainty. He brings a wealth of skills that turn seemingly random situations into advantages — drawing more cards, or making otherwise useless tools effective. Each ally with no duplicate skills gains stat bonuses, and as those allies use skills, the team can take turns gaining even more.
LibraryOfRuinaYan.Character/RuinaYan_Text_Battle_AllyND_0: I didn't come here to watch you bleed today.
LibraryOfRuinaYan.Character/RuinaYan_Text_Battle_AllyND_1: There is no end to suffering.
LibraryOfRuinaYan.Character/RuinaYan_Text_Battle_Cri_0: So it had to come to this...
LibraryOfRuinaYan.Character/RuinaYan_Text_Battle_Cri_1: I know you gave everything you had... but I'm sorry...
LibraryOfRuinaYan.Character/RuinaYan_Text_Battle_Idle_0: Everyone faces a test of their faith in the Prescripts.
LibraryOfRuinaYan.Character/RuinaYan_Text_Battle_Idle_1: Your Prescript only says we must face the challenge. You can still run.
LibraryOfRuinaYan.Character/RuinaYan_Text_Battle_Kill_1: Tear your opponent apart without mercy...
LibraryOfRuinaYan.Character/RuinaYan_Text_Battle_ND_0: As the Prescript says... I will see this through...
LibraryOfRuinaYan.Character/RuinaYan_Text_Battle_ND_1: I won't fall here. The Prescript says nothing of me falling.
LibraryOfRuinaYan.Character/RuinaYan_Text_Battle_Start_0: Could you reconsider? Nothing is truly free.
LibraryOfRuinaYan.Character/RuinaYan_Text_Battle_Start_1: To our opponents — you challenge the Oracle Girl at your own peril.
LibraryOfRuinaYan.Character/RuinaYan_Text_Field_GetItem_0: The Prescript says to take the item from the chest.
LibraryOfRuinaYan.Character/RuinaYan_Text_Field_GetItem_1: Will this be of use to us?
LibraryOfRuinaYan.Character/RuinaYan_Text_Field_Idle_0: These Prescripts... have they truly been guiding me down the right path?
LibraryOfRuinaYan.Character/RuinaYan_Text_Field_Idle_1: I am only a small part of this world. I could never change the will of everyone...
LibraryOfRuinaYan.Character/RuinaYan_Text_Field_Potion_P_0: Take the offered potion and drink it without hesitation.
LibraryOfRuinaYan.Character/RuinaYan_Text_PharosLeader_0: So it's time for yet another act of vengeance...
LibraryOfRuinaYan.Character/RuinaYan_Text_PharosLeader_1: No. Your will is not the will of the Prescript.
LibraryOfRuinaYan.Character/RuinaYan_Text_Witch_0: The Prescript says to accept any curse.
LibraryOfRuinaYan.Item_Consume/Item_RuinaYan_Prescript_Des:
View 2 random, non-duplicate class skills or general skills for each ally, and learn one of them.

Support allies will always be offered at least one healing skill.
LibraryOfRuinaYan.SimpleCampDialogue/CD_RuinaYan_Azar_Dial: [A] Perhaps I can help you understand what it means.
[B] Just how much do these Prescripts actually know?
LibraryOfRuinaYan.SimpleCampDialogue/CD_RuinaYan_Charon_Di: [B] Ooh ooh ooh! You're a member of some secret organization, aren't you!?
[B] Those slips of paper are secret orders, right!?
[A] In a manner of speaking, I suppose.
[B] Do I have any secret orders?
LibraryOfRuinaYan.SimpleCampDialogue/CD_RuinaYan_Hein_Dial: [B] "To Hein, strike down all of your—" Who wrote this?
[A] Where it came from doesn't matter. Just do what it says.
[B] Hahaha! I'd be delighted to hack those bastards to pieces!
[A] Most people would think twice before something so terrible...
LibraryOfRuinaYan.SimpleCampDialogue/CD_RuinaYan_Huz_Dialo: [A] You show no fear in the face of my healing whip.
LibraryOfRuinaYan.SimpleCampDialogue/CD_RuinaYan_Ilya_Dial: [B] Do you think I can do it?
[A] If I may offer my opinion...
[A] You are entirely capable of achieving this.
[A] But if it goes unfinished, something bad will happen.
[B] So it's in my best interest to do it...
LibraryOfRuinaYan.SimpleCampDialogue/CD_RuinaYan_Ironheart: [B] An order? How much are you willing to pay?
[B] If I'm not getting paid, I'm not interested.
[A] If you say so... but read it anyway.
[B] Just play defense during a fight? I do that all the time!
LibraryOfRuinaYan.SimpleCampDialogue/CD_RuinaYan_Joey_Dial: [B] Of course I did what it said. I'm an elite!
[B] Though making such a simple drink is far beneath someone of my standing.
LibraryOfRuinaYan.SimpleCampDialogue/CD_RuinaYan_Johan_Dia: [B] Will this help me find her?
[A] I cannot answer that, though I sympathize.
[B] If I can't find her, what hope do I have left?
LibraryOfRuinaYan.SimpleCampDialogue/CD_RuinaYan_Leryn_Dia: [B] So how exactly do these work?
[B] How do they know? Where do they come from?
[A]But I have a feeling the answer would destroy me.
LibraryOfRuinaYan.SimpleCampDialogue/CD_RuinaYan_Lian_Dial: [B]That's a big sword. Want to learn how to use it?
[A]If I had a choice, I'd rather not use it.
[B]But we rarely have that choice, do we?
[A]No, I think I'll take you up on that offer.
LibraryOfRuinaYan.SimpleCampDialogue/CD_RuinaYan_Lucy_Dial: [B]So you just do whatever these slips of paper say?
[A]I ask myself that every single day.
LibraryOfRuinaYan.SimpleCampDialogue/CD_RuinaYan_MissChain: [A]You... did what it told you to?
[B]It told me to burn it, so I did.
LibraryOfRuinaYan.SimpleCampDialogue/CD_RuinaYan_Momori_Di: [B]Uh, what's this slip of paper? Why does Momori hate it?
[B]Why does Momori have to do what it says?
[B]Why does Momori have to give her first kiss to someone else?
[A]The look in her eyes... frightens me.
LibraryOfRuinaYan.SimpleCampDialogue/CD_RuinaYan_Narhan_Di: [B]He hid it well, but there was deep hatred burning inside him...
[B]I can see that same quality in you.
[A]The things I've had to do... those terrible orders...
LibraryOfRuinaYan.SimpleCampDialogue/CD_RuinaYan_Phoenix_D: [B]Why do you keep your eyes closed?
[B]You never open them. How can you even see?
[A]If my Prescript hadn't told me to keep you alive...
LibraryOfRuinaYan.SimpleCampDialogue/CD_RuinaYan_Pressel_D: [B]You look like a person of faith.
[B]Are you ashamed of your place in God's world?
[A]It simply chose my place for me...
LibraryOfRuinaYan.SimpleCampDialogue/CD_RuinaYan_RuinaPhil: [B]A Messenger of the Index? What's a Finger doing here?
[A]The Prescript brought me here. I had no other choice.
[B]I wish... I could have chosen differently.
[A]The Distortion known as "The Crying Child" shall remain unharmed...
LibraryOfRuinaYan.SimpleCampDialogue/CD_RuinaYan_Selena_Di: [A]Could you apologize to your sister on my behalf?
[A]This Prescript had me act as though she didn't exist for 75 hours and 43 seconds.
[B]I... why was it that specific amount of time?
LibraryOfRuinaYan.SimpleCampDialogue/CD_RuinaYan_Silverste: [A]You remind me of someone I knew...
[B]Whatever you're thinking, that's not who I am anymore.
LibraryOfRuinaYan.SimpleCampDialogue/CD_RuinaYan_Sizz_Dial: [B]Eve is my friend. She's more than just a puppet.
[A]To be treated as a puppet? With no will of your own?
[A]I hate it... but what choice do I have?
LibraryOfRuinaYan.SimpleCampDialogue/CD_RuinaYan_Trisha_Di: [A]You were with the Falros, weren't you?
[B]Yes, and I've left them far behind. I'd never call myself one of them.
[A]To walk away from an organization like that... how enviable.
LibraryOfRuinaYan.Skill/S_RuinaYan_BalefulBrand_Descriptio:
If the target has Erosion, or if this skill defeats an enemy, apply Erosion twice to random enemies.

Then, if any enemy has 5 stacks of Erosion, draw a skill card.
LibraryOfRuinaYan.Skill/S_RuinaYan_BlindFaith_Description: If the target has Erosion, gain 100% Critical Hit Chance, all characters with Locked Potential lose 1 stack, and all enemies gain 1 Erosion.
LibraryOfRuinaYan.Skill/S_RuinaYan_Debug_Description: For each ally with Blade Unlocked, damage dealt is increased by 15%.
LibraryOfRuinaYan.Skill/S_RuinaYan_DrawUnchangeableFate_De:
Draw 2 skills. All allies with Locked Potential lose 1 stack.

If any ally has Blade Unlocked, reduce its cost by 1.
LibraryOfRuinaYan.Skill/S_RuinaYan_Execute_Description:
If this skill defeats an enemy, draw a skill card.

Deal additional damage for each ally with Blade Unlocked.
LibraryOfRuinaYan.Skill/S_RuinaYan_Faith_Description:
All other characters with Locked Potential lose 1 stack. If this character has Blade Unlocked, reduce cost by 1.

For each ally with Blade Unlocked, deal 1 additional damage and gain 25% Critical Hit Chance.
LibraryOfRuinaYan.Skill/S_RuinaYan_FlurryOfFists_Descripti:
Cannot be used unless the target has Erosion or this character has Blade Unlocked.

Attack three times.
LibraryOfRuinaYan.Skill/S_RuinaYan_OminousPower_Descriptio:
Draw 2 skills and gain 1 Mana.

If all enemies have Erosion, reduce the Mana cost by 1.
LibraryOfRuinaYan.Skill/S_RuinaYan_ProselyteBlade_Descript:
If this character has Blade Unlocked or there is only one enemy, deal &a additional damage. If both conditions are met, gain 100% Critical Hit Chance.

If there are multiple enemies, attack one additional random enemy.
LibraryOfRuinaYan.Skill/S_RuinaYan_SwordOfVolition_Descrip:
If Mana is above 0: reduce Mana to 0. The next time Mana is reduced to 0, gain the amount of Mana reduced. Cannot be used again until this effect triggers.

Damage is increased by 25% for each point of Mana spent.
LibraryOfRuinaYan.Skill/S_RuinaYan_TheMessenger_0_Descript:
Cannot target self unless alone.

If an ally has Blade Unlocked, all allies with Blade Unlocked gain Prescribed Strength.
LibraryOfRuinaYan.Skill/S_RuinaYan_TheMessenger_1_Descript:
Cannot target self unless alone.

If an ally has Blade Unlocked, all allies with Blade Unlocked gain Prescribed Protection.
LibraryOfRuinaYan.Skill/S_RuinaYan_TheMessenger_2_Descript:
Cannot target self unless alone.

Draw a skill, prioritizing the target ally's skills.
If the target ally has Blade Unlocked, refund the Mana spent.
LibraryOfRuinaYan.Skill/S_RuinaYan_TheMessenger_3_Descript:
Cannot target self unless alone.

Reduce the target's Mana Overload by 1.
If the target ally has Blade Unlocked, reduce all allies' Mana Overload by 1.
LibraryOfRuinaYan.Skill/S_RuinaYan_TheMessenger_Descriptio:
If the passive is not disabled, randomly transforms into one of the following skills at the start of each turn:
- Prescript I: Strength
- Prescript II: Protection
- Prescript III: Page Draw
- Prescript IV: Mana Recovery
LibraryOfRuinaYan.Skill/S_RuinaYan_UltDistortedBlade_Descr:
Reduce this skill's cost by 1 for each ally with Blade Unlocked.

If this character has Blade Unlocked, apply 2 additional stacks of Erosion.
LibraryOfRuinaYan.Skill/S_RuinaYan_UltForgedPrescript_Desc:
At the start of battle, move this skill to the top of the deck.

Characters with Blade Unlocked cannot gain Forged Prescript.

Forged Prescript grants the same stat bonuses as Locked Potential and does not stack.
LibraryOfRuinaYan.Skill/S_RuinaYan_UndertakePrescript_Desc:
Reduce this skill's cost by 1 for each character with Blade Unlocked (up to 2). If this character is alone and has Blade Unlocked, reduce cost by 2 instead.

If this skill defeats an enemy, gain 1 Mana and reduce all allies' Mana Overload by 1.
LibraryOfRuinaYan.Skill/S_RuinaYan_WhereThePrescriptPoints:
Remove Taunt from all enemies. The target enemy gains Taunt until the Countdown ends. While this skill's Countdown is active, the Taunted enemy takes 35% additional damage.

If 3 skills are used, draw a skill when the Countdown ends. Skills used by characters with Blade Unlocked count twice.
Skills Remaining: &a
LibraryOfRuinaYan.Skill/S_RuinaYan_WillOfTheCity_Descripti:
When this skill is used, look at the next 2 skills to be drawn and choose one to draw.

If the chosen skill's owner has Locked Potential or Blade Unlocked, draw one additional skill and attack one additional enemy.
LibraryOfRuinaYan.Skill/S_RuinaYan_WillOfThePrescript_Desc:
When this skill is used, draw a skill card. If this character has Blade Unlocked, instead choose a skill card from the deck to add to your hand.

Gain 1 Exchange for each character with Blade Unlocked (up to 2).
LibraryOfRuinaYan.SkillExtended/SE_RuinaYan_BladeUnlockedI: For each ally with Blade Unlocked, their damage dealt is increased by 15%.
LibraryOfRuinaYan.SkillExtended/SE_RuinaYan_ImmediateBlade: If this character has Locked Potential, immediately gain Blade Unlocked.
LibraryOfRuinaYan.SkillKeyword/SKW_RuinaYan_Singleton_Desc: This character has Locked Potential, Blade Unlocked, or Forged Prescript.
