<color=#FFFFFFFF>Ignore Taunt to become the target.
Removed when hit.</color>
OtherworldInvestigatorSua.Buff/B_Sua_3_Description:
Bookmark Effect : 
<color=#FFFFFFFF>Evade &a
Chance to Receive Critical Hits &b
Ignore Taunt to directly become the target.</color>
OtherworldInvestigatorSua.Buff/B_Sua_4_0_Description:
At the start of the player's turn, if 3 stacks are present, gains 1 additional stack.
Blood Infection applied through this effect cannot be resisted.
OtherworldInvestigatorSua.Buff/B_Sua_4_Description:
Bookmark Effect : 
<color=#FFFFFFFF><sprite=1> Pain Resist &a
Damage Taken increased by &b </color><color=#FF7C34FF>(&c Sua's Attack Power)</color> <color=#FFFFFFFF>.</color>
OtherworldInvestigatorSua.Buff/B_Sua_5_Description:
Bookmark Effect : 
<color=#FFFFFFFF><sprite=1> Pain Accuracy &a
When allies other than Sua deal damage, chain-heal yourself for &b (Sua's Max. Healing Power &c).</color>
OtherworldInvestigatorSua.Buff/B_Sua_R1_0_Description:
Now, every story reaches its climax!
All Bookmark effects are enhanced.
OtherworldInvestigatorSua.Buff/B_Sua_R1_Description: At the start of each turn, gain one 'Bookmark Add' card.
OtherworldInvestigatorSua.Character/Sua_CampSelectWord: What kind of adventure will you have today?
OtherworldInvestigatorSua.Character/Sua_PassiveDes: Gain a special skill book upon obtaining this passive. Sua can use 'Skill Book - Healing Mastery'. Food for Thought When dealing damage to enemies (excluding Pain damage), chain-heal yourself for 50% of the damage dealt (up to 100% of Sua's Healing Power). When using a skill on an ally, grant them Stability (Healing Gauge Protection for one turn). Bookmark When using a skill on an enemy, apply Bookmark to the target. The effect of Bookmark changes depending on the active story buff. Only one story buff can be active at a time. Defeating an enemy with Bookmark grants one 'Bookmark Add' skill. Memory - Skills with this keyword can Ignore Taunt to target enemies with Bookmark. On use, removes the Bookmark from the target and activates an enhancement.
OtherworldInvestigatorSua.Character/Sua_SelectInfo:
She is a kind and gentle city librarian. She is also an idealist with a naive side that belies her age. She can use the power of the written word, bringing the fantasies within books to life. A true bookworm, she is never without a book in hand. Strangely, however, most of what she reads are fairy tales. Is it a yearning for a pure world, or an escape from harsh reality?

Sua is a versatile investigator who combines offense, healing, and support. However, she is not entirely all-encompassing and will always have areas where she falls short.
OtherworldInvestigatorSua.Character/Sua_Text_Battle_Healed_1: Life is like an arrow.... We can only keep moving forward.
OtherworldInvestigatorSua.Character/Sua_Text_Battle_Idle_0: I often hear the word 'bookworm,' but a real bookworm is a reader's greatest enemy.
OtherworldInvestigatorSua.Character/Sua_Text_Battle_Idle_1: I prefer to use knowledge as my weapon.
OtherworldInvestigatorSua.Character/Sua_Text_Battle_Idle_2: Every story feels vividly real to me.
OtherworldInvestigatorSua.Character/Sua_Text_Battle_Kill_0: You can't survive in this world on kindness alone.
OtherworldInvestigatorSua.Character/Sua_Text_Battle_Kill_1: Not all stories have a happy ending.
OtherworldInvestigatorSua.Character/Sua_Text_Battle_Kill_2: I'm sorry.... But there was nothing I could do.
OtherworldInvestigatorSua.Character/Sua_Text_Battle_Start_0: Today, I am the hero of the story.
OtherworldInvestigatorSua.Character/Sua_Text_Battle_Start_1: What kind of adventure will you have this time?
OtherworldInvestigatorSua.Character/Sua_Text_Field_GetItem_0: So this is what legendary treasure looks like?
OtherworldInvestigatorSua.Character/Sua_Text_Field_GetItem_1: There is nothing in this world that is truly useless.
OtherworldInvestigatorSua.Character/Sua_Text_Field_Idle_0: I wish there was some shade here where I could read for a while.
OtherworldInvestigatorSua.Character/Sua_Text_Field_Idle_1: Moving carelessly here might get us into trouble...
OtherworldInvestigatorSua.Character/Sua_Text_Field_Idle_2: I think I need to take a little rest....
OtherworldInvestigatorSua.Character/Sua_Text_Field_Potion_P_0: (Tap tap)... Is this the kind of magic potion from fairy tales?
OtherworldInvestigatorSua.Character/Sua_Text_Field_Potion_P_1: Wait... I won't turn into a frog, right?
OtherworldInvestigatorSua.Character/Sua_Text_MasterTarget: I hope you all find your way to a happy ending...
OtherworldInvestigatorSua.Character/Sua_Text_PharosLeader_0: In a place with no one around, there can still be a quiet story, right?
OtherworldInvestigatorSua.Character/Sua_Text_PharosLeader_1: Something like this.... is just too much.
OtherworldInvestigatorSua.Character/Sua_Text_PharosLeader_2: I hope I can save those who are caught in misfortune.
OtherworldInvestigatorSua.Character/Sua_Text_Witch_0: Sometimes, suffering is something that must be endured.
OtherworldInvestigatorSua.Character_Skin/1stAnniverserySua_SkinDes: The time we've walked together — that's enough for another book.
OtherworldInvestigatorSua.Character_Skin/CadetSua_SkinDesc: I can't wait for class to end~ Then I can go to the library.
OtherworldInvestigatorSua.Character_Skin/SummertimeSua_SkinDesc: Listen to the sound of the sea — it's telling the most beautiful fairy tale of this summer.
OtherworldInvestigatorSua.Character_Skin/WistfulHeritageSua_SkinDe: What kind of couplet should I write... Ah! I've got it!
OtherworldInvestigatorSua.Character_Skin/SeasideSua_SkinDesc: Shall I tell you a story about the sea today?
OtherworldInvestigatorSua.Item_Consume/SkillBookSua_Description:
Can only be used on Sua.
Choose a Bookmark skill to learn.
At the start of battle, gain the corresponding buff and one 'Bookmark' skill.

<color=#919191>Think carefully before choosing...</color>
OtherworldInvestigatorSua.Skill/S_Sua_1_Description:
<color=#FF7C34FF>Memory</color> : Apply Stun (<sprite=2>&a%).
Killing the target will randomly Stun another enemy.
OtherworldInvestigatorSua.Skill/S_Sua_3_Description:
Ignores Defense.
Can be used again for free after use.
<color=#FF7C34FF>Memory</color> : Deal one additional instance of damage.
Apply Hunter's Mark to the target.

<color=#FFF4BFFF>Hunter's Mark</color>
<color=#FFFFFFFF>Evade -10%
Chance to Receive Critical Hits +100%
Ignore Taunt to become the target.
Removed when hit.</color>
OtherworldInvestigatorSua.Skill/S_Sua_4_Description: <color=#FF7C34FF>Memory</color> : Deal additional damage each turn equal to the number of debuffs on the target.
OtherworldInvestigatorSua.Skill/S_Sua_5_Description:
Deal &a additional damage to the target <color=#FF7C34FF>(160% Healing Power)</color>.
<color=#FF7C34FF>Memory</color> : Also gain a Barrier equal to the damage dealt.
OtherworldInvestigatorSua.Skill/S_Sua_6_Description: Restore &a HP <color=#FF7C34FF>(150% Healing Power)</color> to the ally with the lowest HP percentage in the party.
OtherworldInvestigatorSua.Skill/S_Sua_7_Description: Healing is increased when used on a near-death ally.
OtherworldInvestigatorSua.Skill/S_Sua_8_Description: <color=#919191>'The angel lifted by a grappling hook heals the hearts of all.'</color>
OtherworldInvestigatorSua.Skill/S_Sua_9_Description:
Gain one 'Bookmark Add' card.
Choose a skill from the discard pile, add it to your hand and grant it Swiftness. (Rare skills cannot be chosen.)
If no friendly skills are in the discard pile, draw a skill instead.
OtherworldInvestigatorSua.Skill/S_Sua_Draw_Description: Declare a cost of 0, 1, 2, or 3+. Draw two skills from the deck whose base cost matches the declared cost.
OtherworldInvestigatorSua.Skill/S_Sua_R0_Description: This skill cannot be Evaded and ignores Defense. Deals four additional hits. Each kill scored with this skill causes its damage to increase by 1 for this turn. Current increase: &a "This book has never existed in any library."
OtherworldInvestigatorSua.Skill/S_Sua_R1_0_Description:
Applies Bookmark when used on an enemy.
Grants Stability when used on an ally.
OtherworldInvestigatorSua.Skill/S_Sua_R1_Description:
Placed on top of the deck at the start of battle.
Gain one 'Bookmark Add' card.
While this skill is owned, all Bookmark effects are enhanced.
OtherworldInvestigatorSua.SkillExtended/SkillEn_Sua_0_Name: Gain Swiftness. Applies Bookmark on hit.
OtherworldInvestigatorSua.SkillKeyword/SkillKeyword_Retrieve_Desc: Skills with this keyword can Ignore Taunt to target enemies with Bookmark. On use, removes the Bookmark from the target and activates an enhancement.
OtherworldInvestigatorSua.BookMark_B_Sua_5: <color=#FFFFFFFF>Chain healing equal to &a of damage dealt.</color>
OtherworldInvestigatorSua.BookMark_NotReady: <color=#FFFFFFFF>The author's pen has yet to fall.</color>
OtherworldInvestigatorSua.Skill/S_Sua_3_0_Description: This skill ignores the enemy's Defense.

GenshinNahida.Buff/B_Nahida_Aggravate_Description:
Each time this character triggers a Seed of Skandha, damage per turn increases by &a (up to 5 times).
Triggers remaining: &b
(Based on Healing Power.)
GenshinNahida.Buff/B_Nahida_Bloom_Description:
When this character receives a Critical Hit or is defeated, other enemies share &a% of the damage. When alone, takes an additional &b% Critical Hit damage. (Based on Healing Power.)
Shares 40% of Pain damage with other enemies.
Dendro Cores do not trigger other Dendro Cores.
GenshinNahida.Buff/B_Nahida_EntanglingRoots_Descriptio:
Seed of Skandha deals 50% additional damage, but Healing is reduced by 30%.
Removed upon taking damage from a non-additional attack.
GenshinNahida.Buff/B_Nahida_GrowGrowGrow_Description:
When this character is attacked or evades, restore &a HP.

Removed after triggering this effect.
GenshinNahida.Buff/B_Nahida_SeedofSkandha_Description: After receiving a <sprite=2> CC, <sprite=1> Pain, or <sprite=0> Weakening debuff from an ally, the enemy takes &a Pain damage and the ally with the lowest HP and greatest HP deficit is healed for &b, then removes one stack (once per attack).
GenshinNahida.Buff/B_Nahida_UltIllusoryHeart_1_Descrip:
At the start of each turn, apply Seed of Skandha to all enemies. If there is only one enemy, apply two stacks instead.

Seed of Skandha damage is increased by 20%, and triggers when the enemy takes damage from a non-additional attack.
GenshinNahida.Buff/B_Nahida_UltSeedOfKnowledge_Descrip:
Whenever a skill is played from hand, the ally with the lowest HP and greatest HP deficit is healed for HP equal to that skill's cost + 1.

For every 10 Mana spent, create a Seed of Knowledge in hand.
Mana remaining: &a
GenshinNahida.Character/GenshinNahida_CampSelectWord: Hehe, let's go. The journey has only just begun — I hope you'll keep leading the way.
GenshinNahida.Character/GenshinNahida_PassiveDes:
At the start of battle, Nahida applies Seed of Skandha to one random enemy.

At the end of each turn, one random enemy without Seed of Skandha gains Seed of Skandha. If all enemies already have Seed of Skandha, one random enemy's Seed of Skandha is triggered instead, reducing its healing and damage by 20% without removing any stacks.

Nahida can Ignore Taunt and directly choose which enemy to apply Seed of Skandha to.
GenshinNahida.Character/GenshinNahida_SelectInfo:
Deep within the dreams of many young children, countless meetings occur with someone who knows how to answer their questions. The children are deemed too fragile or precious to receive the answers they came seeking, and those who meant to protect them end up leaving them in ignorance.

Alas, a child's mind can only grow when it is allowed to, and Nahida's purpose in entering others' dreams is to nurture that growth. The encounters within these dreams, however brief and curious, may not be fully understood by the children — but Nahida treasures them nonetheless. For she too has been looked down upon for her appearance, or looked up to for being the Dendro Archon and God of Wisdom of Sumeru.

Her power far surpasses that of many of Sumeru's people, which sets her apart from them, yet her only wish is to be understood and to learn alongside them. Though many will keep their distance for various, often unfounded reasons, those she has gradually come to trust will readily offer the companionship she yearns for.

If Nahida can help others understand the problems they face, she is happy to sit and listen; and even when she cannot, she does her best to help them find understanding. She uses metaphors and comparisons to help people see issues from different angles, and even the most stubborn of minds can be guided by her to learn what they believe they cannot grasp. She is truly worthy of the title God of Wisdom — yet only the foolish believe themselves wise, and her curiosity drives her to approach every new experience with fresh eyes.

Nahida is a healer whose primary healing method comes through a special debuff applied to enemies, triggered by her own skills or by applying CC, Weakening, or Pain debuffs. Triggering this mark heals the ally with the lowest HP and deals Pain damage to the marked enemy. She works well in teams that apply debuffs, functioning as both an indirect damage dealer and a sustained healer — though her heals are modest, they are frequent.
GenshinNahida.Character/GenshinNahida_Text_Battle_Ally: Don't bite off more than you can chew.
Step back. I'd rather not waste your curiosity.
GenshinNahida.Character/GenshinNahida_Text_Battle_Heal: I feel like a Nilufar reunited with its leaves.
I feel like a Sandbearer Pearl that's found its shell.
GenshinNahida.Character/GenshinNahida_Text_Battle_Idle: Any ideas? Let's work through it together.
We cannot foresee all the possibilities that lie ahead.
GenshinNahida.Character/GenshinNahida_Text_Battle_Kill: Don't worry — I promise there's a sweet dream waiting for you.
GenshinNahida.Character/GenshinNahida_Text_Battle_Star: Things are about to get lively again.
No problem is unsolvable for me.
GenshinNahida.Character/GenshinNahida_Text_Field_GetIt: You found something? May I take a look?
How interesting. I wonder how it ended up here?
GenshinNahida.Character/GenshinNahida_Text_Field_Idle_: I've always dreamed of going out and seeing the world for myself.
You have to observe the world firsthand to truly appreciate its beauty.
There, there. You're doing wonderfully. Pat on the head.
GenshinNahida.Character/GenshinNahida_Text_Field_Potio: Hehe, I'm truly grateful. It tastes wonderful.
Mmm, may the world never forget this delightful flavor. Thank you.
GenshinNahida.Character/GenshinNahida_Text_MasterTarge: I understand now — to succeed, one must make sacrifices. Thank you for teaching me so many new things.
GenshinNahida.Character/GenshinNahida_Text_PharosLeade: Please, go! You won't be safe near me!
I've broken free. I'm sorry... I betrayed you...
GenshinNahida.Character/GenshinNahida_Text_Witch_0: Spreading these curses evenly is the wise choice.
GenshinNahida.SimpleCampDialogue/CD_Nahida_Azar_Dialog: [A] Oh, I love games! Would you like to play hopscotch with me?
[A] I told you to draw squares!
[B] I had something a bit more... interesting in mind?
So, [A] Genius Invokation TCG, is it? I've prepared what I'd call, and I quote, a "killer deck."
[B] Oh, what a fascinating card game... and these mechanics... I think I'm going to enjoy this.
GenshinNahida.SimpleCampDialogue/CD_Nahida_Charon_Dial: [B] Are you really the God of Wisdom?
[A] I am. Is there something you'd like help understanding?
[B] Do you know how cool it is to have the God of Wisdom as a friend?
[B] So then, Nahida. Care to learn how to become a Shadow Priest?
[A] Oh, I love learning new things.
GenshinNahida.SimpleCampDialogue/CD_Nahida_Hein_Dialog: [B] Another child? Am I babysitting now?
[A] I may look like a child, but don't be fooled...
[A] I understand this world just as well as any adult.
[B] That sounds like exactly what a child would say.
GenshinNahida.SimpleCampDialogue/CD_Nahida_Helia_Dialo: [B] Ahaha! Bask in my glorious sunshine, child of flowers!
[A] Hehe, sunlight really is good for plants. Thank you.
[B] No need to thank me — just say the word if you need more. I have plenty.
GenshinNahida.SimpleCampDialogue/CD_Nahida_Huz_Dialogu: [B] Oh no, those healing whips I gave you weren't too painful, were they?
[A] It stung for a moment, but don't worry — I know it's the remedy.
[A] Still, it's quite peculiar. It makes me wonder how it works.
[B] Oh, well... are you sure you can follow along?
[A] Please don't skip the technical details. I love learning new things.
GenshinNahida.SimpleCampDialogue/CD_Nahida_Ilya_Dialog: [A] I've never seen anyone wield two different swords as skillfully as you do.
[A] He seems sad, but I believe there's a good person somewhere deep inside.
GenshinNahida.SimpleCampDialogue/CD_Nahida_Ironheart_D: [B] Escorting two children? They'd better pay me double.
[A] I understand, but please don't worry about me. I can handle myself.
GenshinNahida.SimpleCampDialogue/CD_Nahida_Joey_Dialog: [A] Thank you for the potion earlier. It was delicious.
[B] Of course — I'm the best! Did you think I couldn't even pull off a recipe?
[A] Hehe, well, this is actually a new recipe. I heard you enjoy mixing things together.
[A] So I brought it to you, because I thought you'd like it.
[B] Your thinking... is spot on. You're a clever one, kid.
GenshinNahida.SimpleCampDialogue/CD_Nahida_Johan_Dialo: [A] I've known a few rangers who use bows, but you're quite skilled with yours.
[B] Everything I've learned, I learned for the sake of finding someone I lost.
[A] When you say loss, you mean...
[B] That's right. They took her from me, and I'll never stop searching for her.
[A] Loss... why do I feel as though something is missing from me too?
GenshinNahida.SimpleCampDialogue/CD_Nahida_Leryn_Dialo: [A] Yes. I've known for some time.
[A] This isn't my first time experiencing a cycle like this.
[B] I see. You seem remarkably calm about it.
[A] I may look like a child, but I am still the God of Wisdom.
[A] For now, the wise course of action is to be patient and let things unfold naturally.
[B] You know, this truly is our last hope.
[A] I know. And I know that Lucy has what it takes to see it through.
GenshinNahida.SimpleCampDialogue/CD_Nahida_Lian_Dialog: [B] Kid, stay behind me. I don't want you getting hurt.
[A] Thank you, but that's not necessary.
[A] I may be small, but I can fight just as hard as any of you.
[B] I know, I've seen it, but I'm still on defense. You're a valuable asset to the team.
[A] Ah, how wise. Then, my lady, I offer you my apologies.
[B] Please, stop being so formal — you're making me uncomfortable!
GenshinNahida.SimpleCampDialogue/CD_Nahida_Lucy_Dialog: [A] Oh. Hello, Lucy. What's on your mind?
[B] I feel like I've been here before. I can't shake this strange feeling.
[A] Perhaps it means nothing, or perhaps it means everything. Maybe in time, we'll understand.
GenshinNahida.SimpleCampDialogue/CD_Nahida_MissChain_D: [A] A chainsaw fitted with a flamethrower...
[A] I can't help but feel afraid.
[B] It's fine — I built it myself, so it's completely safe! Probably...
[A] You are not the one who controls the plants around here.
GenshinNahida.SimpleCampDialogue/CD_Nahida_Momori_Dial: [B] Ooh... maybe the Momori Club could have a new member...
[B] Want to join the Momori Club?
[A] Hmm... what kind of experience does your club offer?
[B] That'll be 2000G — wait, what? I have no idea!
[A] Perhaps you should think that through a bit more carefully.
GenshinNahida.SimpleCampDialogue/CD_Nahida_Narhan_Dial: [B] A child? No — your appearance conceals a wealth of knowledge and wisdom.
[A] Indeed. The fact that you can see it at a glance surprises me.
[B] Well, I didn't study psychology for nothing.
[A] Perhaps we could talk sometime. I have questions about the Clock Tower and this journey.
[B] They think you're just a child and won't answer you directly? Then just ask me.
GenshinNahida.SimpleCampDialogue/CD_Nahida_Phoenix_Dia: [A] I have never encountered a being quite like you before.
[B] You think I'm just a mortal? I am the legendary Phoenix — don't you forget it!
[B] I will not be insulted by someone like you, child!
[A] You think I'm a child? I am a 500-year-old god of wisdom.
[B] Hmm... perhaps appearances can be deceiving...
GenshinNahida.SimpleCampDialogue/CD_Nahida_Pressel_Dia: [B] You said god of wisdom? That sounds a little blasphemous...
[B] But a child like you couldn't possibly... hmm...
[A] I'd better keep my distance from her. She's terrifying.
GenshinNahida.SimpleCampDialogue/CD_Nahida_Selena_Dial: [A] Ah, you must be Selena. Helia has told me all about you.
[A] Living in her shadow, like the moon to her sun — that must be hard. That was a pun, by the way.
[B] She can be overbearing sometimes, but she's my sister.
[A] I know what that feels like — living in someone's shadow. Wait... whose shadow do I live in?
[B] Oh, don't cry. Come here, let me give you a hug.
GenshinNahida.SimpleCampDialogue/CD_Nahida_Silverstein: [B] Honestly, I just want to get back somewhere safe.
[A] But if you never take that risk, you'll never discover anything amazing.
[A] This world is full of beauty. To discover it, we only need to take those first few steps.
[B] I just got lectured by a kid...
GenshinNahida.SimpleCampDialogue/CD_Nahida_Sizz_Dialog: [A] That friend of yours must have been a great help to you.
[B] Oh, she really is. Eve can do so many things I couldn't manage on my own.
[A] Sometimes, all you need is a friend.
[A] Just knowing that someone will be there for you...
[B] ...is enough to give you the courage to keep going.
GenshinNahida.SimpleCampDialogue/CD_Nahida_Trisha_Dial: [B] I'm alright, I suppose... I just can't shake the feeling that I don't belong.
[A] You worry that people will treat you poorly because of your past.
[A] I know that feeling too. Though I'll admit, my situation is the opposite.
[A] Everyone treats me as though I'm too precious or too young. I'm not that fragile.
[B] No one else gets to decide how people should act around us, do they?
GenshinNahida.Skill/S_Nahida_Akara_Description:
If the target has a Seed of Skandha, trigger this effect instead to heal all allies with 30% increased Healing.

Otherwise, heal one ally for &a, prioritizing the ally with the lowest HP who has taken damage.
GenshinNahida.Skill/S_Nahida_AllSchemestoKnow_Descript:
If the target has a Seed of Skandha, all other enemies gain one stack of Seed of Skandha. If they do not, they gain an additional stack instead.

Each turn, deal bonus damage equal to the target's Pain damage.
GenshinNahida.Skill/S_Nahida_Bloom_Description:
Can only target enemies that have a Seed of Skandha.

Dendro Cores do not trigger Seed of Skandha.
GenshinNahida.Skill/S_Nahida_Debug_Description: If all enemies have a Seed of Skandha: cost is reduced by 1. Damage skills deal 20% bonus damage, and healing skills gain Swiftness.
GenshinNahida.Skill/S_Nahida_EntanglingRoots_Descripti: If all enemies have a Seed of Skandha, cost is reduced by 1.
GenshinNahida.Skill/S_Nahida_EverybodyHoldHands_Descri: Each target takes bonus damage each turn equal to half their Pain damage.
GenshinNahida.Skill/S_Nahida_ForestHelpers_Description:
Draw two skills.
If the target is an enemy with a Seed of Skandha, trigger this skill without removing any stacks.
If the target is an ally, the first skill drawn will preferentially trigger ally skills.
GenshinNahida.Skill/S_Nahida_Purification_Description: Remove one random debuff from the target.
GenshinNahida.Skill/S_Nahida_Spread_Description:
If the target has a Seed of Skandha, trigger this effect and deal 30% bonus damage to all other enemies. If the target does not have a Seed of Skandha, apply 3 stacks of Seed of Skandha.

For each stack of Seed of Skandha on the target, deal 10% bonus damage and gain 25% bonus Critical Hit Chance. (Stacks up to 4 times, scaling with Healing Power.)
GenshinNahida.Skill/S_Nahida_UltIllusoryHeart_Descript: All enemies gain 2 stacks of Seed of Skandha.
GenshinNahida.Skill/S_Nahida_UltSeedOfKnowledge_Descri: At the start of battle, move this skill to the top of the deck.
GenshinNahida.SkillExtended/SE_Nahida_CostRed_EnforceS: <sprite name="비용2"><sprite name="이상"> Healing or Attack skills
GenshinNahida.SkillExtended/SE_Nahida_CostRed_Name: If all enemies have a Seed of Skandha: cost is reduced by 1. Damage skills deal 20% bonus damage, and healing skills gain Swiftness.
GenshinNahida.SkillExtended/SE_Nahida_TriggerSeed_Name: Trigger Seed of Skandha on the target without removing any stacks. Can ignore Taunt to attack enemies with a Seed of Skandha or a Dendro Core.

GenshinHuTao.Buff/B_HuTao_ButterflysEmbrace_1_Descrip:
Negates damage taken while at Death's Door.

Removed when damage is negated by this effect.
GenshinHuTao.Buff/B_HuTao_Coupon_Description: Blood Blossom can stack up to 3 times on this character.
GenshinHuTao.Buff/B_HuTao_FixedGuideToAfterlife_Descr: Gain &b% Attack Power. Attack Power is doubled when HP is at or below &a%. (Based on Max. Health.)
GenshinHuTao.Buff/B_HuTao_UltButterflysEmbrace_Descri:
The first time this character reaches Death's Door, negate up to three instances of damage from Death's Door for three turns. Critical Damage is increased by 20% while damage can still be negated.

Removed after this character reaches Death's Door.
GenshinHuTao.Character/GenshinHuTao_CampSelectWord: Hu means "Who put me in the coffin?" Tao means "I can't get out!" Heheh... No, not funny?
GenshinHuTao.Character/GenshinHuTao_PassiveDes:
This passive skill is activated at level 1.

Hu Tao's Fixed Ability is "Butterfly's Embrace" and cannot be changed.

When Hu Tao's HP falls below 50%, she deals 10% additional damage and gains 10% Critical Hit Chance, 5% Armor, and 5% Evade. These values are doubled while at Death's Door. Additionally, if Hu Tao lands a Critical Hit while at Death's Door, she restores HP equal to 10% of the damage dealt.

Hu Tao's Healing Gauge will not fall below 40% of her Max. Health.

Whenever Hu Tao recovers from Death's Door, she gains "Flutter By", increasing her Max. Health by 10% and Attack Power by 2% for 3 turns (up to 5 stacks).
GenshinHuTao.Character/GenshinHuTao_SelectInfo:
The balance between life and death is sacred, and those who perform funeral rites for the departed are the ones who maintain that balance. In Liyue, this duty falls primarily to the Wangsheng Funeral Parlor, which has watched over the living and the dead for thousands of years.

The 77th Director of the Wangsheng Funeral Parlor is Hu Tao, whose responsibilities include controlling and purifying the foul miasma and lingering karmic debt clinging to the corpses of demons and monsters, as well as providing everyday funeral rites and services to the common people of Liyue. She takes her work very seriously and always ensures that her clients' wishes are handled with meticulous care and respect.

But that is Hu Tao at work. Beyond her role as the 77th Director of the Wangsheng Funeral Parlor, she is far more outgoing and spirited. On the streets of Liyue, you may often hear someone reciting a poem — if the verses are lively and cheerful, they are most likely Hu Tao's work. She approaches her solemn duty with the utmost reverence, yet she is equally fond of pranks, whimsy, and a passionate love of life. As her grandfather used to say: "Live as you live, die as you die. Do as you will, follow your heart." Hu Tao has always lived by this maxim — doing what she believes is right and living life on her own terms.

Hu Tao is a damage-dealing hero who walks the line between life and death, growing stronger with each return from Death's Door. She has many skills that are enhanced while at Death's Door, as well as a Fixed Ability that deals damage to herself and boosts her damage output based on her Max. Health. Her skills inflict Blood Blossom, a damage-over-time debuff that deals persistent damage to enemies and also serves as a resource for empowering certain skills. She synergizes well with characters who can convert self-harm into strength and those who can prevent her from taking damage while she is near death.
GenshinHuTao.Character/GenshinHuTao_Text_Battle_AllyN: Oh my, is this a business opportunity?
Don't die on me yet — I haven't given you a voucher!
GenshinHuTao.Character/GenshinHuTao_Text_Battle_Heale: Ah. Pulled me back from the edge?
GenshinHuTao.Character/GenshinHuTao_Text_Battle_Idle_: *Sigh* Sitting around doing nothing is worse than death.
GenshinHuTao.Character/GenshinHuTao_Text_Battle_Start: Looks like we have some potential clients~!
Oh no, I haven't prepared anything for this funeral.
GenshinHuTao.Character/GenshinHuTao_Text_Field_GetIte: Oh, what an adorable little coffin!
GenshinHuTao.Character/GenshinHuTao_Text_Field_Idle_0: Silly goose, silly goose, silly goose!
GenshinHuTao.Character/GenshinHuTao_Text_Field_Idle_1: Moments like these are perfect for writing poetry.
GenshinHuTao.Character/GenshinHuTao_Text_Field_Potion: Ugh, I hereby declare this potion deceased. Rest in peace.
Bleh... this has to be Xiangling's revenge...
GenshinHuTao.Character/GenshinHuTao_Text_MasterTarget: "Live as you live, die as you die." If my time has come, then so be it.
GenshinHuTao.Character/GenshinHuTao_Text_PharosLeader: Only unbound flames can purify the filth of this world...
Oh, I hope I haven't sent anyone off ahead of schedule.
I've set the impure things ablaze...
GenshinHuTao.Character/GenshinHuTao_Text_Witch_0: Curses, rot, foul stench — I can handle it all.
GenshinHuTao.Character/GenshinHuTao_Text_Witch_1: There is no point in resisting the inevitable.
GenshinHuTao.SimpleCampDialogue/CD_GenshinHuTao_Azar_: [A] There seems to be a kind of deadness in your heart.
[A] You seem to only feel alive chasing the next big thrill. That isn't what life is about.
[A] You know, the quiet moments have their own value too.
GenshinHuTao.SimpleCampDialogue/CD_GenshinHuTao_Charo: [A] What you do to those souls is reprehensible.
[B] But I'm a Shadow Priest! It's kind of my thing.
[A] They deserve to depart this world with dignity.
GenshinHuTao.SimpleCampDialogue/CD_GenshinHuTao_Gensh: [A] Oh my? The Dendro Archon herself? To what do I owe this honor?
[B] Please, call me Nahida. This isn't Sumeru — I hold no authority here.
[A] Then, Nahida, call me Hu Tao.
[A] Do you enjoy poetry? I could teach you how poetry is written in Liyue.
[B] I have read in Liyue that poetry is often a collaboration between two writers.
[B] That sounds delightful. I would love to learn.
GenshinHuTao.SimpleCampDialogue/CD_GenshinHuTao_Hein_: [A] Could you be a little gentler with our enemies?
[A] You know, they need to leave something behind to bury.
[B] Those pests don't deserve a proper burial!
GenshinHuTao.SimpleCampDialogue/CD_GenshinHuTao_Helia: [A] Radiance so bright, a pyre to ease our plight!
[B] Is that a poem? For me? If so, please, go on.
GenshinHuTao.SimpleCampDialogue/CD_GenshinHuTao_Huz_D: [A] Could you stop whipping me around so much?
[B] I just want to keep you alive.
[A] I'm trying to give my opponents a proper send-off.
[A] I can do that so much better when I'm on the brink of death!
GenshinHuTao.SimpleCampDialogue/CD_GenshinHuTao_Ilya_: [A] Turn that frown upside down. Do it and I'll tell you a ghost story!
GenshinHuTao.SimpleCampDialogue/CD_GenshinHuTao_Ironh: [A] What splendid armor! I love how it gleams!
[B] Hahaha! It is my pride and joy.
GenshinHuTao.SimpleCampDialogue/CD_GenshinHuTao_Joey_: [B] So, you're the one in charge of the funeral parlor?
[A] To be precise, the 77th Director of the Wangsheng Funeral Parlor.
[B] So you must come from an elite lineage of elites.
[A] Elite? My, my... I'm just the Director, not royalty.
GenshinHuTao.SimpleCampDialogue/CD_GenshinHuTao_Johan: [B] Those bastards took her from me.
[B] Is this a joke? A voucher... for a funeral...?
[B] You'd better hope we find her alive and well.
[A] My, my. I suppose I should have thought this through...
GenshinHuTao.SimpleCampDialogue/CD_GenshinHuTao_Leryn: [B] More of a scientist, actually. Though the fields are quite similar.
[A] I know a doctor who keeps stealing my clients by saving their lives.
[B] But isn't that a good thing?
[A] You see, if nobody dies, I can't hold any funerals.
GenshinHuTao.SimpleCampDialogue/CD_GenshinHuTao_Lian_: [B] Director of a funeral parlor? Are you sure you're up to this?
[A] Ah, well... fighting isn't usually my strong suit, but don't worry — I can take care of myself.
[B] Does self-defense usually involve setting yourself on fire?
[A] Well, at least you've done a fine job of keeping me from passing on.
GenshinHuTao.SimpleCampDialogue/CD_GenshinHuTao_Lucy_: [B] What does a funeral parlor director do?
[A] Well, Lucy. The Wangsheng Funeral Parlor provides ceremonies of farewell.
[B] Farewell to where? I thought funerals were for the dead.
[A] Hmm... let's just say, in my line of work, "death" is a bit complicated.
[A] You know, I've encountered quite a few ghosts and spirits.
[A] Oh, don't worry — most of them are harmless.
GenshinHuTao.SimpleCampDialogue/CD_GenshinHuTao_MissC: [A] My, your flames almost caught me just now.
[B] But you use fire yourself — why would that worry you?
[A] My flames are different. They exist to purify things.
[B] But they still burn, don't they?
GenshinHuTao.SimpleCampDialogue/CD_GenshinHuTao_Momor: [A] Hehe, looks like you're quite the troublemaker too.
[B] Momori is not a troublemaker — she is a villain!
[A]Villain, troublemaker, prankster. They're all the same.
[A]I bet I can scare more people than you!
GenshinHuTao.SimpleCampDialogue/CD_GenshinHuTao_Narha: [B]You're actually more responsible than you let on.
[A]The legacy of the Wangsheng Funeral Parlor spans 77 generations.
[A]My duty is to maintain the balance between life and death.
[A]All work and no play makes for a dull life, don't you think?
[B]Hehehe... I suppose we do need to find our own fun from time to time.
GenshinHuTao.SimpleCampDialogue/CD_GenshinHuTao_Phoen: [B]You know, I'm not just a bird. I'm the legendary Phoenix!
GenshinHuTao.SimpleCampDialogue/CD_GenshinHuTao_Press: [A]Those who have passed deserve far more respect.
[B]Evil must be judged. I'm simply accelerating the process.
GenshinHuTao.SimpleCampDialogue/CD_GenshinHuTao_Selen: [A]I often find myself wandering beneath the dim moonlight...
[A]It's quite soothing. It gives me time to write poetry.
[B]I know. Sometimes you just need those quiet moments.
GenshinHuTao.SimpleCampDialogue/CD_GenshinHuTao_Silve: [B]Ah! Why do you always sneak up on me like that!
[A]Because you're so tense — you really should loosen up a little.
GenshinHuTao.SimpleCampDialogue/CD_GenshinHuTao_Sizz_: [B]Be careful with your flames when Eve is around.
[A]Ah, sorry. That's just how I fight.
[A]I'll do everything I can to keep Eve safe and sound.
[A]As the director of the Wangsheng Funeral Parlor, I give you my word.
[B]A funeral parlor?! Please don't bury Eve!
GenshinHuTao.SimpleCampDialogue/CD_GenshinHuTao_Trish: [A]My duty, of course. What, did you think I came on a whim?
GenshinHuTao.Skill/S_HuTao_ComplementaryCoupon_Descri:
If this skill lands a Critical Hit, apply Blood Blossom to the target.

If the target already has a Funeral Voucher, all other enemies gain a Funeral Voucher.
GenshinHuTao.Skill/S_HuTao_CrimsonBouquet_1_Descripti:
While at Death's Door, this skill gains Swiftness, cannot be evaded, and heals for 15% of damage dealt.
While not at Death's Door, this skill applies Blood Blossom.

If the target already has Blood Blossom, deal bonus damage. (Based on Max. Health)
GenshinHuTao.Skill/S_HuTao_CrimsonBouquet_Description:
While at Death's Door, this skill gains Swiftness, cannot be evaded, and heals for 15% of damage dealt.
While not at Death's Door, this skill applies Blood Blossom.

If the target already has Blood Blossom, deal bonus damage. (Based on Max. Health)

Generate a copy of Crimson Bouquet with Exclude in hand. Does not duplicate. Lasts 2 turns.
GenshinHuTao.Skill/S_HuTao_DrawAreYouAfraid_1Dummy_De: Draw 3 skills. The target ally takes <color=purple>Pain damage</color> equal to 40% of their Max. Health and 30% of their current Health.
GenshinHuTao.Skill/S_HuTao_DrawAreYouAfraid_1_Descrip: Draw 3 skills. The target takes <color=purple>Pain damage</color>. (Based on Max. Health and current Health)
GenshinHuTao.Skill/S_HuTao_DrawAreYouAfraid_Descripti:
If the target is not near death, choose one:
- Draw 3 skills. The target ally takes <color=purple>Pain damage</color> equal to 40% of their Max. Health and 30% of their current Health.
- Draw 2 skills.

If the target is near death, draw 2 skills.
GenshinHuTao.Skill/S_HuTao_FixedGuideToAfterlife_Desc:
Take &a <color=purple>Pain damage</color>. If used above &b Health, a random enemy gains Blood Blossom. (Based on current and Max. Health)

If this character reaches Death's Door, shuffle one skill from the discard pile back into the deck and draw a skill, prioritizing this character's skills.
Cannot be used at Death's Door.
GenshinHuTao.Skill/S_HuTao_FlutterBy_Description:
Attack adjacent enemies.

If this character has Paramita Papilio, this skill gains Ignore Taunt.

If this character is at Death's Door or there is only one enemy, deal 40% bonus damage. If both conditions are met, damage is doubled.
GenshinHuTao.Skill/S_HuTao_GardenofEternalRest_Descri:
For each stack of Blood Blossom on all enemies, all allies gain one additional stack of Garden of Eternal Rest, then Blood Blossom is removed.

If there is only one enemy, the number of Garden of Eternal Rest stacks gained is doubled.
GenshinHuTao.Skill/S_HuTao_LikeAFirework_Description:
Guaranteed Critical Hit against enemies with Blood Blossom.

Deal bonus damage for each stack of Blood Blossom on the enemy. (Based on Max. Health)

If this skill lands a Critical Hit, all other enemies are inflicted with Blood Blossom.
GenshinHuTao.Skill/S_HuTao_LingeringCarmine_Descripti:
If this character has Paramita Papilio, reduce this skill's cost by 1.

Attack twice, then attack once for each stack of Blood Blossom, removing one stack each time.
GenshinHuTao.Skill/S_HuTao_OfferingOfFlowers_Descript:
Heal yourself and the ally with the lowest Health by an amount based on each stack of Blood Blossom on the target, then remove those stacks.
(Based on Max. Health)
GenshinHuTao.Skill/S_HuTao_PlumBlossom_Description:
Cannot be used unless at Death's Door.

Ignores Armor and cannot be evaded.

Draw a skill. If this skill defeats an enemy, restore &a HP.
GenshinHuTao.Skill/S_HuTao_TimeForAFuneral_Descriptio:
Deal bonus damage to enemies with Blood Blossom. (Based on Max. Health)

All enemies without Blood Blossom gain Blood Blossom.
GenshinHuTao.Skill/S_HuTao_UltButterflysEmbrace_Descr: Triggers when drawn. Draw one skill, prioritizing this character's skills. If there are 15 or fewer skills combined in the deck, discard pile, and hand, Exclude this skill. If this skill is in the deck at the start of battle, gain Butterfly's Embrace. (Hold Shift for details)
GenshinHuTao.Skill/S_HuTao_UltSpiritSoother_Descripti:
Refresh the Fixed skill, reducing its cost by 1 on next use.
Heal all allies and gain &a.
(Based on Max. Health)

If this character has Paramita Papilio, deal up to 100% bonus damage based on HP lost. If there is only one target, damage is doubled. Then remove Paramita Papilio.
GenshinHuTao.SkillExtended/SE_HuTao_BloodBlossom_Enfo: Can only be applied to attack skills.
GenshinHuTao.SkillExtended/SE_HuTao_BloodBlossom_Name: If all enemies have Blood Blossom, this skill gains Swiftness and Ignore Taunt.

FGO_Altria_Alter.Item_Equip/E_FGO_Altria_Alter_0_Descript: Ignore Taunt Mana Mark is no longer subject to its cap. Can only be equipped by Altria Pendragon (Alter)
FGO_Altria_Alter.Character/FGO_Altria_Alter_PassiveDesc: Altria Pendragon (Alter) gains 1 Mana Mark after using a non-Exclude skill. Starting from turn 3, at the start of each odd-numbered turn, each Mana Mark increases her Critical Hit Chance by 10% for 3 turns; when Mana Mark exceeds 20, each point over 20 increases her Critical Damage by 10% for 3 turns. At level 6, equip Lance of Distant Radiance.
FGO_Altria_Alter.Character/FGO_Altria_Alter_SelectInfo:
Eroded by the curse of the Holy Grail, this is the cold and merciless other side of the King of Knights. Or perhaps this is the very "ideal king" that King Arthur sought all along.
Altria normally keeps her power in check, but in this state, she has no hesitation whatsoever in unleashing overwhelming magical energy.

She excels at stacking large amounts of magical energy and releasing it all at once for devastating destruction, while also possessing strong support capabilities.
At the pinnacle of her power, she will hold the ability to bring ruin to all things.
FGO_Altria_Alter.Character/FGO_Altria_Alter_CampSelectWor: Are you my Master? In exchange for my services, I'll be expecting burgers and junk food for the next year.
FGO_Altria_Alter.Character/FGO_Altria_Alter_Text_Battle_N: What a sudden turn of events.
FGO_Altria_Alter.Character/FGO_Altria_Alter_Text_Field_Id: Lucy, did you bring hamburgers? I'm a bit hungry.
FGO_Altria_Alter.Buff/B_FGO_Altria_Alter_p_1_Description: Certain skills are enhanced based on the number of Mana Mark stacks.
FGO_Altria_Alter.Buff/B_FGO_Altria_Alter_1_Description: On the next attack, remove this buff and increase damage dealt by &a%.
FGO_Altria_Alter.Skill/S_FGO_Altria_Alter_10_Description: Prioritize drawing the 2 highest-cost skills from the deck, and grant Altria Pendragon (Alter) 3 Mana Mark.
FGO_Altria_Alter.Skill/S_FGO_Altria_Alter_12_Description: Can only be used when Mana Mark is at least 5. When Mana Mark is at least 12, deal an additional &num1 damage to all enemies and apply a Weakening debuff reducing Defense by 10% for 3 turns (&num2%).
FGO_Altria_Alter.Skill/S_FGO_Altria_Alter_2_Description: Gain 4 Mana Mark, then select 1 skill from the target's entire skill set to generate a copy of, with Exclude attached.
FGO_Altria_Alter.Skill/S_FGO_Altria_Alter_3_Description: For each Mana Mark, perform one additional attack against the target, dealing &a damage. Afterward, lose 3 Mana Mark.
FGO_Altria_Alter.Skill/S_FGO_Altria_Alter_5_Description: When Mana Mark exceeds 20, apply a Pain debuff to all enemies dealing &num1 Pain damage per turn for 5 turns (&num2%). When this skill directly defeats an enemy, gain 2 Mana Mark.
FGO_Altria_Alter.Skill/S_FGO_Altria_Alter_6_Description: Remove all Weakening debuffs from the target.
FGO_Altria_Alter.Skill/S_FGO_Altria_Alter_7_Description: Each Mana Mark increases this skill's Attack Power damage multiplier by 10%. This skill can only be used when Mana Mark is at least 15; after using this skill, Mana becomes 0. Gains enhancements based on Mana Mark count when used: >20: When Critical Hit Chance exceeds 100%, increase this skill's damage based on the overflow percentage. >30: Mana Mark is doubled this turn, and each Mana Mark deals an additional 50% Attack Power damage.
FGO_Altria_Alter.Buff/B_FGO_Altria_Alter_7_Description: At the end of the turn, lose &a% of the current Mana Mark count.
FGO_Altria_Alter.Skill/S_FGO_Altria_Alter_9_Description: Double your current Mana Mark count, and apply an irresistible Stun to all enemies for 1 turn. When Lance of Distant Radiance is equipped, the duration of the Stun becomes 3 turns.
FGO_Altria_Alter.SkillExtended/SkillEn_FGO_Altria_Alter_0: When used, if Altria Pendragon (Alter) has at least 5 Mana Mark, consume 5 to increase this skill's damage/healing by 50%.
FGO_Altria_Alter.SkillExtended/SkillEn_FGO_Altria_Alter_1: When used, for every 10 Mana Mark Altria Pendragon (Alter) has, increase this skill's damage/healing multiplier by 30%.

OtherworldInvestigatorSissela.Buff/B_Sissela_6_Description:
When Sissela takes Pain damage, the same damage is dealt to the enemy bearing the Blood Tether.
This effect can only be applied to one enemy at a time.
OtherworldInvestigatorSissela.Buff/B_Sissela_P_0_Description: When this effect is removed or battle ends, converts the remaining Barrier into healing.
OtherworldInvestigatorSissela.Buff/B_Sissela_P_1_Description:
Until the start of the next turn, <color=purple>Pain damage</color> received cannot cause Faint.
This effect expires at the start of the next turn.
OtherworldInvestigatorSissela.Character/Sissela_CampSelectWord: Just as I cannot escape from agony...
OtherworldInvestigatorSissela.Character/Sissela_PassiveDes: Pain damage dealt by Sissela cannot cause Faint and is not affected by {damage sharing} (Blood Fog 3 and ???). Upon gaining this passive, also receive a dedicated item to remove Sissela's Faint status. Memento Mori In battle, gain 5% Faint Resist per level. When HP is below 0, Attack Power increases by 1, and for every 5 HP below 0, it increases by an additional 1, up to a maximum of 100% Attack Power. When Attack Power is increased through this effect, the chance of being targeted by enemies increases. Once per turn, when starting a turn in Near-Death state or already in Near-Death state.... Gain a Near-Death Barrier equal to 20% of Faint Resist (when this effect ends, heal HP equal to the remaining Barrier amount), lasting one turn. Draw one of Sissela's own skills from the deck. If no skills belonging to Sissela exist in the deck, shuffle her skills from the discard pile back into the deck and draw one. If neither the discard pile nor the deck contain any of Sissela's skills, draw one card instead.
OtherworldInvestigatorSissela.Character/Sissela_SelectInfo:
She suffers from an incurable disease shared by fewer than a hundred people in the world. Ever since her diagnosis at a young age, she has never left the white walls of a hospital room. She endures pain beyond imagination at all times, and though she has attempted to escape many times, she has never been able to.
The medical community has devoted cutting-edge technology and enormous resources to treating her condition — but to her, it feels like nothing more than being a lab rat, kept barely alive for the sake of their research.
She is almost always expressionless and speaks very little. Growing up in a hospital has made her uncomfortable around others. She draws eyes and mouths on the objects around her, gives them names, and treats them as her friends.

Sissela excels at managing Agony debuffs and converting them into her own damage output. When Near-Death, she unleashes tremendous power — but at a constant risk to herself.
OtherworldInvestigatorSissela.Character/Sissela_Text_Battle_Healed_0: Is there still a reason for me to live...?
OtherworldInvestigatorSissela.Character/Sissela_Text_Battle_Healed_1: You didn't have to keep me alive...
OtherworldInvestigatorSissela.Character/Sissela_Text_Battle_Idle_0: A cat, alive or dead — which would you choose?
OtherworldInvestigatorSissela.Character/Sissela_Text_Battle_Idle_1: I dreamed of Wilson. He said he was bored and wanted me to draw more friends for him.
OtherworldInvestigatorSissela.Character/Sissela_Text_Battle_Idle_2: In my dream, Wilson was startled by a cynical, older voice...
OtherworldInvestigatorSissela.Character/Sissela_Text_Battle_Kill_0: I told you... don't bother me...
OtherworldInvestigatorSissela.Character/Sissela_Text_Battle_Kill_1: I didn't mean to hurt you...
OtherworldInvestigatorSissela.Character/Sissela_Text_Battle_Kill_2: Does it hurt? I've gotten used to it...
OtherworldInvestigatorSissela.Character/Sissela_Text_Battle_ND_0: Being alive only means feeling more pain...
OtherworldInvestigatorSissela.Character/Sissela_Text_Battle_ND_1: Death and rest are not the same thing...
OtherworldInvestigatorSissela.Character/Sissela_Text_Battle_Start_0: I still can't escape the fighting... can I?
OtherworldInvestigatorSissela.Character/Sissela_Text_Field_GetItem_0: If I could find a new set of colored pencils... I'd be happy.
OtherworldInvestigatorSissela.Character/Sissela_Text_Field_Idle_1: This spot... can we rest here for a while?
OtherworldInvestigatorSissela.Character/Sissela_Text_Field_Idle_2: On the road... watch your step.
OtherworldInvestigatorSissela.Character/Sissela_Text_Field_Potion_P_0: This medicine... can it take away my pain for good?
OtherworldInvestigatorSissela.Character/Sissela_Text_Field_Potion_P_1: These medicines..... I don't like the smell of them.
OtherworldInvestigatorSissela.Character/Sissela_Text_MasterTarget: It's alright... this way, I won't have to suffer anymore.
OtherworldInvestigatorSissela.Character/Sissela_Text_PharosLeader_0: Now... it's my turn to give them pain.
OtherworldInvestigatorSissela.Character/Sissela_Text_PharosLeader_1: I'm sorry... this wasn't my intention...
OtherworldInvestigatorSissela.Character/Sissela_Text_PharosLeader_2: Now... no one can make me suffer anymore.
OtherworldInvestigatorSissela.Character/Sissela_Text_Witch_0: This pain... must I endure it...?
OtherworldInvestigatorSissela.Character_Skin/DevilkinSissela_SkinDesc: I will bear it all — every agony and every joy.
OtherworldInvestigatorSissela.Character_Skin/FrostCloverSissela_SkinDe:
Perhaps she, too, once wished to live.
Like a clover in the snow — fragile, yet resilient.
OtherworldInvestigatorSissela.Character_Skin/WilsonBakerySissela_SkinD: Little Wilson is watching you... no touching the bread on the shelves!
OtherworldInvestigatorSissela.Character_Skin/WinterCarnivalSissela_Ski: Do you like snow...? I don't think I mind it.
OtherworldInvestigatorSissela.Item_Consume/Sissela_PassiveConsume_Desc:
Sissela only.
Removes Sissela's Faint status.

<color=#919191>They say a cat has nine lives. But for the cat itself, is that truly a blessing?</color>
OtherworldInvestigatorSissela.Skill/S_Sissela_0_Description: Deal &a Pain damage to yourself. If only one enemy remains, gain Swiftness and increase skill damage by &b (50% Attack Power).
OtherworldInvestigatorSissela.Skill/S_Sissela_1_Description: Deal <color=purple>&a Pain damage</color> to yourself. Randomly follow up on enemy characters based on the number of enemies on the field. If there is only one target, this skill's Critical Hit Chance becomes 100%.
OtherworldInvestigatorSissela.Skill/S_Sissela_2_Description: Deal &a Pain damage to yourself. If the target does not have Taunt, apply Taunt to it. Deal &b damage (half of this skill's damage +1) to all other enemies.
OtherworldInvestigatorSissela.Skill/S_Sissela_3_0_Description: Remove one Agony debuff other than [Endless Agony].
OtherworldInvestigatorSissela.Skill/S_Sissela_3_2_Description:
When used on an ally, activate [Pain Suppression: Endure].
When used on an enemy, activate [Pain Suppression: Empathy].
OtherworldInvestigatorSissela.Skill/S_Sissela_3_Description:
Can be used again at 0 cost after use.
When used on an ally, activate [Pain Suppression: Endure].
When used on an enemy, activate [Pain Suppression: Empathy].
OtherworldInvestigatorSissela.Skill/S_Sissela_4_Description:
Deal additional (&b) Pain damage based on the Pain damage Sissela has taken this turn.
Then, deal <color=purple>&a Pain damage</color> to yourself.
OtherworldInvestigatorSissela.Skill/S_Sissela_5_Description:
Deal additional damage based on the total damage per turn dealt by all debuffs on yourself and the target.
Afterward, convert half of the additional damage (&a) into <color=purple>Pain damage</color> and apply it to yourself.
OtherworldInvestigatorSissela.Skill/S_Sissela_7_Description: Gain a Barrier of &a<color=#FF7C34FF> (100% Attack Power)</color> based on your own Attack Power.
OtherworldInvestigatorSissela.Skill/S_Sissela_8_Description: The selected ally will take attacks in place of Sissela.
OtherworldInvestigatorSissela.Skill/S_Sissela_Draw_Description:
Draw two skills.
If any ally is Near-Death or Fainted, draw one additional skill.
If all allies are Near-Death or Fainted, draw two additional skills instead.
OtherworldInvestigatorSissela.Skill/S_Sissela_R0_Description:
Deal <color=purple>&a Pain damage</color> to yourself.
Then, take additional damage equal to the amount of HP below 0 (&b).

<color=#919191>「DEATH AND REBIRTH」</color>
OtherworldInvestigatorSissela.Skill/S_Sissela_R1_Description: When used from hand, the following effect activates. Set the target's HP to 0. If the target is a boss, this effect only applies when their HP is below 40%.

Mlynar.Item_Equip/EQ_Mlynar_0_Description: When using damage or healing skills, increase the damage or healing based on the skill's initial Mana cost (up to 7 initial Mana cost is counted).
Mlynar.Character/Mlynar_PassiveDesc:
<b>Fixed Ability is fixed as "Radiant Liberation."
When attacked, gain 1 Radiance. When using a skill adjacent to one of his own skills, gain 1 Radiance (stackable).
When using a skill from hand, the first of his own skills in hand that is not at the bottom moves down 1 position.

<color=#919191>- This passive is active from Level 1</color>
Mlynar.Character/Mlynar_SelectInfo: It's raining... but still, I press on alone.
Mlynar.Character/Mlynar_SkinDesc: A style that can be worn on any occasion (?) — very convenient.
Mlynar.Character/Mlynar_Text_Battle_Kill_0: These things... are not worth drawing my blade.
Mlynar.Character/Mlynar_Text_PharosLeader_0: I shall atone before the Pharos.
Mlynar.Character/Mlynar_Text_PharosLeader_1: To be swayed by a moment's anger... how shameful.
Mlynar.Skill/S_Mlynar_0_Description: Gain a Barrier of &addBarrierNum (&atkPer% Attack Power + &lightPer% Radiance). Gain &addLightNum Radiance.
Mlynar.Buff/B_Mlynar_1_Description:
Every &needAtkTimes attacks, Mlynar gains &addLightNum Radiance.

Current attack count: &curAtkTimes
Mlynar.Buff/B_Mlynar_2_Description: Ignore Taunt. When attacking enemies without Taunt, deal equal Pain damage to a random other enemy without Taunt.
Mlynar.Buff/B_Mlynar_3_Description:
Damage taken is reduced by &totalSubPer% (&basePer% + &lightPer% Radiance). When the End Turn button is pressed, restore HP equal to the total damage reduced.

Total damage reduced so far: &totalSubDmg
Mlynar.Skill/S_Mlynar_4_Description: Cause all targets to use [Taunt] with Countdown 1.
Mlynar.Buff/B_Mlynar_4_1_Description:
Whenever an Investigator is attacked, use [Burst] against a random enemy. Each use increases the damage of subsequent [Burst]s by &addAtkPer% Attack Power.

Current damage multiplier: &curAtkPer%
Mlynar.Skill/S_Mlynar_5_Description:
When entering the Countdown list, attempt to consume &costLightNum Radiance and gain Absolute Evasion.
When successfully evading during Countdown, immediately activate and increase damage by &addDmgPer%, restore &addApNum Mana, and draw &drawNum skills.
Mlynar.Buff/B_Mlynar_5_Description: Absolute Evasion. Removed upon triggering Evade.
Mlynar.Skill/S_Mlynar_6_Description:
Can only be used while in [Liberation Stance].
If used at 0 cost, add a perfect copy of this skill with Exclude to hand and refresh the Fixed Ability.
After use, exit [Liberation Stance] and gain &addLightNum Radiance.
Mlynar.Skill/S_Mlynar_7_Description:
Can only be used while in [Liberation Stance].
Gain &addLightNum Radiance.
Mlynar.Skill/S_Mlynar_8_Description: Can only be used while in [Liberation Stance].
Mlynar.Buff/B_Mlynar_8_Description: Before receiving an enemy attack, use [Riposte] against them.
Mlynar.Buff/B_Mlynar_8_1_Description: When attacked by Mlynar, damage taken is additionally increased by &addDmgPer% and this debuff gains one more stack.
Mlynar.SkillExtended/S_Mlynar_EN_0_Name: While in hand, after the holder is attacked, this skill's cost is reduced by 1 for this battle.
Mlynar.SkillExtended/S_Mlynar_EN_1_Name: Increase damage and healing by 50% of Mlynar's Radiance value.
Mlynar.Skill/S_Mlynar_L_0_Description:
Draw &drawNum skills, then choose to execute based on Mlynar's Radiance:
- For every &drawBaseLight Radiance, draw 1 additional skill, up to &maxDraw. (Currently drawing &realDraw additional skills.)
- For every &atkBaseLight Radiance, deal &dmgLightNum (&dmgLightPer% Radiance) damage and Pain damage to a random enemy. (Currently executing &realDoTimes times.)
If not in [Liberation Stance], Radiance is reduced to 0 after all effects of this skill resolve.
Mlynar.Skill/S_Mlynar_L_0_0_Description: For every &drawBaseLight Radiance, draw 1 additional skill, up to &maxDraw. (Currently drawing &realDraw additional skills.)
Mlynar.Skill/S_Mlynar_L_0_1_Description: For every &atkBaseLight Radiance, deal &dmgLightNum (&dmgLightPer% Radiance) damage and Pain damage to a random enemy. (Currently executing &realDoTimes times.)
Mlynar.Skill/S_Mlynar_P_Description:
This skill's cost is fixed at 0.

Deal &dmgNum (Radiance × &dmgPer%) damage to all enemies.
Mlynar.Buff/B_Mlynar_P_Description: Removed at the end of the turn. Upon removal, lose &losePer% Radiance.
Mlynar.Buff/B_Mlynar_P_1_Description:
For each point of Radiance, reduce the Mana cost of all [Radiance Sword Skills] by 1.
Each point of Radiance provides &addDefPer% Armor. While in [Liberation Stance], this is changed to &addAtkPer% Attack Power per point of Radiance.

Current Radiance: &lightNum
Mlynar.SkillExtended/SET_Mlynar_P_Description: Mana cost is reduced by 1 for each point of Radiance.
Mlynar.Buff/B_Mlynar_R_0_Description: [Radiant Liberation] gains Innate. When [Liberation Stance] is removed, lose &superLostLightPer% Radiance instead.
Mlynar.Skill/S_Mlynar_R_1_Description: At the start of battle, place this skill at the top of the deck.
Mlynar.Buff/B_Mlynar_R_1_Description:
When another ally is attacked, gain 1 Radiance.
Each time Radiance reaches the next multiple of &baseNum, draw &drawNum skills and restore &addApNum Mana.
Mlynar.Skill/S_Mlynar_R_2_Description:
Can only be used while in [Liberation Stance].
During Countdown, all Investigators gain [Rain of Light].
Mlynar.Buff/B_Mlynar_R_2_Description: When dealing damage, additionally deal &dmgNum (Mlynar's &dmgPer% Attack Power) Pain damage.
Mlynar.Character_Skin/Skin_Mlynar_1_SelectInfo: It's raining... but still, I press on alone.
Mlynar.Character_Skin/Skin_Mlynar_1_SkinDesc: W Dali series / Roar Against the Wilds. Mlynar's iteration in Decision F/3019226. The black iron cavalry has finally set foot upon the forgotten plains. The reclusive knight chose not to leave — instead, he stood alone to face them.
Mlynar.Character_Skin/Skin_Mlynar_2_SelectInfo: It's raining... but still, I press on alone.
Mlynar.Character_Skin/Skin_Mlynar_2_SkinDesc: EPOQUE sub-brand [Passe] series featured item / The Long Road. The attire Mlynar wore while wandering the plains and forests of Kazimierz as a ranger — the engraving on the sword hilt has not yet been obscured by superfluous decoration.

Aqua.Buff/B_Aqua_DubiousBlessing_Description: <color=#919191>You don't notice any real change, but somehow you feel a little off.</color>
Aqua.Buff/B_Aqua_LiquidCourage_Description:
Single-target attacks have a 15% chance to redirect to a random unit instead.
<color=#919191>Courage lives in the bottle, but so does your sense of direction.</color>
Aqua.Buff/B_Aqua_Type100RecoveryMode_Descript: <color=#919191>Completely soaked, yet somehow full of energy. For your own sake, don't ask.</color>
Aqua.Character/Aqua_PassiveDes:
Aqua is immune to all debuffs and purifies all Curses from equipment and the deck.
Whenever Aqua takes damage, restore 2 HP to all allies and apply <color=#FF6B6B>Crying Shame</color> and <color=#A3DFF7>Drenched</color> to all enemies.

<color=#919191>- This passive is active from level 1.</color>

Her tears may be annoying, but they're surprisingly effective. Magical debuffs require a stable mind to take hold — unfortunately, she lost that long ago.
Aqua.Character/Aqua_PassiveName: Tears of the Self-Proclaimed Goddess of Water (and Misfortune)
Aqua.Character/Aqua_SelectInfo:
A goddess from another world who, after a disastrous "reincarnation" journey with a man of extraordinary destiny, tumbled into the Ark by accident.
It is theorized that Aqua's arrival was caused by a break in the cycle of reincarnation, which tore a rift between dimensions.
By all accounts, this self-proclaimed goddess of water — and, arguably, misfortune — burst into tears upon landing in the Ark and proceeded to blame someone named "Kazuma" who was not present.
She has since joined the investigation team, halfheartedly assisting with their efforts while searching for a way back to her own world.
Aqua.Character/Aqua_SkinDesc:
The sacred outfit of the Goddess of Water!
...Though she spent most of her time in it doing extremely dramatic performances, sobbing, and running away from frogs.
...Wait, why was she running away from frogs?
Aqua.Character/Aqua_Text_Battle_AllyND_0: Hurry up and defeat the Demon King and save this world already!
Aqua.Character/Aqua_Text_Battle_AllyND_1: Leave it to me! I'll bring divine judgment down upon it!
Aqua.Character/Aqua_Text_Battle_Healed_0: I'm hungry... Is dinner... ready yet...?
Aqua.Character/Aqua_Text_Battle_Healed_1: Even goddesses have their limits — I want a quiet room and a warm bed!
Aqua.Character/Aqua_Text_Battle_Healed_2: We should be grateful for this moment... No more sleeping on hay beds!
Aqua.Character/Aqua_Text_Battle_Idle_0: Kazuma, I'm so bored! Carry me!
Aqua.Character/Aqua_Text_Battle_Idle_1: Healing and support — leave it all to me, the Arch Priest!
Aqua.Character/Aqua_Text_Battle_Kill_1: Keep at it and one day you'll strike it rich!
Aqua.Character/Aqua_Text_Battle_ND_0: I'm a goddess, you know — I refuse to do anything so undignified!
Aqua.Character/Aqua_Text_Battle_ND_1: Sometimes I just want a nice sparkling drink...
Aqua.Character/Aqua_Text_Battle_ND_2: Urgh... It stinks... It really stinks...
Aqua.Character/Aqua_Text_Battle_Start_0: I am Aqua, the Goddess of Water, revered by the Axis Cult!
Aqua.Character/Aqua_Text_Battle_Start_1: Worship me more, pamper me more! I am a goddess, after all!
Aqua.Character/Aqua_Text_Battle_Start_2: Who am I? I can't say — but I'm just a passing Goddess of Water!
Aqua.Character/Aqua_Text_Character_0: Hehehe, this is a goddess-special cake! It looks absolutely delicious, doesn't it?
Aqua.Character/Aqua_Text_Character_1: Nature is wonderful! A sparkling drink after finishing a job is the best!
Aqua.Character/Aqua_Text_Field_GetItem_0: Why does no one question Hestia, but they question me?! I'm a goddess too, you know!
Aqua.Character/Aqua_Text_Field_Idle_0: Hey, Megumin! Come here, come here — there's a weird fish over here!
Aqua.Character/Aqua_Text_Field_Idle_1: I have no interest in mortals. Don't worry, I'm a genuine goddess!
Aqua.Character/Aqua_Text_Field_Idle_2: Kazuma! I'm tired! Carry me, hurry up!
Aqua.Character/Aqua_Text_Field_Potion_P_0: We have to celebrate tonight! Let's have a party with snacks and sparkling drinks!
Aqua.Character/Aqua_Text_MasterTarget: Since you've come to this world, I hope you'll leave behind many happy memories!
Aqua.Character/Aqua_Text_PharosLeader_1: Sorry to interrupt your fun, but I'm a goddess — what exactly am I supposed to do here?
Aqua.Character/Aqua_Text_Witch_0: Your soul is crying out — true art must come from within yourself!
Aqua.Character/Aqua_Text_Witch_1: Your soul is crying out — true art must come from within yourself!
Aqua.Character_Skin/Aqua_Nurse_Skin_SkinDesc:
This goddess is ready to heal...
No medical knowledge? No problem — with this goddess's power, even a simple bandage will fix you right up!
Aqua.Item_Equip/E_Aqua_Hagoromo_Description:
When attacked, apply <color=#5F9EA0>Aqua Veil</color> (reduces Accuracy) to the attacker.
At the start of each turn, cast a <color=#FF0000>r</color><color=#FFA500>a</color><color=#FFFF00>n</color><color=#00FF00>d</color><color=#00FFFF>o</color><color=#FF69B4>m</color> <color=#800080>Party Magic</color>.

<color=#919191>This equipment helps you evade attacks... probably because you're so utterly unpredictable that your enemies can't comprehend you.</color>
Aqua.Item_Equip/E_Aqua_SacredLaundryStaff_Des:
The wearer's attacks apply <color=#A3DFF7>Drenched</color>.
At the start of each turn, remove <color=#A3DFF7>Drenched</color> from all allies.

<color=#919191>Not particularly great as a medium for casting magic, but exceptionally good at drying laundry.</color>
Aqua.Item_Equip/FoxOrb_0_Description: 20% of damage dealt on attack is converted into HP.
Aqua.Item_Equip/FoxOrb_Description:
Each time the wearer kills an enemy, permanently increase the Sealed Spirit Orb's Attack Power.
Upgrades when 15% Attack Power is reached.
Aqua.Skill/S_Aqua_AquaGradePurification_Descr: Remove all debuffs from the target.
Aqua.Skill/S_Aqua_BlessingoftheAxisCult_Descr: When a Fixed Ability, gains Swiftness and costs 1 less Mana.
Aqua.Skill/S_Aqua_DivineLottery_Description: Cast a random skill drawn from all skills in the game, including Lucy skills and rare skills.
Aqua.Skill/S_Aqua_FogofBlessings_Description: Apply <color=#5F9EA0>Aqua Veil</color> to all enemies and all allies.
Aqua.Skill/S_Aqua_FogofBlessings_Name: Fog of Blessings (Oops, She Did It Again!)
Aqua.Skill/S_Aqua_LucyDraw_Description:
Draw 3 skill cards and cast "Nature's Beauty" on all allies.

If Aqua is incapacitated, draw 1 skill card instead and Exclude this skill from the current battle.
Aqua.Skill/S_Aqua_OverflowingGrace_Descriptio:
Also heals all enemies.
Apply <color=#A3DFF7>Drenched</color> to all enemies and all allies.
Aqua.Skill/S_Aqua_OverflowingGrace_Name: Overflowing Grace of the Water Goddess
Aqua.Skill/S_Aqua_PartyDrunkard_Description: When a Fixed Ability, costs 1 less Mana.
Aqua.Skill/S_Aqua_PartyTrick_Certainkill_Desc:
Apply 3 stacks of <color=#A3DFF7>Drenched</color> and 3 stacks of <color=#5F9EA0>Aqua Veil</color> to all targets (1 turn for allies), and apply <color=#48D1CC>Type 100: Recovery Mode</color> to all allies.

<color=#919191>Once activated, it lingers for half a day before slowly fading away.</color>
Aqua.Skill/S_Aqua_PartyTrick_Certainkill_H_De:
Apply 3 stacks of <color=#A3DFF7>Drenched</color> and 3 stacks of <color=#5F9EA0>Aqua Veil</color> to all targets (1 turn for allies), and apply <color=#48D1CC>Type 100: Recovery Mode</color> to all allies.

<color=#919191>Once activated, it lingers for half a day before slowly fading away.</color>
Aqua.Skill/S_Aqua_PartyTrick_Certainkill_R_De:

Aqua.Dialogue/Aqua_Gift_Sake/001: <i>Leryn hands Aqua a bottle of sake.<i>
Aqua.Dialogue/Aqua_Gift_Sake/002:
*Aqua
Finally! Now THIS is an offering worthy of my divine status!
Aqua.Dialogue/Aqua_Gift_Sake/003:
*Aqua
I was starting to think you'd forgotten who I am.
Aqua.Dialogue/Aqua_Gift_Sake/004:
*Aqua
Rejoice! The great goddess Aqua personally bestows her blessing upon you!
Aqua.Dialogue/Aqua_Gift_Sake/006:
*Leryn
How did a "goddess" like you end up in our party?
Aqua.Dialogue/Aqua_Gift_Sake/007:
*Aqua
It's all Kazuma's fault! I was tricked into coming here!
Aqua.Dialogue/Aqua_Gift_Sake/008:
*Aqua
A magnificent goddess like me having to go through all this... I still can't believe it.
Aqua.Dialogue/Aqua_Gift_Sake/009:
*Leryn
Well, I suppose I'm just the goddess of common sense then.
Aqua.Dialogue/Aqua_Gift_Sake/010:
*Aqua
Hey! Show some respect to the Water Goddess! Or I'll turn your tea back into plain water!
Aqua.Dialogue/Aqua_Gift_Beer/001:
*Leryn
Aqua, we have some free beer. Want some?
Aqua.Dialogue/Aqua_Gift_Beer/002:
*Aqua
Of course. I've been waiting for an offering worthy of me.
Aqua.Dialogue/Aqua_Gift_Beer/003: <i>Leryn silently hands the beer to Aqua.<i>
Aqua.Dialogue/Aqua_Gift_Beer/004:
*Aqua
There's nothing better than an ice-cold beer after a hard day's work.
Aqua.Dialogue/Aqua_Gift_Beer/005:
*Leryn
But you didn't do any work today...
Aqua.Dialogue/Aqua_Gift_Beer/006: <i>Aqua pretends not to hear and takes a big swig.<i>
Aqua.Dialogue/Aqua_Gift_Beer/008:
*Leryn
You actually like beer? I thought you only went for fancy drinks.
Aqua.Dialogue/Aqua_Gift_Beer/009:
*Aqua
Those I keep for special occasions, so I don't have to share with Kazuma or anyone else.
Aqua.Dialogue/Aqua_Gift_Beer/010:
*Leryn
So you just don't like sharing with them?
Aqua.Dialogue/Aqua_Gift_Beer/011:
*Aqua
Hey! At least today I didn't get swallowed by a frog or thrown in jail!
Aqua.Dialogue/Aqua_Gift_Beer/012:
*Leryn
Your daily life sounds pretty rough...
Aqua.Dialogue/Aqua_Gift_Beer/013:
*Leryn
If you were really a goddess, these things wouldn't keep happening to you.
Aqua.Dialogue/Aqua_Gift_Beer/015:
*Aqua
I AM the true Water Goddess!
Aqua.Dialogue/Aqua_Gift_Beer/016:
*Aqua
Why won't any of you believe me?!
Aqua.Dialogue/Aqua_Gift_Beer/017: <i>Leryn sighs and walks away, leaving Aqua sobbing behind her.<i>
Aqua.Dialogue/Aqua_Gift_FishingRod/002:
*Aqua
A fishing rod? What kind of gift is this for a goddess?
Aqua.Dialogue/Aqua_Gift_FishingRod/003:
*Leryn
It's not a gift. I need you to catch fish for dinner.
Aqua.Dialogue/Aqua_Gift_FishingRod/004:
*Aqua
I don't need to go fishing — I command water itself!
Aqua.Dialogue/Aqua_Gift_FishingRod/005:
*Leryn
Then why don't you prove it?
Aqua.Dialogue/Aqua_Gift_FishingRod/006:
*Aqua
Fine! I'll catch more fish than you could ever imagine, and that'll prove I'm a genuine goddess!
Aqua.Dialogue/Aqua_Gift_FishingRod/008:
*Leryn
Sure, just don't come crying to me when you reel in a boot.
Aqua.Dialogue/Aqua_Gift_FishingRod/009: <i>Aqua heads toward the pond, muttering under her breath about how hard her life in this world has been.<i>
Aqua.Dialogue/Aqua_Gift_StuffedAnimal/002:
*Aqua
A stuffed animal? What kind of offering is this for a goddess?!
Aqua.Dialogue/Aqua_Gift_StuffedAnimal/003:
*Leryn
I just felt a little sorry for you, that's all...
Aqua.Dialogue/Aqua_Gift_StuffedAnimal/004:
*Aqua
Seriously?! I'm a goddess worshipped by countless followers!
Aqua.Dialogue/Aqua_Gift_StuffedAnimal/005:
*Leryn
Followers? You mean Kazuma and the others who always cause you trouble?
Aqua.Dialogue/Aqua_Gift_StuffedAnimal/006:
*Aqua
Without this great goddess of theirs, they'd have been done for long ago.
Aqua.Dialogue/Aqua_Gift_StuffedAnimal/007:
*Leryn
At least this stuffed animal won't explode or get you arrested.
Aqua.Dialogue/Aqua_Gift_StuffedAnimal/008:
*Aqua
You're not listening! I'm a goddess!
Aqua.Dialogue/Aqua_Gift_StuffedAnimal/009: <i>Leryn mutters under her breath. (...Goddess of misfortune...)<i>
Aqua.Dialogue/Aqua_Gift_StuffedAnimal/010:
*Aqua
Hey! At least you're finally giving me a proper gift like a true believer!
Aqua.Dialogue/Aqua_Gift_StuffedAnimal/012:
*Leryn
I still can't figure out how this so-called goddess ended up joining our party...
Aqua.Dialogue/Aqua_Gift_Normal/001:
*Leryn
Aqua, I have something for you.
Aqua.Dialogue/Aqua_Gift_Normal/002: <i>Aqua looks up from doing nothing, a little curious.<i>
Aqua.Dialogue/Aqua_Gift_Normal/003:
*Leryn
I wanted to give you this little gift.
Aqua.Dialogue/Aqua_Gift_Normal/004:
*Aqua
...Is disappointment supposed to come wrapped like this?
Aqua.Dialogue/Aqua_Gift_Normal/005:
*Leryn
You could at least pretend to be grateful...
Aqua.Dialogue/Aqua_Gift_Normal/006:
*Aqua
I'm a goddess, not an actress!

Ganyu.Character/Ganyu_PassiveDesc:
Ganyu's Fixed Ability is Frostflake Arrow.
Condenses cold into the arrow, then fires a Frostflake Arrow after a brief charge. Upon impact, the Frostflake Arrow Bloom deals Pain damage to all enemies.
Bow at the Ready: When Ganyu reaches level 6, obtain the Prototype Crescent.
Ganyu.Character/Ganyu_SelectInfo:
To the seven luminaries seated high upon the Jade Chamber, Ganyu is no mere attendant — she is the architect of Liyue Harbor's intricate web of information, the very foundation of its administrative efficiency.
Complex meeting minutes, tangled report data... each day's mountain of documents flows through her hands like water, compiled into clear and concise text to support every decision and negotiation of the Qixing, guiding the workings of each department.
Through thousands of years, the Qixing have changed time and again, yet Ganyu alone has remained to witness Liyue Harbor's enduring splendor.
The human side of her bloodline draws her to the dazzling lantern festivals, while her adeptal nature calls her back to the tranquil seclusion of the sacred mountains.
In the eyes of Ganyu — half-human, half-adeptus — which is truly home: the bustling sea of people, or the quietly humming peaks?
Ganyu.Character/Ganyu_Text_Battle_Healed_0: This warmth... I will keep it close to heart.
Ganyu.Character/Ganyu_Text_Battle_ND_0: ...I have been away from battle too long.
Ganyu.Character/Ganyu_Text_Battle_ND_1: I cannot... stop here... the contract... is not yet fulfilled...
Ganyu.Character/Ganyu_Text_PharosLeader_1: That darkness recedes like a tide...
Ganyu.Character/Ganyu_Text_PharosLeader_2: This is not me... no, this is not what I wanted...
Ganyu.Character/Ganyu_Text_Battle_Idle_0: Bound by contract — there is no room for idleness.
Ganyu.Character/Ganyu_Text_Battle_Start_0: For Liyue... and for the contract.
Ganyu.Character/Ganyu_Text_Battle_Start_1: Battle... is never the first choice.
Ganyu.Character/Ganyu_Text_Battle_Kill_0: Another conflict ends... I hope this brings some peace.
Ganyu.Character/Ganyu_Text_Field_Idle_0: This area... seems to be hiding something.

Ganyu.Buff/Ganyu_buff_2_Description:

Applies 1 stack of Frost to the attacker.
Ganyu.Buff/Ganyu_buff_3_Description: Pain damage received is increased by &a%.
Ganyu.Buff/Ganyu_buff_5_Description: At the start of each turn, add a 0-cost Celestial Shower with Swiftness to your hand.
Ganyu.Buff/Ganyu_buff_8_Description:
Sleeping quietly...
Removed at the end of the turn.
Ganyu.Buff/Ganyu_buff_9_Description: When Frostflake Arrow hits an enemy afflicted with Burn/Solar/Scorch, trigger Melt.
Ganyu.Buff/Ganyu_buff_equip_1_Description:

Elemental Burst damage increased by 10%.
Ganyu.Buff/Ganyu_buff_equip_2_Description:

Elemental Burst damage increased by 20%.
Ganyu.Item_Equip/Ganyu_equip_0_Description: Combine with a Hero-tier or higher equipment to obtain Ganyu's exclusive equipment.

Ganyu.Skill/Keqing_skill_0_Description: Perform an additional attack on a random enemy.
