OtherworldInvestigatorAdina.Buff/B_Adina_5_Description: At the start of each turn, deal damage equal to (remaining Barrier) to all enemies. This effect is immediately removed when the Barrier is gone. System Message: Threat detected. Engaging interception protocol.
OtherworldInvestigatorAdina.Buff/B_Adina_8_Description: Stars increase both Attack Power and Healing Power. When counting celestial bodies for skill triggers, Stars can be counted as either Sun or Moon. YOG.0 PROGRAM: Icebreaker - Decoder 0ⓒ: Break code gate subroutine.
OtherworldInvestigatorAdina.Buff/B_Adina_En_0_Description: For each Sun skill among the top 3 cards of your deck, gain 1 Attack Power.
OtherworldInvestigatorAdina.Buff/B_Adina_En_1_Description: For each Moon skill among the top 3 cards of your deck, gain 1 Attack Power.
OtherworldInvestigatorAdina.Buff/B_Adina_Item_Description: At 5 stacks, generate one 『I・The Magician』. You may hold at most 3 『I・The Magician』. System Message: Firewall encountered. Executing breach protocol...
OtherworldInvestigatorAdina.Buff/B_Adina_R1_Description: Gain stat bonuses from Adina's celestial buffs.
OtherworldInvestigatorAdina.Character/Adina_CampSelectWord: Fate comes secondary to our determination.
OtherworldInvestigatorAdina.Character/Adina_PassiveDes:
Adina's celestial buffs read the types of cards at the top of the deck and grant corresponding bonuses.
Sun represents attack skills, granting 1 Attack Power.
Moon represents healing skills, granting 1 Healing Power.
Star represents skills that are neither Sun nor Moon. When Adina uses her own skills during a turn, she has a (25/55/100)% chance to gain 1 Mana based on the number of Star skills among the top 3 cards of the deck.

<color=#FF7C34FF>『I・The Magician』</color>
Upon gaining this passive, receive 3 special items 『I・The Magician』 used to manipulate the deck.
Every 5 times Adina uses her own skills, she gains 1 『I・The Magician』. (Can hold up to 3.)

<color=#FF7C34FF>Observer</color>
At the start of each turn, if 『XXI・The World』 is not in your hand, generate 1 『XXI・The World』.
『XXI・The World』 enhances the skill Exchange function.
OtherworldInvestigatorAdina.Character/Adina_SelectInfo:
She is an astrologer who runs a small café and fortune-telling shop.
She reads the fates of all things through the movement of stars reflected in her crystal ball.
Her gentle voice, fragrant coffee, and eerily accurate readings have drawn many loyal customers.

When she first took up astrology, she foresaw a misfortune she could not prevent.
Adina took that lesson to heart and refined her craft.
She decided to become a different kind of astrologer — one who not only sees the future, but guides those who come to her toward a better path.

Many customers have grown fond of her candid advice.
At times, Adina gazes quietly into her crystal ball, as though softly confiding to someone unseen.

Adina is a versatile investigator. Her unique abilities allow her to take on different roles at different moments.
OtherworldInvestigatorAdina.Character/Adina_Text_Battle_Healed_0: While you're alive, you ought to live as fully as you can.
OtherworldInvestigatorAdina.Character/Adina_Text_Battle_Healed_1: Your star has not yet stopped moving.
OtherworldInvestigatorAdina.Character/Adina_Text_Battle_Idle_0: People still ask whether astrology has any use in this day and age? Why, you could even make a business out of it.
OtherworldInvestigatorAdina.Character/Adina_Text_Battle_Idle_1: When darkness lies ahead, there should be a light to open the path... The stars, the sun, the moon? A phone flashlight works just fine too.
OtherworldInvestigatorAdina.Character/Adina_Text_Battle_Idle_2: The moon submerged in water, the unmoving pole star, Mars drifting through the void... An ill omen, indeed.
OtherworldInvestigatorAdina.Character/Adina_Text_Battle_Kill_1: Everyone must accept the results of what has already come to pass.
OtherworldInvestigatorAdina.Character/Adina_Text_Battle_Kill_2: The end of time and fate is that eternal, unending sleep.
OtherworldInvestigatorAdina.Character/Adina_Text_Battle_ND_0: All must die in the end. It is the one fate none can escape.
OtherworldInvestigatorAdina.Character/Adina_Text_Battle_ND_1: Was this also written in the stars...?
OtherworldInvestigatorAdina.Character/Adina_Text_Battle_Start_0: Perhaps it is time to reveal what lies ahead?
OtherworldInvestigatorAdina.Character/Adina_Text_Field_GetItem_0: Best to save a little luck for when it truly matters.
OtherworldInvestigatorAdina.Character/Adina_Text_Field_GetItem_1: Higher expectations only invite greater disappointment.
OtherworldInvestigatorAdina.Character/Adina_Text_Field_Idle_0: The celestial bodies are in motion. Shouldn't we be moving too?
OtherworldInvestigatorAdina.Character/Adina_Text_Field_Idle_1: Rough terrain, illusions, lurking dangers... and an unyielding will and unclouded intuition.
OtherworldInvestigatorAdina.Character/Adina_Text_Field_Idle_2: Perhaps I should try closing my eyes and letting my mind go blank for a moment...
OtherworldInvestigatorAdina.Character/Adina_Text_Field_Potion_P_0:
Harmony, temperance, full force... two waters —
Wait, are you just telling me to drink it already?
OtherworldInvestigatorAdina.Character/Adina_Text_MasterTarget: Finally... I can go see my old friend...
OtherworldInvestigatorAdina.Character/Adina_Text_PharosLeader_0: Darkness, boundaries, form, restriction... they bring solitude and endurance.
OtherworldInvestigatorAdina.Character/Adina_Text_PharosLeader_2: Embrace the will of the stars.
OtherworldInvestigatorAdina.Character/Adina_Text_Witch_0: An ominous shadow looms over this place.
OtherworldInvestigatorAdina.Character/Adina_Text_Witch_1: Will you kneel and stop here, or overcome it and press on toward the path yet unfinished?
OtherworldInvestigatorAdina.Character_Skin/ArcanaofFateAdina_SkinDes: The path has been revealed before you, but the final choice remains yours.
OtherworldInvestigatorAdina.Character_Skin/EternalVowAdina_SkinDesc: Will you accept my fate, in its entirety?
OtherworldInvestigatorAdina.Character_Skin/OceanBreezeAdina_SkinDesc: How about a special reading with seashells today?
OtherworldInvestigatorAdina.Item_Consume/Adina_TheMagician_Descripti: Gain 1 additional Exchange. Choose a celestial type. Select a random skill of the corresponding type from the discard pile and place it on top of the deck. If no corresponding skill exists in the discard pile, search from the bottom of the deck instead. System Message: Connecting to remote server. Retrieving keychain.
OtherworldInvestigatorAdina.Skill/S_Adina_0_Description:
Gain different effects based on the number of Sun skills among the top 3 cards of the deck.
1 or more: Gain <color=#FF7C34FF>Swiftness</color>.
2 or more: Critical Hit Chance is increased to 100%.
3: Attack range changes to all enemies.
OtherworldInvestigatorAdina.Skill/S_Adina_1_Description:
Gain different effects based on the number of Moon skills among the top 3 cards of the deck.
1 or more: Healing effect is increased.
2 or more: Remove one random debuff from the target.
3: When used from hand, this skill can be cast one additional time.
OtherworldInvestigatorAdina.Skill/S_Adina_2_Description:
Gain different effects based on the number of Star skills among the top 3 cards of the deck.
1 or more: Restore 1 Mana.
2 or more: Apply Stun to the target (<sprite=2>&a%).
3: Apply the Starscorch debuff to all other enemies.
OtherworldInvestigatorAdina.Skill/S_Adina_3_Description:
Gain different effects based on the number of Sun skills among the top 3 cards of the deck.
1 or more: Gain <color=#FF7C34FF>Swiftness</color>.
2 or more: Critical Hit Chance is increased to 100%.
3: Perform one additional attack.
OtherworldInvestigatorAdina.Skill/S_Adina_4_Description:
Gain different effects based on the number of Moon skills among the top 3 cards of the deck.
1 or more: Healing effect is increased.
2 or more: Apply the Moonlight buff to all targets (<color=#FFFFFFFF>Restore &a</color><color=#FF7C34FF>25% of base Healing Power per turn</color>, <color=#FFFFFFFF>stacks up to 5 times, lasts 3 turns</color>).
3: When used from hand, this skill can be cast one additional time.
OtherworldInvestigatorAdina.Skill/S_Adina_5_Description: Based on the number of Star skills among the top 3 cards of the deck, generate a Barrier of &a × <color=#FF7C34FF>(15/20/30/45)</color>.
OtherworldInvestigatorAdina.Skill/S_Adina_6_Description: This card is counted as Sun during celestial observation. Choose how many skills to Exclude (up to 4). Exclude that many skills from the top of the deck. Then, deal defense-ignoring damage to all enemies equal to (75% Attack Power) multiplied by the number of Excluded skills. System Warning: Stack count has reached critical threshold.
OtherworldInvestigatorAdina.Skill/S_Adina_7_Description: This card is counted as Moon during celestial observation. This attack ignores enemy Defense and cannot be Evaded. Heal the ally with the lowest HP by an amount equal to the damage dealt. If this attack kills the enemy, instead grant all allies &a Overheal equal to (25% Healing Power).
OtherworldInvestigatorAdina.Skill/S_Adina_9_Description: Can only be used when Exchange count is not 0. Cannot select skills that cannot be Exchanged. Consume 1 Exchange. Can be used repeatedly as long as Exchange count remains. Discard the selected skill, then choose a position — 1, 2, 3, or 4 — from the top of the deck. Draw the skill at the chosen position. If the drawn skill has a Foresight effect, trigger it. System Message: Access verified. Preparing orbital correction program.
OtherworldInvestigatorAdina.Skill/S_Adina_Draw_Description:
Choose a celestial type.
Search from the bottom of the deck for skills of the corresponding type and draw the first 2 found.
OtherworldInvestigatorAdina.Skill/S_Adina_Item_Description:
Gain 1 additional Exchange.
Choose a celestial type. Randomly select a skill of the corresponding type from the discard pile and place it on top of the deck.
If no corresponding type exists in the discard pile, search from the bottom of the deck instead and place it on top.
OtherworldInvestigatorAdina.Skill/S_Adina_R0_0_Description:
Can be used one more time, but only once per turn.
Choose:
- Gain 2 Mana.
- Draw 1 card.
OtherworldInvestigatorAdina.Skill/S_Adina_R0_Description:
At the start of battle, place this card on top of the deck.
Can be used two more times, but only once per turn.
Choose:
- Gain 2 Mana.
- Draw 1 card.
While this card is in the deck, a fourth celestial body can be observed.
The fourth celestial does not provide stat bonuses and is not counted in celestial checks.
OtherworldInvestigatorAdina.Skill/S_Adina_R1_Description:
At the start of battle, place this card on top of the deck.
While this card is in the deck, a fourth celestial body can be observed.
The fourth celestial does not provide stat bonuses and is not counted in celestial checks.
OtherworldInvestigatorAdina.SkillExtended/SkillEn_Adina_0_Name:
Apply Solar Eclipse to self
(Gain 1 Attack Power for each Sun skill among the top 3 cards of the deck, lasts 6 turns.)
OtherworldInvestigatorAdina.SkillExtended/SkillEn_Adina_1_Name:
Grants self the Lunar Eclipse buff
(For each Moon skill on top of the deck, gain 1 Healing Power, lasting 6 turns.)
OtherworldInvestigatorAdina.SkillKeyword/Keyword_Celestial_Desc:
The skill type determines its corresponding Celestial body.
Sun represents attack skills, Moon represents healing skills, and Star represents skills that are neither.
OtherworldInvestigatorAdina.B_Adina_Celestial_Star: Star: Skills that are neither healing nor attack.
OtherworldInvestigatorAdina.B_Adina_Celestial_Void: There is no skill in this position.
OtherworldInvestigatorAdina.S_Adina_6_Confirm_Except: Confirm the skill to Exclude from the deck.
OtherworldInvestigatorAdina.S_Adina_6_Select_Except: Select the number of skills to Exclude from the deck.
OtherworldInvestigatorAdina.S_Adina_9_Select_Position: Select the position of the skill to swap with the top of the deck.
OtherworldInvestigatorAdina.S_Adina_Draw_Select_Celestial: Select the Celestial type to draw from the bottom of the deck.
OtherworldInvestigatorAdina.S_Adina_Item_Select_Celestial: Select the Celestial type to place on top of the deck.

Sorasaki Hina.Buff/B_Hina_8_Description: Both Choice effects of Hina's exclusive skills are triggered simultaneously.
Sorasaki Hina.Buff/B_Hina_9_Description: Hina's exclusive skills trigger their Choice effects without needing to meet the conditions.
Sorasaki Hina.Character/Hina_PassiveDes: Damage dealt to targets not under Taunt is increased by 20%.
Sorasaki Hina.Character/Hina_SelectInfo: Chairwoman of Gehenna Academy's Disciplinary Committee. Her fighting prowess is astounding — organizations that oppose Gehenna fear her arrival more than anything else. At heart she's a self-proclaimed hassle-hater, but when it comes to school rules, she becomes strict, calmly and swiftly assessing the situation and acting without hesitation, all while muttering "What a pain."
Sorasaki Hina.Character/Hina_Text_Battle_Idle_0: What a hassle. Let's just wrap this up.
Sorasaki Hina.Character/Hina_Text_Battle_Kill_0: A mission of this level is nothing.
Sorasaki Hina.Character/Hina_Text_Battle_Kill_1: Hm. Of course it ended this way.
Sorasaki Hina.Character/Hina_Text_PharosLeader_0: What did you do to Sensei?
Sorasaki Hina.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Hina_Azar_Di: [A] You're a senior member of the investigation team, right? I'm Hina. Pleased to meet you.
[A] (This person... is concealing her true strength?)
Sorasaki Hina.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Hina_Blue_Di: [A] You're quite different from your sister.
Sorasaki Hina.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Hina_Charon_: [A] ...Why do you get so worked up every time you see me?
[B] You're so cool~! Those horns and wings! They're absolutely amazing!
[B] Ahhhh~ I want them too. Do I need to learn advanced dark magic to reshape my body like that?
Sorasaki Hina.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Hina_Hein_Di: [B] Whoooooa! What incredible horns and wings!
Sorasaki Hina.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Hina_Huz_Dia: [B] Whoa... I've never seen such an imposing little girl before.
[A] Um... could you please not pat my head like that?
Sorasaki Hina.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Hina_Ilya_Di: [B] I envy you. You look so confident.
[A] When it comes to combat, that's just because I'm used to it.
[B] Used to combat? That sounds terrifying.
[B] S-Sorry, I didn't mean it that way.
Sorasaki Hina.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Hina_Iron_Di: [B] Your fighting style is outrageous. You look like you don't need any allies at all.
[A] I am more used to working alone, yes.
[B] Ha! But while you're here, I'd still like you to trust my shield.
Sorasaki Hina.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Hina_Joey_Di: [B] Quite the cocky little brat, aren't you?
[B] Fighting like that — you've got no fear of death whatsoever.
[A] Is that your way of showing concern? Thank you.
Sorasaki Hina.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Hina_Johan_D: [B] Do you know Alice? Do you know where she is?
[A] I do know someone named Alice, but I doubt it's the Alice you mean.
[B] No, maybe it is. Tell me what she looks like.
[A] Very well. A young girl, slightly taller than me, hair that reaches the ground, and she peppers her speech with RPG terminology.
Sorasaki Hina.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Hina_Leryn_D: [B] Horns and wings... how fascinating. May I touch them?
[B] Thank you. Wow, they're slightly warm. These aren't prosthetics at all — I'd love to know the structure underneath!
[A] I won't let you dissect me.
Sorasaki Hina.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Hina_Lian_Di: [B] You have the air of someone well-suited to be an instructor. The investigation team is glad to have you.
[A] I have led quite a few training sessions for the Disciplinary Committee.
Sorasaki Hina.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Hina_Miss_Di: [B] Do you know me? You keep looking at me like you're nostalgic about something.
[A] I know someone who looks a bit like you, though she carries a flamethrower instead of a chainsaw.
[B] Oh! I feel like we'd be great friends!
[A] ...She's a bit of a handful, though.
Sorasaki Hina.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Hina_Momori_: [A] ...Why are you making faces at me?
[B] There's actually a girl cuter than me here! How infuriating!
Sorasaki Hina.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Hina_Narhan_: [A] (What a hassle... I just want to go home and sleep...)
[B] (To manipulate her, I'd need to go through someone she trusts.)
Sorasaki Hina.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Hina_Pheonix: [B] Hmph, you have wings too? Still no match for mine, though!
[A] I have no interest in making that comparison.
[B] But those are some fine-looking horns you've got... Not that I'm jealous or anything.
[A] There's nothing worth being jealous about.
Sorasaki Hina.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Hina_Priest_: [B] Horns and bat wings? But also a halo?
[B] How intriguing. You carry the symbols of both angel and demon.
[B] Yet from your actions, I believe you belong more on "our" side. Would you like to pray together?
Sorasaki Hina.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Hina_Red_Dia: [A] I do have a fair degree of confidence in my own abilities.
[B] I probably couldn't beat you on my own, but if Selena joined in...
[B] I'm not sure why we'd ever come to blows, but honestly, if it were the two of you sisters, I don't think my odds would be great.
Sorasaki Hina.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Hina_SilverS: [B] That's quite the big gun you've got there, little lady.
Sorasaki Hina.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Hina_Sizz_Di: [B] I hope you two can be friends!
Sorasaki Hina.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Hina_Trisha_: [B] (She looks small and cute, but my instincts are telling me I absolutely cannot cross this person...)
[A] (There's really no need to be that on guard...)
Sorasaki Hina.Skill/S_Hina_1_Description:
Cost -X, where X is the total number of skills below this card. If there is only one target, choose one effect to trigger:
·Attack Power +50% (1 turn)
·Attack all enemies once.
Sorasaki Hina.Skill/S_Hina_2_Description:
Cost +X, where X is the total number of skills above this card. If Mana reaches 0 after use, choose one effect to trigger:
·Attack all enemies once.
·Restore 1 Mana.
Sorasaki Hina.Skill/S_Hina_3_Description:
Damage +X%, where X is the percentage of HP the target has lost. If the target's HP is above 80% or below 20%, choose one effect to trigger:
·CC Accuracy +50% (1 turn)
·Attack all enemies once.
Sorasaki Hina.Skill/S_Hina_4_Description:
If this is the first skill played this turn, choose one effect to trigger:
·CC Accuracy +50% (1 turn)
·Attack Power +25% (1 turn)
Sorasaki Hina.Skill/S_Hina_5_Description:
Stun the target (1 turn). If held in hand for at least one turn before playing, choose one effect to trigger:
·CC Accuracy +50% (1 turn)
·Restore 1 Mana.
Sorasaki Hina.Skill/S_Hina_6_Description:
This skill can only be played when in position 1 or 6. When played in position 6, choose one effect to trigger:
·Attack Power +50% (1 turn)
·Restore 1 Mana.
Sorasaki Hina.Skill/S_Hina_7_Description: Discard 1 skill. Randomly generate 3 Hina-exclusive attack skills with Exclude, discarded after 2 turns.
Sorasaki Hina.Skill/S_Hina_LucyD_0_Description: Draw skills equal to the number of attack skills in hand.
Sorasaki Hina.Skill/S_Hina_LucyD_1_Description: Draw skills equal to the number of healing skills in hand.
Sorasaki Hina.Skill/S_Hina_LucyD_2_Description: Draw skills equal to the number of non-attack, non-healing skills in hand.
Sorasaki Hina.Skill/S_Hina_LucyD_Description: Choice: Draw skills equal to the number of attack / healing / other skills in hand.
Sorasaki Hina.Skill/S_Hina_LucyD_Name: I Want to Be Praised Too!
Sorasaki Hina.Skill/S_Hina_R2_Description: Repeat this skill based on the number of skills below this card, up to 5 times. Excess attack counts are converted into stun hits on enemies.
Sorasaki Hina.SkillExtended/SkillEn_Hina_0_Des: If Hina survives after using this skill, add "Flawless Preparation" to hand with Exclude.
Sorasaki Hina.SkillExtended/SkillEn_Hina_0_EnforceStri: If Hina is in the party, create a Flawless Preparation and mark its owner as Hina.
Sorasaki Hina.SkillExtended/SkillEn_Hina_1_Des: For every 3 skills below this card, reduce this skill's cost by 1.

Darkness.Character/Darkness_Normal_SelectInfo: Choose me, and I'll show you just how much I can endure ♡

When attacking, apply 1 stack of <color=#FC6178>Burn</color>.
When attacked, apply 1 stack of <color=#FC6178>Burn</color> to the attacker.

XiaoLOR.Buff/B_XiaoLOR_BùMièXīnLián_Description: When taking damage, apply 2 stacks of <color=#FC6178>Burn</color> to a random enemy.
XiaoLOR.Buff/B_XiaoLOR_ForceofaWildfire_0_Descri: At 4 stacks, inflict Stun (<sprite=2>125%). Adds this character's CC Accuracy to the Stun chance.
XiaoLOR.Buff/B_XiaoLOR_ForceofaWildfire_Descript: When this character attacks an enemy, apply <color=#FC6178>Force of a Wildfire</color> to the target.
XiaoLOR.Buff/B_XiaoLOR_HuǒYǐng_Description: When the user uses an attack skill on an enemy, cast "Shadow Flame" on the same target and remove 1 stack.
XiaoLOR.Buff/B_XiaoLOR_LièYànXīnLián_Description: On a critical hit, apply 2 stacks of <color=#FC6178>Burn</color> to the target.
XiaoLOR.Character/XiaoLOR_CampSelectWord: Let us burn bright, rather than fade away.
XiaoLOR.Character/XiaoLOR_PassiveDes:
Each Xiao level increases Faint Resist by 5.
<color=#C067EF>Emotion Level</color>:
<color=#C067EF>1</color>: Apply 1 stack of <color=#FC6178>Burn</color> when attacking.
<color=#C067EF>2</color>: Manifest E.G.O and enhance skills. At the start of each turn, apply 1 stack of <color=#FC6178>Burn</color> to all enemies.
<color=#C067EF>3</color>: At the start of each turn, 2 random attack skills in hand apply 2 stacks of <color=#FC6178>Burn</color>.
<color=#C067EF>4</color>: Enhance E.G.O.
<color=#C067EF>5</color>: Apply 1 additional stack of <color=#FC6178>Burn</color> when attacking.

<color=#919191>- This passive is active from level 1.</color>
XiaoLOR.Character/XiaoLOR_SelectInfo: Once the proud Director of Section 1 of the Liu Association's Southern Branch, known as the "Lady of Iron" for her unwavering and professional demeanor. But even the strongest heart can break — when she lost the one she swore to protect, her soul crumbled with him. Grief-stricken yet resolute, she fought on, her sorrow burning fiercer than any flame. In her final moments at the Library, her anguish tore through reality and cast her into the world of Chrono Ark — perhaps there, her soul might find peace... or burn once more.
XiaoLOR.Character/XiaoLOR_Text_Battle_AllyND_0: Life, like a falling flower, will return to dust.
XiaoLOR.Character/XiaoLOR_Text_Battle_AllyND_1: If your journey has ended, may the wind carry you gently.
XiaoLOR.Character/XiaoLOR_Text_Battle_AllyND_2: The wound has yet to heal, and already the heart has turned to ash.
XiaoLOR.Character/XiaoLOR_Text_Battle_Cri_0: In an instant, my strike shatters fate.
XiaoLOR.Character/XiaoLOR_Text_Battle_Cri_1: With the fury of a storm, my blow leaves only ruin.
XiaoLOR.Character/XiaoLOR_Text_Battle_Cri_2: As the spear dances, the enemy's life scatters on the wind.
XiaoLOR.Character/XiaoLOR_Text_Battle_Healed_0: Like a flower blooming from the ashes, my strength blossoms once more.
XiaoLOR.Character/XiaoLOR_Text_Battle_Healed_1: Though scarred, the healing touch bids me fight again.
XiaoLOR.Character/XiaoLOR_Text_Battle_Healed_2: The pain fades, leaving only the whisper of a battle that once burned within.
XiaoLOR.Character/XiaoLOR_Text_Battle_Idle_0: Even the moon refuses to witness this cursed fate.
XiaoLOR.Character/XiaoLOR_Text_Battle_Idle_1: A thousand petals fall — none shall bloom again.
XiaoLOR.Character/XiaoLOR_Text_Battle_Idle_2: In waiting, I feel the weight of all those who have fallen before me.
XiaoLOR.Character/XiaoLOR_Text_Battle_Kill_0: The heavens weep for them — their journey ends here.
XiaoLOR.Character/XiaoLOR_Text_Battle_Kill_1: In a single strike, their fate was sealed, like a leaf swept away by the river.
XiaoLOR.Character/XiaoLOR_Text_Battle_Kill_2: In the silence of the battlefield, their life fades like a setting sun.
XiaoLOR.Character/XiaoLOR_Text_Battle_ND_0: The stars dim, yet my soul endures — an undying flame.
XiaoLOR.Character/XiaoLOR_Text_Battle_ND_1: Shadows reach for me, yet I stand unmoved, like a mountain against the storm.
XiaoLOR.Character/XiaoLOR_Text_Battle_ND_2: In the end, even the sharpest blade dulls — but my resolve does not bend.
XiaoLOR.Character/XiaoLOR_Text_Battle_Start_0: With an unshaken heart, I step onto the battlefield where fate calls.
XiaoLOR.Character/XiaoLOR_Text_Battle_Start_1: When the wind howls, I stand firm — for I am the storm that cuts through it.
XiaoLOR.Character/XiaoLOR_Text_Battle_Start_2: Like an unyielding flame in the abyss, my resolve burns fiercer with every battle's awakening.
XiaoLOR.Character/XiaoLOR_Text_Field_GetItem_0: From the depths of the earth, treasure reveals itself to those who are worthy.
XiaoLOR.Character/XiaoLOR_Text_Field_GetItem_1: A treasure is like a fleeting thought — its value only realized when used with purpose.
XiaoLOR.Character/XiaoLOR_Text_Field_Idle_0: In silence, I await fate's call, as a flower awaits the dawn.
XiaoLOR.Character/XiaoLOR_Text_Field_Idle_1: Like the moon above, I observe the world in quiet contemplation.
XiaoLOR.Character/XiaoLOR_Text_Field_Idle_2: Silence is louder than the clash of swords, for it carries the weight of fate.
XiaoLOR.Character/XiaoLOR_Text_Field_Potion_P_0: This elixir may ease the pain, but no potion can mend a broken heart.
XiaoLOR.Character/XiaoLOR_Text_Field_Potion_P_1: Like a whisper on the wind, this remedy heals the body — but only time heals a broken soul.
XiaoLOR.Character/XiaoLOR_Text_MasterTarget: Let this final act be my offering. I am coming, my love.
XiaoLOR.Character/XiaoLOR_Text_PharosLeader_0: My body moves against my will... the flame within is no longer mine to control.
XiaoLOR.Character/XiaoLOR_Text_PharosLeader_1: The flame has returned to me... yet a lotus blooms in the ashes where it once burned.
XiaoLOR.Character/XiaoLOR_Text_PharosLeader_2: Forgive me... the fire that scorched you was not my own.
XiaoLOR.Character/XiaoLOR_Text_Witch_0: This curse is but the wind — my flame stands firm as a mountain.
XiaoLOR.Character/XiaoLOR_Text_Witch_1: My flame wavers... but even in the ashes, a mountain does not kneel.
XiaoLOR.Character_Skin/XiaoLORSwimsuit_SkinDesc: A rare and fleeting respite. Even a flame must cool from time to time.

<color=#919191>The spear's flame bears the weight of a love lost, burning fierce still in the grief of absence.</color>

<color=#919191>A lotus blooming in the ashes of chaos. She burned the entire garden to save a single flower.</color>

<color=#919191>The wind took the warmth from the meal, but could not take the guilt from my heart.</color>

<color=#919191>Let the fire in your heart guide your hand — burn away every hesitation.</color>

XiaoLOR.Skill/S_XiaoLORUnique_FormingStorm_Descr:

While this skill's count is active, all allies gain 15% Attack Power and Defense, and gain Healing Gauge Protection.
Apply 'A Fighter That Never Retreats' to all allies.
XiaoLOR.SkillExtended/Ex_XiaoLOR_LiánQíng_Name:

Phrolova.Buff/B_LetheanElegy_Description: Damage dealt by the next skill used from hand is increased by 64%.
Phrolova.Buff/B_Phrolova_2_Description: Empowers your next skill, increasing its damage by &a%<color=#FF7A33>(200% of &user's Attack Power)</color>.
Phrolova.Buff/B_Phrolova_3_Description: <color=purple>Pain damage</color> taken is increased by &a%<color=#FF7A33>(200% of &user's Attack Power)</color>.
Phrolova.Buff/B_Phrolova_4_Description: Damage dealt by Fixed Abilities is increased by &a%<color=#FF7A33>(200% of &user's Attack Power)</color>.
Phrolova.Buff/B_Phrolova_5_Description:
Critical Hit Chance is increased by &a%<color=#FF7A33>(100% of &user's Attack Power)</color>.
<color=purple>Pain damage</color> dealt by self can critically hit.
Phrolova.Buff/B_Phrolova_8_Description:
The next single-target skill used on &user deals 100% increased damage/healing and draws 1 of the target's skills, then removes this buff.
At the end of the turn, use "Basic Attack" on &user once.
Phrolova.Buff/B_Phrolova_P_1_Description: On death, deal <color=purple>&a Pain damage</color> to all enemies<color=#FF7A33>(33% of &user's Attack Power per stack)</color>.
Phrolova.Buff/B_Phrolova_P_Description: Upon reaching 6 stacks, the Fixed Ability is replaced with "Curtain Call."
Phrolova.Buff/B_Phrolova_Rare_1_1_Description:
Whenever another ally uses a skill, gain 1 stack of "Aftersound."
When "Aftersound" reaches 6 stacks, the Fixed Ability becomes "A Night to Depart From Eternal Rest" instead.
Removes this buff upon entering Near-Death state.
Phrolova.Buff/B_Phrolova_Rare_1_2_Description: The "damage per turn" of this buff equals the sum of all debuffs' "damage per turn" on the target.
Phrolova.Buff/B_Phrolova_Rare_1_Description:
All of your own skills in hand become "Song of Red and Black."
Removes this buff upon entering Near-Death state.
Phrolova.Buff/B_Phrolova_Rare_2_1_Description:
After using a Fixed Ability, clear own Overload.
Whenever dealing damage, convert 20% of the damage dealt into HP.
Phrolova.Buff/B_Phrolova_Rare_2_1_Name: A Forked Road in Fate's Heartland
Phrolova.Buff/B_Phrolova_Rare_2_Name: A Night to Depart From Eternal Rest
Phrolova.Character/Phrolova_PassiveDes:
Each time you use your own skill, gain 1 stack of "Aftersound."
Upon reaching 6 stacks, the Fixed Ability is replaced with "Curtain Call."

Damage received from allies is increased by 100%.
For each ally that has fallen, Phrolova permanently holds 1 stack of "Aftersound."
Phrolova.Character/Phrolova_SelectInfo: A former Fractsidus Overseer walking the fine line between life and death — an uncanny, deadly conductor. A silent wave of her baton is enough to attune the very frequencies of being and conduct the symphonies of "souls." Her music can sculpt a better world or, just as easily, summon a legion to wreak havoc.
Phrolova.Character/Phrolova_Text_Battle_AllyND_0: You see, humans are creatures that live under the shelter of safety — threatened by fear, clinging to anything to survive, refusing death.
Phrolova.Character/Phrolova_Text_Battle_Cri_0: All of it is nothing more than a fleeting moment.
Phrolova.Character/Phrolova_Text_Battle_Idle_0: Don't be so hasty to leave. This performance is not yet over.
Phrolova.Character/Phrolova_Text_Battle_Idle_1: Be careful — I may hurl my baton at any moment.
Phrolova.Character/Phrolova_Text_Battle_Kill_0: The warm yet sorrowful first movement lies hidden in the dark of night — lonely, desolate.
Phrolova.Character/Phrolova_Text_Battle_Kill_1: The grim and mournful second movement conceals unease and menace within.
Phrolova.Character/Phrolova_Text_Battle_Kill_2: The bright and lively third movement takes on the playful air of fantasy.
Phrolova.Character/Phrolova_Text_Battle_Kill_3: The resolute and powerful fourth movement brings down an exhilarating battle hymn.
Phrolova.Character/Phrolova_Text_Battle_ND_0: Fail enough times, and you lose the capacity to feel failure. And with that, all your troubles disappear.
Phrolova.Character/Phrolova_Text_Battle_Start_0: Come then. Let us together complete this long-awaited performance.
Phrolova.Character/Phrolova_Text_Battle_Start_1: A duet with me? Are you certain?
Phrolova.Character/Phrolova_Text_Battle_Start_2: I wonder... will the sound that's about to come be beautiful enough?
Phrolova.Character/Phrolova_Text_Field_GetItem_1: What meaning will you give them?
Phrolova.Character/Phrolova_Text_Field_Idle_0: To grasp the endless cycle of life, one must live through it, again and again.
Phrolova.Character/Phrolova_Text_PharosLeader_0: Mutual exploitation between those who know the truth — somehow, that puts the mind at ease, don't you think?
Phrolova.Character/Phrolova_Text_PharosLeader_1: But we must learn to master the art of living, and of living on after death.
Phrolova.Character/Phrolova_Text_PharosLeader_2: Are you not afraid? It will raise its dagger with force and pierce the veil between life and death.
Phrolova.Character/Phrolova_Text_Witch_0: Fail enough times, and you lose the capacity to feel failure. And with that, all your troubles disappear.
Phrolova.Character/Phrolova_Text_Witch_1: The soul must never become a grave.
Phrolova.Item_Equip/E_LetheanElegy_Description: Damage dealt by Fixed Abilities is increased by 64%. After using a Fixed Ability, damage dealt by the next skill used from hand is increased by 64%. I am not there, nor have I died. I shall follow death — masking fear with pleasure, trading the future for the past.
Phrolova.Skill/S_Phrolova_0_Description:
Activates twice and deals <color=purple>Pain damage</color>.
Draw 1 "Rhapsody of a New World" from the deck or discard pile.
While holding the "Rhapsody of a New World" buff, also Stun the target (<sprite=2>80%) for 1 turn.
Phrolova.Skill/S_Phrolova_1_Description:
Draw 1 "Rhapsody of a New World" from the deck or discard pile.
While holding the "Rhapsody of a New World" buff, also preferentially draw 1 additional skill of your own.
Phrolova.Skill/S_Phrolova_5_Description: Preferentially draw 1 of your own skills.
Phrolova.Skill/S_Phrolova_6_Description:
Can only be used while <color=red>in Near-Death state</color>.
Deal <color=purple>Pain damage</color>.
Phrolova.Skill/S_Phrolova_7_Description: Generate 1 rare skill that you have not learned into your hand.
Phrolova.Skill/S_Phrolova_7_Name: A Rope Tied to a Life Beyond
Phrolova.Skill/S_Phrolova_8_Description: When this skill is exchanged or discarded, take <color=purple>6 Pain damage</color>.
Phrolova.Skill/S_Phrolova_Rare_1_2_Description: Deal <color=purple>Pain damage</color>. Inflict <color=purple>&a Pain damage</color> on yourself<color=#FF7A33>(100% of your Max. Health)</color>.
Phrolova.Skill/S_Phrolova_Rare_1_2_Name: A Night to Depart From Eternal Rest
Phrolova.Skill/S_Phrolova_Rare_1_Description:
Can only be used while holding the "Muted" buff.
Remove the "Muted" buff.
Phrolova.Skill/S_Phrolova_Rare_2_Description:
All allies except yourself are killed.
Afterward, add all skills from your allies' decks to your own deck, and transfer ownership to yourself.
Fill the charge count of "Lucy's Necklace" to 3 stacks.
Phrolova.SkillExtended/SE_E_LetheanElegy_1_Des: Damage dealt by the next skill used from hand is increased by 64%.
Phrolova.SkillExtended/SE_Phrolova_2_Des: The next skill's damage is increased by &a%<color=#FF7A33>(100% of &user's Attack Power)</color>.
Phrolova.SkillExtended/SE_Phrolova_4_Des: Damage dealt by Fixed Abilities is increased by &a%<color=#FF7A33>(100% of &user's Attack Power)</color>.

Sparkle.Buff/B_sparkle_fakeface_Description:
Each stack provides 1% Critical Hit Chance and 3% Critical Damage.
​
​&fakeface
Sparkle.Buff/B_sparkle_fakeface_1_Description: The fireworks are ready~ Go find Mini-Sparkle~
Sparkle.Buff/B_sparkle_pbuff_1_Description: "Narrative Polysemy" ​ When receiving healing that does not Overheal, take damage equal to &sparkleCri% of the healing received. Can be lethal.
Sparkle.Buff/B_sparkle_pbuff_2_Description: "Narrative Polysemy" ​ Pain damage received is increased by &sparkleCridmg%.
Sparkle.Buff/B_sparkle_pbuff_3_Description: "Narrative Polysemy" ​ When Evade triggers, take &50bysparkleAtk damage from Sparkle. Can be lethal.
Sparkle.Buff/B_sparkle_pdeb_1_Description: "Narrative Polysemy" ​When an attack skill misses, Sparkle unleashes a copy of that skill with Countdown 1.
Sparkle.Buff/B_sparkle_pdeb_2_Description: "Narrative Polysemy" Each time you are attacked, reduce the Mana cost of your own skills in hand by 1 for their next use. The meta-brain connects, the invincible replaces thought!
Sparkle.Buff/B_sparkle_pdeb_3_Description: "Narrative Polysemy" ​ Damage accumulated: &damageGot Records damage received. Upon reaching &sparkleReg, Sparkle deals &sparkleReg damage to a random enemy.
Sparkle.Buff/B_sparkle_s_0_Name: The Hero with a Thousand Faces
Sparkle.Buff/B_sparkle_s_0_Description:
+10% damage dealt.

Damage accumulated: &damageGot
Records damage dealt. Upon reaching &sparkleAtk, Sparkle gains 1 stack of "Mask".
Sparkle.Buff/B_sparkle_s_1_Description: When hit by an attack, Sparkle gains 1 stack of "Mask".
Sparkle.Buff/B_sparkle_s_2_Description:
Each time a skill is used, there is a 1% chance to restore all Mana.
​
Each time Mana is restored, Sparkle gains 1 stack of "Mask".
Sparkle.Buff/B_sparkle_s_3_Description: When dealing &dmg or more damage, Sparkle gains 1 stack of "Mask".
Sparkle.Buff/B_sparkle_s_4_Description: At the start of the turn, randomly gain 2 "Narrative Polysemy" buffs or debuffs, then remove Suspension of Disbelief.
Sparkle.Buff/B_sparkle_s_5_Description: When a debuff is applied, Sparkle gains 1 stack of "Mask".
Sparkle.Buff/B_sparkle_s_6_Description: When cards are discarded using the Exchange button, Sparkle gains 1 stack of "Mask".
Sparkle.Buff/B_sparkle_s_7_Description: When another ally receives healing, Sparkle gains 1 stack of "Mask".
Sparkle.Buff/B_sparkle_s_8_Description: When receiving healing, Sparkle gains 1 stack of "Mask".
Sparkle.Buff/B_sparkle_s_9_Description:
When a buff is applied, extend its duration by one turn.

When a buff is applied, Sparkle gains 1 stack of "Mask".
Sparkle.Skill/S_sparkle_firework_Description: Additionally deal a total of &dmg! damage... if it hits?
Sparkle.Skill/S_sparkle_firework_1_Description: Why not take a closer look?
Sparkle.Skill/S_sparkle_rare_0_Name: The Hero with a Thousand Faces
Sparkle.Skill/S_sparkle_rare_0_Description: This skill's Mana cost is reduced by 1 for every 2 "Narrative Polysemy" buffs or debuffs held by all allies.
Sparkle.Character/Sparkle_PassiveDesc: -When a skill belonging to Sparkle that is already in hand is drawn, transform it into a random rare skill of Sparkle's. -When Sparkle uses a skill on herself, additionally deal a small amount of Healing Power-based damage to a random enemy. -When Sparkle uses a skill targeting an ally, convert one of the target's random buffs or debuffs into one of Sparkle's special buffs or debuffs. Conversion excludes irremovable effects. Buffs can only become debuffs, and debuffs can only become buffs. The Fool wears a thousand faces, playing through this mortal world... will you find the answer? There is a 1% chance to trigger a mysterious BGM when using Sparkle's skills.
Sparkle.Character/Sparkle_SelectInfo:
Sparkle is a member of the Masked Fools — inscrutable and unscrupulous. A dangerous master of theatrics engrossed in playing roles, she wears a thousand masks and wields countless faces. Wealth, status, power... none of it matters to Sparkle. The only thing that can draw her out is "amusement."

As a member of the Masked Fools, Sparkle has only 2 exclusive skills, and converts debuffs on allies into buffs... or buffs into debuffs. However, each of Sparkle's rare skills can grant the target a powerful buff!
Sparkle.Character/Sparkle_Text_Field_GetItem_0: How did I only get...? Fine.
Sparkle.Character/Sparkle_Text_Battle_Healed_0: We're on the same team now~
Sparkle.Character/Sparkle_Text_PharosLeader_0: Listen to me — just surrender already~
Sparkle.Character/Sparkle_Text_Battle_Idle_0: I'll only wait ten seconds for you. 10, 9... 1!
Sparkle.Character/Sparkle_Text_Field_Idle_0: Order, social norms, humanity's fictional moral compass... I've tried so hard, and they still won't leave me alone!

OtherworldInvestigatorDebiMarlene.Buff/B_DebiMarlene_6_Description:
<color=#FFFFFFFF>Damage taken: &a</color>
Removed when 'Crescent Slash' is activated.
OtherworldInvestigatorDebiMarlene.Buff/B_DebiMarlene_P_0_Description: When a Combo is triggered, gain a Barrier equal to 30% of Max. Health (&a).
OtherworldInvestigatorDebiMarlene.Buff/B_DebiMarlene_P_1_Description: When a Combo is triggered, deal &a<color=#FF7C34FF> (30% Attack Power)</color> damage to the enemy with the lowest HP on the field.
OtherworldInvestigatorDebiMarlene.Buff/B_DebiMarlene_P_2_Description: When <color=#DD143CFF>Red</color> is gained, remove this effect and trigger a Combo.
OtherworldInvestigatorDebiMarlene.Buff/B_DebiMarlene_P_3_Description: When <color=#1E90FFFF>Blue</color> is gained, remove this effect and trigger a Combo.
OtherworldInvestigatorDebiMarlene.Buff/B_DebiMarlene_P_4_Description:
<color=#FFFFFFFF>Barrier: &a</color>
Removed at the end of the turn.
OtherworldInvestigatorDebiMarlene.Buff/B_DebiMarlene_R0_Description: Removes Overload from an ally and removes itself.
OtherworldInvestigatorDebiMarlene.Character/DebiMarlene_PassiveDes:
This passive is unlocked at level 1 and replaces the Fixed Ability with 'Twins Rush!'.
During battle, different buffs are granted depending on the currently active character.
When Debi & Marlene use a skill, they gain <color=#1E90FFFF>Blue</color> or <color=#DD143CFF>Red</color>.
(The color granted by Basic or Common skills is determined randomly when drawn.)
When Debi & Marlene gain a color different from their current one, the existing color is removed and a Combo is triggered.
<color=#1E90FFFF>Blue</color>, <color=#DD143CFF>Red</color>, and Combo stacks are removed at the end of the turn.

<color=#FF7C34FF>When a Combo is triggered:</color>
If the Combo stack count is odd (1, 3, 5, 7...), gain 1 Mana.
If the active character is Debi, gain an Ironclad Barrier equal to 30% of Max. Health (lasts 1 turn).
If the active character is Marlene, deal <color=#FF7C34FF>(30% Attack Power)</color> damage to the enemy with the lowest HP on the field.
OtherworldInvestigatorDebiMarlene.Character/DebiMarlene_SelectInfo:
They are twins with extraordinary powers. When together, their power to protect each other grows ever stronger. But when apart, they become no different from ordinary people. There were always those who coveted their power, and so the twins made a decision: to separate. Both Debi and Marlene believed this was the only way they could live in peace — until that moment. When the younger sister nearly lost her beloved twin, they finally understood: they had always been bound to each other, inseparable. "If this is our destiny, I will embrace it without regret."

Debi and Marlene are exceptional all-rounders, capable of freely switching between a defensive or offensive role as needed. That said, when recruiting the twins into your party, you must decide who leads — this determines their role type. When Debi is recruited as the leader, the role type changes to Defensive.
OtherworldInvestigatorDebiMarlene.Character/DebiMarlene_Text_Battle_Cri_0:
<color=#DD143CFF>Heart beating a little fast?</color>
<color=#1E90FFFF>What's wrong? Nothing to be scared of!</color>
OtherworldInvestigatorDebiMarlene.Character/DebiMarlene_Text_Battle_Healed:
<color=#1E90FFFF>We'll get it right next time, I know it.</color>
<color=#DD143CFF>Naive. That's not good enough.</color>

<color=#DD143CFF>Now you've got the hang of it.</color>
<color=#1E90FFFF>Watch out! I'm actually getting serious now!</color>
OtherworldInvestigatorDebiMarlene.Character/DebiMarlene_Text_Battle_Idle_0:
<color=#1E90FFFF>Want me to tell you something interesting?</color>
<color=#DD143CFF>No.</color>
OtherworldInvestigatorDebiMarlene.Character/DebiMarlene_Text_Battle_Idle_1:
<color=#1E90FFFF>Stop running around, please — use your head for once~</color>
<color=#DD143CFF>Who are you imitating?</color>
OtherworldInvestigatorDebiMarlene.Character/DebiMarlene_Text_Battle_Idle_2:
<color=#DD143CFF>This and that — might as well just smash it all.</color>
<color=#1E90FFFF>Ha?! That impression is nothing like her!</color>
OtherworldInvestigatorDebiMarlene.Character/DebiMarlene_Text_Battle_Idle_3:
<color=#DD143CFF>Too rational? Well, if you had a sister like mine, you'd understand.</color>
<color=#1E90FFFF>I can hear every word, you know.</color>
OtherworldInvestigatorDebiMarlene.Character/DebiMarlene_Text_Battle_Kill_0:
<color=#1E90FFFF>How does it feel, going from hunter to prey? </color>
<color=#DD143CFF>Satisfying? ...Hard to say.</color>
OtherworldInvestigatorDebiMarlene.Character/DebiMarlene_Text_Battle_Kill_1:
<color=#DD143CFF>Treating us as two separate people —</color>
<color=#1E90FFFF>— is exactly why you lost.</color>
OtherworldInvestigatorDebiMarlene.Character/DebiMarlene_Text_Battle_Kill_2:
<color=#DD143CFF>I alone was more than enough.</color>
<color=#1E90FFFF>Hey hey, so can I take a break now?</color>
OtherworldInvestigatorDebiMarlene.Character/DebiMarlene_Text_Battle_ND_0:
<color=#DD143CFF>Maybe our partner wasn't the best choice.</color>
<color=#1E90FFFF>Hey, who exactly are you talking about?</color>
OtherworldInvestigatorDebiMarlene.Character/DebiMarlene_Text_Battle_ND_1:
<color=#1E90FFFF>I've got a bad feeling about this.</color>
<color=#DD143CFF>You always have a bad feeling.</color>
OtherworldInvestigatorDebiMarlene.Character/DebiMarlene_Text_Battle_Start_:
<color=#1E90FFFF>Stick with me! I got this.</color>
<color=#DD143CFF>Like hell you do.</color>

<color=#1E90FFFF>I am way too pumped right now!</color>
<color=#DD143CFF>Ugh... there's that headache again.</color>
OtherworldInvestigatorDebiMarlene.Character/DebiMarlene_Text_Field_GetItem:
<color=#1E90FFFF>Oh! This is pretty great!</color>
<color=#DD143CFF>Indeed, it's quite useful.</color>
OtherworldInvestigatorDebiMarlene.Character/DebiMarlene_Text_Field_Idle_0:
<color=#DD143CFF>Stop touching everything.</color>
<color=#1E90FFFF>Yeah yeah, such a killjoy.</color>
OtherworldInvestigatorDebiMarlene.Character/DebiMarlene_Text_Field_Idle_1:
<color=#1E90FFFF>Is it just me... or is this place kind of scary?</color>
<color=#DD143CFF>Don't cling to me.</color>
OtherworldInvestigatorDebiMarlene.Character/DebiMarlene_Text_Field_Idle_2:
<color=#1E90FFFF>Can't we get some sleep before heading out?</color>
<color=#DD143CFF>Less talking, more moving.</color>
OtherworldInvestigatorDebiMarlene.Character/DebiMarlene_Text_Field_Potion_:
<color=#1E90FFFF>Hmm... there's a weird smell to this...</color>
<color=#DD143CFF>Just drink it.</color>

<color=#DD143CFF>I feel a little sick...</color>
<color=#1E90FFFF>I warned you.</color>
OtherworldInvestigatorDebiMarlene.Character/DebiMarlene_Text_PharosLeader_:
<color=#1E90FFFF>Anyone who can't read the room — just kill them.</color>
<color=#DD143CFF>Hesitation is your worst enemy.</color>

<color=#1E90FFFF>This is bringing back some unpleasant memories.</color>
<color=#DD143CFF>Same.</color>
OtherworldInvestigatorDebiMarlene.Character/DebiMarlene_Text_Witch_1:
<color=#1E90FFFF>Again! I can still keep going!</color>
<color=#DD143CFF>Fine, fine. Have it your way.</color>

OtherworldInvestigatorDebiMarlene.Character/MarleneDebi_Text_Battle_Idle_2:
<color=#DD143CFF>This and that — might as well just smash it all.</color>
<color=#1E90FFFF>Ha?! That impression is nothing like her!</color>
OtherworldInvestigatorDebiMarlene.Character/MarleneDebi_Text_Battle_Idle_3:
<color=#DD143CFF>Too rational? Well, if you had a sister like mine, you'd understand.</color>
<color=#1E90FFFF>I can hear every word, you know.</color>
OtherworldInvestigatorDebiMarlene.Character/MarleneDebi_Text_Battle_Kill_0:
<color=#1E90FFFF>How does it feel, going from hunter to prey? </color>
<color=#DD143CFF>Satisfying? ...Hard to say.</color>
OtherworldInvestigatorDebiMarlene.Character/MarleneDebi_Text_Battle_Kill_1:
<color=#DD143CFF>Treating us as two separate people —</color>
<color=#1E90FFFF>— is exactly why you lost.</color>
OtherworldInvestigatorDebiMarlene.Character/MarleneDebi_Text_Battle_Kill_2:
<color=#DD143CFF>I alone was more than enough.</color>
<color=#1E90FFFF>Hey hey, so can I take a break now?</color>
OtherworldInvestigatorDebiMarlene.Character/MarleneDebi_Text_Battle_ND_0:
<color=#DD143CFF>Maybe our partner wasn't the best choice.</color>
<color=#1E90FFFF>Hey, who exactly are you talking about?</color>
OtherworldInvestigatorDebiMarlene.Character/MarleneDebi_Text_Battle_ND_1:
<color=#1E90FFFF>I've got a bad feeling about this.</color>
<color=#DD143CFF>You always have a bad feeling.</color>
OtherworldInvestigatorDebiMarlene.Character/MarleneDebi_Text_Battle_Start_:
<color=#1E90FFFF>Stick with me! I got this.</color>
<color=#DD143CFF>Like hell you do.</color>

<color=#1E90FFFF>I am way too pumped right now!</color>
<color=#DD143CFF>Ugh... there's that headache again.</color>
OtherworldInvestigatorDebiMarlene.Character/MarleneDebi_Text_Field_GetItem:
<color=#1E90FFFF>Oh! This is pretty great!</color>
<color=#DD143CFF>Indeed, it's quite useful.</color>
OtherworldInvestigatorDebiMarlene.Character/MarleneDebi_Text_Field_Idle_0:
<color=#DD143CFF>Stop touching everything.</color>
<color=#1E90FFFF>Yeah yeah, such a killjoy.</color>
OtherworldInvestigatorDebiMarlene.Character/MarleneDebi_Text_Field_Idle_1:
<color=#1E90FFFF>Is it just me... or is this place kind of scary?</color>
<color=#DD143CFF>Don't cling to me.</color>
OtherworldInvestigatorDebiMarlene.Character/MarleneDebi_Text_Field_Idle_2:
<color=#1E90FFFF>Can't we get some sleep before heading out?</color>
<color=#DD143CFF>Less talking, more moving.</color>
OtherworldInvestigatorDebiMarlene.Character/MarleneDebi_Text_Field_Potion_:
<color=#1E90FFFF>Hmm... there's a weird smell to this...</color>
<color=#DD143CFF>Just drink it.</color>

<color=#DD143CFF>I feel a little sick...</color>
<color=#1E90FFFF>I warned you.</color>
OtherworldInvestigatorDebiMarlene.Character/MarleneDebi_Text_PharosLeader_:
<color=#1E90FFFF>Anyone who can't read the room — just kill them.</color>
<color=#DD143CFF>Hesitation is your worst enemy.</color>

<color=#1E90FFFF>This is bringing back some unpleasant memories.</color>
<color=#DD143CFF>Same.</color>
OtherworldInvestigatorDebiMarlene.Character/MarleneDebi_Text_Witch_1:
<color=#1E90FFFF>Again! I can still keep going!</color>
<color=#DD143CFF>Fine, fine. Have it your way.</color>
OtherworldInvestigatorDebiMarlene.Character_Skin/AfterSchoolDebiMarlene_Sk:
<color=#1E90FFFF>Oh! This is one of my absolute favorite songs! Want to listen?</color>
<color=#DD143CFF>I've already played it for you.</color>
OtherworldInvestigatorDebiMarlene.Character_Skin/AfterSchoolMarleneDebi_Sk:
<color=#1E90FFFF>Oh! This is one of my absolute favorite songs! Want to listen?</color>
<color=#DD143CFF>I've already played it for you.</color>
OtherworldInvestigatorDebiMarlene.Character_Skin/CottonCandyDebiMarlene_Sk:
<color=#1E90FFFF>Ready to have some fun?</color>
<color=#DD143CFF>Stop bothering me.</color>
OtherworldInvestigatorDebiMarlene.Character_Skin/CottonCandyMarleneDebi_Sk:
<color=#1E90FFFF>Ready to have some fun?</color>
<color=#DD143CFF>Stop bothering me.</color>
OtherworldInvestigatorDebiMarlene.Character_Skin/SecurityEnforcERDebiMarle:
<color=#DD143CFF>Reporting in — all clear.</color>
<color=#1E90FFFF>Wait! Someone suspicious is heading this way!</color>
OtherworldInvestigatorDebiMarlene.Character_Skin/SecurityEnforcERMarleneDe:
<color=#DD143CFF>Reporting in — all clear.</color>
<color=#1E90FFFF>Wait! Someone suspicious is heading this way!</color>
OtherworldInvestigatorDebiMarlene.Item_Consume/ItemDebiMarlene_Description:
Change the current leader.
Current leader: &a
OtherworldInvestigatorDebiMarlene.Skill/S_DebiMarlene_1_Description:
<color=#1E90FFFF>Blue</color>
Cannot be used while "Whirl Dance" is active.
Gain <color=#1E90FFFF>Blue</color> only when the countdown begins. Not when it ends.
During the countdown, when an enemy deals damage to an ally, negate that damage and immediately use this skill, dealing bonus damage equal to the negated amount.
OtherworldInvestigatorDebiMarlene.Skill/S_DebiMarlene_2_0_Description:
<color=#1E90FFFF>Blue</color>
Generate Ironclad equal to 30% of max HP (&a) (a temporary shield that lasts one turn).
OtherworldInvestigatorDebiMarlene.Skill/S_DebiMarlene_2_Description:
<color=#1E90FFFF>Blue</color>
Generate Ironclad equal to 30% of max HP (&a) (a temporary shield that lasts one turn).
Generate "Bullet Parry".
The generated skill will be Excluded after two turns.
OtherworldInvestigatorDebiMarlene.Skill/S_DebiMarlene_3_Description:
<color=#1E90FFFF>Blue</color>
If there is only one target, gain Swiftness.
Each Combo stack adds &a <color=#FF7C34FF>(30% of Attack Power)</color> damage.
OtherworldInvestigatorDebiMarlene.Skill/S_DebiMarlene_5_Description:
<color=#DD143CFF>Red</color>
Targets the enemy with the lowest HP.
Deal &a additional attacks <color=#FF7C34FF>(2 + Combo stacks)</color> times (up to 6 times).
OtherworldInvestigatorDebiMarlene.Skill/S_DebiMarlene_6_0_Description:
This skill cannot be Evaded.
Deal &a bonus damage <color=#FF7C34FF>(equal to damage the target received during its duration)</color>.
OtherworldInvestigatorDebiMarlene.Skill/S_DebiMarlene_6_Description:
<color=#DD143CFF>Red</color>
Cannot be used while "Crescent Slash" is active.
When activated, use "Crescent Slash" with a Countdown of 1.
Increases damage dealt to the target before "Crescent Slash" ends.
OtherworldInvestigatorDebiMarlene.Skill/S_DebiMarlene_7_Description:
<color=#DD143CFF>Red</color>
Generate "Hard Slash" with Swiftness.
The generated skill will be Excluded after 1 turn.
OtherworldInvestigatorDebiMarlene.Skill/S_DebiMarlene_8_0_Description:
<color=#DD143CFF>Red</color>
Switch the Leader to Marlene.
This skill cannot be Evaded.
OtherworldInvestigatorDebiMarlene.Skill/S_DebiMarlene_8_Description:
If the current Leader is Debi, activate "Cover Me, Marlene!"
If the current Leader is Marlene, activate "Now, Debi!"
Generate "Twins Rush".
OtherworldInvestigatorDebiMarlene.Skill/S_DebiMarlene_Draw_Description: Draw two skills, prioritizing target skills.
OtherworldInvestigatorDebiMarlene.Skill/S_DebiMarlene_R0_Description:
<color=#1E90FFFF>Blue</color>&<color=#DD143CFF>Red</color>
Attack three times in a row.
Remove Taunt from enemies.
OtherworldInvestigatorDebiMarlene.Skill/S_DebiMarlene_R1_Description:
<color=#1E90FFFF>Blue</color>&<color=#DD143CFF>Red</color>
If Combo stacks are 3 or more, gain Swiftness and reduce cost by 3.
If the target has a Stun debuff, Critical Hit Chance becomes 100%.

OtherworldInvestigatorDebiMarlene.SkillExtended/SE_DebiMarlene_0_Des: Gain <color=#1E90FFFF>Blue</color>. If you already have <color=#DD143CFF>Red</color>, remove it and trigger a Combo effect.
OtherworldInvestigatorDebiMarlene.SkillExtended/SE_DebiMarlene_1_Des: Gain <color=#DD143CFF>Red</color>. If you already have <color=#1E90FFFF>Blue</color>, remove it and trigger a Combo effect.

OtherworldInvestigatorDebiMarlene.SkillExtended/SE_DebiMarlene_3_Des: Gain <color=#DD143CFF>Red</color>. If you already have <color=#1E90FFFF>Blue</color>, remove it and trigger a Combo effect.
OtherworldInvestigatorDebiMarlene.SkillExtended/SE_DebiMarlene_4_Des:
If you have <color=#DD143CFF>Red</color>, gain <color=#1E90FFFF>Blue</color> and trigger a Combo effect.
If you have <color=#1E90FFFF>Blue</color>, gain <color=#DD143CFF>Red</color> and trigger a Combo effect.
If you have neither color, gain the color corresponding to the current active character.
OtherworldInvestigatorDebiMarlene.SkillKeyword/SkillKeyword_Blue_Desc: Gain <color=#1E90FFFF>Blue</color>. If you already have <color=#DD143CFF>Red</color>, remove it and trigger a Combo effect.

OtherworldInvestigatorDebiMarlene.Buff/B_DebiMarlene_P_5_Description: Removed when gaining <color=#1E90FFFF>Blue</color> or <color=#DD143CFF>Red</color>, triggering a Combo effect.
