Sakuraba.Buff/B_Sakuraba_0_Description: Whenever <color=purple>Pain damage</color> is received, applies 'Crimson Butterfly' to a random enemy.
Sakuraba.Buff/B_Sakuraba_1_Description: When attacked, damage taken is halved, but Sakuraba receives <color=purple>&a Pain damage</color> instead.
Sakuraba.Buff/B_Sakuraba_2_Description: Whenever 'Vitality Drain' is applied, additionally applies 'Crimson Butterfly'.
Sakuraba.Buff/B_Sakuraba_R_1_Description: When taking normal damage, only receive 1 damage, and the damage of 'Bystander's Price' increases by the original damage amount.
Sakuraba.SkillKeyword/GetX_Sakuraba_Description: This skill can only be obtained by using 'Anan's Sketchbook'.
Sakuraba.SkillKeyword/KeyWord_StagePain_Descripti: The Pain damage of this skill grows stronger as the stage progresses.
Sakuraba.Skill/S_Sakuraba_0_Description: Place this card on top of the deck at the start of battle.
Sakuraba.Skill/S_Sakuraba_1_Description: This turn, when another ally is attacked, their damage taken is halved, but Sakuraba receives <color=purple>&a Pain damage</color> instead. Sakuraba cannot be incapacitated by this damage.
Sakuraba.Skill/S_Sakuraba_3_Description: If the target has 5 or more 'Crimson Butterfly' stacks, consume 1 additional Mana to reduce the target's HP to 0. Against bosses, deal bonus damage equal to 20% of their max HP instead.
Sakuraba.Skill/S_Sakuraba_4_Description: If the target's Action Count is 1 or 9, apply Stun (<sprite=2>&a%).
Sakuraba.Skill/S_Sakuraba_5_Description:
This skill can be used even while Stunned.
Remove all debuffs on yourself, then take <color=purple>Pain damage</color> equal to half your current HP and gain a Barrier of the same amount. Repeat for each surviving ally.
Sakuraba.Skill/S_Sakuraba_6_Description: Take <color=purple>Pain damage</color> equal to <color=purple>20% of max HP</color>, then choose one Attack skill from the target ally and gain it. That skill is granted 0 cost and Exclude, and its damage is reduced by 90%.
Sakuraba.Skill/S_Sakuraba_7_Description:
Draw 1 card from the deck, prioritizing Heal skills.
Remove all Weakening and Pain effects from all allies, then take <color=purple>2 Pain damage</color> repeatedly for each effect removed. Sakuraba cannot be incapacitated by this damage.
Sakuraba.Skill/S_Sakuraba_8_Description:
Apply 'Vitality Drain' to all targets except yourself, then Overheal yourself by twice the number of stacks applied.
Apply an additional 'Vitality Drain' to bosses.
Sakuraba.Skill/S_Sakuraba_LucyD_Description:
Draw 2 skills.
Remove all debuffs and Weakening effects from the target.
Sakuraba.Skill/S_Sakuraba_R_1_Description: Generate a 'Bystander's Price' that can be used next turn.
Sakuraba.Skill/S_Sakuraba_R_1_0_Description: Damage is increased by &a. On use, take <color=purple>Pain damage</color> equal to 10% of max HP, repeated for each other ally. Cannot be incapacitated by this damage.
Sakuraba.Skill/S_Sakuraba_R_1_S_Description: Damage is increased by the total original damage received during the turn this was generated. On use, take <color=purple>Pain damage</color> equal to 10% of max HP, repeated for each other ally. Cannot be incapacitated by this damage.
Sakuraba.Skill/S_Sakuraba_R_2_Description: For each Debuff stack on each target, deal <color=purple>Pain damage</color> equal to your level, then apply 'Vitality Drain' equal to half the number of stacks.
Sakuraba.Character/Sakuraba_PassiveDesc:
Gain 'Anan's Sketchbook' upon the first level-up.

At the start of each turn, apply 'Vitality Drain' to a random enemy, repeated a number of times equal to your level.
Sakuraba.Character/Sakuraba_SelectInfo:
A friendly girl who refers to herself as 'boku'.
Clumsy and prone to mistakes, she is often looked after by others.
Lonely by nature, she craves the warmth of those around her.
She acts cheerful because she is afraid of being left alone.
Smart and capable of calm judgment, but she deliberately fails for fear of being disliked.
When she wants to help someone, she displays surprising deductive ability.
She has the perseverance to never give up or be broken.

Sakuraba Ema is a self-harm type defensive character skilled at applying Weakening and Pain.
Sakuraba.Character/Sakuraba_CampSelectWord: I'll do my best...! I'll definitely be of help to everyone!
Sakuraba.Character/Sakuraba_Text_Battle_Kill_1: It was an accident! ...Well, not really.
Sakuraba.Character/Sakuraba_Text_Battle_Start_1: We're all making it out of here alive. Together, to the clock tower.
Sakuraba.Character/Sakuraba_Text_Battle_Healed_1: I feel better now, thanks to you.
Sakuraba.Character/Sakuraba_Text_Field_Idle_0: You know what? If you bake a bottle... you get a baked bottle.
Sakuraba.Character/Sakuraba_Text_Field_Idle_1: I heard a witch lives somewhere in the forest...
Sakuraba.Character/Sakuraba_Text_Battle_Idle_0: Making up and getting along... I guess that's not happening, huh?
Sakuraba.Character/Sakuraba_Text_Battle_Idle_1: My head's still working just fine, you know.
Sakuraba.Character/Sakuraba_Text_PharosLeader_0: Everyone... they can all just die...
Sakuraba.Character/Sakuraba_Text_PharosLeader_2: Did I... did I kill them...?
Sakuraba.Item_Consume/SkillBookSakuraba_Descripti: Can only be used on Sakuraba Ema. On use, learn 'Magic - Liquid Manipulation'.
Sakuraba.SkillExtended/SkillEn_Sakuraba_1_Name: On use, applies 'Crimson Butterfly' to all enemies.
Sakuraba.SkillExtended/SkillEn_Sakuraba_2_Name: On use, each enemy takes <color=purple>Pain damage</color> equal to twice their current Debuff stack count.

ZenaBaral.Buff/B_Baral_SerumPulse_Description: Restore 20% of damage dealt as healing.
ZenaBaral.Buff/B_Zena_JudgmentManifest_Description: Reduce the next instance of damage taken to 0 and reflect it back to the attacker.
ZenaBaral.Character/Zena_CampSelectWord: A thorough cleansing of this place is in order, so my involvement is prudent.
ZenaBaral.Character/Zena_PassiveDes:
For each level Zena gains, Critical Damage increases by 5%.
At the start of each turn, draw cards until you hold 6.

<color=#919191>- This passive takes effect from level 1.</color>
ZenaBaral.Character/Zena_SelectInfo:
Zena — Arbiter of the Distorted Land

The plan to relocate the Library to the Outskirts ended in failure.
Light bent, space collapsed, and Zena and Baral awoke in a world where order had lost all meaning.

The Distorted Land breathes on residual emotion, reflecting the warped nature of all who wander within.
Zena remains composed — observing, judging, seeking pattern beneath the chaos.
Baral stays at her side, guarding the fragile line between reason and the abyss.

The way back remains unknown.
But so long as the Arbiter still stands, her verdicts still carry weight.
ZenaBaral.Character/Zena_Text_Battle_AllyND_0: Even so, it is gratifying to witness the effort.
ZenaBaral.Character/Zena_Text_Battle_Healed_0: This place must be dealt with thoroughly.
ZenaBaral.Character/Zena_Text_Battle_Idle_0: We came here to expunge you.
ZenaBaral.Character/Zena_Text_Battle_Idle_1: You are demonstrating precisely why we cannot leave you unattended.
ZenaBaral.Character/Zena_Text_Battle_Kill_0: We can no longer stand by and do nothing.
ZenaBaral.Character/Zena_Text_Battle_Start_0: You cannot escape the origin that defines you.
ZenaBaral.Character/Zena_Text_Battle_Start_1: So you have finally shown yourself.
ZenaBaral.Character/Zena_Text_Battle_Start_2: We will soon demolish your tomb and drag you out.
ZenaBaral.Character/Zena_Text_Field_GetItem_0: Isolated, with no means of escape...
ZenaBaral.Character/Zena_Text_Field_Idle_0: In every sense, distortion is a manifestation of human nature.
ZenaBaral.Character/Zena_Text_Field_Potion_P_0: We have yet to exert our full effort.
ZenaBaral.Character/Zena_Text_MasterTarget: Executioner, stand ready. It will be carried out shortly.
ZenaBaral.Character/Zena_Text_PharosLeader_0: You slumber here, having abandoned us.
ZenaBaral.Character/Zena_Text_PharosLeader_1: Though I suppose we can settle accounts later.
ZenaBaral.Character/Zena_Text_Witch_0: Though I would not mind observing the situation from a distance...
ZenaBaral.Skill/S_Baral_Extirpation_Description: Deal bonus <color=purple>Pain damage</color> equal to 10% of the target's maximum HP.
ZenaBaral.Skill/S_Baral_Trail_Description: Apply 10 stacks of <color=red>Bleed</color> to the target.
ZenaBaral.Skill/S_Lucy_Directive_Description: Draw 2 skill cards. Choose 1 skill from your hand and remove it from this battle. Restore Mana equal to the chosen skill's base Mana cost ×2.
ZenaBaral.Skill/S_Lucy_Verdict_Description: All enemies lose 25% of their maximum HP.
ZenaBaral.SkillExtended/Ex_Zena_0_Name: Draw 1 skill. Choose a skill in hand to Exclude from this battle. Restore Mana equal to the chosen skill's base Mana cost × 2.
ZenaBaral.SkillExtended/Ex_Zena_1_Name: Critical Hit Chance +100%. On use, choose 1 skill from your hand and remove it from this battle. Restore Mana equal to the chosen skill's base Mana cost ×2.
ZenaBaral.Zena_Lucy: Choose a skill to remove from your deck for this battle. Restore Mana equal to the chosen skill's base Mana cost ×2.

Asuna.Skill/S_Asuna_1_Description:
<color=#FF0000>Always hits</color>

<color=#C0C0C0>A faint glimmer at the tip of the blade arrives first, cutting through the air like a streak of light — the strike lands before the enemy can even react, and Asuna has already slipped into her next opening.</color>
Asuna.Skill/S_Asuna_10_Description: Grant all allies an Overheal of 30 HP. If Kirito is present, grant yourself and Kirito 1 stack of 'Meteor Wings'. Meteor Wings: Attack Power +25%, Evade +30. A perfect, wordless bond becomes a pair of guardian wings — heightening evasion and sharpening their blades as they dance across the battlefield together.
Asuna.Skill/S_Asuna_2_Description:
Total Damage: &a
Hits: 2
A two-hit combo unleashed at blinding speed. <color=#FF0000>Always hits.</color>

<color=#C0C0C0>Two thrusts trace parallel paths — so fast they seem simultaneous, leaving the opponent no chance to even consider a block.</color>
Asuna.Skill/S_Asuna_3_Description:
Total Damage: &a
Hits: 4
A four-hit thrusting sword skill that deals <color=#FF0000>unavoidable damage</color> in four strikes.
Apply 1 stack of 'Flash Gap' to the target (Defense -100%; removed when the target acts).

<color=#C0C0C0>Four precise thrusts strike the same 'Flash Gap' in an instant, shattering all defenses and creating a perfect opening for attack.</color>
Asuna.Skill/S_Asuna_4_Description:
Charge skill (one of the highest-tier rapier sword skills).
Deals damage, draws 1 card, and restores 1 Mana.

<color=#C0C0C0>Asuna becomes a comet piercing through enemy lines — in the instant she breaks their defense, she has already gathered strength for her next strike.</color>
Asuna.Skill/S_Asuna_5_Description:
Total Damage: &a
Hits: 5
A five-hit sword skill — Asuna's original creation.

<color=#C0C0C0>Five strikes like falling teardrops don't just wound — the 'Tear Star Bind' seeps into the enemy, eroding their will to fight and draining their vitality.</color>
Asuna.Skill/S_Asuna_6_Description: Overheal a single target for HP equal to 80% of Asuna's Attack Power (&a). A meal made with heartfelt care heals wounds far beyond what ordinary medicine can, filling an ally with boundless energy.
Asuna.Skill/S_Asuna_7_Description: Total Damage: &a Hits: 8 An advanced eight-hit thrusting sword skill. Overheal self for 25% of Max. Health. If Kirito is present and the target's 'Break' stacks exceed 10, automatically cast 'Eclipse' on the target. This skill does not add 'Break' stacks. Eight hits beyond all limits! Rally and recover in the midst of a seamless, relentless assault.
Asuna.Skill/S_Asuna_8_Description:
Generate 1 Star Splash card and restore 3 Mana.
Apply 1 stack of 'Meteor Command' to all allies.
Meteor Command: Attack Power +15%.

<color=#C0C0C0>Conviction blazes like a rainbow, igniting the will to win in every ally and summoning forth a decisive 'Star Splash'.</color>
Asuna.Skill/S_Asuna_9_Description:
Cast 'Starry Tear' on the target. If Kirito is present: if the target survives, automatically cast 'Starburst Stream' on the target; otherwise, automatically select a new target. Finally, Kirito and Asuna each deal one guaranteed Critical Hit equal to 100% Attack Power to all enemies.
Generate 1 'Flashing Concerto' card.

<color=#C0C0C0>Teardrops and starburst weave into a brilliant duet, ending with a unified slash that brings the concerto to its final, resounding close.</color>
Asuna.Buff/B_Asuna_2_Description: <color=#8A2BE2>Dancing with the rapier, becoming a flash that tears through the shadows, piercing all despair with a meteor storm.</color>
Asuna.Buff/B_Asuna_3_Description:
Defense is reduced by 100% when the target receives the next instance of damage.
<color=#F08080>A sword flash streaks through the gap like a meteor, piercing straight through an iron-clad defense in one strike.</color>
Asuna.Buff/B_Asuna_4_Description: <color=#8A2BE2>Sword stars like teardrops swirl around the target, shackling their power and eroding their healing.</color>
Asuna.Buff/B_Asuna_5_Description: <color=#FFD700>Transcending the boundary between life and death at 'The Flash's' speed, turning indomitable will into a miracle of survival.</color>
Asuna.Buff/B_Asuna_6_Description: <color=#FF4500>A command that streaks across the battlefield like a meteor, precisely arming every strike with the edge of victory.</color>
Asuna.Buff/B_Asuna_7_Description: <color=#FFD700>"Fight for my share too, Kirito-kun!" — Asuna entrusts all her conviction and strength to Kirito, forging it into a strike that turns the tide.</color>
Asuna.Buff/B_Asuna_8_Description: <color=#FA8072>The two streak across the sky like meteors, evading all attacks with blazing speed and striking back with radiant sword light against fate itself.</color>
Asuna.Item_Equip/Asuna_Lambent_Light_Descripti:
When equipped by Asuna:
Each time Asuna uses a skill, regardless of whether it hits, apply N stacks of 'Break' based on <N = number of hits> (each stack: Defense -3%).
Asuna.Character/Asuna_PassiveDes:
At level 4, obtain the weapon 「<color=#F0BC1F>Lambent Light</color>」. (Lambent Light inflicts the critical debuff 'Break' on enemies.)
When reduced to near-death, if Kirito is present, Kirito gains the buff 'Oath of Protection' (greatly increases Kirito's damage output).
<color=#FF0000>When fielded together with Kirito, certain skills trigger combo effects.</color>
Asuna.Character/Asuna_SelectInfo: From the confusion and fear of the early days of the death game, to being heralded as 'The Flash' — Asuna's growth is a true transformation. She was not born a warrior, yet through extraordinary perseverance she honed her rapier skills to their peak, becoming the most trusted vice-commander of the Knights of the Blood. Her rapier, «Lambent Light», is wielded not only to survive, but to protect her companions' smiles and their shared future. Her bond with Kirito became her greatest source of strength, and the belief that drives her forward: "Even if this is a virtual world, the feelings are real."
Asuna.Character/Asuna_CampSelectWord: For everyone's sake, I'll give it everything I've got.
Asuna.Character/Asuna_Text_Battle_Idle_0: Is everyone's HP and status okay?
Asuna.Character/Asuna_Text_Battle_Idle_1: If you need it, I can share half of my lunch with you.
Asuna.Character/Asuna_Text_Battle_ND_0: Kirito-kun... the rest... is up to you...
Asuna.Character/Asuna_Text_Battle_ND_1: I... don't want it to end here...
Asuna.Character/Asuna_Text_Battle_AllyND_0: Hold on! I will never abandon a single one of you!
Asuna.Character/Asuna_Text_Battle_AllyND_1: Fall back! Leave this to me!
Asuna.Character/Asuna_Text_Battle_Kill_0: To clear the path to the future!
Asuna.Character/Asuna_Text_Battle_Healed_0: Thank you — that warmth gives me strength.
Asuna.Character/Asuna_Text_PharosLeader_0: Hold formation... wait for me to return!
Asuna.Character/Asuna_Text_PharosLeader_1: You won't keep me bound like this!
Asuna.Character/Asuna_Text_PharosLeader_2: I'm sorry! Are you all right?!

Kirito.Skill/S_Kirito_1_Description: <color=#C0C0C0>The blade precisely tears through the enemy's defensive structure.</color>
Kirito.Skill/S_Kirito_12_Description:
<color=#FFD700>Can only be drawn while the buff 'Dual Blades' is active.</color>
Dual Blades heavy assault skill. Deal 120% Attack Power damage to all enemies and restore 2 Mana.
<color=#C0C0C0>Twin blades carve a sweeping arc of destruction, tearing through enemy lines while charging energy for the next burst.</color>
Kirito.Skill/S_Kirito_13_Description:
<color=#FFD700>Can only be drawn while the buff 'Dual Blades' is active.</color>
Total Damage: &a
Hits: 8
Deal 8 × 40% Attack Power damage.
<color=#C0C0C0>Blades pour down like rain, dealing damage and permanently destroying the enemy's weapon.</color>
Kirito.Skill/S_Kirito_16_Description:
If Asuna is present, apply 'Resonant Resolve' to Asuna (Critical Hit Chance increased by 100%), gain 'Black Swordsman's Bulwark' (Aggro Greatly Increased, gain 10 Barrier each turn), change the maximum stack count of 'Sword Skill Chain' to 10 and gain 3 stacks of Sword Skill Chain; add 'Starburst Ascension' to the deck.
<color=#C0C0C0>Bearing everything to protect Asuna, the resolve of the Beater unlocks the ultimate power to turn the tide of battle.</color>
Kirito.Skill/S_Kirito_17_Description:
Ten-hit pinnacle one-handed sword skill.
Deal 10 × 60% (&a) Attack Power damage. If Asuna is present, generate one of Asuna's skills with zero cost and Exclude.
<color=#C0C0C0>The ultimate ten-hit technique — if Asuna's resonance is felt, it manifests in her hands as a zero-cost finishing move.</color>
Kirito.Skill/S_Kirito_2_Description:
Deal 120% Attack Power damage to all enemies. If there is only one target, deal an additional 80% Attack Power damage.
<color=#C0C0C0>A wide horizontal sweep of light — a lone enemy will face an even fiercer follow-up.</color>
Kirito.Skill/S_Kirito_3_Description:
Single-hit diagonal slash basic skill.
Deal 120% Attack Power damage to an enemy and draw 1 card.
<color=#C0C0C0>A sharp, decisive diagonal slash.</color>
Kirito.Skill/S_Kirito_4_Description:
One-handed sword basic skill, upper-thrust charge technique.
Deal 100% Attack Power damage to an enemy. If this skill kills the enemy, return this skill to hand.
<color=#C0C0C0>A strike at the speed of sound — if this blade decides the battle, the assault surges forward once more like a tide.</color>
Kirito.Skill/S_Kirito_5_Description:
Total Damage: &a
Hits: 7
Seven-hit one-handed sword skill.
Deal 7 × 30% Attack Power damage to an enemy.
<color=#C0C0C0>A relentless chain of seven strikes embodying seven deadly sins, dragging the opponent into a spiral of sin and punishment.</color>
Kirito.Skill/S_Kirito_6_Description:
Choose one of <color=#FF0000>'Starburst Stream'</color> or <color=#FF0000>'The Eclipse'</color> to obtain, and gain the status: <color=#FFD700>'Dual Blades' (all 'Sharp Nail' and 'Vorpal Strike' cards in the deck will be Excluded, then the corresponding Dual Blades sword skills are generated in hand.)</color>
Dual Blades is an extremely rare passive skill that can be used after equipping two sword-type weapons.
<color=#C0C0C0>When twin blades are drawn, the ultimate choice between Starburst Stream and The Eclipse descends upon the battlefield.</color>
Kirito.Skill/S_Kirito_8_Description:
<color=#FF0000>Requires more than 2 stacks of Sword Skill Chain to use.</color>
Total Damage: &a
Hits: 16
Sixteen-hit superior Dual Blades sword skill.
Deal 16 × 60% Attack Power damage.
<color=#DC143C>Star Burst Stream! A sixteen-hit combo that transcends the limits of the system, bursting forth like exploding stars.</color>
Kirito.Skill/S_Kirito_9_Description: Usable when below 30% HP. Total Damage: &a Hits: 27 Twenty-seven-hit pinnacle Dual Blades sword skill. Deal 27 × 65% Attack Power damage to an enemy. Overheal self for 50% of Max. Health. Twenty-seven rays of light blooming from the depths of despair — a darkness that devours all, and yet the dawn of a new self.
Kirito.Buff/B_Kirito_0_Description: Removes one stack when damage is taken.
Kirito.Buff/B_Kirito_1_Description:
Replaces 'Vorpal Strike' in the deck with <color=#FF0000>'Double Circular'</color> and adds it to hand. Replaces all 'Sharp Nail' cards with <color=#FF0000>'The Eclipse'</color> and adds them to hand.
<color=#8A2BE2>Twin blades unsheathed — become the Black Swordsman who severs fate, consuming all enemies in a blaze of combos.</color>
Kirito.Buff/B_Kirito_2_Description: A powerful sword skill leaves them unable to act and unable to evade any attacks.
Kirito.Buff/B_Kirito_3_Description:
When Sword Skill Chain stacks exceed 2, Speed +1.
When Sword Skill Chain stacks exceed 3, gain +1 Mana at the start of each turn.
When Sword Skill Chain stacks exceed 4, draw 1 additional card at the start of each turn.
<color=#C0C0C0>A fluid mastery of chained techniques — the higher the stacks, the more Kirito's actions and mind surpass all reason.</color>
Kirito.Buff/B_Kirito_5_Description: <color=#191970>Kirito and Asuna's determination resonate in perfect unison, causing Asuna's rapier to shine with shared resolve.</color>
Kirito.Buff/B_Kirito_6_Description:
Aggro greatly increased by 80%. Gain 10 Barrier each turn.
<color=#191970>As the «Black Swordsman», Kirito becomes the most steadfast shield for his allies.</color>
Kirito.Buff/B_Kirito_7_Description:
When Sword Skill Chain stacks exceed 2, Speed +1.
When Sword Skill Chain stacks exceed 3, gain +1 Mana at the start of each turn.
When Sword Skill Chain stacks exceed 4, draw 1 additional card at the start of each turn.
<color=#C0C0C0>A fluid mastery of chained techniques — the higher the stacks, the more Kirito's actions and mind surpass all reason.</color>
Kirito.Item_Equip/Kirito_Dark_Repulsor_Descript: When equipped alongside «Elucidator»: At the start of battle, generate «<color=#F0BC1F>Starburst Stream</color>».<color=#F0BC1F></color> When equipped by Kirito: Speed +1, Defense +10%.
Kirito.Item_Equip/Kirito_Elucidator_Description: When equipped alongside «Dark Repulser»: At the start of battle, generate «<color=#F0BC1F>Starburst Stream</color>».<color=#F0BC1F></color> When equipped by Kirito: Armor Penetration +20%.
Kirito.Character/Kirito_PassiveDes:
Obtain «<color=#F0BC1F>Elucidator</color>» at level 4, and «<color=#F0BC1F>Dark Repulser</color>» at level 6.
Gain 1 stack of Sword Skill Chain every 3 times a personal skill is used. Different stack counts of Sword Skill Chain grant different bonuses.
When Sword Skill Chain stacks exceed 2, Speed +1.
When Sword Skill Chain stacks exceed 3, gain +1 Mana at the start of each turn.
When Sword Skill Chain stacks exceed 4, draw 1 additional card at the start of each turn.
<color=#FF0000>When deployed alongside Asuna, certain skills trigger combo effects.</color>
Kirito.Character/Kirito_SelectInfo: Kirigaya Kazuto is the protagonist of the light novel «Sword Art Online» and its related works. The story begins on November 6, 2022, when the 14-year-old enters the VRMMORPG «Sword Art Online» (SAO), only to discover alongside other players that logging out is impossible — forcing them into a deadly death game. As a beta tester, he grew rapidly through superior reflexes and sharp insight. Known for his solitary style and black attire, he earned the title «Black Swordsman» — though some players also branded him a «Beater».
Kirito.Character/Kirito_CampSelectWord: Protecting others... it used to be the last thing I wanted. But the look in your eyes tells me maybe this time will be different. Alright, I'm in. Just don't die on me — I'd rather not break in a new teammate.
Kirito.Character/Kirito_Text_Battle_Idle_0: My blade is already ready to draw.
Kirito.Character/Kirito_Text_Battle_Idle_1: The path ahead is cleared by the sword.
Kirito.Character/Kirito_Text_Battle_ND_0: Not yet... it's not time to fall...
Kirito.Character/Kirito_Text_Battle_ND_1: This pain... is nothing compared to the despair I felt back then.
Kirito.Character/Kirito_Text_Battle_AllyND_0: I won't let any ally fall before my eyes!
Kirito.Character/Kirito_Text_Battle_AllyND_2: My blade will never let another ally fall!
Kirito.Character/Kirito_Text_Battle_Kill_0: To survive, there was no other choice.
Kirito.Character/Kirito_Text_Battle_Kill_1: Rest now. The battle is over.
Kirito.Character/Kirito_Text_Battle_Start_0: Let's finish this fast — let the blade do the talking.
Kirito.Character/Kirito_Text_Battle_Start_1: In this world, a single sword is all you need to go anywhere.
Kirito.Character/Kirito_Text_Battle_Cri_0: This strike will cut through everything!
Kirito.Character/Kirito_Text_Battle_Healed_0: I felt that warmth. Thank you.
Kirito.Character/Kirito_Text_Battle_Healed_1: Thanks. I think I can keep fighting now.
Kirito.Character/Kirito_Text_PharosLeader_2: Stay focused. Victory is decided in an instant.

OtherworldInvestigatorTia.Buff/B_Tia_2_Description:
Also blocks <color=purple>Pain damage</color>.
Reduces <color=purple>Pain damage</color> taken by &a%.
OtherworldInvestigatorTia.Buff/B_Tia_4_Description:
Loses one stack when taking Health damage.
At the end of battle, restore HP equal to the per-turn HP recovery amount.
OtherworldInvestigatorTia.Buff/B_Tia_5_Description: Nullifies damage that is less than or equal to &a <color=#FF7C34FF>(Investigator level)</color> after Defense reduction.
OtherworldInvestigatorTia.Buff/B_Tia_P_0_B_Description: <color=#919191>A paint material for Tia's skills, generated through Color Mixing.</color>
OtherworldInvestigatorTia.Buff/B_Tia_P_0_C_Description: <color=#919191>A paint material for Tia's skills, generated through Color Mixing.</color>
OtherworldInvestigatorTia.Buff/B_Tia_P_0_G_Description: <color=#919191>A paint material for Tia's skills, generated through Color Mixing.</color>
OtherworldInvestigatorTia.Buff/B_Tia_P_0_M_Description: <color=#919191>A paint material for Tia's skills, generated through Color Mixing.</color>
OtherworldInvestigatorTia.Buff/B_Tia_P_0_R_Description: <color=#919191>A paint material for Tia's skills, generated through Color Mixing.</color>
OtherworldInvestigatorTia.Buff/B_Tia_P_0_Y_Description: <color=#919191>A paint material for Tia's skills, generated through Color Mixing.</color>
OtherworldInvestigatorTia.Buff/B_Tia_P_Description: Removed when struck by a critical hit.
OtherworldInvestigatorTia.Character/Tia_CampSelectWord: Is there... something you'd like me to paint?
OtherworldInvestigatorTia.Character/Tia_PassiveDes:
This passive is unlocked at level 1 and replaces the Fixed Ability with [Color Mixing].
Tia has a smaller skill pool; in exchange, she can use her Fixed Ability to generate additional skills.
Check the dedicated equipment to see which materials correspond to which generated skills.

<color=#FF7C34FF>Color Mixing</color>
Most of Tia's skills grant one paint color upon use: <color=#FF0000FF>Red</color>・<color=#00FF00FF>Green</color>・<color=#1E90FFFF>Blue</color>・<color=#00FFFFFF>Cyan</color>・<color=#FF00FFFF>Magenta</color>・<color=#FFFF00FF>Yellow</color>. (Not counted as a buff.)
Tia can spend stored paint to generate her special skills.
Each paint color can be stored up to two at a time, and they are consumed in the order of <color=#FF0000FF>Red</color><color=#00FF00FF>Green</color> <color=#1E90FFFF>Blue</color>, followed by <color=#00FFFFFF>Cyan</color> <color=#FF00FFFF>Magenta</color> <color=#FFFF00FF>Yellow</color>.
If this skill is not used during a turn, gain [Color Generation] at the start of the next turn.
OtherworldInvestigatorTia.Character/Tia_SelectInfo:
A shy but brilliant painter.
She feels emotions through colors and conveys them to others through her paintings.
She excels at still life, and somehow, her paintings are strikingly lifelike.
She also loves drawing small animals — especially squirrels, the kind hiding acorns.
To escape her strict family, she slipped away while painting for a child, and was never seen again.

A highly team-reliant support Investigator. Not only does she depend on others' abilities — she can also turn them to her advantage.
OtherworldInvestigatorTia.Character/Tia_Text_Battle_Cri_0: I... didn't want it to come to this....
OtherworldInvestigatorTia.Character/Tia_Text_Battle_Healed_1: ....I was pretty sure this would work... probably..
OtherworldInvestigatorTia.Character/Tia_Text_Battle_Idle_0: ...Me? I just... wanted to paint. That's all.
OtherworldInvestigatorTia.Character/Tia_Text_Battle_Idle_1: Should I paint a picture of you? If I had enough time or pocket money... I-I'm just kidding, really. Uh.
OtherworldInvestigatorTia.Character/Tia_Text_Battle_Idle_2: Squirrels... they always forget where they buried their acorns and spend forever looking... isn't that adorable?
OtherworldInvestigatorTia.Character/Tia_Text_Battle_Kill_0: I only wanted to scare you...
OtherworldInvestigatorTia.Character/Tia_Text_Battle_Kill_1: I never wanted to hurt anyone..
OtherworldInvestigatorTia.Character/Tia_Text_Battle_Kill_2: But.. you kept attacking me, I couldn't just do nothing...
OtherworldInvestigatorTia.Character/Tia_Text_Battle_ND_1: I... I don't want to die yet...
OtherworldInvestigatorTia.Character/Tia_Text_Battle_Start_1: Is there... anything in particular you'd like me to paint?
OtherworldInvestigatorTia.Character/Tia_Text_Field_Idle_0: ...Is there anything here I could paint...
OtherworldInvestigatorTia.Character/Tia_Text_Field_Idle_1: Um, e-excuse me... is there anything you'd like me to paint?
OtherworldInvestigatorTia.Character/Tia_Text_Field_Idle_2: I... I have to be careful not to trip...
OtherworldInvestigatorTia.Character/Tia_Text_Field_Potion_P_0: This tastes a little like paint... hm? How would I know, you ask?
OtherworldInvestigatorTia.Character/Tia_Text_MasterTarget: I... I miss my family a little...
OtherworldInvestigatorTia.Character/Tia_Text_PharosLeader_0: P-please.. Please don't come any closer!
OtherworldInvestigatorTia.Character/Tia_Text_PharosLeader_1: I-I'm sorry... but I really, really can't let you!
OtherworldInvestigatorTia.Character/Tia_Text_PharosLeader_2: Hm...? How did they all... fall down like that?
OtherworldInvestigatorTia.Character/Tia_Text_Witch_0: I'm so scared... I don't like this kind of thing...
OtherworldInvestigatorTia.Character/Tia_Text_Witch_1: I... I want to go home...
OtherworldInvestigatorTia.Character_Skin/ApprenticeWitchTia_SkinDe: What kind of magic might your favorite color hold...?
OtherworldInvestigatorTia.Character_Skin/OceanPaintERTia_SkinDesc: I can finally fit the whole ocean onto my palette... I'm so happy...
OtherworldInvestigatorTia.Character_Skin/PixelARtTia_SkinDesc: A painting made up of tiny little dots... don't you find that exciting?
OtherworldInvestigatorTia.Character_Skin/StreetAtelierTia_SkinDesc: As long as I have a brush in hand, anywhere is my canvas!
OtherworldInvestigatorTia.Item_Equip/Equip_Tia_Book_Description:
<color="red">Tia only.</color>

The shield additionally provides &b% <color=#FF7C34FF>(based on the caster's Defense)</color> damage reduction, and nullifies damage that falls below &a <color=#FF7C34FF>(Investigator's Defense)</color> after Defense reduction.

<color=#919191>─ Project CA Equipment Design</color>

The generated skill is assigned to the selected target.

OtherworldInvestigatorTia.SkillExtended/SkillEn_Tia_0_Name: Apply [Charcoal Ash] to all enemies (Chance to Receive Critical Hits and Critical Damage Taken increased by 20%; removed when struck by a critical hit).
OtherworldInvestigatorTia.SkillExtended/SkillEn_Tia_1_Name: Gain 100 Gold when a skill kills an enemy.
OtherworldInvestigatorTia.SkillKeyword/SkillKeyword_Material_Desc:
This skill can be generated via Color Mixing.
X represents the colors required to generate this skill.
<color=#FF0000FF>Red</color> <color=#00FF00FF>Green</color> <color=#1E90FFFF>Blue</color> are consumed first,
followed by <color=#00FFFFFF>Cyan</color> <color=#FF00FFFF>Magenta</color> <color=#FFFF00FF>Yellow</color>.

Gain Paint X.
Up to two of each paint can be stored.
OtherworldInvestigatorTia.Buff/B_Tia_1_Description:
During this turn and at the start of the next turn, you cannot be incapacitated by <color=purple>Pain damage</color>.
Removed after the start of the next turn.

QoH.Buff/B_QoH_Affection_Description:
When killed, generate a "Sparkling Justice Shot ♡" in Lucy's hand.
Once per turn (Current: &d): When receiving a <color=#FF7C34>&c</color> attack, restore &a HP to the investigator with the lowest HP <color=#FF7C34>(&b% of &c's Attack Power)</color>.
QoH.Buff/B_QoH_ArcanaSlave_Description: When attacking, reduces by 1 stack, applies Shattered Heartbeat (<sprite=1>&f%) to the target, and restores &a HP <color=#FF7C34>(&b% of &c Healing Power)</color>.
QoH.Buff/B_QoH_Chant_Description: When removed, restore &a HP to a random investigator with the lowest HP <color=#FF7C34>(&b% of &c Attack Power)</color>.
QoH.Buff/B_QoH_LoveJustice_Description: When taking damage, restore &a HP <color=#FF7C34>(&b% of &c Healing Power)</color> and remove this buff.
QoH.Buff/B_QoH_MagicalGirl_Description: At the start of the turn, apply <color=#BD2DC2>Mark of Villainy</color> to a random enemy.
QoH.Buff/B_QoH_Mark_Description:
Can be targeted regardless of Taunt.
Removed at the start of the turn.
QoH.Buff/B_QoH_Shattered_Description: When killed, trigger on a random ally: all debuffs they hold deal (damage per turn x remaining turns x 0.5) points of <color=purple>Pain damage</color> to them.
QoH.Buff/B_QoH_Transformation_Description:
Can switch Sanity an unlimited number of times.
Ignores the side effects of Sanity.
QoH.Buff/B_QoH_WhatUse_Description: <sprite=1>Pain debuffs applied to enemies have their duration extended by 1 turn, and each stack deals 2 additional damage per turn.
QoH.Buff/B_R_QoH_SunMoon_Description:
Ignores Emotion Level cap. Ignores the per-turn upgrade limit of Emotion Level.
At the start of the turn, gain 3 <color=red>Negative</color> Emotion Points.
QoH.Character/QoH_CampSelectWord: In the name of love ♡ and justice ☆
QoH.Character/QoH_PassiveDes:
At the start of the turn, apply <color=#BD2DC2>Mark of Villainy</color> to a random enemy and gain <color=#FF77FF>Pure Heart ☆</color>.
During battle, you can switch the Queen of Hatred's Sanity form (once per turn; twice when at level 4 or above).

<color=#919191>This passive is active from level 1.</color>
QoH.Character/QoH_SelectInfo:
You seem to be exactly who I've been looking for — a messenger of love and justice ♡
In the name of those who fell before, I swear upon the light ☆
To vanquish every vile creature that stands in our way ☆
Together, I'm sure we can spread the power of love to everyone ☆
Arcana Wave ♡
QoH.Character/QoH_Text_Battle_AllyND_0: I failed... will you just leave me like this?
QoH.Character/QoH_Text_Battle_Healed_0: Forgive... me... it's all... my fault...
QoH.Character/QoH_Text_Battle_Idle_0: Oh! Is there anything I can help with?
QoH.Character/QoH_Text_Battle_Idle_1: This doesn't look good... leave it to me!
QoH.Character/QoH_Text_Battle_Kill_1: Justice is served! I can't wait... to go back and tell her all about this glorious "suppression"!
QoH.Character/QoH_Text_Battle_Start_0: Don't stray too far from me!
QoH.Character/QoH_Text_Battle_Start_1: In the name of love and justice — a Magical Girl has arrived!
QoH.Character/QoH_Text_Field_GetItem_0: I have a feeling... this is a treasure that will bring us victory!
QoH.Character/QoH_Text_Field_Idle_0: Even at the cost of my life... I will protect the people of this organization and this city!
QoH.Character/QoH_Text_Field_Idle_1: No alerts today... It's absolutely NOT because I'm bored from the lack of chances to shine!
QoH.Character/QoH_Text_Field_Potion_P_0: Mm, that went smoothly! Don't forget to call on me next time too!
QoH.Character/QoH_Text_MasterTarget: Has the time come... to pay the price...?
QoH.Character/QoH_Text_PharosLeader_1: Ha ha... peace arrives... and then what?
QoH.Character/QoH_Text_Witch_0: I swear... I will protect... everyone... until...
QoH.Character/QoH_Text_Witch_1: I swear... I will protect... everyone... until...
QoH.Item_Equip/E_QoH_FormingHate_Description: When attacking an enemy, each stack of <sprite=1>Pain debuff on the enemy has a 40% chance to trigger: deal (damage per turn x remaining turns x 2) points of <color=purple>Pain damage</color> to the holder and remove that stack.
QoH.Item_Equip/E_QoH_LovelyGift_Description: At the start of the turn, all allies gain "Love/Hate ☆".
QoH.Item_Passive/R_QoH_Star_Description: <color=#C067EF>Emotion Burst</color>: At the start of turn 6, choose 1 page from all level 3 Abnormality pages that have not been selected and apply it to an ally.
QoH.Item_Passive/R_QoH_SunMoon_Description:
Gain "Virtual Data", "Final Secret Manual", and "Golden Bread".
Relic Display increases by 2 slots.

However, all enemies' HP is increased by 25%, and Emotion Level upgrades ignore the per-turn limit.
QoH.Skill/S_QoH_Blessing_Description: Applies to both the target and the adjacent character to their right.
QoH.Skill/S_QoH_Embrace_Description: For each <sprite=1>debuff stack the target holds, restore &a HP <color=#FF7C34>(40% of Healing Power)</color> to a random ally with the lowest HP.
QoH.Skill/S_QoH_Harmony_Description: If the target has 3 or more types of <sprite=1>Pain debuffs, cast again once.
QoH.Skill/S_QoH_Heartwave_Description:
For each type the target holds, this skill's healing is increased by &a <color=#FF7C34>(25% of Healing Power)</color>.
Remove all <sprite=1>Pain debuffs from the target.
QoH.Skill/S_QoH_Lucy_1_Description:
Extend the duration of all enemies' <sprite=1>Pain debuffs by 1 turn.
Draw 3 skills.
QoH.Skill/S_QoH_Lucy_Description:
Restore &a HP to all allies <color=#FF7C34>(&b 50% of Healing Power)</color>.
Draw 2 skills.
This turn, the Queen of Hatred can switch Sanity form an unlimited number of times.
QoH.Skill/S_QoH_Miracle_Description: If the target has <sprite=1>Pain debuffs, restore &a HP to the ally with the lowest HP <color=#FF7C34>(50% of Healing Power)</color> and apply 1 stack of each of this buff's debuffs to all enemies.
QoH.Skill/S_QoH_Rare_Slave_Description: For each stack of <sprite=1>Pain debuff the target holds, deal &a additional damage <color=#FF7C34>(50% of Attack Power)</color>.
QoH.Skill/S_QoH_Shot_Description: If this skill's debuff is resisted, add this skill to the discard pile.
QoH.SkillExtended/Ex_QoH_0_Name:
When used, heal the ally with the lowest HP for 75% of the Queen of Hatred's Healing Power.
This turn, the Queen of Hatred can switch Sanity form an unlimited number of times.
QoH.SkillExtended/Ex_QoH_1_Name: Trigger all Pain debuffs on all enemies: deal (damage per turn x remaining turns x 2) points of <color=purple>Pain damage</color> to the holder, then remove each debuff.
QoH.QoH_Sanity_Mod_H_Desc:
Can only use attack skills.
Can only gain <color=red>Negative</color> Emotion Points.
When healed, gain <color=#FF77FF>Pure Heart ☆</color>.
QoH.QoH_Sanity_Mod_M_Desc:
Can only use healing skills.
Can only gain <color=green>Positive</color> Emotion Points.
When taking damage, become <color=#BD2DC2>Hysterical</color>.
QoH.QoH_Sanity_TurnCap: <color=#919191>Can only switch Sanity once per turn</color>

KosakaWakamo.Buff/B_Wakamo_5_Description: Attack bonuses from Rage are doubled.
KosakaWakamo.Buff/B_Wakamo_6_Description: When Wakamo takes Pain damage, deal &a additional hits to a random enemy.
KosakaWakamo.Buff/B_Wakamo_7_Description: Pain damage taken is reduced to 1.
KosakaWakamo.Buff/B_Wakamo_8_Description: The next non-rare attack skill is repeated once.
KosakaWakamo.Buff/B_Wakamo_9_Description: Passive is not triggered by excess Rage.
KosakaWakamo.Buff/B_Wakamo_LucyD_Description: Each attack card drawn grants Wakamo +2 Rage. Each non-attack card drawn grants Wakamo +2 Patience.
KosakaWakamo.Buff/B_Wakamo_p_ang_Description: If Anger exceeds Patience, take &a Pain damage when using a skill.
KosakaWakamo.Buff/B_Wakamo_R1_Description: Stacks are accumulated each time damage is taken. At the end of the turn, Wakamo deals &a damage to this enemy.
KosakaWakamo.Buff/B_Wakamo_R2_Description: When 5 stacks are reached, the target dies instantly. Against a Boss, deals damage equal to 30% of their current HP instead.
KosakaWakamo.Character/Wakamo_PassiveDes: Each time an ally plays an attack skill, Wakamo gains 1 Rage. Each time an ally plays a healing skill, Wakamo gains 1 Patience. Patience starts equal to Wakamo's level. Each stack of Rage increases Wakamo's Attack Power by 5%. When Rage exceeds Patience, each time a Wakamo skill is played, she deals &a Pain damage to herself. If Rage still exceeds Patience at the end of the turn, all Wakamo skills in hand are Discarded, then she Stuns herself and calls down multiple Ampoule Missiles to bombard random enemies. Rage is then reset to zero.
KosakaWakamo.Character/Wakamo_SelectInfo: A student of Hyakkiyako Alliance Academy, one of the "Seven Prisoners" who was sent to the Federal Corrections Bureau as a suspended student — and then escaped. Known as the "Fox of Calamity" for her indiscriminate and large-scale acts of destruction, she is a girl feared by many. Her motives and purpose are shrouded in mystery. Rumors of a face beneath her mask being "terrifying as a demon" or "hideous as a devil" never cease, yet people fear only what they do not know.
KosakaWakamo.Character/Wakamo_Text_Battle_Cri_0: Come now... who wishes to be pierced first?
KosakaWakamo.Character/Wakamo_Text_Battle_Cri_1: Those who wish to wail, please form a line?
KosakaWakamo.Character/Wakamo_Text_Battle_Healed_1: Oh my, thank you very much.
KosakaWakamo.Character/Wakamo_Text_Battle_Start_0: Your enemies... all of them. I will destroy every last one.
KosakaWakamo.Character/Wakamo_Text_Field_GetItem_0: Is there anything else you desire?
KosakaWakamo.Character/Wakamo_Text_Field_GetItem_1: What is it you wish for? Whatever it may be, Wakamo is prepared.
KosakaWakamo.Character/Wakamo_Text_Field_Idle_1: I, Wakamo, am ready. Not a single one of your enemies shall be left standing.
KosakaWakamo.Character/Wakamo_Text_PharosLeader_0: There is no use trying to escape from me... I will make sure your body learns that lesson well.
KosakaWakamo.Character/Wakamo_Text_Witch_0: I would do anything for you. Please, leave it all to Wakamo.
KosakaWakamo.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Wakamo_Azar_: [B] A fine weapon. I like it.
[A] Oh? Could you tell me what you like about it?
[B] A rifle fitted with a bayonet — in other words, you're not fixated on ranged combat. You've accounted for situations where reloading or running dry becomes an issue.
[A] Exactly... though I haven't had any opportunity to use this blade yet.
KosakaWakamo.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Wakamo_Blue_: [A] Please let me study the construction of your outfit...
[B] Fufufu, such a small request — think nothing of it. Come, feast your eyes upon Wakamo's magnificent attire!
KosakaWakamo.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Wakamo_Charo: [B] How did I never think of this!
[B] Yes... asymmetrical clothing, a mysterious mask — oh, oh, oh, oh, the inspiration is just flooding in!
KosakaWakamo.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Wakamo_Hein_: [B] But I'm even more unhinged than you!
KosakaWakamo.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Wakamo_Huz_D: [B] Whoa! Your hair is so smooth!
[A] Fufufu, thank you. I, Wakamo, am always prepared for that special someone to pat my head.
[B] How do you even take care of it like that?
KosakaWakamo.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Wakamo_Ilya_: [B] I-I'm sorry, could you please stay a little further away from me?
[A] Oh my? Would this distance be alright?
[A] No need to be so guarded. I don't bite... not right now, at least.
KosakaWakamo.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Wakamo_Iron_: [B] Your marksmanship is flawless, but as a vanguard I do worry about getting caught in friendly fire.
[A] Fufufufu... no need to worry. Shall I demonstrate my marksmanship right now?
[B] Hahaha! I'm only kidding. I trust all my teammates.
KosakaWakamo.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Wakamo_Joey_: [B] Does your mask have any special function?
[A] Fufufufu, it is a bond shared with someone dear to me.
[B] Want me to add a gas filter to it?
[A] Thank you, but that won't be necessary.
KosakaWakamo.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Wakamo_Johan: [B] You... you can understand me, can't you?
[A] But of course. Ahh, I, Wakamo, can understand that burning, desperate longing you feel.
[A] ...So, if that longing of yours ever gets in Wakamo's way...
KosakaWakamo.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Wakamo_Leryn: [B] How many bones are in your tail? And with four ears, does your skull have two extra holes?
[B] How fascinating. I'd love to study you~
[A] My body belongs to that special someone. I won't let you run any experiments on me.
[B] I don't quite follow, but by your logic — if I find that special someone and they agree, you'd let anyone do any experiment they wanted? That really doesn't seem healthy.
KosakaWakamo.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Wakamo_Lian_: [B] Your weapon looks rather old, yet you wield it with great skill.
[A] But of course — all to protect someone precious to me.
[B] Though it seems to me that rather than protecting someone, you look more like you want to annihilate every enemy in sight.
[A] The best defense is a good offense.
KosakaWakamo.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Wakamo_Miss_: [B] Ohhh! New girl! I heard you're fond of festivals!
[A] Fufufu, my homeland is a place where celebrations go on all year round. I, Wakamo, don't mind that at all.
[B] Hahaha! Then have some grilled meat! Let's say it's a festival right now!
KosakaWakamo.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Wakamo_Momor: [A] Listen up, brat — I don't dislike you. But if you ever dare to mess with my precious mask...
[B] S-so what, what are you gonna do about it?
[A] I promise you will regret it.
[B] Anyone can make empty threats! Not that I'd touch your mask anyway — and it's absolutely NOT because I'm scared.
KosakaWakamo.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Wakamo_Narha: [A] Hmm? What brings you to me?
[B] Someone like you is very easy to incite... but also exactly the type one should never incite carelessly.
[A] Fufufufufu, and telling Wakamo that — is that part of your mind-reading as well?
[B] My, you're sharper than I expected.
KosakaWakamo.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Wakamo_Pries: [B]Do you have an interest in religion?
[A]There is something more important to me than faith.
[A]Well... you could call it faith, in a way. That person is someone I both adore and revere.
[B]How wonderful. Would you both like to visit the church together sometime?
KosakaWakamo.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Wakamo_Red_D: [B]Wow, what a lovely outfit. Selena would definitely want to study it.
[B]That's right. She wants to be a fashion designer. She's always loved diverse clothing cultures like this.
KosakaWakamo.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Wakamo_Silve: [B]You're the kind of woman who'd sacrifice everything for love, aren't you.
[B]Any man who catches your eye must be very lucky. Heh.
KosakaWakamo.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Wakamo_Sizz_: [A]Oh my? Thank you. You have a cute companion too.
KosakaWakamo.SimpleCampDialogue/CampDial_Wakamo_Trish: [A]Thank you. Grooming my tail is an important part of my daily routine.
[B]Wanting to look cute is every girl's nature. Same for me.
[A]Wakamo always wants to be held close by that person. I can't afford to look slovenly.
KosakaWakamo.Skill/S_Wakamo_1_Description: If the target has Crimson Flower Divination, apply Critical and Tracking. If the target has Scattered Flower Storm, add 2 additional stacks.
KosakaWakamo.Skill/S_Wakamo_2_Description: Increase stacks of Crimson Flower Divination by 20%. If the target has Scattered Flower Storm, apply Attack Power -50% and Stun.
KosakaWakamo.Skill/S_Wakamo_3_Description: Increase Rage to the current Patience value. If the target has Crimson Flower Divination, deal +&a damage. If the target has Scattered Flower Storm, apply 1 stack of Scattered Flower Storm to all enemies.
KosakaWakamo.Skill/S_Wakamo_4_Description: When attacking an enemy with a Countdown, gain +3 Patience and +3 Rage.
KosakaWakamo.Skill/S_Wakamo_5_Description: If Rage equals exactly the current Patience, generate a random Wakamo-exclusive attack skill.
KosakaWakamo.Skill/S_Wakamo_LucyD_Description: This turn, each attack card drawn grants Wakamo +2 Rage, and each non-attack card grants Wakamo +2 Patience. Draw 2 skills.
KosakaWakamo.SkillExtended/S_Wakamo_8_Ex_Des: Repeat Wakamo's target non-rare attack skill once.
KosakaWakamo.SkillExtended/SkillEn_Wakamo_0_Des: When played, increase Wakamo's Rage based on this card's cost.
KosakaWakamo.SkillExtended/SkillEn_Wakamo_0_EnforceSt: When played, increase Wakamo's Rage based on this card's cost.
KosakaWakamo.SkillExtended/SkillEn_Wakamo_1_Des: When played, increase Wakamo's Patience based on this card's cost.
KosakaWakamo.SkillExtended/SkillEn_Wakamo_1_EnforceSt: When played, increase Wakamo's Patience based on this card's cost.

OtherworldInvestigatorChloe.Character/Chloe_CampSelectWord: The puppet was moving? Heh, very funny.
OtherworldInvestigatorChloe.Character/Chloe_PassiveDes:
When taking damage while near death, if Nina is not in Shutdown state, Nina takes the damage instead.
When Chloe is incapacitated, Nina is also incapacitated.
At the end of battle, if Nina's current HP (%) is lower than Chloe's, restore the difference.
This also applies when eating bread or recovering from an incapacitated state.

<color=#FF7C34FF>Shutdown</color>
When Nina would be incapacitated during battle, she enters Shutdown state instead.
At the start of the turn, if Nina's HP is 1 or above, Shutdown state is removed.
While in Shutdown state, skills and Fixed Abilities cannot be used, and any active Countdown skills are interrupted.
Additionally, single-target attacks directed at Nina are redirected to other allies.

<color=#919191>- This passive is available from level 1.</color>
OtherworldInvestigatorChloe.Character/Chloe_SelectInfo:
A puppeteer with a gentle smile and a calm demeanor, always warm and approachable. Her manner of dealing with people is remarkably soothing — she treats others almost like children, effortlessly making them lower their guard. Since she almost never shows irritation or anger, those around her see her as a gentle soul. Yet only when speaking with her puppet, Nina, does she occasionally reveal her true self.

Chloe deals direct damage to enemies while inflicting heavy Pain, and can unleash powerful firepower through Nina.

Chloe and Nina can only be selected when recruiting the first two members of the expedition, and will not appear in the campfire's Support Request.
OtherworldInvestigatorChloe.Character/Chloe_Text_Battle_Healed_0: We can't go down yet. Right?
OtherworldInvestigatorChloe.Character/Chloe_Text_Battle_Healed_1: If only the strings hadn't gotten tangled…
OtherworldInvestigatorChloe.Character/Chloe_Text_Battle_Kill_0: I didn't want it to come to this…
OtherworldInvestigatorChloe.Character/Chloe_Text_Battle_Kill_1: You've become just like a puppet.
OtherworldInvestigatorChloe.Character/Chloe_Text_Field_GetItem_0: I hope there are some spare parts in there…
OtherworldInvestigatorChloe.Character/Chloe_Text_Field_GetItem_1: If it's useful, we use it.
OtherworldInvestigatorChloe.Character/Chloe_Text_Field_Idle_1: Phew… Shall we rest for a bit, Nina?
OtherworldInvestigatorChloe.Character/Chloe_Text_Field_Idle_2: It's a little dirty over there. Come this way, Nina.
OtherworldInvestigatorChloe.Character/Chloe_Text_Field_Potion_P_1: Is it really… okay to drink this?
OtherworldInvestigatorChloe.Character/Nina_PassiveDes:
All shields applied to Nina also absorb <color=purple>Pain damage</color>.
Adaptive Shields generated by Nina also absorb <color=purple>Pain damage</color>.

<color=#FF7C34FF>Special Parts Box</color>
Upon gaining this passive, receive a special consumable that can be used to learn or replace a rare skill.

<color=#FF7C34FF>Living Marionette</color>
When eating bread or recovering from an incapacitated state, this effect also applies to Chloe.

<color=#919191>- This passive is available from level 1.</color>
OtherworldInvestigatorChloe.Character/Nina_SelectInfo:
The stone-faced puppet always at Chloe's side. Yet when Chloe gazes at Nina and whispers softly to her, Nina seems like far more than just a puppet. In those moments, it becomes difficult to tell whether Nina is an extension of Chloe, or whether Chloe is revealing her true self through Nina.

Nina has low HP, but compensates with high Evasion and shields. She can also deal exceptional damage through her synergy with Chloe.

Chloe and Nina can only be selected when recruiting the first two members of the expedition, and will not appear in the campfire's Support Request.
OtherworldInvestigatorChloe.Character_Skin/DutifulMaidChloe_SkinDesc: Please, leave the reception to us.
OtherworldInvestigatorChloe.Character_Skin/LuckyBunnyChloe_SkinDesc: Thank you for being by my side again this year.
OtherworldInvestigatorChloe.Character_Skin/OceanBreezeChloe_SkinDesc: The puppet theatre we've prepared is about to open its curtain before this great sea.
OtherworldInvestigatorChloe.Item_Consume/ItemChloe_Description:
Can only be used on Nina.
Can only be used if Nina has a rare skill, or if you have 1000 Gold and 3 Soul Stones.
Replaces Nina's current rare skill with the desired rare skill, or spends 1000 Gold and 3 Soul Stones to learn the desired rare skill.

OtherworldInvestigatorChloe.SkillExtended/SE_Common_CH_Des: Can be discarded to maintain Focus.
OtherworldInvestigatorChloe.SkillExtended/SkillEn_Chloe_0_Name: Can be discarded to maintain Focus.

OtherworldInvestigatorChloe.SkillExtended/SkillEn_Nina_1_Name: Apply the Shock debuff to all enemies (Accuracy -10%, Critical Hit Chance -10%, removed when an attack misses).
OtherworldInvestigatorChloe.SkillKeyword/SkillKeyword_Channeling_Des:
Effects trigger continuously until Focus is interrupted, activating once each time an enemy acts.
Using your own skill or Fixed Ability while channeling will interrupt Focus.
After an enemy acts, you may discard one of Chloe's or Nina's skills from hand (topmost or bottommost) to maintain Focus. If no skills can be discarded or you choose not to discard, Focus is interrupted.
OtherworldInvestigatorChloe.SkillKeyword/SkillKeyword_Spool_Desc:
Triggers an effect when a skill is discarded.
If multiple skills are discarded at once, only one effect triggers.
(Does not apply to discards caused by Exchange or a full hand.)
OtherworldInvestigatorChloe.Change_Text_Battle_Cri_Nina: Nina, aren't you getting a little carried away?
OtherworldInvestigatorChloe.Change_Text_Battle_Idle_0_0: Why is everyone so afraid of you?
OtherworldInvestigatorChloe.Change_Text_Battle_Idle_0_2: I don't want you to be hated…
OtherworldInvestigatorChloe.Change_Text_Battle_Idle_1_0: Is there something you'd like to say to me?
OtherworldInvestigatorChloe.Change_Text_Battle_Idle_1_1: Please, go out and meet more people!
OtherworldInvestigatorChloe.Change_Text_Battle_Idle_2_0: I just want to live a quiet life.
OtherworldInvestigatorChloe.Change_Text_Battle_Idle_2_1: Life doesn't always go according to plan, does it?
OtherworldInvestigatorChloe.Change_Text_Battle_Kill_Nina_0: This is the price of underestimating us.
OtherworldInvestigatorChloe.Change_Text_Battle_Kill_Nina_1: We take no pleasure in this.
OtherworldInvestigatorChloe.Change_Text_Battle_Start_0_0: Underestimate us, and you'll regret it.
OtherworldInvestigatorChloe.Change_Text_Battle_Start_0_1: Stupid! Fool! Come at us if you dare!
OtherworldInvestigatorChloe.Change_Text_Battle_Start_1_0: Please don't hold it against us.
OtherworldInvestigatorChloe.Change_Text_Battle_Start_1_1: I'll make sure you despise us!
OtherworldInvestigatorChloe.Change_Text_Battle_Start_1_2: Calm down... just a little. Alright?
OtherworldInvestigatorChloe.Change_Text_MasterTarget_Nina: Nina. Wait for me… I'm coming.
OtherworldInvestigatorChloe.Change_Text_PharosLeader_Chloe_2: Snap out of it, Chloe. This isn't right.
OtherworldInvestigatorChloe.Change_Text_PharosLeader_Nina_0: What…? The strings… are moving on their own…?
OtherworldInvestigatorChloe.Text_Cant_Only_Chloe: Could you make room for Nina too?
OtherworldInvestigatorChloe.Text_Cant_Only_Nina: I can't let Nina go with you alone.
OtherworldInvestigatorChloe.Text_SpoolWastePassive: Choose which Blade Weave / Spool effect to trigger.

When the End Turn button is pressed, if the Program Master's HP or posture is at or below &a <color=#FF7C34FF>(100% Attack Power)</color>, cast "Soul Vortex".

<color=#919191>Number of souls released: &b</color>
OtherworldInvestigatorAbigail.Character/Abigail_CampSelectWord: I can go anywhere, yet feel like I belong nowhere. Can you understand that feeling?
OtherworldInvestigatorAbigail.Character/Abigail_PassiveDes: This passive is available from level 1, and the Fixed Ability changes to "Summon Blade". At the start of the turn, if the enemy with the lowest HP does not have the "Coordinates" debuff, apply the "Coordinates" debuff. When the End Turn button is pressed, if an enemy's HP is at or below half of your Attack Power, cast "Soul Reap" on the one with the lowest HP (50% Attack Power, ignores Defense, cannot be evaded). If you kill an enemy during battle... If the enemy with the lowest HP does not have the "Coordinates" debuff, apply the "Coordinates" debuff. Gain the "Dimensional Rift" buff (evade one attack). For the rest of the battle, Attack Power increases by 1.
OtherworldInvestigatorAbigail.Character/Abigail_SelectInfo:
She is the sole survivor of a horrific accident. When the accident occurred, Abigail was swallowed by the void, but miraculously survived. However, the accident cost her all of her family, leaving her utterly alone. Weary of wandering and loneliness, she often thought of returning to that empty place, to fade away with her grief and solitude.
At that moment, someone appeared and stopped her. She told Abigail that the accident was not her fault, and gave her a reason to live. And so Abigail set foot on Lumia Island, to fulfill a promise she made to that person.

Abigail is an offensive investigator who targets enemy back rows with combo attacks, and unleashes more power with each kill.
OtherworldInvestigatorAbigail.Character/Abigail_Text_Battle_Idle_1: If you fall asleep in a place like that, you'll catch a cold.
OtherworldInvestigatorAbigail.Character/Abigail_Text_Battle_ND_0: Ah... I pushed myself... too hard.
OtherworldInvestigatorAbigail.Character/Abigail_Text_Battle_Start_0: Things through to the end. Are you ready?
OtherworldInvestigatorAbigail.Character/Abigail_Text_Field_Idle_0: A quiet place... I don't mind.
OtherworldInvestigatorAbigail.Character/Abigail_Text_Field_Potion_P_0: I'll make good use of this.
OtherworldInvestigatorAbigail.Character/Abigail_Text_MasterTarget: The rest... I'll leave to you.
OtherworldInvestigatorAbigail.Character_Skin/PokerFaceBunnyAbigail_OI_: Care to have a match with a bunny?
OtherworldInvestigatorAbigail.Character_Skin/PrisonKeeperAbigail_OI_Sk: If you've done wrong, you should be punished, don't you think?
OtherworldInvestigatorAbigail.Character_Skin/TropicalDimensionAbigail_: Do you like the sea at night?
